Name: Dasa
Description:
A Dasa é uma das maiores empresas de saúde do mundo, líder em medicina diagnóstica no Brasil. Trabalha para transformar sua especialização, alcance e escala em acesso à saúde de qualidade e cuidado humanizado.

A empresa faz parte da vida de mais de 20 milhões de pessoas por ano, com alta tecnologia, amplo portfólio de exames e serviços e foco na melhor experiência em saúde. Com mais de 25 mil colaboradores e mais de 350 mil médicos parceiros, processa mais de 414 milhões de exames por ano em suas mais de 40 marcas presentes em todo o território nacional.

Essa capilaridade única torna a Dasa a companhia de saúde que mais se relaciona com as pessoas, oferecendo soluções conectadas à realidade e à diversidade do país. Com uma governança baseada em gestão disciplinada e capacidade de execução, a empresa avança como uma organização inovadora, focada e sustentável, sempre pautada pela excelência médica e pelo compromisso com a sustentabilidade do setor da saúde.

Name: Quest Diagnostics
Description:
Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX) empowers people to take action to improve health outcomes.  Derived from the world's largest database of clinical lab results, our diagnostic insights reveal new avenues to identify and treat disease, inspire healthy behaviors and improve health care management.  Quest annually serves one in three adult Americans and half the physicians and hospitals in the United States, and our 47,000 employees understand that, in the right hands and with the right context, our diagnostic insights can inspire actions that transform lives.

The company offers physicians the broadest test menu (3,000+ tests), is a pioneer in developing innovative new tests, is the leader in cancer diagnostics, provides anatomic pathology (AP) services, & interpretive consultation through its medical & scientific staff of about 900 M.D.s & Ph.D.s. The company reported 2020 revenues of $9.44 billion. 

Quest Diagnostics offers the most extensive clinical testing network in the U.S., with laboratories in most major metropolitan areas, & in Mexico, the UK & India. The company also operates four esoteric laboratories, 40 outpatient AP laboratories, & 160 smaller, rapid-response laboratories. 

Patients may have specimens collected in any of the company’s approximately 2,250 patient service centers. On a typical workday, testing is performed for about 550,000 patients. 

Quest Diagnostics empowers healthcare organizations & clinicians with state-of-the-art connectivity solutions. 

The company is the leading provider of pre-employment drugs-of-abuse screening for employers & risk assessment services for the life insurance industry. It is the world’s 2nd largest provider of clinical trials testing for new pharmaceuticals.

More information is available at www.questdiagnostics.com.

Name: FEMME - Laboratório da Mulher
Description:
O FEMME - Laboratório da Mulher é um laboratório de medicina diagnóstica especializado na saúde da mulher. Desde sua concepção tem como foco a prevenção de doenças femininas, como o câncer de mama e câncer ginecológico.  Além disso, todas as estruturas do laboratório são pensadas especialmente no conforto e bem-estar da mulher.

Possui acreditação nível III em excelência pela ONA (Organização Nacional de Acreditação).

Lidar com vidas, sentimentos e emoções é um privilégio, por isso criamos um jeito encantador de atender nossas clientes, o Jeito FEMME de atender.

Desenvolvimento de Carreira é um dos nossos pilares. Pensando nisso, temos áreas especializadas e uma variedade de treinamentos e trilhas de aprendizagem que auxiliam a capacitação do nosso Time. Além disso, por meio do nosso Comitê de Sustentabilidade, discutimos e implementamos iniciativas para que a responsabilidade socioambiental permeie as ações internas e externas da companhia, de modo a proporcionar um impacto positivo à sociedade e ao meio ambiente. 
 
Sabemos que uma organização é composta por pessoas e cada um de nós possui o seu jeito de ser, sua identidade de gênero, crença, cor, raça, estilos e valores. Aqui no Femme temos uma Política de Diversidade e Inclusão e estamos trabalhando diariamente para tornar o nosso ambiente de trabalho mais inclusivo e diverso. Então, se você quer fazer a diferença e nos ajudar a construir essa missão, venha fazer parte do nosso Time.

https://femme-laboratoriodamulher.pandape.com.br/

#TIMEFEMME

Name: Tricog Health
Description:
Tricog is on a mission to empower healthcare providers with virtual cardiac diagnostic tools and services that help them in the accurate, timely, and consistent diagnosis of heart conditions.  

Tricog products - InstaECG and InstaEcho are diagnostic solutions for ECG and Echocardiogram built by combining artificial intelligence and medical expertise to process digital data and deliver an accurate and timely diagnosis of cardiac conditions to save lives. 

Tricog's vision is to become the world's most trusted diagnostic brand enabling the prediction and detection of cardiovascular ailments.

Tricog operates in 14+ countries and has been used by more than 5000+ physicians to treat 10 million + patients and saved 4 lakh+ lives using artificial intelligence and medical expertise.

Name: Metropolis Healthcare
Description:
We believe that every human being deserves to know the truth about their inner health.

We are Metropolis - Your Pathology Specialist,  delivering millions of tests every year while catering to so many patients, leading laboratories, Hospitals, Nursing homes and 2,00,000 doctors. With over 35 years of experience in delivering accurate reports, Metropolis has earned the reputation of being India's most respected and only multinational chain of diagnostic centres with presence in UAE, Sri Lanka, South Africa, Kenya, Mauritius and Ghana. 

Metropolis follows a rigorous 8-Stage MET Protocol that ensures the most comprehensive testing for accurate and reliable reports. Metropolis offers diagnostic and wellness services like Blood tests, Clinical Trials, Hospital Lab Management, Home Health Services, Preventive Health Check-ups and Corporate & Wellness Solutions. 

Metropolis is at the forefront in adopting cutting edge technologies and services that cater to patients needs. Driven to make a difference and provide quality & affordable services to our consumers we have a wide network that includes 115+ state-of-art Laboratories across India with over 1500 collection centres, processing over 4000 varieties of tests and supported by an efficient team of more than 4500 people. 

Today, we are one of the few laboratories that has received the CAP (College of American Pathologists), accreditation, the global gold standard in Laboratory Accreditation. Most of our laboratories in India have received the NABL Accreditation (National Accreditation Board for testing and Calibration Laboratories). In addition, the central laboratory in Mumbai also adheres to CLIA (Clinical Laboratory Improvement Amendments) program and also follows the guidelines laid by GCP and GLP. Our unit in South Africa is accredited by SANAS (South African National Accreditation System is the only accreditation body approved by South African Government).

Name: Redcliffe Labs
Description: Redcliffe Labs is a purpose-driven, pan-India diagnostics provider dedicated to Giving India its Right to Quality Diagnostics. Operating across 220+ cities with a network of 80+ advanced labs and 2000+ collection centers, we deliver trusted healthcare solutions to Tier 1, 2, and 3 cities and beyond. Our convenient home collection services bring diagnostics directly to patients' doorsteps, ensuring accessibility and ease. With over 50 stringent quality checks performed regularly to ensure 100% report accuracy, Redcliffe Labs has served over 7 million patients and remains steadfast in advancing precise, reliable, and accessible diagnostics, setting new standards of healthcare excellence across Bharat.

Name: Dandy
Description:
Dandy was created with one goal in mind: to modernize the dental lab process.

We’re the first solution of its kind. Our platform is designed to level up practices by making the entire process effortlessly digital — from start to finish.

*All recruiting emails will come from email addresses ending in @meetdandy.com

Name: Thyrocare Technologies Ltd.
Description:
Why is Thyrocare more than just a workplace? Because we are not just diagnostics; we are also a place that values every life, be it one within those vials or the ones making this happen. We’re also a Great Place to Work Certified organization. That means we don’t just deliver healthcare; we invest in people.

Founded in 1996, we’ve built India’s foremost IT-enabled, 24x7, fully automated clinical laboratory. We operate from a central processing lab in Mumbai, 21 regional, 2 zonal, 5 satellite processing, & 3 Hybrid labs pan India.

Starting with only thyroid testing, today, we’re not only proud of our 1200+ vast test menu, but also our national network & global-quality certifications. We are the first Indian diagnostic laboratory to obtain internationally renowned quality accreditations, like ISO 9001-2000 in 2001 (now ISO 9001:2015), CAP certification in 2007 & NABL. 

What Makes Working Here Different?
1. We believe in Delivery Not Hierarchy: Your ideas matter, we foster open dialogue & ownership at every level.
2. Learn From Mistakes: A culture of continuous improvement helps you become your best.
3. Demanding yet Rewarding: Your growth depends on your performance & learning.
4. Good Ideas Will Be Backed: Your word matters. If you have an Idea, we support you.
5. Grow Further: Wins are collective, teamwork drives success

USP’s:
1. 100% Samples processed in NABL-accredited labs
2. 9/10 Doctors trust that Thyrocare reports are Accurate & Reliable (As per a survey on doctors' perception of laboratory diagnostics (IJARIIT, 2023)
3. 98% Reports released within 06 hrs of samples reaching the lab
4. 7400+ Centers Pan India & 570+ Districts served

Brands:
1. Aarogyam, a flagship preventive healthcare series
2. Jaanch offers doctor-curated specialised packages for the management of lifestyle disorders.
3. Her Check an extensive range of packages for Women’s Reproductive Health.

Join us to grow, be valued & shape the future of diagnostics.

Name: SYNLAB Italia
Description:
synlab Italia è un network sanitario che opera a livello locale, nazionale ed internazionale ed è riconosciuta in Italia e all'estero come una tra le prime dieci aziende europee attive nella medicina di laboratorio.
 
Attraverso le proprie unità operative, da oltre trent'anni synlab svolge:
Attività di laboratorio analisi
Diagnostica specialistica
Service di laboratorio, in Italia e all'estero.

Name: Alliança
Description:
Seja bem-vindo(a) à Alliança - Excelência em Saúde!

Somos a Alliança Saúde*, um Grupo composto por 15 marcas de referência em diagnósticos por imagem, exames laboratoriais, exames genéticos, medicina nuclear e vacinas.

Com mais de 5 mil colaboradores e cerca de 1,2 mil médicos parceiros, estamos presentes em 13 estados brasileiros, com 116 unidades de atendimento. Formamos uma Alliança pela qualidade, inovação e alta eficiência no cuidado com os nossos pacientes.

Nossos centros de medicina diagnóstica pelo Brasil são:
· Axial, Nuclear, São Judas Tadeu e Cedimagem (Minas Gerais)
· CDB e Plani (São Paulo)
· Cedimagem, ProEcho e Cepem (Rio de Janeiro)
· CSD (Pará)
· Delfin (Bahia, Paraíba e Rio Grande do Norte)
· Di Imagem e Multilab (Mato Grosso do Sul)
· Multilab (AM)
· Multiscan (Espírito Santo)
· Sabedotti (Paraná)

Entendemos que alianças criam vínculos. E os vínculos nos tornam mais fortes. É nisso que nós acreditamos e investimos. Por isso, atuamos para transformar a medicina, tornando-a cada vez mais humana, acessível e de qualidade.

Para conhecer mais sobre nossas marcas e descobrir como estamos revolucionando o setor de saúde no Brasil, acesse nosso site.

Juntos, construímos uma Alliança cada vez mais forte.

RT: Dr. Ricardo Sartim - CRM SP 129.559

*O Grupo Alliança e Alliança Saúde não utilizam a marca ALLIANÇA nos Estados da Bahia e do Sergipe para identificação de seus produtos e serviços e não são marcas e/ou empresas relacionadas, direta ou indiretamente, com o Grupo Rede D’Or São Luiz S.A., Hospital Esperança S.A., Hospital Aliança, Centro Médico Aliança e/ou CAP – Centro Aliança De Pediatria.

Name: Neuberg Diagnostics
Description:
Neuberg Diagnostics, headquartered in Chennai, is one of India’s leading diagnostic service providers, with its presence in India, UAE, South Africa and USA. The laboratories are accredited by CAP & NABL. The group has created accessibility to state of the art diagnostic technologies and possesses some of the finest clinical Pathologists, Biochemists, Geneticists and several other certified clinical lab professionals, with the capability to perform over 6000 varieties of pathological investigations. 
To know more, visit: www.neubergdiagnostics.com

Name: SYNLAB Portugal
Description:
O Grupo SYNLAB é o líder europeu em serviços de laboratório médico. 

Estamos presentes em mais de 36 países e em 4 continentes, e dispomos de uma gama completa de serviços de laboratório médico a utentes, profissionais de saúde, clínicas e indústria farmacêutica. Disponibilizamos acesso local e aconselhamento personalizado aos nossos clientes usufruindo, simultaneamente, da ampla experiência e conhecimento da SYNLAB internacional.

Em 2015, mudámos o nome, mas mantemos a nossa equipa, valores e essência de cada um dos laboratórios que adquirimos ao longo dos anos. Os utentes são o foco do nosso trabalho, e a nossa missão é proporcionar os melhores serviços possíveis.

Name: LABORATORIO ECHEVARNE
Description:
Formamos parte de Grupo Echevarne, holding empresarial que opera en el sector Salud y que ofrece sus servicios en el ámbito Asistencial, Diagnóstico y Prevención.

En Laboratorio Echevarne destacamos por la innovación tecnológica y la adaptación a las necesidades de nuestros clientes.

Actuamos en las áreas Clínica (análisis clínicos, estudios clínicos y anatomía patológica), Veterinaria e Industria.
Nuestra misión es aportar profesionales y tecnología al servicio de la salud y bienestar de las personas.
Contamos con más de 800 profesionales en 49 centros en España y Andorra.  

Queremos ser un partner de confianza para nuestros clientes, enfocando nuestra atención a sus necesidades y facilitando la accesibilidad a nuestros servicios. Las líneas estratégicas para lograrlo son: el desarrollo de las personas, el rigor científico y la orientación al cliente.

Política redes sociales: http://bit.ly/2JSoZn7

Name: BAYAN MEDICAL COMPANY
Description: BAYAN MEDICAL COMPANY offers services and MedTech devices to healthcare professionals, from equipment and medical devices to professional values, our services help HCP, most importantly, improve patients care.

Name: Laboratorio Cibic
Description:
Nuestros Valores 

Excelencia analítica: El concepto de eficacia y eficiencia para obtener informes de análisis con utilidad clínica, es fundamental para diferenciarnos en la calidad de los resultados. 

Excelencia en los servicios: Sustentamos nuestro slogan “Mucho más que el resultado de un análisis” anticipándonos a las expectativas de nuestros pacientes y clientes, aplicando la mejora continua en pos de brindar servicios de excelencia y diferenciarnos de la competencia. 

Compromiso con los pacientes: Entendemos que nada es más importante que el compromiso total con nuestros pacientes y clientes y que ese es el sello distintivo de CIBIC. 

Innovación: Asumimos los costos y riesgos que implican mantenerse a la vanguardia en nuevas tecnologías, entendiendo que es el camino más adecuado para la mejora continua de nuestros procesos. 

Historia: CIBIC y sus profesionales son reconocidos a nivel nacional e internacional por ser referentes en el campo de la Bioquímica Clínica.

Name: Biomega Medicina Diagnóstica
Description: A Biomega traz em seu DNA mais de 30 anos de experiência na área da saúde, com foco na excelência em prestação de serviços laboratoriais com alta tecnologia, rapidez e eficiência, atendendo o mercado público e instituições sociais e filantrópicas.

Name: Labmedicina
Description:
Laboratorio de Medicina es una organización con más de 40 años de trayectoria en investigación en el ámbito de la salud y en la prestación asistencial a pacientes, bioquímicos, sanatorios y centros de diagnóstico.

Fue fundada bajo dos lineamientos rectores: bioquímica clínica de alta complejidad y atención personalizada al cliente.
Labmedicina trabaja en el marco de un sistema de gestión de la calidad según la norma ISO 15189 "Requisitos para la calidad y la competencia de los laboratorios análisis clínicos”.

Contamos con ocho sedes ubicadas en CABA.

Equipado con la más alta tecnología, nuestra Planta de Procesamiento, tiene un sistema pre-analítico para la trazabilidad de las muestras; tubo único con código de barra; seroteca y transferencia electrónica de resultados que nos permite la máxima confiabilidad. De esta manera abastece como laboratorio de referencia la demanda de alta complejidad de 500 laboratorios en todo el país; centros de diálisis y la atención de pacientes de obras sociales y medicinas prepagas.

Name: CENTRO MEDICO DERAGOPYAN
Description: Somos un centro médico integral especializado en diagnóstico por imágenes, con sedes en Belgrano y Pilar. Con sofisticada tecnología y un equipo profesional de excelencia que avala sus resultados, trabajamos con procesos que garantizan altos estándares de calidad certificados por las normas ISO: 9001:2008 para que usted se sienta cuidado.
Location: Comuna 13, Autonomous City of Buenos Aires

Name: CentraLab
Description:
Somos el laboratorio líder en Argentina. Tenemos la mayor capacidad de procesamiento del país, el menor tiempo de respuesta e innovación tecnológica con acreditaciones y certificaciones internacionales.

Nuestro Laboratorio Central es un modelo único en el mercado de la salud nacional: trabaja con los más altos estándares de calidad, está provisto con equipos analíticos de vanguardia y cuenta con la mayor capacidad de procesamiento del país gracias a su sistema de automatización total. Atendemos a más de 7.000 pacientes por día en nuestras 25 sedes propias.

En CentraLab trabajamos día a día con compromisos muy claros: apostar a la innovación constante, a la tecnología y a la capacitación continua de nuestros profesionales.

Name: BIOGROUP
Description:
Premier groupement de laboratoires détenu et dirigé exclusivement par des biologistes, dont la connaissance métier et le professionnalisme constituent sa force. 

Biogroup, acteur majeur français de la biologie médicale de proximité, prend en charge plus de 100 000 patients chaque jour et propose un panel de plus de 2 000 examens biologiques de routine et spécialisés, réalisés in situ sur les plateaux techniques régionaux. 

L’équipe de biologistes médicaux compétents et qualifiés, suit des formations continues et régulières. Elle se tient à votre service pour vous apporter expertise et conseils de qualité. Des moyens techniques performants et innovants, à la pointe de la technologie, couvrent nos domaines d’analyses courantes et spécialisées.

Name: Millennium Health
Description: Millennium Health is an accredited specialty laboratory with over 15 years of experience delivering timely, accurate, clinically-actionable information through our nationwide medication monitoring and drug testing services. Drug testing is used by substance use disorder and pain management providers to obtain objective information about patients’ recent use of prescription medications and/or illicit drugs and helps monitor the effectiveness of treatment plans. Processing over a million patient specimens each year allows us to provide meaningful insights into emerging drug use trends. Visit millenniumhealth.com for more information.

Name: SYNLAB International
Description:
SYNLAB Group is the leader in medical diagnostic services and specialty testing in Europe. The Group offers a full range of innovative and reliable medical diagnostics to patients, practising doctors, hospitals and clinics, governments, and corporates.

SYNLAB operates in more than 20 countries across four continents. More than 24,000 employees, including over 2,000 medical experts, contribute every day to the Group’s worldwide success.

Name: Vyttra
Description:
Somos a Vyttra, referência em soluções para diagnósticos e Especialista em Laboratórios. Nosso propósito é cuidar da saúde das pessoas com as melhores soluções em diagnóstico.

Distribuímos e desenvolvemos soluções orientadas pela inovação e a alta tecnologia, para que laboratórios e hospitais ofereçam o melhor diagnóstico aos seus pacientes.

Name: Laboratorio Argenetics
Description:
Laboratorio ARGENETICS es una compañía sustentada en los últimos avances tecnológicos orientados a diagnósticos más precisos, con fundamentos científicos en las áreas de salud y de las ciencias de la vida.
 
Sus recursos únicos ofrecen las herramientas necesarias para que los profesionales de la salud puedan brindar una adecuada prevención de enfermedades y establecer precisión en los tratamientos médicos. Especialmente por estar basados en datos genómicos, cuyo propósito es mejorar la salud y la calidad de vida de  las personas.
 
ARGENETICS es una organización nacional, con la capacidad de brindar servicios a la región de Latinoamérica y proyectar sus avances y conocimientos a nivel global.

Name: RADCARE
Description:
Redcare Company, established in 2022 as a Saudi limited liability company, provides an extensive range of medical imaging services.

Services: 
• Traditional X-rays
• Ultrasound examinations for various bodily areas like the heart and blood vessels
• Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI)
• Positron Emission Tomography (PET)
• CT scans
• Electrocardiograms (EKG)
• Electroencephalograms (EEG)
• Advanced radiation therapy for tumor treatment, utilizing the latest and most precise devices in the field

Name: CERBA
Description:
FR//
Créé en 1967, accrédité selon la norme NF ISO 15189 depuis 1999, CERBA est le leader européen de la biologie médicale spécialisée. 
Concentrant plus de 40 spécialités médicales et employant plus de 600 personnes hautement qualifiées sur un site unique basé au nord-ouest de Paris, le laboratoire CERBA traite en moyenne 40 000 prélèvements par jour. Sa plateforme technologique de pointe lui permet de proposer aux laboratoires privés et hospitaliers sur plus de 50 pays un large panel d’examens de biologie spécialisée. 
CERBA développe constamment son potentiel technologique et humain et initie de nombreuses collaborations avec des structures publiques et privées pour être à la pointe de l’innovation. Depuis 1998, les équipes de CERBA ont participé à plus de 500 publications scientifiques.
CERBA est par ailleurs le membre fondateur du groupe CERBA HEALTHCARE

EN//
Created in 1967 and accredited in compliance with the NF ISO 15189 standard since 1999, CERBA is the European leader in specialized clinical pathology. Integrating more than 40 medical specialties and employing over 600 highly qualified staff on a single site located to the north-west of Paris, on average CERBA handles some 40,000 dossiers daily. 
With a state-of-the-art technological platform, it is able to offer private and hospital laboratories in over 50 countries a wide range of specialized clinical pathology tests. 
CERBA ceaselessly works to develop its technological and human potential and has launched numerous collaborative projects with both public and private establishments to ensure it always remains on the leading-edge of innovation. Since 1998, CERBA's pathologists have contributed to over 500 scientific publications. 
CERBA is also a founder member of the CERBA HEALTHCARE group.

Name: Variantyx
Description:
Variantyx is a technology-driven precision medicine company providing state-of-the-art diagnostic solutions for the rare genetic disorders and reproductive genetics markets, and treatment optimization in oncology.

Our unique, comprehensive testing platform uses whole genome sequencing to identify all major genetic changes from a single sample. The results empower patients and providers with information that can rapidly end the challenging diagnostic search, optimize treatment, and improve quality of life.

We are a diverse, multinational company that embodies professionalism, transparency, tenacity, and respect. See more with us: www.variantyx.com/.

Name: Cerballiance
Description:
Cerballiance est un réseau de Laboratoires de Biologie Médicale implantés en France et sur l’Ile de la Réunion.
Cerballiance est l’union de laboratoires connus et reconnus pour la qualité de leurs prestations et leur implication dans l’offre de soins, au niveau local ou régional. 
Ainsi, de la biologie de 1ère intention à la biologie spécialisée, de la prévention au dépistage, du diagnostic au suivi des traitements, le réseau Cerballiance compte plus de 400 laboratoires et s’engage à vous accompagner, vous conseiller tout au long de votre parcours de soins et à innover au service de votre santé.

Name: Eurofins España
Description:
Eurofins España es uno de los mayores laboratorios de diagnóstico clínico de España. Con más de 35 años de experiencia y una trayectoria acreditada, actualmente es líder nacional en pruebas diagnósticas de análisis clínicos y anatomía patológica. Además, lidera la gestión de laboratorios intra-hospitalarios en España con presencia en más de 70 hospitales que dan servicio 24 horas los 356 días del año. 

Realiza más de 50 millones de análisis anualmente y ofrece alrededor de 5.000 tipos de test diferentes.

Su teléfono de contacto es el 914 202 205

Para más información: https://eurofins-megalab.com/

Name: Engravida Clínica de Reprodução Humana
Description:
Utilizando as inovações técnicas em favor da vida e da família, a Clínica Engravida investe nos laboratórios, aparelhos de ultrassom até a estação de trabalho da manipulação de gametas, unindo uma infraestrutura completa a um atendimento personalizado. Unidades em São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, Brasília,  Salvador, Manaus, Juiz de Fora, Bauru e Vitória. 

O cuidado individual dos pacientes e a atenção às necessidades de cada um é o elemento essencial de trabalho dos médicos, que prezam, antes de tudo, pela assistência à vida. Ética juntamente com a excelência em serviço e o cuidado com os pacientes, são os pilares da clínica.

Name: DELFI Diagnostics
Description: DELFI uses AI, machine learning and whole genome sequencing to sensitively detect unique patterns of DNA fragmentation in the blood of patients with cancer.

Name: Laboratório Biofast
Description: x

Name: Eurofins Biomnis
Description:
European leader in the sector of specialized medical pathology, Eurofins Biomnis carries out over 32,000
analyses per day from a range of over 2,500 available tests, including specialized tests for which the company
has the appropriate authorizations.
Founded in 1897 by Marcel Mérieux, Eurofins Biomnis remains the leader in the field of specialized medical
pathology in France. It has kept its position through continuous technological innovation and investment,
particularly in areas such as female biology, oncology and personalized medicine, as well as chromosomal and molecular genetics.
The laboratory also stands out through its expertise in clinical research and biobanking, thanks to its dedicated infrastructure.
With 120 years of expertise and innovation in the service of medical pathology, Eurofins Biomnis is the core of the Clinical Diagnostics division in Europe and has its eyes set on its international development.

Name: SYNLAB Colombia
Description: Brindamos una oferta integral de servicios de Laboratorio Clínico y Medicina Laboral dirigido a pacientes, médicos, compañías aseguradoras, hospitales, clínicas, empresas y otros laboratorio.

Name: Krsnaa Diagnostics Ltd
Description:
Krsnaa Diagnostics Ltd. is the largest PPP player in diagnostics healthcare in India.  

We are vanguard of patient care & technology excellence with an accuracy of test results to ensure precise patient diagnosis.

We are the largest PAN India diagnostic (radiology & pathology) service provider operational from Kashmir to Kanyakumari.

We offer latest technologies with qualified and committed staff. We provide fast & affordable diagnostic services.

Name: SYNLAB UK & Ireland
Description:
At SYNLAB, we provide laboratory, diagnostic and advisory services to a diverse range of sectors, from healthcare, wellness and veterinary, to food, family law and transport. We carry out over 25 million tests every year and employ more than 1,300 people across the UK and Ireland.

We pride ourselves on the positive difference we make to people, animals, the environment, workplaces and other consumers by providing reliable, effective and timely diagnostic information. 

Our extensive network of laboratories offers thousands of different types of tests. These include routine blood, toxicology, food, fuel, water and soil analysis through to cutting edge molecular and genetic testing. 

At SYNLAB, we are committed to advancing scientific and clinical practice through innovation, research and development. All our laboratories comply with industry standards and hold the accreditations relevant to their field of work.

We are proud to work with the NHS through a number of hospital partnerships. These combine clinical excellence with the very best in innovation and transformation. SYNLAB’s involvement has enabled the NHS to realise a number of benefits, such as major improvements to patient services, better value for money and access to state-of-the-art laboratories and diagnostic services. 

SYNLAB UK & Ireland is part of SYNLAB Group, Europe’s leading medical diagnostic services provider.

Description: SMT LABS are state-of-the-art microbiological testing laboratories. We’re SANAS accredited and DALRRD approved. Our core values and the pillars of our business is our focus on accuracy and ethical conduct, which is why SMT LABS uses the latest technologies and testing methods to guarantee fast yet accurate results. Our Technical Signatories are also highly trained and experienced and provide 24/7 assistance with enquiries concerning results and personal feedback. Name: Eurofins Biologie Médicale
Description:
Les laboratoires d'analyses médicales au service de la santé des patients.

Eurofins Biologie Médicale est le réseau de laboratoires de biologie médicale en France métropolitaine et départements d'outre-mer du Groupe Eurofins.

Avec plus de 280 laboratoires d'analyses médicales, la mission d’Eurofins Biologie Médicale et de ses collaborateurs est de proposer jour après jour une offre de soins de qualité : de l’accueil et l’accompagnement des patients au rendu des résultats d’examens dans les meilleurs délais.

 Les laboratoires Eurofins Biologie Médicale favorisent la prévention et le dépistage, des diagnostics plus précoces et plus précis, une prise en charge thérapeutique plus efficace, plus rapide et plus sûre.

 Eurofins Biologie Médicale travaille étroitement avec Eurofins Biomnis pour la réalisation de l'ensemble de ses analyses spécialisées et propose ainsi un catalogue exhaustif avec les examens de biologie médicale les plus innovants et à la pointe de la technologie.

 Grâce à l’engagement de l’ensemble des collaborateurs, Eurofins Biologie Médicale a réduit de 20% ses émissions de CO2 en 2022 !
En 2020, le groupe Eurofins a annoncé son objectif de neutralité carbone d’ici 2025.

Name: DermTech, LLC

Name: AMPATH (American Institute of Pathology and Laboratory Sciences)
Description:
AMPATH (AMERICAN INSTITUTE OF PATHOLOGY AND LABORATORY SCIENCES PRIVATE LIMITED) is the only lab in India to bring international standard pathology services to ensure accurate, reliable and on-time diagnosis, in the shortest possible time.

We are known for consistent quality-driven operations through the systematic implementation of effective quality management systems. Besides offering a comfortable phlebotomy experience to our customers, our goal is to contribute to the well-being of the communities we serve.

AMPATH's Central Reference Laboratory, located in Hyderabad and 22+ satellite labs are at different locations. With customer centricity, quality and accurate diagnosis being central to our brand philosophy, our vision is to become a global network of a highly automated and sophisticated chain of labs, synonymous with cutting-edge technology, reliability and above all, stringent ethical practices.

Our network of NABL (National Accreditation Board for Testing & Calibration Laboratories) accredited labs, spread across the country has serviced 1700+ clients. AMPATH offers 2600+ tests in addition to a gamut of routine, wellness and preventive tests that includes Clinical Biochemistry, Hematology, Clinical Pathology, Microbiology, Immuno Phenotyping, Serology, Immunology, Histopathology, Cytology and Cytogenesis, etc. These specialized tests are used for disease monitoring, detection, confirmation and prognosis.

La experiencia en el mercado nacional de más de quince años de servicios en el área de la Medicina de Laboratorio orientada a la confiabilidad y uso clinico de la información generada en un marco de Seguridad del Paciente soportada en nuestro sólido Sistema de Gestión de la Calidad con "triple reconocimiento internacional" se mantiene y se fortalce con el "know how" internacional de ser parte de Synlab Solution in diagnostics internacional, con presencia en Europa, Asia y Amèrica, donde se aglutinan los Más importantes profesionales en el ámbito de los servicios de diagnóstico en salud.

We are here to redefine and revolutionize the cancer paradigm by creating innovative solutions that empower healthcare professionals around the world. Cancer is a shared enemy of our society and transforming its detection will enable us to save millions of lives.

At Blueberry Diagnostics, we lead cancer detection with a groundbreaking set of early cancer detection and diagnosis confirmation tests (Laboratory Developed Tests – LDTs), based on routine blood and urine analyses and powered by our Deep Learning (DL) algorithms that deliver unprecedented rates of accuracy and magnificent advantages for all involved stakeholders.

Our state-of-the-art solutions masterfully integrate the principles of scientific methodology to deliver outstanding cancer testing sensitivity and specificity. They rely on solid evidence and data, and the technological knowledge that leverages our own developed AI-powered algorithms to maximize the accuracy and efficiency of every test.

We are setting the new gold standard for cancer detection. Because early detection saves lives.

Essa filosofia de trabalho norteou os rumos da clínica desde então e é responsável pelo respeito que a empresa adquiriu na comunidade médica e entre os seus pacientes.

Com seus mais de 40 anos de tradição e com duas unidades no coração de Icaraí, em Niterói, a clínica é referência em exames por imagem no Estado do Rio de Janeiro, em função da qualidade de seu corpo clínico e técnico e de sua tecnologia de ponta.

It seeks to address the shortage of skilled parasitologists, combat corruption, and promote strong leadership among laboratory scientists in Sudan and around the world.

Description:
We have the most recognized "patient-friendly" MRI. Our state-of-the-art system is unlike any other. Not only is it completely bright and open, but its revolutionary design allows you to simply walk in and be scanned...no dark tubes...no tight, enclosed spaces...no claustrophobia, and no sedation! 

Equally exciting is the advanced technology behind the Upright MRI. Now, for the first time, patients can be scanned in a variety of positions including standing, sitting, bending, and laying down. Even more importantly, with Upright MRI, patients can be scanned in weight-bearing positions (and in their position of symptoms) providing the most accurate picture of the spine and joints to pinpoint the problem.

Our MRI scan is 70% quieter than other MRIs. Is designed to scan patients in a variety of positions.

Possui no seu DNA fatores indispensáveis para quem atua no segmento de saúde: respeito, agilidade, tecnologia e qualidade.
Com diversos espaços de coleta localizados em Fortaleza e Maracanaú o Laboratório realiza exames de análises clínicas em geral, atuando também nas áreas de toxicologia, biologia molecular e genética.

“Sabendo que os exames laboratoriais ajudam em aproximadamente 70% das decisões médicas, o Laboratório Omnilab visa auxiliar no diagnóstico e no tratamento de doenças, assim como na prevenção, com o fornecimento de resultados com qualidade por meio da análise de material biológico”, afirma Paula Philomeno Leal Viana, diretora do laboratório.

O Laboratório Omnilab possui o Certificado de Acreditação de Laboratórios Clínicos – PALC, emitido pela Sociedade Brasileira de Patologia Clínica – SBPC, reforçando o seu compromisso com a qualidade e a segurança dos pacientes.

Name: AVMLabs
Description:
Our journey in laboratory testing began in 1995 with a vision to offer premium, cost-effective, quick, and reliable laboratory testing services for healthcare providers, ensuring timely and precise treatment. After establishing ourselves as the leading diagnostic brand in India, specializing in clinical biochemistry and wellness under the brand "Thyrocare", with laser-sharp focus on Hormones, Vitamins, and Wellness, we expanded into the GCC region in 2012, establishing our first Lab in Bahrain.

With over 30 years of experience and expertise, processing over tests daily from more than 400 towns and cities worldwide, and backed by a dedicated team of clinicians, technicians, and trained staff members, we extended the best-in-class laboratory testing services to our clients in Bahrain. Our expansions included starting of operations in Dubai in 2018, followed by Muscat and Khobar in 2022, and further in Riyadh in 2023.

Following a successful IPO and exit from the Indian market, we have rebranded our GCC business as " AVMLabs " Present in four countries across five locations – Bahrain, Dubai, Khobar, Riyadh, and Muscat – our labs are equipped with state-of-the-art technologies from global leaders like Siemens, Beckman Coulter, Bio-Rad, and more, with globally recognized accreditation from the College of American Pathologists (CAP).

Our mission is to alleviate the burden of laboratory testing for healthcare providers of all sizes and specializations, allowing them to focus on delivering quality care and treatment. As healthcare evolves from sick-care to preventive-care, timely diagnosis and periodic monitoring become crucial for improved patient care. AVMLabs specializes in a range of diagnostics, including hormonal imbalances, comprehensive wellness checks, chronic illnesses, metabolic disorders and high-end clinical chemistry tests, offering comprehensive laboratory solutions under one roof.

Description:
Caarisma MED is an aesthetics company that provides a breakthrough AI based aesthetic consultation assistant for physicians, aestheticians and comsetic healthcare providers.

Name: Domus Medica
Description:
Domus Medica è una clinica polispecialistica privata, non convenzionata con il Sistema Sanitario Nazionale, nella quale opera un team di medici e professionisti sanitari di comprovata esperienza e alta qualità.

La clinica offre visite specialistiche, esami diagnostici strumentali e di laboratorio e terapie riabilitative, garantendo tempi rapidi e un servizio attento alle esigenze di ogni paziente. 
Presa in carico globale della persona, rispetto, professionalità, cortesia e puntualità sono i valori che guidano ogni giorno la nostra attività. 
Fondata nel 2010, Domus Medica è cresciuta nel tempo fino a diventare un punto di riferimento per la sanità privata del territorio, operando in sinergia e a supporto della sanità pubblica.

Ci troviamo all’interno di un immobile di circa 3500 m², moderno e facilmente raggiungibile, con un ampio parcheggio da oltre 200 posti auto. 
La clinica offre 22 ambulatori polispecialistici, con ambienti accoglienti, funzionali e dotati delle più moderne tecnologie. 

All’interno della clinica è stato inoltre realizzato un reparto di radiologia completo e di ultima generazione, dove è possibile effettuare: 
- Risonanze magnetiche aperte, ideali per chi soffre di claustrofobia
- Risonanze magnetiche ad alto campo (1,5 Tesla)
- TAC, RX, mammografia con tomosintesi e MOC per la valutazione della densitometria ossea
Tutte le apparecchiature diagnostiche sono di ultima generazione con protocollo di intelligenza artificiale, per garantire precisione, comfort e qualità. 

La nostra struttura include anche un bar interno e una nuova area bimbi dedicata, pensata per offrire maggiore supporto alle famiglie durante le visite. 

Grazie a un team di oltre 70 specialisti, a un’organizzazione moderna e flessibile e a spazi tecnologicamente avanzati, Domus Medica vuole coniugare innovazione, accoglienza e qualità delle cure.

Name: Humancare Diagnostics Private Limited

Name: Vesica Health, Inc
Description:
Vesica Health is a leading commercial-stage multi-omics liquid biopsy company dedicated to transforming patient care. Our flagship product, AssureMDx, is a noninvasive urine-based test designed to optimize the triage of hematuria patients to urology and improve early detection of bladder cancer.

Based on two decades of advanced biomarker research in bladder cancer, AssureMDx assesses key proprietary biomarkers, including DNA methylation status and somatic mutations. Backed by 22 peer-reviewed and published studies on over 6,000 subjects, AssureMDx empowers physicians to accurately identify patients at increased risk for bladder cancer, enabling timely intervention for the best chance of cure.

Join our mission to shape a future where early detection leads to better outcomes and enhanced quality of life for hematuria patients.

#VesicaHealth #AssureMDx #BladderCancerDetection #LiquidBiopsy #PatientCare #HealthcareInnovation #Epigenetics

Name: Frat Autism
Description: FRAT, a diagnostic blood test, measures the presence of autoantibodies that interact (either block or bind) with the activity of the Folate Receptor A (FRA). FRA is responsible for the transport of folate (vitamin B9) into certain tissues, most notably the brain, placenta and ovary. These autoantibodies were detected in numerous individuals with disorders such as Cerebral Folate Deficiency, Autism Spectrum Disorders, sub-fertility in women, and pregnant women carrying fetuses with neural tube defects (NTD). FRAT measures these autoantibodies, which is an indication that folate may need to be delivered in different ways to enter the brain. This early detection of folate receptor autoantibodies can lead to early intervention and improved prognosis.

Name: SYNERGY ONCOLOGY
Description:
Synergy Oncology is a business unit of Synergy Laboratories headquartered in Mobile, Alabama.  The Company offers an extensive oncology diagnostic testing menu to the cancer-related healthcare sector in the United States, including, hospital and private pathology laboratories, oncologists, biopharmaceutical partners, academia, CRO, and more.  

Synergy Oncology specializes in genomics, enabling the personalization of cancer treatments.  Synergy Oncology’s personalized medicine test kit, Totality, analyzes a patient's genetic profile to determine a treatment strategy. Totality analyzes genes from solid tumor tissue, providing physicians with a compact report that matches detected molecular alterations with FDA approved therapies and clinical trials.  Synergy Oncology offers the most comprehensive NGS kit of its kind, including liquid biopsy testing, hereditary testing, and myeloid malignancies.  

Synergy Oncology’s mission is to develop the most advanced cancer diagnostic technology and make it accessible to all patients, while serving the needs of clinicians, academic researchers, and drug developers.

Name: PRAID AI
Description:
PRAID AI is a next-generation diagnostic ecosystem designed to transform early disease detection. By unifying radiology, pathology, and microscopy into a single AI-powered platform, it enables clinicians to detect cancer and other diseases faster, more accurately, and with greater confidence. From digitizing medical data to delivering actionable insights, PRAID AI streamlines the entire diagnostic workflow, reducing delays and enhancing patient care.

At the heart of PRAID AI is its advanced AI suite, including Vision-Language Models and smart annotation tools, which assist in interpreting scans, pathology slides, and cellular-level microscopy images. Clinicians can collaborate seamlessly across disciplines through a unified dashboard, ensuring a holistic view of each patient case. This integration not only accelerates diagnosis but also improves efficiency, reduces costs, and optimizes clinical resources.

Trusted by leading institutions and backed by validated clinical data, PRAID AI is more than just a platform,it’s an intelligent partner in precision medicine. Whether for hospitals, clinics, educators, or research institutions, PRAID AI empowers users with AI-driven insights, transforming complex medical data into clear, actionable information and ultimately improving outcomes for patients everywhere.

We are not limited to these services and will be adding more capabilities as we are growing.

Name: Cybernicx Therapy
Description:
HAL [Hybrid Assistive Limb], kullanıcının vücut fonksiyonlarının desteklenip geliştirilebildiği dünyanın ilk * cyborg tipi robotudur.
 HAL giymek "insan", "makine" ve "bilgi"nin kaynaşmasına yol açar.  HAL, fiziksel engelli bir kişinin hareket etmesine ve normalden daha fazla motor enerjisi kullanmasına yardımcı olur.  HAL ayrıca serebral sinirlerin motor öğrenmesini hızlandıran bir sistem olarak kabul edilir.
 * Cyborg-tipi Robotu (Japon Patent no. 4178186) icadı, 2009 yılında Japonya Buluş ve İnovasyon Enstitüsü tarafından 21. Yüzyılın İcadı Ödülü'ne layık görüldü.
 Ayrıca sağlık bakımı için erken tespit ve önleme sağlamak, yaşlanan iş gücümüzü iyileştirmek ve küçülen iş gücüne yanıt vermek için çeşitli yenilikçi Cybernics cihazları ve arayüzleri ve gelişmiş AI-Robot ürünleri geliştirdik.  Ürünlerimiz yeni bir IoH / IoT teknolojisi konseptine (insanların ve nesnelerin interneti) dayanmaktadır.
 Bu teknoloji sayesinde, insan sinir sistemi, fizyolojik sistem ve çevre sistemi süper bilgisayara bağlanır ve insan ve nesnelerin büyük verileri biriktirilir, analiz edilir ve AI işlenir, böylece "İnsanları birleştiren yeni bir Sibernik Endüstrisinin yaratılmasını hızlandırır". "Siberuzay ve Fiziksel Uzay" ile.
 Tüm iskemik ve hemorajik beyin yaralanmaları, serebral palsi, nörodejeneratif ve ortopedik cerrahi sonrası hastalıkların tedavisi için FDA onayı almıştır.  Normal spor performansını artırır ve kas öğrenimi sağlar.  Bu kapsamda 
 Cyberdyne tedavisi, düşünce gücüyle beyin sinir iletimini sağlayan dünyadaki ilk ve tek giyilebilir, tedavi edici cyborg robotudur.

Στόχος μας είναι η όσο το δυνατόν ευρύτερη κάλυψη των αναγκών του γενετικού ελέγχου, καθώς και η παροχή υπηρεσιών κλινικής γενετικής και γενετικής συμβουλευτικής.

Καθώς επίσης, η συμμετοχή μας σε ερευνητικές και εκπαιδευτικές δραστηριότητες σε συνεργασία με άλλους φορείς της χώρας μας και του εξωτερικού.

Στα πλαίσια αυτά το εργαστήριο έχει ήδη ενταχθεί σε πρόγραμμα e-learning ιατρικής γενετικής σε συνεργασία με τη Εργαστήριο Ιατρικής Γενετικής και Υποβοηθούμενης Αναπαραγωγής του Πανεπιστημίου Ιωαννίνων υπό την ευθύνη του Καθηγητή Ιατρικής Γενετικής Ι. Γεωργίου.

Ευελπιστούμε ότι με την εργατικότητα, την εμπειρία, το κοινό μας όραμα για συνεχή βελτίωση και εξέλιξη θα μπορέσουμε να ανταποκριθούμε στις σύγχρονες ανάγκες της γενετικής διάγνωσης, κλινικής γενετικής, εκπαίδευσης και έρευνας στον τομέα της γενετικής.

Name: BAP Brain and Pain
Description:
BaP was born with the aim of improving the quality of life of patients suffering from chronic pain.

The failure of pharmacological and surgical interventions to control pain is evident in patients with drug-resistant and refractory pain. This indicates the need for a paradigm shift in pain management, from a diagnostic-based strategy to one based on the knowledge of the mechanisms that explain why pain becomes chronic.

BaP proposes a comprehensive evaluation of the central nervous system responses and brain plasticity mechanisms that explain the chronic pain, with the aim of identifying biomarkers and develop more individualized and specialized intervention strategies adapted to patient profiles.

In addition, we are interested in testing alternative treatments for pain control, based primarily on neuromodulation techniques. They are innovative, cost-effective, and easily integrated into health care services, and can be applied both in health centers and in the patient’s own home.

Picture this - You visit a doctor, and they ask you to get some tests done. What happens next? You start hunting for labs, calling around, hoping for a home collection slot - and usually, it’s a long, frustrating wait. No transparency on pricing, no clue about lab quality, and no idea when you’ll actually get your reports.

That was before Zet Health !

We’re live in Bangalore, available 24/7, with 30,000+ tests done and a 4.8-star rating. Alongside B2C, we also serve leading eldercare and continuum care partners.

Next stop? Delhi NCR, Mumbai, and Hyderabad - as we scale diagnostics, and soon, quick medicines, doctors, nurses, and even emergency care.

Name: altona Diagnostics Brasil
Description:
QUEM SOMOS 
altona Diagnostics Brasil é subsidiária da altona Diagnostics GmbH, na Alemanha, e somos uma empresa de importação e distribuição de testes de diagnóstico in vitro para a detecção baseada na técnica de PCR, de agentes patogênicos como vírus, bactérias e parasitas. Com sede em São Paulo-Brasil, a altona Diagnostics Brasil é uma empresa privada que oferece produtos registrados e assistência técnica e científica a laboratórios privados e públicos em todo o território nacional. 

O QUE FAZEMOS
Os testes de diagnóstico molecular da altona têm como base a tecnologia de PCR em tempo real e são apresentados como kits prontos para uso. O catálogo de produtos da empresa contém mais de 50 kits registrados em diversos órgãos regulatórios pelo mundo como FDA, comunidade europeia e ANVISA, e são compatíveis com plataformas abertas de PCR em tempo real. Além disso, oferecemos uma solução de fluxo de trabalho automatizada completa, com reagentes de extração de ácidos nucléicos e um software dedicado. 

COMO PENSAMOS
Enquanto empresa dirigida pelo próprio proprietário, temos expectativas realistas que incluem objetivos a médio e longo prazo. Somos rentáveis mas não motivados pelo dinheiro. Isto significa que não fazemos previsões loucas, ginástica financeira nem relatórios inúteis. O nosso modelo de negócio é simples e objetivo: boas pessoas fazendo bons produtos e oferecendo um bom serviço. Junte-se a nós, se compartilha da mesma filosofia!

Description:

Name: EDX Medical Group
Description:
EDX Medical Group PLC develops innovative digital diagnostic products and services, enabling personalised treatment for cancer, heart disease and infectious diseases. The company is listed on the Access Segment of the AQSE Growth Market (TIDM: EDX).

EDX Medical was founded by Professor Sir Christopher Evans, OBE, a medical and life sciences entrepreneur with more than 30 years of experience, together with CEO, Dr Mike Hudson.

By translating clinical insights into pragmatic solutions combining advanced biological and digital technologies, EDX Medical seeks to cost-effectively improve the detection and characterisation of disease in order to personalise treatment in a timely fashion. Early disease detection and biologically-based personal treatment optimisation is considered to be the most impactful way of reducing deaths and lowering the cost of healthcare globally.

EDX Medical Group operates a molecular biology and diagnostics laboratory in Cambridge, UK, and 100%-owned subsidiary companies, Hutano Diagnostics Limited in Oxford, UK, and Torax Biosciences Ltd in Ireland. 

EDX Medical provides testing and genomic sequencing services, undertakes quality assurance, conducts research & development (R&D) and has established expertise in the design, development, validation and sourcing of diagnostic testing solutions to ISO 13485. Key laboratory tests performed by the Company have been accredited to ISO 15189 by the United Kingdom Accreditation Service (UKAS).

Name: NovaGray
Description:
Personalizing Cancer Treatment with Predictive Radiotherapy Tests.

At NovaGray, we are committed to transforming the way breast and prostate cancer patients experience radiotherapy by personalizing treatment and minimizing risks.

We are a pioneering French company, spin-off from the leading cancer ICM based in Montpellier, specializing in the development of the first-ever predictive tests for radiotherapy tolerance. These tests, designed for breast and prostate cancer patients, are a major step forward in precision medicine.

How It Works:
Before beginning radiotherapy, with just a simple blood test , NovaGray assesses a patient’s unique radiosensitivity. This helps predict their risk of developing severe complications post-treatment.

Why It Matters:
One of the greatest challenges in clinical radiobiology is predicting how an individual patient will respond to radiotherapy. 

NovaGray’s innovative tests directly address this by:
- Reassuring patients and physicians: Providing confidence in the treatment plan.
- Enabling personalized care: Assisting physicians in choosing the most appropriate treatment path.
- Enhancing post-treatment follow-up: Tailoring care and monitoring based on individual risk.

By helping predict a patient’s response to radiotherapy, we empower clinicians to offer safer, more personalized cancer care, improving outcomes and patient well-being.

Name: Laboratório de Analises Proclinico
Description:
Sediado na cidade de Maceió-AL, fundado em 1976 pelo médico Francisco José Galindo Pimentel e pela técnica de laboratório Maria Ilza Cavalcante Costa Pimentel, em sociedade com a médica Lygia Nogueira, o Laboratório Proclínico nasceu no bairro do Farol sendo transferido, três anos mais tarde para a Rua Pedro Monteiro, no Centro, onde permaneceu até 1984. Em seguida, mudou-se para a Rua Sete de Setembro, 62 e passou por grandes transformações, como o aumento no quadro de funcionários e renovação de equipamentos. Em 1989, o laboratório saiu na frente como o pioneiro da capital a desenvolver um sistema informatizado de atendimento e de exames hormonais e bioquímicos. Em 1997, com a reformulação de sua identidade visual, o laboratório chega à Ponta Verde, inaugurando sua unidade na Av. Sandoval Arroxelas, como mais um passo em seu projeto de expansão e melhoria na qualidade do atendimento. O Proclínico entrou ao fim da década de 1990 em uma intensa fase de treinamento, conquistando assim a certificação ISO 9001, que segue renovada periodicamente ao fim de cada ciclo de treinamento e auditoria.

Com mais de 40 anos de existência e cada vez mais preocupado em oferecer aos alagoanos um serviço de qualidade e com confiança, o Proclínico vem investindo em equipamentos modernos, atendimento humanizado e processos rigorosos de controle de segurança, que resultaram na conquista de um selo de qualidade, a acreditação PALC, da Sociedade Brasileira de Patologia Clínica, que obedece a critérios internacionais e poucos laboratórios no Brasil possuem.

Com três unidades espalhadas por Maceió e um acompanhamento diário de uma equipe capacitada e engajada, liderada de perto pela Dra. Lygia Nogueira e suas filhas, Laryce e Letycia Nogueira, o Proclínico cresceu e se consolidou como uma das principais referências em Diagnóstico Laboratorial em Alagoas, atendendo tanto pacientes da capital quanto do interior."

Name: TB Biomedical Ltd
Description:
A private consultancy firm founded by Neil Evans in November 2022. 

As a consultant, I provide comprehensive advisory services in quality management, health and safety, and laboratory commissioning, ensuring compliance with relevant ISO standards. This includes:

Quality Management: Guidance on achieving and maintaining ISO 15189 (medical laboratories), ISO 17025 (testing and calibration laboratories), ISO 20395 (PCR-specific guidelines), and ISO 15190 (laboratory safety), focusing on the implementation of robust quality management systems, technical competence, and safety protocols.

Health & Safety: Advise on the integration of health and safety standards in laboratory environments, ensuring risk assessments, proper hazard management, and compliance with ISO 15190 and local regulations.

Laboratory Commissioning: Assist in the commissioning of new laboratories, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements, validating equipment functionality, and overseeing the qualification of systems.

Product Review and Marketing: Conduct detailed product reviews and collaborate with marketing teams to ensure products meet regulatory standards, perform as claimed, and align with industry best practices.

Data Review and Reporting: Analyze laboratory data, generate detailed reports, and provide actionable insights to ensure compliance with quality standards and regulatory requirements.

Audit and Inspection: Perform audits and inspections in accordance with ISO 17020, ensuring processes are compliant and generating reports for corrective actions where necessary.

Ethics Review and IRAS Submission: Provide guidance on ethics review processes, assisting with the preparation and submission of documentation to IRAS for ethics and governance approval.

Our approach ensures clients adhere to international standards, maintain safety and ethical practices, and enhance operational efficiency.

Name: Eurobio Oncology
Description: Starting August 1st, EndoPredict, a genomic test for breast cancer patients, and Prolaris Kits, a prognostic test for prostate cancer patients, are joining the Eurobio Scientific portfolio. As a leading player in Molecular Diagnostics and Life Sciences, we are thrilled to expand our offer and enhance our commitment to innovative patient care. About Eurobio Scientific Eurobio Scientific is committed to enhancing patients' quality of life through innovative diagnostics. Our vision is to become a global leader in specialty diagnostics, offering cutting-edge solutions to healthcare professionals. With over 370 employees worldwide, we provide robust local support through our manufacturing and research centers, as well as offices in Europe, the USA, and a network of trusted distributors globally. Our expert R&D team focuses on developing advanced molecular diagnostic tests in oncology, transplant, and infectious diseases. About EndoPredict and Prolaris Kit EndoPredict: EndoPredict is a second generation genomic test for breast cancer that provides a thorough analysis of tumor biology. It helps predict the likelihood of cancer recurrence and chemotherapy benefit to support more informed decisions about adjuvant chemotherapy for patients with ER+, HER2- early-stage breast cancer. With its high prognostic accuracy, EndoPredict enables personalized treatment planning, ensuring that patients receive the most appropriate care based on their individual risk profile. Prolaris: Prolaris is a prognostic test for prostate cancer that measures the expression levels of genes involved in cell cycle progression. It provides an accurate assessment of the aggressiveness of prostate cancer, helping to distinguish between indolent and aggressive disease. Prolaris aids in risk stratification and guides treatment decisions, allowing clinicians to tailor their approach to each patient's specific cancer biology and risk of progression.

Name: Oncosure Testing Laboratory
Description:
Oncosure Testing revolutionizes cancer screening with a breakthrough diagnostic test that detects all human cancers using one simple blood draw. Our state-of-the-art technology provides rapid, 24-hour results that identify early-stage biomarkers, empowering proactive, life-saving interventions.

Headquartered in Pompano Beach, Florida, and supported by a network of 265 partner labs nationwide, we offer comprehensive, minimally invasive screening services that cover over 200 cancer variants. Our test sets a new industry standard in speed and precision.

Catching cancer early is the most effective way to combat it. Regular screenings dramatically improve your chances of a positive outcome by detecting cancer in its initial stages. They not only reduce the risk of dying from cancer through consistent testing, but also provide rapid results, enabling swift action and timely treatment decisions. Embrace proactive health management—early detection truly makes a difference.

Why Choose Us:
 Breakthrough Screening: Detects all human cancers with one blood draw.
 Unmatched Accuracy: Superior sensitivity and specificity in 24-hour results.
 Nationwide Access: Extensive partner lab network.
 Cost-Effective: Affordable, minimally invasive, and efficient testing.

Oncosure Testing sets a new gold standard in cancer screening, offering unparalleled accuracy and speed. Our test delivers 97.77% overall accuracy, 98.44% sensitivity, and 97.15% specificity—numbers that significantly outperform competitors. In just 24 hours and with only 3 cc’s of blood, we provide comprehensive results for over 200 cancer variants. Additionally, our test is cost-effective—priced 61% lower than conventional options—and requires only a minimal 3 cc blood sample, significantly reducing patient discomfort while delivering comprehensive results.

Contact us to learn how Oncosure Testing can transform your proactive health journey.

Name: Global Neurosurgical Alliance
Description:
Welcome to the Global Neurosurgical Alliance (GNA), a pioneering platform in the world of neuroscience, established in July 2023. At the heart of GNA is a mission to unite neurosurgeons and researchers from diverse backgrounds, fostering an environment where innovation and collaboration thrive. Our founders, Albert Alan and Michelle Ennabe, have harnessed their passion for medical sociology and a shared commitment to social impact, laying the foundation for a community that challenges the status quo in neurosurgical research.

GNA is more than just a research lab; it's a movement towards inclusivity and diversity in the scientific community. By leveraging technology and artificial intelligence, we provide our members with the tools they need to push the boundaries of what's possible in neuroscience. Our platform is designed to facilitate global collaboration, making research accessible to all, irrespective of geographical or financial constraints.

Our achievements in a short span speak volumes about our impact. With members joining from across the globe and significant contributions to esteemed neurosurgical forums, GNA is rewriting the narrative of medical research. We're not just envisioning a future where science knows no boundaries – we're creating it.

Join us at GNA, where your passion for neuroscience and desire to make a difference find a welcoming, supportive community. Together, we can unlock the mysteries of the brain and pave the way for groundbreaking discoveries that change lives around the world.

Name: Indigo BioAutomation
Description:
Indigo BioAutomation provides automated data analysis, data management and data integration solutions to clinical diagnostics reference laboratories, pharmaceutical and biotechnology research laboratories and laboratories in other life science markets.  

Headquartered in Carmel, Indiana, the company was founded with the vision of becoming the leading provider of software for improving laboratory operational efficiency. We take a data-centric, not document-centric, approach to our solutions.  

We believe that scientists and scientific management need access to details at the raw data layer in order to make effective, timely decisions.  Pushing PDFs and Excel spreadsheets around organizations is inefficient and leads to incomplete information and unanswered questions. 

We have deep expertise in mass spectrometry, laboratory process automation, "big" data analysis, and the utilization of advanced algorithms to drive factory science in high throughput laboratory environments.

Indigo’s flagship product ASCENT was built on these tenets and leverages our expertise to deliver high efficiency and improved quality.

Name: Institut National de Recherche Biomédicale

Both of the CEOs of INNOPROOF GmbH have many years of research experience in the field of implantable medical devices. Due to INNOPROOFs close personal relation to the University Medicine Rostock, we are always on the cutting edge of science and technology. In addition to the standard test procedures according to ISO and ASTM standards, we offer our customers also innovative implant tests, which go beyond the standards. If there are no standardized tests for your special product, we will develop the appropriate methodology to already acquire a high level of safety in the preclinical phase. Name: ANALYTICA Medizinische Laboratorien AG
Description:
Unabhängiges Schweizer Familienunternehmen in dritter Generation

Die ANALYTICA Medizinische Laboratorien AG ist ein unabhängiges Schweizer Familienunternehmen und zeichnet sich seit über 60 Jahren durch gelebte Werte aus. Mit erstklassiger Labordiagnostik, individueller Wertschätzung und ausgezeichnetem Fachpersonal garantieren wir Qualität im Praxisalltag und tragen damit zur Lebensqualität der Schweizer Bevölkerung bei.

Unser Labor in Zürich
Die ANALYTICA bietet qualitativ hochwertige Laboranalytik und deckt sämtliche medizinischen Fachbereiche ab, um Ihnen eine ganzheitliche Diagnostik zu ermöglichen. Für eine optimale Interpretation der Analysenergebnisse steht unser ärztliches Konsiliarteam sowie unsere Laborspezialistinnen und -spezialisten beratend zur Seite.

Genetik durch die Genetica AG
Die Genetica AG, ein humangenetisches Labor unter der Leitung von Dr. med. Benno Röthlisberger, ist seit 2016 Teil der ANALYTICA Unternehmensgruppe. Das Analysenspektrum beinhaltet alle relevanten Methoden der modernen Molekulargenetik, darunter: Next-Generation-Sequencing (NGS), Array-CGH, nicht-invasive Pränataldiagnostik (NIPT), Optical Genome Mapping sowie die klassischen Zellkulturverfahren zur Chromosomendiagnostik aus Chorionzotten, Fruchtwasser und Blut.

Kundenbetreuung
Bei der ANALYTICA legen wir besonderen Wert auf eine persönliche Kundenbetreuung. Eine Ansprechperson, die Sie individuell betreut. Der Vorteil für Sie: Ihre Bedürfnisse, Routinen und individuellen Anforderungen sind bekannt und Sie sparen so Zeit und Aufwand.

Mehrwerte
Mit unseren Services und Dienstleistungen möchten wir das Praxispersonal entlasten und so die Qualität der Patientenversorgung steigern. Mit ANA.eLAB, ANA.BERATUNG, ANA.WISSEN, ANA.MONITOR24 und ANA.PRAXISBEDARF haben wir Leistungen geschaffen, die die Praxen direkt abrufen oder auf Ihre Anforderungen individualisieren lassen können.

Name: Laboratório Comin

Description:
LabOuest est un laboratoire de Biologie médicale indépendant situé en Pays de la Loire.

Composé d'un réseau de 27 sites de laboratoires, 24 biologistes et 300 collaborateurs, LabOuest offre un service de biologie médicale tourné vers la satisfaction des patients "Votre santé, notre engagement".

Notre engagement se traduit par une offre de proximité accessible et performante pour ses différents publics : patients, médecins, sages-femmes, infirmiers (IDE), cliniques privées, EHPAD, hôpitaux et autres laboratoires de biologie médicale via des contrats de collaboration.

Les compétences variées et complémentaires des 3 plateaux techniques d’analyses nous permettent de réaliser localement la quasi-totalité des examens de biologie médicale qui nous sont confiés et d’assurer ainsi la permanence des soins au plus près de nos territoires.
L'immense majorité des résultats est rendue dans la journée (voir la demi-journée en cas de besoin).

Le capital de LabOuest est détenu à 100% par les biologistes médicaux qui y travaille. Il n'est adossé à aucun fond de pension étranger ou autres actifs financiers.

Name: EARLY Labs
Description:
EARLY is the world’s pioneer provider of VM (Volatile Markers) test for early detection of cancer. 

The key to fighting cancer is early detection, meaning finding the disease when it is still curable. Our test is specially designed to meet the needs and demands of large-scale population/targeted screening programs, by being acceptable, affordable and accessible. 

With a simple, safe, highly sensitive, inexpensive urine test, EARLY’s proprietary evidence-based novel platform will enable diagnostic level testing on a population screening scale. 
The company’s test will revolutionize the way cancer is detected, starting with lung cancer, and dramatically reduce the disease’s global human and financial burden.

In the future, the same technology will be modified to allow detection of other cancer types, creating a unique multi-cancer screening platform.

Name: ARGOS Slide Scanner Systems
Description:
ARGOS Slide Scanner – Not Just a Scanner!

The ARGOS digital slide scanner transforms pathology workflows with fully hands-off automation through robotics, enabling labs to scan large batches of slides with minimal technician involvement. Its high-capacity Slide Hotel and continuous-loading design allow uninterrupted operation—even overnight—reducing bottlenecks and freeing staff for higher-value tasks.

With automated archiving and seamless digital organization, every scanned slide is traceable and compliant, eliminating manual handling and minimizing errors. The remote rescan function empowers pathologists to request rescans directly from the software allowing them to continue working on the patient case as the rescan is available within minutes.

ARGOS is not only about efficiency—it delivers measurable ROI. By cutting hands-on labor, the system quickly pays for itself, letting labs redeploy staff, increase throughput, and accelerate turnaround times. 

With ARGOS, laboratories gain a fully automated, high-throughput solution that reduces costs, boosts productivity, and future-proofs digital pathology operations. Hands-off automation isn’t just convenience—it’s a smart investment.

Name: True Dose
Description:
We are True Dose, committed to advancing precision medicine through innovative at-home blood sampling technology.

Our story began in 2012, when two of our founders were involved in groundbreaking clinical studies focused on the correlation between drug concentration and the effectiveness of breast cancer treatments. Their research demonstrated that personalized dosing, guided by specific biomarkers in the blood, could significantly improve treatment outcomes compared to the outdated, one-size-fits-all approach based on Body Surface Area (BSA), a method over a century old.

Recognizing the high costs and logistical challenges of traditional blood sampling—requiring patients to travel to distant labs and adhere to strict lab schedules—our founders envisioned a more accessible solution. This vision led to the development of a revolutionary at-home blood sampling kit, starting in 2018. Our goal was to create a tool that would allow patients to measure drug concentrations conveniently at home and send samples via standard postal services for analysis.

After extensive development and validation, True Dose was founded in 2023 with a patented technology that combines simplicity with precision. Our at-home blood sampling kit not only provides accurate measurements but also supports personalized dosing strategies, enhancing the chances of effective treatment while reducing the risks of relapse, toxicity, and side effects.

At True Dose, we are passionate about making personalized medicine accessible and efficient, transforming the way treatments are managed and ultimately improving patient outcomes.

Name: CompagOs

I am the managing director at HygCen Germany GmbH and we focus on the individual testing of your product.

Because we adapt the test to your product in accordance with the harmonized standards, not the other way around.

With more than 26 years of experience and around 70 employees, we are a recognized and accredited testing institute with our headquarters in Schwerin.

For you we test exactly:

- Efficacy tests of disinfectants including the complete virucidal and sporicidal tests (EN 14885)
- Preparation instructions according to EN ISO 17664
- Reprocessing of medical devices (manual and mechanical)
- Biocompatibility testing of medical devices (EN ISO 10993)
- Type testing of RDG/RDG-E and sterilizers (EN 15883 and others)
- Process validation of RDG/RDG-E and sterilizers (EN 15883 and others)
- and other tests

Activities outside of HygCen Germany GmbH complement my experience as a medical specialist in hygiene.

If you have a medical device or biocide that needs testing according to the current standard but does not fit the old standards, please send me a message.

We will find a way for you to test your unique product.

Feel free to get in touch using our contact form on the website.

Yours

Dr. med. univ. Sebastian Werner

Description:
Determining treatment effectiveness, discovering new biology using AI enabled nanosensor technology.

Name: Advanced Cell Laboratories (ACL) مختبرات الخلية المتقدمة
Description:

We are committed to excellence in diagnostics, utilizing state-of-the-art technology and a team of highly skilled professionals to ensure the highest standards of patient care.

Name: orbitcare.in
Description:
Our pathology test home collection service offers a convenient and hassle-free way to get tested from the comfort of your own home. We understand that getting tested can be a stressful and time-consuming experience, which is why we have designed our service to be as simple and easy as possible.

With our online booking platform, you can schedule your pathology test at a time that works for you. Our team of trained professionals will come to your home to collect your sample, which will then be sent to our state-of-the-art laboratory for testing.

We offer a wide range of pathology tests, including blood tests, urine tests, and more. Our tests are performed using the latest technology and equipment, ensuring accurate and reliable results.

At our pathology test home collection service, we prioritize your health and safety. Our team follows strict hygiene and safety protocols to ensure a clean and safe testing experience. We also offer contactless sample collection options for added peace of mind.

Whether you need to get tested for a routine check-up or have specific health concerns, our pathology test home collection service is here to help. Book your test online today and experience the convenience and reliability of our service.

Name: Laboratoire de Biologie Médicale BIO MEDI QUAL Centre
Description:
Le laboratoire Bio Medi Qual Centre est un laboratoire multi sites indépendant, dirigé par des biologistes médicaux, pharmaciens et médecins, et accrédité selon la norme NF ISO 15189 depuis 2008 (liste des sites et portées disponibles sur www.cofrac.fr, accréditation N° 8-2590).

Il est issu de la volonté d’un ensemble de biologistes de conserver un service médical de qualité et de proximité pour les patients et les acteurs de santé, tout en répondant aux exigences de la réforme de la Biologie Médicale.

L’équipe est composée de 19 biologistes et 260 collaborateurs adhérant aux mêmes valeurs pour une prise en charge de qualité des patients.

Les différents sites du laboratoire Bio Medi Qual Centre sont sur les départements 18,36,41 et 45.

Name: Triolab Danmark
Description:
Triolab AS Denmark is a professional sales organization founded in 1991. We specialize in the import, marketing, sales, and technical support of IVD products. 

Due to our extensive product range and long experience in the field of clinical diagnostics, we have customers in all healthcare segments, and also veterinary institutions, pharmaceutical companies, and special university labs are among our customers.

Our skillful and highly committed personnel has a deep understanding of the market and our customers' needs, and they always meet our customers with an open mind, a friendly  attitude, and a strong desire to find the best possible solution for each individual customer. 

We have sister companies in Norway, Sweden, and Finland, and together we are one of the leading suppliers of IVD products in the Nordic area. 

Triolab AS Denmark is part of AddLife, a Swedish group specialized in selected niches within diagnostics, medical technology, biomedical research and laboratory analysis (www.add.life). AddLife is quoted on the NASDAQ Stockholm Main Market.

Please visit www.triolab.dk for further information.

Name: LABMAX LLC
Description: Lab Products. Supply, import and export

Name: Tecnonuclear
Description:
TECNONUCLEAR es una empresa argentina con más de 30 años de experiencia en medicina nuclear, especializada en la fabricación y distribución de productos para diagnóstico SPECT Y PET así como tratamientos terapéuticos. En enero de 2022, fue adquirida por Eckert & Ziegler, una empresa global en el campo de los radionúclidos y dispositivos de laboratorio. Esta adquisición ha permitido a Tecnonuclear expandir su presencia internacional y continuar innovando en sus productos.
ECKERT&ZIEGLER ofrece servicios personalizados para el desarrollo de radiofármacos y la fabricación por contrato. Desde el desarrollo inicial hasta las etapas clínicas. Sus laboratorios están equipados para proyectos de radiación alfa, beta o gamma. Además de los productos destinados al mercado de Medicina Nuclear, TECNONUCLEAR ahora cuenta con generadores de galio-68 y productos teragnósticos como el lutecio-177 (nca), que facilitan un diagnóstico y tratamiento precisos.
TECNONUCLEAR tiene un impacto significativo en la salud de los pacientes, mejorando la calidad de vida y la eficiencia en el diagnóstico y tratamiento de diversas patologías. También apoya la capacitación continua de profesionales en medicina nuclear. Como parte de ECKERT&ZIEGLER, TECNONUCLEAR se posiciona para seguir avanzando en la investigación e innovación de productos de medicina nuclear, tanto a nivel nacional como internacional, manteniendo sus pilares de integridad, eficiencia y compromiso.
Entre sus productos destacados se encuentran los generadores de Tecnecio-99m, radiofármacos de diagnóstico, kits fríos, agentes terapéuticos y un amplio portafolio de productos para PET/SPECT. Estos productos permiten a TECNONUCLEAR mantener una fuerte presencia en el mercado de diagnóstico por imagen y continuar innovando en el campo de la medicina nuclear.
