Description: Nossa expertise e foco de atuação são exames laboratoriais, vacinas, serviços e ações que visam a prevenção de doenças e qualidade de vida em ambientes corporativos e clínicas médicas altamente especializadas.

Name: YZY Medical
Description:
Founded in 2011, with personalized diagnosis and treatment of cardiovascular, tumor as the strategic direction, Wuhan YZY Medical Science and Technology Co., Ltd. (YZY MED) is a high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D, production and sales of individualized medical diagnostic products. The company has established various technical platforms, including ARMS fluorescence qPCR, multiple fluorescence qPCR, fluorescence in situ hybridization (FISH) and circulating tumor cell detection, etc. Meanwhile, the self-developed products include molecular diagnostic products to guide personalized medicine for cardiovascular and cerebrovascular diseases, companion diagnostic products to guide tumor diagnosis and treatment, FISH products and circulating tumor cell (CTC) autoanalyzer system, all these provide clinical diagnosis basis for precision medicine.

With a R&D center of 2,000㎡and GMP-accredited industrialized workshop of 3,200㎡,YZY MED has successfully developed over 160 genetic diagnostic products and multiple in vitro diagnostic (IVD) devices, among which 15 molecular diagnostic kits have been approved by the NMPA Class III medical device registration and approval, more than 110 products have  CE marks.

Name: PROMISE Proteomics
Description:
About Promise Proteomics

Promise proteomics is an expert in the bioproduction of Stable Isotope Labelled monoclonal antibodies and proteins, considered as internal standards for absolute quantification by mass spectrometry.



Promise Proteomics offers products and services in two main areas :

• Stable isotope labelled and unlabelled protein and monoclonal antibodies. We offer a range of products and services for customized bioproduction.

• Innovative kits dedicated to monoclonal antibody quantification by mass spectrometry. mAbXmise kits are ready-to-use sample preparation kits, including our stable-labelled mAbs as internal standards and all the required reagents and consumables. mAbXmise targets 20 t-mAbs on the market, used in various therapeutic areas.

Name: SpotitEarly
Description:
SpotitEarly is revolutionizing cancer pre-screening with an innovative AI-based test that can detect multiple cancer types from a single breath sample.
This simple solution allows for easy, at-home sample collection in minutes, without any healthcare professional assistance. Our off-the-shelf test is affordable and available everywhere, at everyone’s convenience, removing the barriers that keep about half of the people from getting tested on time.
With an impressive 94% accuracy (sensitivity and specificity), our technology has been shown to be effective even in early-stage cancer detection, which can significantly increase treatment options and survival rates. 
By harnessing the science of scent, SpotitEarly identifies cancerous VOCs in exhaled breath. This smart technology enables more frequent testing of wider audiences at a fraction of the cost, ultimately saving lives and improving clinical outcomes globally. 
We envision a world where hassle-free pre-screening is the norm. Join us in our mission to make cancer prevention easy, effective, and universally accessible, bringing enhanced quality of life and peace of mind for all.

Name: Neway, LLC
Description:
Neway is the U.S. leader in value-based care for dialysis labs. We help dialysis programs achieve better financial outcomes while increasing the quality and velocity of patient care.

The Neway Dialysis Lab Stewardship Program helps you maximize lab revenue, lower lab fees, and give you global lab cost of care control. Neway works with your care team to optimize your lab order set and adhere to CMS guidelines, while eliminating wasteful and excessive testing, which lowers your overall lab fees and maximizes your dialysis lab earnings. 

Neway with Quest Diagnostics delivers next-day lab results and emergency preparedness. Dialysis clinics draw patient specimens using Quest Diagnostics collection protocols that preserve specimen integrity and minimize blood degradation, an important detail on dialysis Hemoglobin and Potassium results. Quest Diagnostics logistic teams pick up specimens to be processed locally or regionally and results are delivered the next day. Quest Diagnostics’ extensive network of laboratories and emergency preparedness protocols enables Neway to sustain the velocity of patient care through unforeseen events such as natural disasters, labor strikes, and pandemics. 

The Neway eLabs Platform is a modern lab ordering and reporting tool developed from years of clinical dialysis lab expertise. It's user friendly and improves dialysis lab draw workflows by reducing clicks and screen time. The Neway eLabs Platform has real-time critical alerts, dashboards, draw calendars, and the highest level of cyber security for PHI & HIPAA. Neway eLabs has all the dialysis labs reporting you would expect plus clinical decision support tools for disease management with hepatitis and anemia lab protocols. Neway also integrates directly to your dialysis specific EMR so that new patients and KT/V calculation data automatically flows into eLabs, and conversely eLabs pushes new lab results into your EMR real-time. 

Neway - Your Trusted Dialysis Lab Partner

Name: Emirates Clinical Chemistry Society (ECCS)
Description:
Established in August 2023 as a part of the Emirates Medical Association (EMA), The Emirates Clinical Chemistry Society (ECCS) serves as the scientific association for professionals in clinical chemistry and laboratory medicine in UAE. Operating as a non-profit medical/scientific organization, ECCS is dedicated to advancing the development of quality assurance in laboratory medicine. The primary objectives of ECCS encompass education and training, the promotion of quality standards and best practices, fostering collaboration and networking, advocacy and guideline development, the encouragement of research and innovation, and raising public awareness regarding the significance of clinical chemistry in healthcare and disease management.

Our mission is to facilitate the exchange of information and ideas among our members, promoting the advancement of clinical chemistry and ensuring specialists in the field stay abreast of the latest developments in clinical chemistry and laboratory medicine. ECCS actively encourages its members to participate in international academic conferences and submit academic papers. Notably, ECCS has officially affiliated with the International Federation of Clinical Chemistry (IFCC), aligning itself with all their activities and scientific events.

Da oltre dieci anni, il network porta avanti un processo di crescita orientato alla qualità, alla digitalizzazione e all’innovazione scientifica. Grazie all’utilizzo della tecnologia CAD CAM, delle stampanti 3D, degli scanner intraorali e di materiali di pregio, Primo Lab fornisce prodotti alla rete seguendo rigidi protocolli scientifici, pensati per garantire ai pazienti prodotti duraturi e di qualità.

Name: iFAST Diagnostics
Description:
iFAST is developing a game-changing, rapid antimicrobial susceptibility test, that will enable every patient with bacterial infections to receive the right antibiotic, on time, every time.

Currently, these tests take 48-72 hours, but iFAST's tests are 10x faster - giving full quantitative and qualitative results in under 3 hours from a positive blood culture or bacterial isolate.

The technology is cheaper and involve less tedious manual labour than current standard of care, which is based on technology from the mid-1900s! We also offer high throughout (most labs only need one system to accommodate all their requirements).

This is a $4bn market and we will be launching on the UK market at the start of 2026, and in the US and EU the following year.

Name: OncoDxRx
Description:
OncoDxRx is a patient-centered, innovation-driven liquid biopsy company. We develop, validate and offer exclusive, transformative and build-for-purpose diagnostics and therapeutics to the huge, unmet genetic healthcare market. Our current pipeline covers early cancer detection, treatment selection, monitoring recurrence to therapeutics. 
PGA (patient-derived gene expression-informed anti-cancer drug efficacy) is the flagship assay which can provide comprehensive anti-cancer drug efficacy data within 5 days and improve the clinical-benefit rate for cancer patients. PGA’s unprecedented potential of selecting the optimal regimen among hundreds of anti-cancer drugs for individual patients based on their own gene expression signatures is truly a breakthrough. 
For cancer early detection, OncoDxRx scientists have identified 10 CpG methylation biomarkers with AUC of 0.895 for 14 cancer types.
One-of-a-kind assays for MRD, DNA repair activity (HRR and/or MMR), tissue-of-origin as well as cancer drug discovery are also progressing as planned.
OncoDxRx is seeking for investors/buyers/partners to further our mission.

Description:
Tissue & Cell Technologies offers innovative cryo-storage for adipose tissue, revolutionizing fat grafting. One liposuction procedure banks all the tissue you'll need for future face, breast, and body injections. 

At Tissue & Cell Technologies (T&CT), our mission is to revolutionize the way doctors practice medicine.

Our technology platform, the ADIPOSET System, is designed to unlock the full potential of aesthetic and regenerative medicine, cell-based therapies, and personalized medicine.

We are focused on several sectors, all with strong clinical drivers, unmet clinical needs, and potential for high impact on clinical economics and patient care.

With no rival technology or company in the long-term storage of large volumes of human adipose tissue, T&CT’s ADIPOSET storage technology fills a significant gap in the US, Europe, and beyond.

Name: Oro Muscles, Inc
Description:
Rehabilitation shouldn’t rely on guesswork, outdated assessments, or unreliable data. Yet, most systems still provide raw, unprocessed signals or estimates that require manual interpretation and post-processing - leading to delays, inconsistencies, and limited clinical value.

At Oro, we do things differently. Our real-time, medically validated muscle insights provide immediate, decision-ready data: no post-processing, no artifact-ridden raw signals, no waiting. Unlike traditional systems or surface-level tracking tools, Oro combines AI-driven neuromuscular analysis, IMU-based movement tracking, and automatic MVC normalization, ensuring clinicians, therapists, and trainers get precise, objective, and actionable insights every session.

Because at every stage of recovery, better data means better outcomes.

Name: SYNLAB Hungary
Description:
We create value for humans, animals and our environment. - SYNLAB is the largest private laboratory service provider both in Hungary and Europe-wide. We provide an extensive range of examinations; our clients can choose from more than 4000 examinations. Our high-quality human diagnostics, environmental analysis and forensic laboratory services are performed by highly skilled professionals using state-of-the-art technological background. Both the laboratories of the Human Analytics Unit and the Environmental Analytics Unit are operated in the framework of a quality management system complying with ISO standards. 
We are convinced that prevention is the key element of the healthcare system. Preventive measures are effective if we provide adequate and evidence-based information on the risks of diseases and to accomplish this, accurate diagnostic screening tests and laboratory examinations are essential.

Értéket teremtünk az emberek, állatok és környezetünk számára.- A SYNLAB Magyarország és Európa legnagyobb magán laborszolgáltatója. Széles vizsgálati palettával rendelkezünk: ügyfeleink több, mint 4.000 vizsgálat közül választhatnak. Humándiagnosztikai, környezetanalitikai és igazságügyi laborszolgáltatásainkat magas színvonalon, kiváló szakembergárdával és korszerű technikai háttér segítségével végezzük. Emellett mind a Humánanalitikai Üzletág orvosi laboratóriumai, mind a Környezetanalitikai Üzletág vizsgálólaboratóriumai ISO szabványnak megfelelő minőségirányítási rendszer szerint működnek.
Meggyőződésünk, hogy a megelőzés az egészségügyi rendszer egyik legfontosabb eleme kell, hogy legyen. A megelőző intézkedések akkor hatásosak, ha a betegségek kockázatairól megfelelő és megalapozott felvilágosítást adunk, amelyhez nélkülözhetetlenek a pontos diagnosztikai szűrőtesztek valamint a laboratóriumi vizsgálatok.

Name: Synevo Georgia • სინევო საქართველო
Description:
Synevo is the leading provider of diagnostic laboratory services in Georgia, offering more than 2,000 routine and advanced tests across all clinical pathology areas. Synevo Georgia operates a national network of 62 blood drawing points, two regional labs and one central lab in the country capital Tbilisi.

Synevo Georgia is part of Medicover - a leading international healthcare and diagnostic services provider. Established in 1995 in response to the growing demand for high-quality healthcare services in Poland, Medicover subsequently expanded to other countries, fulfilling similar needs. Today, Medicover’s largest operations are in Poland, Germany, Romania and Ukraine. Medicover provides a broad spectrum of healthcare services via an extensive network of ambulatory clinics, hospitals, specialty-care facilities and laboratories through two divisions – Healthcare Services and Diagnostic Services. 

Healthcare Services – a predominantly employer-funded integrated healthcare provider offering benefit plans ranging from primary to specialist healthcare and inpatient care. The major markets are Poland and Romania, the two largest and fastest growing economies in Central and Eastern Europe. 

Diagnostic Services – a network of laboratories with international scale and local knowledge, offering comprehensive clinical solutions with strong heritage of innovation. The Diagnostic Services division has operations in Germany, Romania, Ukraine, Poland, Moldova, Serbia, Turkey, Georgia and Bulgaria. Through the network of 91 laboratories and 511 high quality standardized blood drawing points in 9 countries, the division offers more than 3,000 services ranging from routine blood tests to highly advanced diagnostics, while performing more than 124 million tests in 2017.

Name: Bayramli Group LLC
Description:
Bayramli Group LLC is a company dedicated to providing cutting-edge laboratory solutions. Our company specializes in laboratory turnkey solutions, research, and development, kit production, as well as training, seminars, and conferences.

At Bayramli Group LLC, we are committed to advancing scientific research by providing innovative solutions to complex problems. Our team of experts has years of experience in developing customized laboratory solutions that meet the unique needs of our clients.

We offer a wide range of services, including custom kit production, specialized training sessions and seminars, and comprehensive turnkey solutions for laboratory construction and design. Our solutions are designed to help our clients save time and money while achieving their research goals.

We are proud to have worked with some of the most innovative companies and research institutions in the industry, and we are dedicated to building lasting relationships with all of our clients. 

Thank you for visiting our page, and we look forward to the opportunity to work with you.

We provide them with a selective range of medical diagnostics tests they can perform through our central labs, and we carry on the operations from receiving/gathering the collected samples from the lab to providing timely and efficient reports.

A missão do nosso laboratório é dar resposta às necessidades dos profissionais de saúde e aos doentes, no sentido de oferecer os melhores meios de rastreio e de diagnóstico genético por técnicas de estudo genómico. Cabe-nos o desenvolvimento de um programa que integre a formação pós-graduada de estudantes, de profissionais e de colaboradores, e a investigação e actualização das tecnologias mais recentes na área da genómica, para prestar os melhores cuidados de prevenção e diagnóstico na Genética Médica.

Favorecer o diagnóstico precoce de doenças genéticas permite a intervenção atempada de estratégias que visem a melhor qualidade de vida para o doente.

Description:
TSAR LabCare | Empowering Innovation in Bioscience & Research

We specialize in providing advanced bio-equipment, analytical instruments, and customized lab solutions that support innovation across research, diagnostics, and academia. With a strong footprint in biotechnology, molecular biology, cell culture, and genetic sciences, our offerings are designed to meet the evolving demands of research institutions, labs, universities, and industrial R&D centers.

 Driving Research. Enabling Progress. Innovating Tomorrow.

Name: Absolute Genomics
Description: We at Absolute Genomics make it a priority to provide accurate, actionable, accessible, and timely results for your infectious disease testing needs. Our laboratory prioritizes maintaining cutting-edge RT-PCR technology centered around patient care. Our experienced team of healthcare professionals— including M.D., Ph.D, infectious disease specialists, and other professional clinicians—has diligently tailored and continually innovate comprehensive, patient-centric testing solutions based on feedback from our national client-base. When you need trusted information to make clear, confident health decisions, consider Absolute Genomics your source.

Name: Medical Laboratory Services Curaçao
Description:
We are a cutting-edge medical laboratory that provides a laboratory experience where you and your time are treated with respect. We prioritize the highest quality standards and consistently ensure the accuracy of our results through rigorous testing and validation processes.

We are ISO-accredited, which guarantees our strict adherence to the highest international standards for medical laboratories. Our unwavering commitment to innovation and excellence, along with our dedication to always prioritizing our clients, makes MLS the ideal choice for your laboratory needs.

Name: LABORIAD
Description:
Le laboratoire Centre de Biologie Riad (LABORIAD) a été créé en 2012 et fait partie du réseau MÉDICAL-BIO-SANTÉ qui regroupe 4 laboratoires d'analyses médicales installés entre Rabat et Casablanca.

L'organisation de LABORIAD permet de proposer des techniques analytiques innovantes tout en assurant une permanence des soins et en mettant à disposition du corps médical des compétences en biologie médicale de qualité reconnue.

LABORIAD s'est engagé depuis des années à développer une biologie spécialisée et à ramener des technologies de pointe pour avoir une médecine moderne au Maroc.

La mise en commun de nos ressources permet d’assurer aux patients une biologie polyvalente de haute compétence, grâce aux différents domaines de spécialisation de nos biologistes et à une sélection d’appareillages les plus performants.

Name: Institute of Tissue Medicine and Pathology at the University of Bern
Description:
Als ein modernes Institut (IGMP), decken wir die gesamte Breite an Gewebeuntersuchungen ab und stellen rasche Befunde.

Zu unseren wichtigsten Werten gehören Präzision, Innovation, Fortschritt und Weiterentwicklung, dies stets im Sinne unserer Patientinnen und Patienten. Die moderne Pathologie ist im Wandel. Und so haben auch in unserem Institut Digitalisierung, Automatisierung und personalisierte Medizin längst Einzug gefunden. 

Unsere Umfirmierung in "Institut für Gewebemedizin und Pathologie" soll dieser positiven Entwicklung Rechnung tragen.

Unsere Kombination aus Dienstleistung, Lehre und Forschung unter einem Dach erlaubt eine enge Interaktion und gegenseitige Inspiration.

In unseren Videos und Beiträgen geben wir Ihnen einen Einblick in die aufregende Welt der modernen und innovativen Gewebemedizin, sie erfahren, womit sich ein Forschender befasst oder mit welchen Tätigkeiten sich unser Ärzteteam in seiner täglichen Arbeit auseinandersetzen.

Description:
Há 59 anos, o Instituto Carlos Chagas é uma referência sólida e inovadora no Leste de Minas Gerais, com a mais robusta e moderna estrutura técnica da região. Com mais de 150 colaboradores dedicados, 16 unidades e um atendimento ENCANTADOR que mantém um NPS de 94, seguimos crescendo e transformando o setor.

Nossa trajetória de pioneirismo incluiu a incorporação de vacinas e anatomia patológica ao portfólio, expandindo a conveniência e o alcance dos nossos serviços. Em 2024, acrescentamos mais um marco importante com a aquisição do renomado Laboratório Cabral Ruback, fortalecendo nossa presença no Vale do Aço com postos de coleta em Timóteo, Coronel Fabriciano e região.

Com um time engajado e “sangue nos olhos”, mantemos investimentos contínuos em tecnologia e capacitação para oferecer uma experiência laboratorial única aos nossos clientes e parceiros.

Name: SimKIDS, The Hospital for Sick Children
Description:
Welcome to the Simulation Program, a vital initiative under The Hospital for Sick Children dedicated to enhancing healthcare education and patient outcomes. Accredited by the Royal College of Physicians and Surgeons of Canada since 2013, our program is a hub for innovation and collaboration.

Since 2009, we've supported over 5,600 learners annually, facilitating more than 24,400 learner hours. Our offerings include procedural skills training, team-based education, research, community outreach, and virtual simulations. We're committed to fostering a culture of improvement, safety, and competency-based performance in pediatric care worldwide.

The Simulation Program has many versatile spaces to meet the objectives of various learners. The new 11,500 sq. ft. Simulation Centre is in the Patient Support Centre, 175 Elizabeth Street.  

The new Simulation Centre has four simulation suites, four debriefing rooms, six OSCE style suites, two large multipurpose rooms for procedural training and large group sessions, Immersive suite equipped with projection technology and capable of VR training, the SimKids Invention lab housed with 3D printers and a student lounge 

The Simulation Program is mobile and the team delivers in-situ simulations in many units, as well as, travelling to hospitals throughout the community to facilitate training and quality improvement work. 

Join us in transforming healthcare through simulation, driving excellence, and shaping the future of paediatric care.

Name: AlFarabi Medical Labs

Al Farabi Laboratories was founded by experienced Saudi consultants with over 13 years of expertise in the field of medical laboratories. Their main mission is geographic expansion to provide laboratory services throughout the Kingdom while maintaining quality results and customer satisfaction. Al Farabi Laboratories' services extend to over 60 cities across the Kingdom, both locally and internationally accredited.

The main laboratory and its branches have obtained various accreditation certificates such as CBAHI, GCI, and CAP, reflecting our commitment to providing high-quality services to our clients.

At all Al Farabi Laboratories branches, we offer a comprehensive range of routine and advanced tests supervised by specialists in pathology, including chemical, hormonal, viral, allergy, vitamin, elemental, genetic blood disorders, and microbial analyses. Al Farabi Laboratories is distinguished by its specialized Molecular PCR Analysis department, as well as tissue and cellular tests, and specialized analyses in the field of pregnancy and childbirth issues, which are rare and available only in advanced medical centers.

Al Farabi Laboratories aims to enhance health risk prevention, a motto reflected in its monthly programs and offers. We are here to provide advanced, high-quality services at affordable prices for everyone.

In summary, at Al Farabi Medical Laboratories, we strive to achieve our vision and contribute to the goals of Vision 2030 by providing exceptional and innovative healthcare services.

Name: PHTA Ltd
Description:
The Precision Health Technologies Accelerator (PHTA) is the University of Birmingham’s flagship life sciences innovation facility, based at No.1 Birmingham Health Innovation Campus. Home to Clinical Immunology Services and the Industry Trials Hub, PHTA provides state-of-the-art incubation and collaboration space to ambitious SMEs, start-ups and scale-ups.

Our facilities include 70,000 sq ft of bespoke Cat 2 wet and dry lab/office modules, the Makerspace – a prototyping and small-batch manufacturing facility – and an extensive training suite.

PHTA is designed to accommodate researchers at proof-of-concept stage through to spin-out companies and beyond – providing small health innovation businesses with much needed grow-on space.

Name: Metabiomics
Description:
Metabiomics has developed a new type of microbiome diagnostic test for early detection and monitoring of polymicrobial and immunological diseases such as inflammatory bowel disease, colon cancer, HIV infection, alcoholic liver disease, and others that are non-invasive, lower cost, more sensitive and accurate than currently available diagnostic procedures.

For the past 10 years, Metabiomics has been a pioneer in human microbiome research specializing in functional metagenomics and systems biology applied to advances in microbial DNA sequencing methods, clinical research, and in vitro diagnostics.
  
Our on-going clinical research is unraveling some of the secret relationships between human microbial communities, immunology, and health.  Our research collaborations with Diversigen, the Harvard Chan School of Medicine, Penn State University and George Mason University Microbiome Analysis Center and several medical research institutions are focusing on microbial biomarkers and immunological responses in intestinal dysbiosis, colon disease and cancer, liver disease, and other immunological diseases.

Name: OncoHelix
Description: At OncoHelix, we're proud to be recognized as Canada's leading precision diagnostics laboratory, boasting an unmatched selection of clinically-validated panels and advanced analytics. Our mission is simple: to offer top-quality molecular and immune profile testing that meets the highest clinical standards. Whether it's for diagnostics, research, commercial needs, or direct-to-consumer services we are here to deliver reliable and personalized insights - because better insights lead to better health.

Name: Metropole Laboratories Private Limited
Description: Metropole Laboratories Private Limited is an ISO 15189 accreditated pathology laboratory located in Islamabad, Pakistan. We are committed to providing high-quality laboratory and radiology services at very competitive prices. MPL is affiliated with the College of American Pathologists (CAP) USA, UK NEQAS & BIO-RAD EQAS USA for its external quality assurance programs to ensure the highest standards of results to the patients.

Name: Tikslus Elementas
Description:
UAB „Tikslus Elementas“ susikūrė iš idėjos tobulinti ir dalintis savo laboratorinės įrangos veikimo bei taikymo žiniomis su mokslo srities entuziastais. Norime, jog Lietuvoje veikiančios laboratorijos įsigytų tinkamiausią jos poreikius atitinkančią įrangą, priimtų tinkamus ilgalaikius taikymo sprendimus bei gautų aukščiausios įdiegimo ir techninio palaikymo paslaugas.

Siekdami sėkmingai vykdyti savo veikla, negalime jos atsieti nuo vertybių, todėl mums labai svarbu:

Komunikacija – proceso eigoje labai svarbu su klientu tinkamai komunikuoti. Ne tik laikytis etiketo taisyklių, tačiau ir teikti visas naujausias žinias apie pasikeitimus bei aiškiai išdėstyti darbų eigą. Tai abejoms pusėms padės atsakingai planuotis darbus ir taupyti laiką ar kaštus.
Atsakingumas – klientas visada bus patenkintas, jei gaus tai – kas buvo sutarta ir užbaigta iki galo. Būtent todėl, svarbu atsakingai atlikti bei užbaigti visus darbus laiku.
Inovatyvumas – nors pasitikime laiko patikrintomis technologijomis, tačiau nereikia pamiršti judėti į priekį ir ieškoti naujų sprendimų, padedančių greičiau, pigiau ar paprasčiau atlikti kasdienius laboratorinius darbus.

Our certified Precision Psychiatry Service analyzes brain data from EEG and ECG signals to generate DeepPsy Biomarker Reports. These reports deliver fast, actionable insights that guide psychiatrists to the most effective treatment from the start.

Powered by certified medical software and seamless cloud integration, DeepPsy enables evidence-based decisions using real-world biological signals.

We work with hospitals and clinics worldwide to bring personalized mental health care into everyday practice.

Name: GeneIQ
Description: GeneIQ is a molecular diagnostics laboratory specializing in pharmacogenomic (PGx) testing. PGx testing determines how an individual will metabolize medications based on their DNA. GeneIQ's comprehensive panel of 35 genes covers a wide array of specialties including addiction, cardiology, diabetes, gastroenterology, neurology, oncology, orthopedics, pain management, psychiatry, and rheumatology. We combine the expertise of an outstanding laboratory team combined with a world renowned scientific team. Our robust process and state of the art instrument methodology ensures expedited delivery of results and the highest level of patient support.

Name: Deutsche Gesellschaft für Hygiene und Mikrobiologie
Description:
Die DGHM mit ihren mehr als 2000 Mitgliedern bringt die in der Medizinischen und Molekularen Mikrobiologie und der Patienten-bezogenen Hygiene tätigen Wissenschaftler*innen aus dem In- und Ausland zusammen und fördert Forschung und Lehre auf diesen Gebieten.

Die jährliche Jahrestagung ist als deutschlandweit größte Fachkonferenz in diesem Bereich.

In jedem Jahr werden hervorragende Wissenschaftler*innen mit den renommierten DGHM-Preisen ausgezeichnet. Der DGHM-Hauptpreis wird an aktive Wissenschaftler*innen mit hervorragender Forschungstätigkeit verliehen, die Förderpreise an jüngere Wissenschaftler*innen für innovative Forschungsansätze, die beiden von bioMérieux und BD gesponserten Forschungs- bzw. Diagnostikpreise  für innovativen Anwendungsbezug und die Promotionspreise für  hervorragende Dissertationen. 

Herausragende Publikationen von DGHM-Mitglieder mit dem "Paper of the Month" und dem "Highlight in der Infektionsprävention und klinischen Mikrobiologie" gewürdigt.
Neben den Ständigen Arbeitsgemeinschaften: 
- Diagnostische Verfahren in der Mikrobiologie, 
- Allgemeine und Krankenhaushygiene, 
- Klinische Mikrobiologie / Infektiologie, 
- Referenzzentren und Konsiliarlaboratorien, Mikobiologisch Infektiologische Qualitätsstandards, 
- Richt- und Warnwerte in Lebensmitteln
- Aus- Weiter- und Fortbildung
wird auch die Arbeit wissenschaftlicher folgenden Fachgruppen: 
- Diagnostische und klinische Mikrobiologie, 
- Infektionsprävention und Antibiotikaresistenz in der Krankenhaushygiene, 
-  Infektionsimmunologie, 
- Eukaryontische Krankheitserreger, 
- Gastrointestinale Infektionen, 
- Lebensmittelmikrobiologie und –hygiene, 
- Mikrobielle Pathogänithät, 
- Mikrobiota, Probiotika und Wirt, 
- Molekulare Infektionsepidemiologie und Populationsgenetik,
- Zoonosen
durch die DGHM finanziell unterstützt.

Die Junge DGHM kümmert sich um die Belange insbesondere jüngerer DGHM-Mitglieder und ist thematisch nicht begrenzt.

Nossa atuação abrange Goiás, Tocantins, Mato Grosso, Mato Grosso do Sul e Distrito Federal, oferecendo suporte especializado nas áreas de alergia, autoimunidade, bioquímica, coagulação, dosagens hormonais e imunológicas, eletroforese, eletrólitos, hematologia, hemocultura, microbiologia, veterinária, point-of-care e testes rápidos.

Name: Institute For Medical Research (IMR)
Description:
The Institute for Medical Research (IMR), established in 1900 as the Pathological Institute, stands as a cornerstone of public health in Malaysia. Its rich history and unwavering commitment to research have positioned it as a premier institution, not only within the nation but also on the regional and international stage. This description delves into IMR's multifaceted contributions, highlighting its research focus, specialized services, training programs, and unwavering dedication to a healthier Malaysia.

IMR's robust research infrastructure is anchored by nine specialized research centers, each addressing critical areas of public health concern. These centers foster a collaborative environment, allowing scientists from diverse disciplines to tackle complex health challenges.

IMR continues to adapt and evolve, embracing cutting-edge technologies like genomics, proteomics, and bioinformatics to accelerate research breakthroughs. As Malaysia grapples with the evolving healthcare landscape, IMR remains steadfast in its commitment to safeguarding public health and promoting a healthier future for all Malaysians.

Name: UNIBIO Laboratoire de Biologie Médicale
Description:
UNIBIO Rhône-Alpes est un laboratoire multisite indépendant.

Société d’exercice libéral (SELARL) : la totalité du capital de la société est détenu exclusivement par des biologistes médicaux médecins ou pharmaciens. L’ensemble des laboratoires de proximité est regroupé en Auvergne - Rhône-Alpes.

Name: Grapheal
Description:
Grapheal is a spin-off from Neel Institute, at French Research Center CNRS in Grenoble. After 10 years of research and development on biomaterials fabrication and integration. Grapheal is born out of our will to improve chronic wounds medical care with a new generation of smart-bandages. 
The core of our technology is linked to graphene physical and biochemical properties. We use it as a bioactive material, an electrical plateform for wound stimulation, and a biodetection plateform to monitor healing in real time. Our smart-bandages benefits to both patients and medical staff by combining an efficient and flexible dressing with a simple smartphone app to monitor, day after day, the wound healing progresses.

Name: Miro Health
Description: Miro Health is a turnkey provider of specialty brain healthcare services. Miro Health’s seamless integration of psychiatric, neurologic, and cognitive specialities drives high-quality clinical results for individuals and populations.

Name: Juno Genetics US
Description:
Juno Genetics is a state-of-the-art laboratory specializing in preimplantation genetic testing (PGT). Our mission is to provide rigorously validated, evidence-based PGT of the highest clinical quality to IVF clinics and patients undergoing fertility treatment. 
 
We are committed to: 

- Evidence-based preimplantation genetic testing (PGT-A, -M, and -SR). We believe that patients and providers deserve genetic tests that have undergone robust analytical and clinical validation before being launched clinically. We develop and utilize custom testing platforms and methods that are unique to our lab.

- Research. We are committed to advancing knowledge in embryo genetics and have a history of >30 years of world-class research, development, and innovation. Our international teams from our three research centers have published more than 350 peer-reviewed scientific papers. We collaborate closely with our clinical partners to ensure that our advances translate into meaningful improvements in outcomes for patients.

- Collaboration and transparency. We believe that the highest quality PGT is provided through a close partnership between IVF physicians and staff, embryology teams, and the genetics laboratory. We work to seamlessly integrate workflows between the clinic and lab in order to maintain efficient and lasting relationships. We share genetic data transparently with our referring providers and patients.

- Education. We enthusiastically support continuing medical education (CME), graduate-level initiatives, and other educational activities to promote understanding and applications of embryonic diagnostics in the reproductive medicine field and beyond.

New Jersey, US - Valencia, Spain - Oxford, UK - Rome, Italy

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/junogeneticsus/

Name: Diagnum Healthcare
Description: Diagnum Healthcare is a fast-growing name in diagnostics, with a rapidly expanding network of labs and collection centres across India. Our NABL/ISO accredited facilities deliver everything from routine screenings to advanced molecular testing, accurately, affordably, and often right at your doorstep. Driven by technology and a patient-first ethos, we’re on a mission to make world-class diagnostics accessible to every corner of India.

Name: PinkDx, Inc.
Description:
PinkDx is an early-stage company whose vision is to
positively impact the health of women throughout
their life journey.

We focus on addressing the medical problems that women uniquely face by applying sophisticated scientific approaches to resolve them and provide answers that have an immediate, positive impact on their lives. Our first indication will focus on overcoming diagnostic challenges for women who present with general symptoms that could signal a gynecological cancer. 

Led by a team of diagnostics industry veterans, PinkDx is privately held, with Series A funding from prominent biotechnology investors, including Catalio Capital Management, The Production Board, Mountain Group Partners, Byers Capital, Mayo Clinic, Blue Venture Fund, Sandbox Clinical Ventures and BEVC.

Name: EDAAD Medical Company
Description: EDAAD Medical can undertake all your Biosafety Cabinet and Clean Room testing requirements including the organization of maintenance programs to ensure your clean room is in compliance with the corresponding ISO 14644 standards and CBAHI Compliances

Name: Medconn Diagnostics
Description: Medconn Diagnostics was founded in 1992, focusing on R&D, manufacturing, sales and service of in vitro diagnostic IVD products. Medconn Diagnostics is headquartered in Shanghai, China. Its business covers most provinces and regions in China and its products cover HbA1c, Clinical Chemistry, Immunoassay, POCT, etc.

Name: Eastern Scientific Corporation
Description:
Eastern Scientific Corporation (ESC) is Pakistan’s largest One Health scientific organization, redefining the future of science and integrated health solutions.
As exclusive franchise partners of global leaders, we deliver world-class diagnostics, analytical technologies, and lab solutions tailored for agriculture, healthcare, government, and education. Our portfolio includes testing kits, microbiological media, lab equipment, and research-driven services—all built on precision, reliability, and innovation.
We go beyond products by offering comprehensive services in lab testing, calibration, repair, maintenance, and research support—ensuring operational excellence nationwide.
Guided by our philosophy “Science for a Better Tomorrow,” we lead as Pakistan’s first One Health solution provider, bridging human, animal & environmental health to build a healthier, sustainable future.

Name: PT. Medquest Jaya Global
Description:
PT. Medquest Jaya Global since its establishment in 2004 concentrating in distributing medical device and pharmaceutical, by promoting innovation and latest technology. We currently distribute more than 20 leading brands in the world, which includes the equipment in the field of blood bank, cardiology, diagnostics, research and industry.

We currently divide our business into 5 divisions : blood bank, Hospital & Clinical Diagnostic, life sciences, pharmaceutical and vaccine, also overseas business. With a coverage area includes government hospitals, private hospitals, research laboratories, clinics, department of health and blood transfusion units throughout Indonesia and other country for overseas division coverage. All sales are done directly, or through tenders both domestic and international. Our field sales representatives are knowledgeable and highly trained in all of our markets and product lines.

We currently have 136 of professional employees from Marketing, Administrations, Sales, and Engineers determined to deliver better solutions to our customers that are all unique and important. We believe commitment, integrity, strong teamwork and customer satisfactions are keys to achieve our vision and mission.

Name: ScottCare
Description:
ScottCare is the leading provider of telemetry monitoring solutions designed specifically for cardiac and pulmonary rehabilitation. Our innovative technology empowers healthcare providers with real-time patient monitoring, seamless data management, and enhanced workflow efficiency—all to improve patient outcomes and optimize program operations.

At the heart of our portfolio is VersaCare, the top choice for cardiopulmonary rehab telemetry. VersaCare offers a fully integrated platform with rechargeable digital transmitters, SPO2 monitoring, wireless access, and robust reporting capabilities, ensuring rehab teams can focus on delivering exceptional patient care.

With over three decades of expertise, ScottCare continues to set the standard for rehab telemetry by delivering cutting-edge solutions that enhance clinical decision-making and streamline operations.

Headquartered in Cleveland, Ohio, ScottCare is a division of Marmon Holdings, a Berkshire Hathaway company.

Name: Premium Healthcare Group
Description:
Premium Healthcare Group is a leading, multi-disciplinary healthcare conglomerate serving patients and healthcare institutions across the GCC, Egypt, and Jordan. Established with a mission to revolutionize healthcare services in the MENA region, the Group has swiftly grown into a key player in diagnostics, laboratory supplies, and outpatient care.

The company is publicly listed on the Egyptian Stock Exchange, with plans to dual-list on international exchanges to support its ambitious growth trajectory.

Premium Healthcare Group is committed to delivering excellence through innovation, strategic acquisitions, and superior patient care.

Name: AL FAHIM HEALTHCARE SOLUTIONS L.L.C
Description:
AL FAHIM HEALTHCARE SOLUTIONS LLC is one of the leading Laboratory Equipment’s, Reagent’s & Consumable distributors Company in the U.A.E. We have branches in Dubai and Abu Dhabi representing leading international Brands in the Healthcare Industry.
AL FAHIM HEALTHCARE SOLUTIONS LLC been placed under the list of specialist subcontractor with prestigious clients such as DHA, SEHA, RAFED, MOH, Private Hospital’s/Laboratories, UAE Universities etc..

Name: Biotheranostics, Inc., A Hologic Company
Description: Biotheranostics, Inc. has been acquired by Hologic. Hologic is an innovative medical technology company whose purpose is to enable healthier lives everywhere, every day. While we discover and develop groundbreaking products and services that benefit everyone, we are especially passionate about those that advance women’s health and well-being. This allows us to be a company that prospers, grows and empowers women to experience healthier lives.

Name: TomaLab
Description:
Siamo tra i più grandi laboratori di genetica in Italia accreditati dal Sistema Sanitario della Regione Lombardia. Esaminiamo il DNA per offrire servizi di diagnostica ad elevata specializzazione per tutta la famiglia.

Il laboratorio è dotato delle tecnologie più evolute per poter implementare le più moderne metodologie in campo scientifico. Investiamo continuamente in R&D grazie al supporto di un comitato scientifico di alto livello, per offrire un supporto sempre più preciso ed esami diversificati.
La nostra mission è promuovere il buon uso della genetica inteso come scelta appropriata ed etica delle prestazioni da erogare e della valenza scientifica delle stesse. Lo facciamo mettendo le persone al centro: offrendo loro un servizio solo se necessario, formando gli operatori costantemente e rendendo comprensibile l’approccio alla materia scientifica.

Name: SYNLAB Suomi
Description:
SYNLAB Suomi on osa Euroopan suurinta laboratorioyritystä SYNLABia.

SYNLAB tarjoaa Suomessa kattavia ja korkealaatuisia laboratorio- ja kuvantamispalveluita julkisille ja yksityisille terveydenhuollon toimijoille. SYNLABin laboratoriot on sertifioitu ja akkreditoitu kansainvälisten ja EU:n laatustandardien mukaisesti (EAK, EA, ILAC, IAF) samoin periaattein kuin FINAS Suomessa. SYNLABin laboratoriot ovat ISO15189-standardin mukaisia testilaboratorioita.

SYNLAB-konsernin palveluksessa on noin 40 000 työntekijää. Toimimme tällä hetkellä n. 30 maassa neljässä maanosassa. Vuotuinen tutkimusmäärämme on noin 400 miljoonaa testiä. Valikoimamme kattaa noin 5000 tutkimusnimikettä ja tämän lisäksi kehitämme vuosittain jopa 100 uutta tutkimusta yhteistyössä yliopistojen ja tutkimusryhmien kanssa, mukaan lukien yrityksen ylläpitämä SYNLAB Academy.

Name: Future Labs Live Basel
Description:
This is the world’s most diverse, stimulating, and exciting event for the future of all labs. Start-ups and disruptors will meet lab heads and lab techs, together with the tech & practice innovators.

We’re breaking down silos within and between organisations to bring people together to come up with the ideas, the tech and the processes that’ll transform the lab of tomorrow.

Name: Innoquest Diagnostics
Description: In March 2021, Innoquest Diagnostics Pte Ltd (The merger between Quest Laboratories Pte Ltd and Innovative Diagnostics Pte Ltd) was officially launched and we operate from seven facilities in Singapore. Our main laboratory is installed with the Roche total laboratory automation system with the capability to perform tests for over 10,000 patient episodes a day.

Name: Medics Labor
Description:
Unser Fokus liegt auf qualitativ hochstehenden labormedizinischen Dienstleistungen für Arztpraxen, Ärztezentren und Heime.

Die Bereiche klinische Chemie, Hämatologie, Infektionsserologie, Allergologie, Endokrinologie, klinische Immunologie und medizinische Mikrobiologie erledigen wir in Eigenregie. 
Für einige wenige spezialanalytische Verfahren wie genetische Abklärungen arbeiten wir seit Jahren mit erfahrenen Partnerlaboren zusammen.

Schnell und exakt beurteilen wir Untersuchungsmaterial der gesamten Histo- und Zytopathologie.

Name: Eastern Scientific Corporation
Description:
Transforming Lives Through Science | Leading Organization in Agri-Food, Animal & Human Healthcare, Public, and Diversified Sectors | Offering a Comprehensive Range of High-Quality Products and Services | Join Us in Shaping a Better Tomorrow | #Science #Quality #ISOCertified

Eastern Scientific Corporation is a leading scientific organization based in Pakistan, providing high-quality scientific solutions across diverse sectors. Our vision is to become the foremost trusted leader in the realm of science and technology, spearheading ground-breaking advancements and enabling customers to achieve remarkable success.

We offer a comprehensive range of products and services in Agri-Food, Animal & Human Healthcare, Public, and Diversified sectors. Our offerings include diagnostics, lab equipment, chemicals and hygiene, food ingredients, laboratory consumables, and supplies.

We are affiliated with SECP, FBR, LCCI, and ISO and have established a robust Quality Management System (QMS) to ensure that all offerings meet or surpass customer expectations.

We value our employees and strive to create a positive work environment that fosters creativity, innovation, and collaboration. We actively support the personal and professional growth of our employees through comprehensive training and development programs.

Our core values of Integrity, Respect, Innovation, Teamwork, Sustainability, Agility, Leadership, Commitment, and Excellence guide our operations and decision-making processes. We believe in exceptional customer service and value diversity and inclusion in our corporate culture.

Eastern Scientific Corporation invests in R&D, partnerships, and collaborations to develop new products and services. Our sustainable strategy focuses on reducing our environmental footprint and promoting social welfare.

Name: Amaral Costa Medicina Diagnóstica
Description:
Consciente do seu compromisso e responsabilidade com seus clientes, que acreditam e o fazem crescer há mais de 70 anos, o Amaral Costa, vem buscando sempre a excelência no que faz, e por isso investe não só em estrutura física, mas principalmente na capacitação de seus colaboradores, bem como está à frente da aquisição tecnológica, assegurando assim a rapidez, qualidade e confiabilidade na prestação de seus serviços.

O Amaral Costa tem orgulho de ser atualmente um dos maiores laboratórios de análises clínicas da região Norte: uma região tão rica e bela. E é por isso que dedicamos nossos esforços a quem nos garante o sentido a seguir: Você, nosso cliente, que certifica a nossa credibilidade no dia a dia. Amaral Costa: Há 70 anos especialista em cuidar de você!

Name: Zarephath Health
Description:
Zarephath Health is a trusted medical device distribution company serving healthcare professionals across Africa and beyond. With offices in South Africa and strategic partnerships through Zarephath Group in Zimbabwe, we deliver cutting-edge rapid diagnostic testing solutions designed to improve clinical outcomes and streamline patient care.

We understand the demands of frontline healthcare, and our mission is to equip providers with accurate, easy-to-use, and cost-effective diagnostic tools that support early detection and timely intervention.

Our Product Portfolio Includes:
	•	Six-in-One STI Rapid Diagnostic Testing Kits
Diagnose multiple sexually transmitted infections in a single test — ideal for efficient screening and management in both clinical and outreach settings.
	•	HPV Rapid Diagnostic Testing Kits
A key component in cervical cancer prevention programs, offering fast and reliable HPV detection for early intervention.
	•	TB Antigen Rapid Diagnostic Testing Kits
Accelerate TB diagnosis and treatment decisions with this innovative, rapid antigen-based solution.
	•	Four-in-One Antenatal Marker
Screen for HIV, Syphilis, HBV, and HCV in a single test — essential for comprehensive antenatal care and early risk mitigation.

At Zarephath Health, we’re not just delivering test kits — we’re supporting better patient outcomes, improving healthcare access, and partnering with providers to build healthier communities.

Name: Opal Bio Pharma
Description: We are a science base company with more than 100 experties just work on developing new vaccines, our value is working on high-tech vaccine with shortage in world to protecting mankind from suffering from common diseases and make them opportunity to exprince a better life with a little cost.

Name: PureLabs
Description:
PureLabs intende contribuire allo sviluppo dei servizi sanitari di prossimità, realizzando la prima rete di laboratori diagnostici costruita sulle esigenze dei pazienti.
PureLabs garantisce l'accesso a esami innovativi in maniera capillare insieme alla comodità dei servizi digitali ad alto valore aggiunto, quali tele health e remote monitoring

Name: Labtronics S.A.S
Description: Labtronics SAS, Empresa colombiana fundada en 1999 por profesionales con amplia experiencia en comercialización de productos para diagnóstico clínico, servicio técnico y asesoría científica. Representa en Colombia empresas multinacionales con reconocimiento a nivel mundial por su calidad, respaldo y economía.

Name: Health Supervisors
Description: Occupational Health & Wellbeing Services

Name: Gencell - Brasil
Description:
A Gencell é um laboratório especializado em exames genéticos de alta tecnologia, apoiando médicos, laboratórios e pesquisadores na tomada de decisões de diagnóstico e tratamento, além de apoio à pesquisa científica. 

Fundada em 2010 na Colômbia, a Gencell oferece soluções inovadoras em medicina genômica, biologia molecular e bioinformática. Presente no Brasil desde 2016, a Gencell atua em sete países da América Latina, fornecendo testes genéticos customizados nas áreas de Oncologia, Genética e Sequenciamento, com foco em atender as necessidades específicas do mercado brasileiro.

Name: Chondrometrics GmbH
Description:
Chondrometrics is a leading provider of medical image analysis services to #researchers in academia and in the pharmaceutical industry. The focus is on quantitative analysis of articular and peri-articular tissues, specifically articular #cartilage, #meniscus, #synovitis, #bone, #adipose tissue, and #muscle. Precise measurements of tissue dimensions (#morphometry)  and composition (#relaxometry) are obtained from magnetic resonance images (#MRI), using an #ISO13485 compliant medial device software and quality control (#QC) process, or fully automated analysis using convolutional neural networks (#CNNs). The thematic focus of the company is on the research of articular tissue development, function, pathophysiology, and on #osteoarthritis, specifically the development of disease- and structure- modifying osteoarthritis drugs (#DMOADs) in clinical trials together with partners from the pharmaceutical industry.

Key Staff:
CEO / CMO: @Felix Eckstein
CTO: @Wolfgang Wirth
CHR: @Susanne Maschek

Name: HepQuant, LLC
Description: HepQuant develops non-invasive, quantitative tests that measure liver health. The HepQuant DuO Test enables healthcare providers to manage patients with liver diseases more effectively. The HepQuant DuO Test delivers information about liver cell function and portal-systemic shunting, attributes of liver disease that are associated with clinical outcomes. Results may be used by a physician in conjunction with clinical evaluation and other tests to aid in the decision to proceed with or defer invasive procedures, to monitor treatment response, or to predict disease progression and adverse outcomes, such as ascites, encephalopathy and variceal bleeding.

Name: 4Dental Labs
Description:
4Dental is the leading dental lab chain in the Netherlands, operating over 45 locations throughout the country. The group characterizes itself by 1) nationwide coverage, 2) innovative digital workflows, 3) 100+ year heritage, and 4) ownership of Asian labs to offer an economical attractive alternative.

We provide dentists (and indirectly patients) with a variety of products to assist in the provision of oral health care. These products include crowns, bridges, dentures and other dental products. 

The group operates mainly under the 4Dental brand, but also operates under the so called 4Dental Partner brands, like for example Optident, Arodent, and TTL Weegels.

The group tries to differentiate itself by being at the forefront of the digitalization in the industry. For crown & bridges we offer our customers a full digital workflow. We offer extensive CAD capabilities and have our own CAM facility. 

4Dental is owner of the largest dental lab group of South East Asia, namely Hexa Ceram, and owner of a large export lab in China. This allows us to offer our customers, next to our Dutch product line, a more economical import line. Daily flights between the Netherlands and Thailand / China ensure that our customers are served swiftly.

Name: Clínica Dr. Roberto Raña
Description:
Somos una institución dedicada al cuidado de la salud con 50 años de trayectoria. Nuestra propuesta de servicio está integrada por tres unidades principales: laboratorio de análisis clínicos, consultorios externos, banco de sangre y medicina tranfusional. 
También brindamos el servicio de Laboratorio a  Domicilio para las localidades de Neuquén Capital, Plottier y Centenario (Provincia de Neuquén).

Name: Clinpath Pathology
Description:
Clinpath is a highly respected, well established private pathology practice, providing laboratory services to general practitioners, specialists, private hospitals, and aged care facilities in Adelaide, South Australia.

There are over 160 collection centres located across Adelaide and regional South Australia for patient convenience. 

We operate laboratories at the Calvary Adelaide Hospital, Calvary North Adelaide Hospital, Calvary Central Districts Hospital, Tennyson Centre, St Andrew's Hospital and St Andrew's Oncology. 

Our Calvary Adelaide Hospital laboratory operates 365 days per year, 24 hours a day, and is staffed to respond to emergency situations at all times.

Name: Lifenity
Description: Leading provider in the field of diagnostic and healthcare solutions across India. It has the expertise in mass screening , diagnostics and healthcare analytics which are used by eminent hospitals , healthcare professionals and government bodies.

Name: Laboroil
Description:
A Laboroil é um laboratório de análise de óleos lubrificantes, graxas, diesel, gasolina, líquido de arrefecimento e Arla 32 - para monitoramento de desgaste, contaminação e de condições de uso desses produtos em equipamentos automotivos e industriais.
Desde 1975 mantendo pioneirismo em tecnologia, investigação e desenvolvimento em análise de fluidos, a empresa registra um acervo de milhões – sim! Milhões! – de amostras analisadas com um número extraordinário de ensaios realizados e pareceres emitidos.
Resultados assertivos que geram economia e melhor aproveitamento da vida útil de lubrificantes e equipamentos.

Name: Ascend Clinical
Description:
Ascend Clinical, LLC is the nation’s leading provider of laboratory testing, environmental water testing, including Legionella and AAMI ST108

Ascend Clinical was founded in Northern California in 2000 as a clinical reference laboratory specializing in testing services for kidney disease.  For over 20 years, we have been working with dialysis clinics to provide industry-leading service, comprehensive testing, innovative tools and technology. Ascend has focused on innovating and growing so we can anticipate our customers’ needs to deliver best-in-class services and optimize patient care.

In addition to accurate, reliable and efficient laboratory testing, the company also offers LabCheck, a web-based software (SaaS) that enables dialysis clinics to efficiently operate and manage patient care.

Ascend is headquartered in Sunnyvale, CA, with additional offices in Colorado. Employing over 200 people across 23 states. The company was named one of the Bay Area’s Top Workplaces.

Name: Bombicino Diagnósticos S.A.
Description:
Bombicino es Salud Ocupacional con más de 50 años de trayectoria. 
Brindamos servicios excepcionales y soluciones innovadoras a empresas de todos los tamaños y sectores. Contamos con dos sedes en Recoleta y San Isidro y una amplia red de prestadores a nivel nacional.
Nos enorgullece ser pioneros en la promoción de ambientes laborales seguros, saludables y productivos. 

Como especialistas de extensa trayectoria y amplia experiencia en Salud ocupacional estamos preparados para poder desarrollar soluciones múltiples a posibles necesidades que vuestra empresa pueda llegar a plantear, tanto en materia de prestaciones como de asesoramiento técnico y/o profesional.

Nos orientamos a brindar una estructura organizada y funcional que facilite el mejor nivel de servicio, conjugando las expectativas de los usuarios, el bienestar del personal, y el logro de los objetivos planteados por la empresa.

Name: Akralab
Description:
Akralab es uno de los principales distribuidores de Diagnóstico Humano y soluciones IVD en España.

La empresa ofrece soluciones para Análisis Clínicos, Anatomía Patológica, qPCR y procesos Preanalíticos. Con una red comercial a nivel nacional y una sólida presencia en los mercados español y europeo, garantiza un suministro fiable, gran capacidad de almacenamiento de productos y reactivos, y su propio servicio técnico.

Akralab proporciona soluciones integrales para el sector sanitario, actuando como un socio sólido y de confianza para cubrir todas las necesidades diagnósticas. Su compromiso: calidad y soporte para profesionales y laboratorios

Akralab is one of the leading distributors of Human Diagnostics and IVD solutions in Spain.

The company provides solutions for Clinical Analysis, Anatomical Pathology, qPCR, and Preanalytical processes. With a nationwide sales network and a strong presence in both Spanish and European markets, it ensures reliable supply, extensive storage capacity for products and reagents, and its own technical service.

Akralab delivers comprehensive solutions for the healthcare sector, acting as a solid and trusted partner to meet all diagnostic needs. Its commitment: quality and support for professionals and laboratories.

Name: SYNLAB CZ & SK
Description:
Patříme mezi největší laboratorní uskupení v České republice. Zaměstnáváme přibližně 900 zaměstnanců, provozujeme 12 akreditovaných laboratoří a síť více než 90 odběrových pracovišť. Jsme součástí nadnárodní skupiny SYNLAB Group, která působí ve více než 40 zemích světa a zaměstnává přes 20 tisíc lidí. 

Zakládáme si na špičkovém laboratorním zpracování odebraných vzorků v co nejkratším čase. Kromě odběrů vzorků, jejich převozu do laboratoře, vlastní diagnostiky a doručení výsledků vyšetření lékaři či pacientovi nabízíme také odborné poradenství.

Disponujeme širokým know-how i vlastními vědeckými týmy, které přicházejí s novými metodami vyšetření. Vlastníme desítky unikátních metod, jež jsou přesné, rychlé a také k pacientům maximálně ohleduplné.

Intenzivně se zaměřujeme na rozvoj laboratorních služeb také v oblastech veterinární a environmentální diagnostiky.

Name: SYNLAB Provence
Description:
SYNLAB Provence est un groupement de 66 laboratoires de biologie médicale répartis sur les Bouches-du-Rhône (55 sites), le Vaucluse (7 sites) et les Alpes de Haute-Provence (4 sites), accueillant, en moyenne, 6000 patients par jour. 

 SYNLAB Provence compte 70 biologistes médicaux (médecins et pharmaciens), 3 pôles médicaux d’excellence, 8 plateaux techniques et près de 500 collaborateurs. 

 SYNLAB Provence constitue la plus importante filiale française du groupe SYNLAB, leader européen du diagnostic médical.

Name: BIOLABORATORIO S.A.
Description: Somos una empresa especializada en laboratorio y servicios de salud, contamos con 5 años de experiencia brindando servicios de laboratorio en general y participando como proveedores de Servicios Ocupacionales.

Name: Melbourne Pathology
Description:
Melbourne Pathology is the premier provider of pathology services in Victoria, built on the dedication and expertise of our staff.

Having served the Victorian community for more than 90 years, we are the oldest established private pathology practice in Australia. Since the 1920's, we have been committed to diagnostic excellence and independence. Today, we form part of Sonic Healthcare, one of the world's largest diagnostic medical companies. Sonic Healthcare is proudly Australian owned.

Our highly experienced pathologists are leaders in their field with specialist knowledge and expertise. They provide current, informed and practical advice to assist with interpretation of results to clinicians. 

We have state-of-the-art 24-hour laboratories in Collingwood, Richmond, Box Hill and Mulgrave, with additional laboratories in Geelong, Mornington, Malvern, Footscray, Moe, Bendigo and Ballarat. These laboratories support more than 300 collection centres throughout Melbourne and regional Victoria.

Since our beginning, we have valued independence, personalised service and quality care and these remain the hallmarks of Melbourne Pathology today.

Name: WELL Health Diagnostic Centres
Description: Our 50+ locations in Ontario and Alberta provide OHIP and AHCIP-covered cardiology, radiology, respirology, endocrinology, and sleep diagnostic services with shorter wait times, faster report turn-around, and the highest standard of patient care.

Name: MIDA Mec
Description: A leading manufacturer of medical plastic consumable labwares for hematology, biochemistry and microbiology.
Location: Long An Province, Vietnam, Long An

Name: Grupo Mastellini
Description:

Name: Rieder MedEvidence
Description: Rieder MedEvidence is one solution with one mission: to give doctors clarity they can defend. By combining medical heritage with advanced AI, we transform overwhelming data into evidence that is fast, reliable, and auditable at the point of care.

Name: Laboratório Linus Pauling
Description:
Não somos o mais velho, mas com certeza temos grande amor e dedicação pelo que fazemos, e isso nos tornou um dos laboratórios mais tradicionais em Medicina Diagnóstica Laboratorial e Vacinas. Afinal, faz parte do nosso jeito premium de ser priorizar a sua experiência durante o contato conosco, seja em uma de nossas unidades ou no conforto do nosso atendimento domiciliar.

Nascemos em 1995, e de lá para cá, crescemos, expandimos e principalmente aprendemos com o apoio de todas as pessoas que fizeram e fazem parte da nossa história. Com elas entendemos que pensar no futuro é trazer para o presente novas soluções para proporcionar ainda mais bem-estar para você, meu cliente, por isso investimos em pessoas, tecnologia e na qualidade do atendimento. Tudo para te proporcionar uma experiência Premium.

Name: Alshamel Medical Company
Description: starting 2020 Alshamel Medical Laboratories Management Co. started it's journey competing to provide the best care, diagnostic procedures, instrument technologies and atmosphere for our customers on daily basis. we challenge ourselves to leave an impact that matters on our customers.

Name: ALLÔ LABO
Description:
ALLÔ LABO offre un service de prélèvement et de rendu de résultats à domicile, pour une expérience de santé plus pratique et adaptée à votre rythme. Notre équipe de professionnels qualifiés se déplace directement chez vous pour effectuer les prélèvements nécessaires, évitant ainsi les déplacements contraignants en laboratoire. Grâce à notre service, vous gagnez du temps et bénéficiez d'une prise en charge personnalisée et efficace.

   Avec un taux de satisfaction de 95%, nos clients apprécient la praticité et la qualité de notre service, soulignant la rapidité des interventions et la gentillesse de nos équipes. En moyenne, nos résultats sont prêts en moins de 24 heures, vous permettant une réactivité optimale en cas de besoin. De plus, notre service couvre une large gamme d'analyses médicales, répondant ainsi à différents besoins et exigences.

Name: Health United Pvt Ltd
Description:
Health United is a state-of-the-art healthcare company that aims to change/revolutionize the way health systems are operated. 

Health United uses technology, data and AI to upgrade our current healthcare ecosystem with focus on improving efficiency, consistency, standardization of care. We want to build systems around the stakeholders focusing on their pain points that makes healthcare accessible, affordable, adaptive and ever evolving, one step at a time. We believe in tackling the healthcare challenges by innovating consumer centric products and services that will ease the lives of both care providers and patients.

Name: Vistim Labs
Description:
Vistim Labs' Ceregram brain imaging product enables private practice clinicians to offer instant, in-clinic brain imaging with similar image results as PET, for monitoring neurodegenerative disease progression.

Our mission is give doctors the means to cure devastating diseases like Alzheimer's, by providing a feedback loop to know when treatments are working.

We are valued for our ability to estimate multiple dementia endpoints in a single EEG, including full-resolution PET imaging. Includes endpoints like: cognitive performance, amyloid & tau accumulation, alpha-synuclein, and neurodegeneration.

As far as we know, we are the only EEG technology in the world capable of structural brain-imaging.

Name: UNIONE SANITARIA INTERNAZIONALE SPA
Description: LABORATORIO DI ANALISI CLINICHE LA SOCIETA  HA PER OGGETTO: 1. L ORGANIZZAZIONE E GESTIONE DI SERVIZI, CON RELATIVE ATTREZZATURE E MACCHINARI DI LABORATORI: DI ANALISI CHIMICO CLINICHE, DI PATOLOGIA CLINICA, DI TOSSICOLOGIA, DI MEDICINA DEL LAVORO, DI RICERCHE DIAGNOSTICHE, DI RICERCA

BIOTRON is a major importer of laboratory equipment and instruments, such as glassware, plastics, porcelain, and other laboratory materials. BIOTRON also offers cutting-edge technology, high-quality items, and exceptional customer service with over 30 years of experience selling medical equipment, supplies, and procedures, establishing itself as a dependable partner in satisfying laboratory requirements. We are dedicated to providing creative solutions while maintaining high client satisfaction.

WHY BIOTRON?
BIOTRON is an expert in the laboratory business through a combination of experience, high-quality products, creative solutions, and a customer-centric approach, servicing a wide range of markets and contributing to advances in healthcare and scientific research.

Name: Life Genomics Diagnostics Brazil
Description: At Life Genomics, we use Next Generation Sequencing technologies (NGS acronym). NGS is a series of technologies that allow the sequencing of large genomes in a short period of time. It is used to identify the order of nucleotides in your genome or target regions of RNA or DNA. These technologies have achieved several critical goals in the field of genetics research – such as workflow optimization, result personalization, data analysis and interpretation with superior throughput, scalability and speed.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: SYNLAB - Solutions in Diagnostics
Description:
SYNLAB – Solutions in Diagnostics is the division of the SYNLAB Group responsible for providing diagnostic solutions with the highest quality control to the healthcare industry. Taking advantage of a local and a wide network of production facilities in Europe, we provide clinical diagnostic to partners in Iberia, Latin America, Middle East and Africa.

Our goal is to be a reference partner for our customers. We allow them to incorporate a wide range of exams, comparable to major international centers, without the acquisition and maintenance costs. Furthermore, we offer the SYNLAB Group extended knowledge in all diagnostic areas and high technology production platforms.

Our experience in the health market and laboratory analysis allows us to understand the dynamics of each client giving us the flexibility to adapt our service model. This creates synergy and supportiveness with the laboratories we serve.

Name: CEDUS Centro Avançado em Diagnóstico
Description:
O Cedus é um Centro de Diagnóstico por Imagem qualificado e com reconhecimento na área com o certificado ISO 9001:2015. 

Realizamos com ética, exames de Medicina Diagnóstica visando um reconhecimento de profissionalismo, envolvendo a equipe médica até a operação para garantir a segurança e acolhimento nos serviços prestados.

Contamos com 6 unidade em Belo Horizonte, Betim e Contagem, mais de 90 médicos no nosso corpo clínico e diversos exames.

Name: Mavi Laboratuarlar Grubu
Description:
Doğru Tanı, Güvenilir Hizmet, 2003’ten Bugüne Daha Fazla Sağlık İçin…
Mavi Laboratuvarlar Grubu, 2003 yılında kurucumuz İnanç Yılmaz ÇETİNTAŞ liderliğinde, tıbbi tanı ve tahlil alanında yüksek kalite standartlarına sahip laboratuvar hizmeti sunmak amacıyla kurulmuştur. Kuruluşumuzdan bu yana geçen süre içerisinde, klinik laboratuvarcılıkta bilimsel doğruluğu, teknolojik gelişmeleri ve hasta memnuniyetini merkeze alan bir yaklaşımla sektörde güvenilir bir marka haline gelmiş bulunmaktayız.

Hizmet sunduğumuz bireylere ve sağlık kuruluşlarına, tanı süreçlerinde hızlı, doğru ve bilimsel olarak güvenilir veriler sunarak, sağlık kararlarının en doğru şekilde alınmasına katkı sağlamayı ilke ediniyoruz.

Bilimsel Temellere Dayalı, Güvenilir Laboratuvar Çözümleri
Mavi Laboratuvarlar Grubu, mikrobiyoloji, biyokimya, hematoloji, hormon, alerji ve özel test alanlarında geniş kapsamlı tahlil hizmetleri sunmaktadır. Sahip olduğumuz güncel laboratuvar teknolojisi, dijital altyapı sistemleri, uzman doktor kadromuz, deneyimli sağlık personelimiz sayesinde, hasta ve hekimlerin tanıya ulaşma süreçlerini en hızlı ve en güvenilir biçimde desteklemekteyiz.

Tüm laboratuvar süreçlerimiz, ulusal ve uluslararası kalite standartlarına uygun olarak yönetilmekte olup, etik değerler, hasta gizliliği, veri güvenliği ve bilimsel sorumluluk temel ilkelerimiz arasında yer almaktadır.

İstanbul Genelinde Yaygın Hizmet Ağı
Bugün itibarıyla, İstanbul’un beş farklı lokasyonunda faaliyet gösteren şubelerimiz aracılığıyla, kent genelinde geniş bir hizmet ağına ulaşmış bulunuyoruz. Her biri alanında yetkin kadrolara sahip şubelerimiz şunlardır:

Fulya Şubesi
Ataköy Şubesi
Çapa Şubesi
Kozyatağı Şubesi
Beykent Şubesi
Her şubemizde, hızlı sonuç bildirimi, doğru analiz, hasta odaklı yaklaşım ve profesyonel hizmet anlayışı ile hizmet sunmaktayız. Hizmet kalitemiz, yalnızca sonuçlarla değil, süreç boyunca sağlanan destekle de kendini göstermektedir.

Name: EUROLAB LABORATUVAR A.Ş.
Description:
Test Analiz ve Belgelendirme;
Belgelendirmenin amacı, bir kurum ve kuruluşta işletilen bir yönetim sisteminin ilgili standartlara uyduğunun ve etkin şekilde uygulandığının bağımsız bir kuruluş tarafından kanıtlanmasıdır. Belgelendirme aynı zamanda yönetim sistemi standartlarının, kurum veya kuruluşun açıkladığı politika ve hedefleri, sürekli olarak gerçekleştirebilme kapasitesinin bulunduğunun da bir göstergesidir. Belge almış olan bir kuruluş, bu şekilde kendisine bir katma değer yaratmış olmaktadır.

, hem ulusal hem de uluslararası yetkili kuruluşlar tarafından yayınlanarak uygulamaya konulan standartlar ve yasa, yönetmelik, tüzük ve benzeri yasal düzenlemeler doğrultusunda belgelendirme çalışmaları yapmaktadır. Belgelendirme konusu sistemin gereklerine ve faaliyet konusuna bağlı olarak ön denetim ve saha denetim çalışmaları planlanmakta, yürütülmekte ve gerekli koşulların sağlanması durumunda firmalara ilgili sistemin belgesi düzenlenerek teslim edilmektedir. Ayrıca belgenin geçerlik süresi içinde firmaların yıllık dönemsel denetimleri de yapılmaktadır.

Belgelendirme çalışmaları kapsamında, ürünlere yönelik test ve analiz çalışmaları, gözetim hizmetleri, uygunluk kontrolleri ve benzeri faaliyetler de yapılmaktadır.

Muayene ve test çalışmaları

Yönetim sistemleri kurulurken firma faaliyetlerinin ilgili standartlara uygun hale getirilmesi sırasında yapılan çeşitli muyane işlemleri ve yapılması gerekli ölçümler ve testler bulunmaktadır. LVD alçak gerilim testi, EMC elektromanyetik uyumluluk testi, temiz oda testleri, hava mikrobiyolojisi testleri, iş sağlığı ve güvenliği analizleri, aydınlatma ölçümü, toz ölçümü, gürültü ölçümü, gaz ölçümü, titreşim ölçümü bunlardan sadece birkaçıdır.

Name: Sanabil Medical

Sanabil Medical Establishment is a company specialized in providing all kinds of medical supplies with high quality and exceptional services. We are committed to offering the best service and highest quality by collaborating with prominent partners to ensure the highest level of service and guarantee your comfort and satisfaction. We always strive to achieve customer satisfaction and meet their needs in the best possible way. Our headquarters is in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
