Name: Arablab Group
Description:
ARABLAB ...A TOTAL GLOBAL BRAND

ARABLAB is the #1 TECHNOLOGY FORUM... where almost 1,000 exhibitors meet visiting buyers from over 100 countries!

ARABLAB is the #1 BUSINESS to BUSINESS SHOW... where over 10,000+ buyers and distributors formulate global business partnerships!
 
ARABLAB hits the #1 Spot with More Space and New Specialist Sectors!

ARABLAB is the only trade show for the Analytical Industry that reaches buyers from the growth markets such as the Middle East & Africa and the Indian Sub-Continent, as well as China & Asia. ARABLAB connects people from all over the world and showcases the very latest laboratory and instrumentation equipment from all the leading manufacturers in the world.

The addition of more exhibition space, the development of a new dedicated show sector CHEMLAB, and the third year of ENVIROTEC, a specialist Environmental Technology show alongside the main exhibition, has further secured ARABLAB’s position as one of the world’s leading events for the Analytical Industry.

David Domoney, Managing Director of the ARABLAB Group, highlighted the growth of the show and explained; "The 2017 version of ARABLAB will be the 34th session of the show, and we have worked hard to maintain its relevance and value to a market that has changed considerably, over the intervening three decades. That we have succeeded, is reflected in the position the show holds today as one of the pre-eminent events for the analytical industry anywhere in the world.

"Staying relevant for such a diverse industry is a constant challenge," he said. "We have developed specialist show sectors allowing both visitors and exhibitors to focus on their core interests. For 2017 we have added CHEMLAB to join the existing BIOLAB, PETROLAB, MEDILAB, FOODLAB and NANOLAB sectors."

Name: Fundación para el Progreso de la Medicina
Description:
La Fundación para el Progreso de la Medicina (FPM) fue creada en abril del 1962 con el apoyo de los funcionarios del Health Plan de la Fundación Kaiser de Estados Unidos.
La actividad científica constituye uno de los pilares que sostiene la visión y la misión de esta institución, que se traduce en trabajos de investigación clínica y básica. 
Durante más de 40 años de trayectoria de nuestra institución hemos crecido e incorporado nuevos laboratorios tales como química clínica, separación de metabolitos y drogas, inmunología, biología molecular, citometría de flujo, hemostasia y coagulación. 
Nuestra calidad y eficiencia cuentan con el reconocimiento de la comunidad lo que se ve reflejado en el incremento de pacientes atendidos en los últimos años. Esto nos motivó a realizar modificaciones edilicias desde el año 2009 a fin de brindar una mejor atención.

Name: ID8 - Inovação em Diagnóstico
Description:
Somos um laboratório de apoio focado no diagnóstico molecular com entrega rápida, oferecendo resultados em poucas horas após o recebimento da amostra, com um fluxo de trabalho operacional os 7 dias da semana. 

Nossos serviços vão além do diagnóstico. Inovamos com metodologias simples e ágeis, reduzindo consideravelmente o tempo de entrega do resultado, possibilitando ao paciente a chance de um tratamento mais assertivo e direcionado. 

Em nosso radar estão 8 processos que norteiam um modelo inovador na maneira de fazer diagnóstico, que trazem benefícios à saúde do paciente e otimização de custos às instituições.

Name: Lazarus 3D
Description:
Lazarus 3D produces anatomical models for surgical training and pre-operative rehearsal, and utilize a patented 3D printing process and proprietary materials to optimize realism for surgical simulation.

In addition to Pre-Sure FDA-cleared patient-specific models that can be created from MRI or CT data to rehearse for an upcoming surgery, Lazarus 3D also offers Skill-Sure customized training models for medical device companies and teaching hospitals that are interested in accelerating the learning curve for the latest surgical procedures.

Name: EXPRESSMED Diagnostics & Research
Description:
EXPRESSMED Diagnostics & Research is a Multi-Omics organization based in the Kingdom of Bahrain that provides services to hospitals, clinics, private entities, and research and educational facilities.

The services provided by EXPRESSMED include Anatomic Pathology, Clinical Pathology, Electron Microscopy, and Genomics and Precision Medicine. The departments that provide these services contribute to the Multi-Omics approach and the research activities. 

With our experienced and qualified pathologists with different subspecialties and scientists' supervision, the methodologies are performed by highly skilled laboratory technologists and technicians, where we provide results by maintaining efficiency and accuracy.

Name: CND Life Sciences
Description: CND Life Sciences is dedicated to supporting the care of patients suffering from neurodegenerative diseases and other conditions.  Operating a CLIA-certified and CAP-accredited laboratory in Scottsdale, AZ, CND launched the Syn-One Test as the first commercially available test to detect, visualize, and quantify the presence of misfolded phosphorylated alpha-synuclein in cutaneous nerve fibers.  The test serves as an objective diagnostic tool to aid in the confirmation of a synucleinopathy in patients with suspected Parkinson’s disease (PD), dementia with Lewy bodies (DLB), multiple system atrophy (MSA), or pure autonomic failure (PAF). Through analysis of three small in-office skin biopsies provided by a referring physician, CND offers a convenient, accurate, minimally invasive alternative to aid in the diagnosis of neurodegenerative diseases.  The company has research collaborations with multiple biopharmaceutical companies and is committed to advancing science in the field.

Name: Nucitec
Description: Somos un laboratorio farmacéutico enfocado en el desarrollo y comercialización de terapias innovadoras para el tratamiento de enfermedades crónico degenerativas. Basándonos en la innovación de productos de consumo y generación de tecnología, Nucitec contribuye al mejoramiento de la salud en las siguientes enfermedades: obesidad, diabetes, hipertensión, hiperlipidemia, osteoporosis, insuficiencia renal y desnutrición

Name: Briogene (Private) Limited
Description:
Briogene is a diversified healthcare solution provider. The company offers broad range of established & innovative products for use in the fields of medical diagnostics, treatment and disease management. The strong & deep rooted legacy of Getz Group of Companies and partnership with QIAGEN enabled Briogene to position itself as a premier supplier of innovative solutions to the healthcare industry. We are dedicated towards introducing methods that are safe and effective to improve the health conditions and the lives of patients suffering from disease. Our main objective is to cater to the needs of our patients and meet expectations of health care professionals – within the framework of best practices science and technology has to offer.

Briogene is a member of Getz Healthcare.

For more than 110 years, our companies have been conducting business in the Asia Pacific region. In 2016, we rebranded nine healthcare businesses within The Getz Group of companies, to Getz Healthcare. This milestone allows us to consolidate our expertise and best practices by integrating our operations and establishing ourselves as the leading distribution company for medical devices, equipment and consumables across Asia Pacific.

We are proud to be an ISO 9001:2015 certified company. Headquartered in Singapore, we serve 7,500 customers, we work with over 450+ Business Partners worldwide and have 23 offices and distribution centers spread across Australia, Hong Kong, Malaysia, New Zealand, Pakistan, Philippines,
Taiwan, Thailand, and Vietnam.

Getz Healthcare is part of The Getz Group of companies. Our mission is to bring meaningful healthcare solutions to the people of Asia Pacific.

For more information, visit Getz Healthcare at www.getzhealthcare.com

Name: NuMeRI
Description:
NuMeRI is a not-for-profit company, providing a framework to consolidate expertise and to implement new strategic initiatives in nuclear medicine technologies and biosciences. This will create significant Research, Development and Innovation (RD& I) capacity in South Africa.

NuMeRI is a all inclusive medical imaging facility dedicated to drug development and clinical research.

Name: Clinipath Pathology
Description:
Clinipath Pathology is Western Australia’s leading private pathology practice, with over 260 collection centres spanning from Broome to Albany, and laboratories in Osborne Park, Bunbury and Kalgoorlie.

We are an established and well-respected pathology provider committed to delivering exceptional patient care to our community through our comprehensive, professional pathology services, with accurate results and fast turnaround times. 

Our success is achieved through our highly experienced locally based pathologists, laboratory scientists, pathology collectors, and administrative staff, as well as our commitment to excellence and medical innovation.

Name: labor team
Description: labor team ist ein unabhängiges medizinisches Labor in Goldach am Bodensee, das in allen Teilen der Schweiz präsent ist und ein umfassendes Analysespektrum anbietet: Klinische Chemie, Hämatologie, Immunologie, medizinische Mikrobiologie, Molekularbiologie, medizinische Genetik, Zytologie, Histopathologie.

Name: TAmiRNA GmbH
Description:
At TAmiRNA we drive innovation through microRNA and RNAi technology to solve unmet clinical needs. Circulating microRNAs are novel minimal-invasive biomarkers that fulfil the requirements of valuable markers. TAmiRNA excels in the identification and development of microRNA biomarkers for diagnosis and prediction of disease and treatment response with a special focus on musculoskeletal, cardiovascular and metabolic diseases. TAmiRNA is a biotech R&D company based in Vienna, Austria.

---- Privacy Policy and Imprint can be accessed by clicking "Contact us" ----

Name: Grupo Magsul & Corpus Diagnóstica
Description:
Com mais de 40 anos de experiência, o Grupo Magsul e Corpus Diagnóstica é referência em medicina diagnóstica no Sul de Minas Gerais e interior de São Paulo. Nossa trajetória foi marcada pela inovação e compromisso com a qualidade, consolidando-nos como um dos maiores centros de diagnóstico por imagem da região.

Fomos pioneiros na introdução de Ressonância Magnética e Medicina Nuclear no Sul de Minas, sempre investindo em tecnologia de ponta e no aprimoramento dos nossos serviços. Atualmente, contamos com unidades em:
Minas Gerais: Pouso Alegre, Três Corações, Itajubá, Alfenas, Extrema e Varginha.
São Paulo: Ribeirão Preto, Lorena, Itapetininga, Salto e Cruzeiro. 

Nosso compromisso vai além dos diagnósticos precisos. Prezamos por um atendimento humanizado, proporcionando conforto e segurança para nossos pacientes. Um exemplo disso é o Espaço da Mulher, um ambiente acolhedor pensado especialmente para exames voltados para a saúde da mulher.

Acreditamos que a excelência vem da união entre tecnologia avançada e uma equipe altamente qualificada. Por isso, investimos constantemente na capacitação de nossos profissionais e na modernização de nossos equipamentos. Hoje, contamos com inteligência artificial aplicada à Ressonância Magnética, garantindo imagens de alta qualidade e reduzindo o tempo de realização dos exames.

Com esse compromisso contínuo com a inovação e a qualidade, seguimos expandindo nossa atuação para levar o melhor da medicina diagnóstica a ainda mais pessoas.

Name: Infinity Healthcare (Pvt) Ltd - Laboratories
Description:
Discovering Clarity in the World of Diagnostics 

Are you in search of reliable, accurate, and compassionate pathology services? Look no further! Welcome to INFINITY our state-of-the-art Pathology Lab, where we are dedicated to providing exceptional diagnostic solutions that bring clarity to your healthcare journey.

Why Choose Our INFINITY Lab?

- Our TEAM of highly skilled pathologists and technicians brings years of experience and expertise to every analysis. With their unwavering commitment to excellence, you can trust that your samples are in capable hands at INFINITY

- INFINITY continuously invest in technology and equipment, ensuring that we deliver precise and reliable results. Our advanced laboratory infrastructure allows us to stay at the forefront of diagnostic innovation.

- From routine tests to complex analyses, INFINITY lab offers a wide range of services to meet your healthcare needs. Whether it's histopathology, cytopathology, molecular diagnostics, or clinical chemistry, we've got you covered.

- We understand the importance of prompt results for effective healthcare management. With our streamlined processes and efficient workflow, we strive to provide accurate reports within the shortest possible turnaround time.

- We prioritize the patient experience. INFINITY ensures that each interaction is marked by empathy, respect, and individual attention. Your well-being is at the heart of everything we do.

- We believe in fostering strong relationships with healthcare professionals, clinics, and hospitals. By working together, we aim to create a seamless healthcare ecosystem focused on accurate diagnoses and improved patient outcomes.

Name: Enfer Medical
Description: Enfer Medical is a high-throughput medical laboratory, providing a consultant-led diagnostic service across various pathology disciplines for both the public and private sector, operating to ISO15189 Quality Standards.

Name: Salient Bio
Description:
Salient Bio is an innovative, fast-growing biotech start-up combining synthetic biology and robotics to build digital-first laboratories that make diagnostic testing available to all. We pride ourselves on the ingenuity of our automation, excellent customer service and agile approach to the market and our customers' needs.

We believe in the power of preventive healthcare, and that access to diagnostic testing - both conventional and cutting edge - should be available to everyone. This is our North Star, and everything we develop is in service of our mission to deliver a world class diagnostics service and experience. 

We are based in central London, where we've built a state-of-the-art laboratory offering a wide range of diagnostic testing, both, routine and specialised, as well as operating an R&D microbiome laboratory undertaking cutting edge research. This represents the start of our journey to transform the delivery of mass-scale diagnostics to communities around the world.

Contact us to learn more: info@salient.bio.

Name: VERAVAS, Inc.
Description: Veravas is a leading innovator in clinical diagnostics focused on the early-stage detection of Alzheimer’s disease and other neurological conditions. The company’s proprietary VeraBIND technology transforms challenging sample types into measurable biomarkers, enabling earlier disease detection and the development of novel diagnostic tests. Its VeraBIND Tau assay is a first-in-class blood-based test that measures the pathological activity of hyperphosphorylated tau in blood samples of cognitively normal individuals or individuals experiencing cognitive impairment which may be used to aid in the diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease.

Name: Cardiac Monitoring Service
Description: Cardiac Monitoring Service provides Holter Monitors and Cardiac Event Monitors at no charge for doctors. Based in Orange County, California our lab ships monitors overnight and nationwide. Our monitors offer same day reporting, as well as 24/7 Tech Support. Contact us today to receive your Holter Monitor or Cardiac Event Monitor tomorrow. Cardiac Monitors are the Heart of our Business.

Name: INOVIE AFRICA
Description:
INOVIE AFRICA est une filiale du Groupe INOVIE, acteur majeur du diagnostic médical en France et l’international (Biologie humaine et vétérinaire, anatomopathologie et radiologie). 

Doté de plus de 630 sites de laboratoires et plus de 70 plateaux techniques, le groupe réalise aujourd’hui environ 22% de l’activité libérale en France. 
Notre ambition est de fournir aux patients et aux professionnels de santé un service d'excellence, d'innovation et de proximité pour participer demain à 100% des diagnostics médicaux. 

Experte en biologie médicale de routine et spécialisée, INOVIE AFRICA développe dans chaque pays où elle s'installe, un réseau étendu de laboratoires de proximité, de plateaux techniques de pointe et de centres de diagnostics répondant à des normes qualité et standards internationaux.

Nous saurons vous accompagner pour l’ensemble de  vos examens et bilan de santé :
- Biochimie, Immunologie, Hématologie, Hémostase, Bactériologie
- Auto-Immunité, Allergie, Chimie spécialisée, Sérologie infectieuse
- Génétique (infectieuse, héréditaire, somatique et cytogénétique)
- Biologie de la femme (Dépistage T21, Cancer du col, Cancer du sein, Trouble de la fertilité)
-Histocompatibilité (Typage HLA, Cytométrie en flux)
- Biopathologie (Cytologie, Histologie, Immuno-histochimie)

 Nous œuvrons également pour soutenir les projets médicaux et sanitaires en Afrique et au Moyen-Orient à travers la Fondation Inovie Africa en mettant notre expertise au service de la communauté médicale en Afrique. La Fondation agit pour la formation, l’accompagnement et la création de réseaux de biologistes médicaux et également pour la promotion de la R&D. Elle participe également aux grandes campagnes de dépistage des pathologies dans les pays où nous sommes présents (Diabète, Drépanocytose, Cancer du col, VIH...).

Name: International Society for Vaccines - ISV
Description: The International Society for Vaccines is an organization that engages, supports, and sustains the professional goals of a diverse membership in all areas relevant to vaccines.

Name: Healthcare Diagnostic Solutions Ltd.
Description:
Healthcare Diagnostic Solutions Ltd. (HDSL) is one of the fastest growing medical devices, medical instrument & reagents supplier in Bangladesh. HDSL is one of the sister concerns of Healthcare Pharmaceuticals Ltd., which has already earned a deep seeded reputation in Bangladesh and overseas through its excellence in quality, innovation, safety & usefulness.

At HDSL, we value our customer need most. We ensure innovative & effective solution to their need with our cutting-edge technology & quality certified product & solutions.  We endeavour every single step and opt every single product that ensures only the best quality test reports are delivered to our end users.

We take our pride in our ample ranges of products & solutions from internationally reputed manufacturers like Abbott (USA), Horiba Medical (Japan), Erba Mannheim (Germany), All Medicus (South Korea). In addition, with our extensive chain of distribution empowered with 30 depots, 1600+ distribution forces, ISO certification, facilitated with cool chain chambers & vehicle support, we are helping our laboratories and medical institutions to deliver better results and patient outcomes.

Name: Bioline Laboratory
Description:
BioLine Laboratory offers a comprehensive range of products and services in the biotechnology sector. Their offerings can be summarized as follows:

**Products:**

1. **Biological Reagents:** BioLine Laboratory provides a wide array of biological reagents, including enzymes, DNA/RNA purification kits, antibodies, and other biomolecules essential for research and diagnostics.

2. **Laboratory Equipment:** They offer state-of-the-art laboratory equipment, including centrifuges, spectrophotometers, and PCR machines, to support scientific experiments and analyses.

3. **Chemicals and Consumables:** BioLine Laboratory supplies laboratory-grade chemicals, buffers, and consumables necessary for various molecular biology and biochemical applications.

**Services:**

2. **Customized Assay Development:** They specialize in developing customized assays and test kits tailored to specific research or diagnostic needs, helping clients achieve precise results.

3. **Technical Support and Training:** BioLine Laboratory provides technical support and training to ensure proper use of their products and equipment, enhancing the capabilities of researchers and technicians.

4. **Consulting and Collaboration:** The company collaborates with research institutions and organizations, offering consulting services to advance scientific projects and promote innovation in biotechnology.

5. **Quality Control and Assurance:** BioLine Laboratory maintains rigorous quality control and assurance processes to ensure the reliability and consistency of its products and services.

Our commitment to excellence is driven by a strong organizational culture centered around the following core values:

Patient First: Every decision we make begins with our patients and customers in mind. We understand that the quality of our work can significantly impact lives.

Integrity and Empathy: We strive to do the right thing, treating each patient, customer, and colleague with the respect they deserve.

Continuous Learning: Innovation and curiosity are at the heart of what we do. We are dedicated to being better today than we were yesterday, ensuring we deliver superior quality in everything we undertake.

Our promise is to provide accurate and timely insights using the best technology available. As Dubai’s leading diagnostics service provider, our team empowers clinicians with actionable results that support informed healthcare decisions.

We are committed to exploring new ways to screen, prevent, diagnose, and monitor diseases. Name: AccuLabs Diagnostics
Description:
AccuLabs Diagnostics UK Ltd is a prominent private pathology provider based in Wynyard Business Park, Tees Valley, England. With over 30 years of experience, the company has established itself as a trusted partner for the NHS, general practitioners, private clinics, and international clients. AccuLabs has installed and managed more than 120 laboratories across hospitals and clinics.

We’re proud to share that Acculabs Diagnostics is accredited to ISO 15189:2022 (Medical laboratories — Quality and competence), ISO 9001 (Quality management systems), ISO/IEC 27001 (Information security management systems), and ISO 22301 (Business continuity management systems). These certifications reflect our ongoing commitment to delivering quality diagnostics, safeguarding data, and ensuring resilience across all operations.

 Core Services

- Acculabs provides a wide range of pathology services, including:

- Sexual Health Testing – Rapid and accurate STI testing, with laboratories operating 12 hours per day. 

- Biochemistry and Haematology – Routine and specialised blood tests.

- Endocrinology and Microbiology – Hormone and infectious disease diagnostics.

- Post-Vasectomy Semen Analysis and Special Clearance

- Kit Assembly for At-Home Testing. 

- Histology

If you're seeking guidance on assembling a diagnostic kit from AccuLabs, it's best to contact us directly for specific instructions and support. You can reach AccuLabs at 01740 644439 or via email at enquiries@acculabsdiagnostics.co.uk.

AccuLabs Diagnostics UK Ltd continues to be a trusted name in UK pathology, offering innovative, efficient, and bespoke diagnostic solutions to meet the evolving needs of healthcare providers.

Description: PreciseDx is innovating oncology diagnostics, leveraging Artificial Intelligence (AI) for revolutionary, morphology-driven, disease analysis. Combining AI with our patented Morphology Feature Array (MFA), PreciseDx provides access to unmatched disease insights and accurate, actionable intelligence for more comprehensive decision-making throughout the cancer care continuum.

Name: Eurofins Biomnis Middle East
Description:
Eurofins Biomnis Middle East LLC is a CAP accredited reference laboratory based in Jumeirah, Dubai, UAE. 
The company is wholly owned by Eurofins Scientific S.E. in Luxemborg.

Eurofins Scientific is an international life sciences company, providing a unique range of analytical testing services to clients across multiple industries, to make life and the environment safer, healthier and more sustainable. From the food you eat to the medicines you rely on, Eurofins works with the biggest companies in the world to ensure the products they supply are safe, their ingredients are authentic and labelling is accurate. Eurofins is a global leader in food, environmental, pharmaceutical and cosmetic product testing and in agroscience CRO services. It is also one of the global independent market leaders in certain testing and laboratory services for genomics, discovery pharmacology, forensics, CDMO, advanced material sciences and in the support of clinical studies. 

In over just 35 years, Eurofins has grown from one laboratory in Nantes, France to over 61,000 staff across a network of independent companies in 61 countries, operating ca. 900 laboratories. 

Performing over 450 million tests every year, Eurofins offers a portfolio of over 200,000 analytical methods to evaluate the safety, identity, composition, authenticity, origin, traceability and purity of biological substances and products, as well as providing innovative clinical diagnostic testing services, as one of the leading global emerging players in specialised clinical diagnostics testing. 

Ever since its IPO on the French stock exchange in 1997, Eurofins has been one of the fastest growing listed European companies. In 2022, Eurofins recorded revenues of €6,712 million.

Name: Cerba Lancet Kenya
Description:

Our main laboratory is ISO15189 certified and accredited by SANAS since 2010, while our other key branch laboratories are accredited by KENAS.

Monlab S.L. trabaja de forma que se cumpla escrupulosamente su política de calidad y sus procedimientos establecidos según norma ISO 9001, Núm. EC-376/2/99 desde 1999. 
Desde Noviembre del 2002, estamos certificados en la nueva versión de la norma para ISO9001:2000 en los siguientes campos:
• Comercialización, distribución y asistencia técnica de aparatos y sistemas automatizados para laboratorios de diagnóstico clínico y ensayo.
• Comercialización y distribución de material fungible y reactivos.
• Comercialización y distribución de productos hospitalarios de incontinencia.

Y desde Noviembre del 2011 hemos ampliado este alcance de la certificación a la FABRICACIÓN DE REACTIVOS DE DIAGNÓSTICO CLÍNICO.

Name: Future Labs Live USA
Description:
Our vision is to create the world’s most interesting, diverse, and  stimulating event for the future of all labs. Start-ups and disruptors will meet lab heads and lab techs together with the tech innovators and practice innovators of the future. We aim to break down silos within and between organizations to bring people together to come up with the ideas, the tech and the processes that’ll transform the lab of tomorrow.

 

WE NEED FUTURE LABS NOW BECAUSE

Those who don’t adapt, change and get ahead of the enormous technologies changing the way labs function will be left behind.
 

Organizations and business models are being transformed.
 
New jobs are being created. And old ones are being eviscerated.
 
Many of our existing processes and business models are just not up to the challenges of the future.
 
Lab leaders of tomorrow will need different skills to be able to survive and thrive.
 
We desperately need to break out of our silos and meet, talk and debate across function, industry and geography.

FUTURE LABS LIVE WILL GENERATE IDEAS, NEW WAYS OF THINKING AND NOVEL PARTNERSHIPS

We have designed an event experience that is engaging, collaborative and global. Our carefully curated content will be about disruptive innovation and draws on our vast experience of creating events for the international life science and technology sector.
 

START-UPS

The lab of the future is being created not only in the largest corporations but in university spin-outs and start-ups. We’re inviting the most interesting start-ups to participate in the event. Completely free of charge.

Future Labs Live will bring together old and new, traditional and innovative. The world’s largest and most established manufacturing, life science and agri-chem labs will meet the smallest start-ups in a format designed to spark ideas and foster new relationships. Our aim is to be more expansive in our thinking and more multi-disciplinary in our approach than any other event in the sector.

Name: Centre For Advanced Medical Research and Training - CAMRET, UDUS
Description:
The Centre for Advanced Medical Research and Training (CAMRET) is a public laboratory complex that seeks to advance knowledge in the fields of Biotechnology and Biomedical Sciences. CAMRET was established in 2017 through the Tertiary Education Trust Fund (TETFUND) special intervention fund and is situated at the Teaching Hospital Campus of Usmanu Danfodiyo University, Sokoto. CAMRET is involved in cutting-edge cross-disciplinary research in drug discovery, immunotherapeutics and vaccine development against infectious diseases and cancer. CAMRET also supports epigenetic and nutrigenomic research. 

The Centre is administered by a Director, Deputy Director and several Research Associates that are appointed by the Vice-Chancellor from relevant Departments of the University. Nine CAMRET laboratories house state-of-the-art molecular biology equipment, which are directly supervised by research assistants. These serve the research needs of the university staff, students and visitors. Specific postgraduate programs of the departments of biochemistry, veterinary microbiology and physiology are domiciled in the Centre; where students from these departments conduct their projects.

HealthAI empowers patients with proactive personalised health insights that reduce the risk of chronic disease, particularly diabetes, cancer, cardiovascular & neurodegenerative diseases, and that assist in optimising their healthy lifespan. Our vision is to create a paradigm shift in mindset for individuals to prioritise their preventative health and take control of their longevity. 

HealthAI has the potential to completely transform healthcare by shifting the current focus from treating diseases to proactively preventing them. Name: PathReD Congress
Description:
The Pathology Research and Development Congress (PathReD) presents a thrilling opportunity for medical laboratory professionals, Public Health specialists, and researchers to collaboratively enhance and innovate within the realm of pathology and laboratory medicine. Brought to you by the NHLS which is the largest public health laboratory in South Africa. PathReD has grown in magnitude to become the largest congregation of pathology experts in South Africa, serving as a pivotal platform for knowledge exchange and the exhibition of cutting-edge research.

The congress facilitates networking and collaboration opportunities, fostering an increasingly expansive professional network with each successive congress. The 2023 edition saw over 1000 delegates in attendance, solidifying PathReD’s reputation as a premier event. Aligned with the NHLS mandate of teaching, training, and research, PathReD offers educational avenues through workshops designed to elevate the skills of students, trainees and emerging researchers in various undergraduate and postgraduate programmes spanning pathology, occupational health, and public health disciplines.

The 5th PathReD Congress, held in a hybrid format from August 31st to September 3rd, 2023, seamlessly blended onsite activities at the Radisson Hotel & Convention Centre, Johannesburg, O.R. Tambo, Estate 154, Corner 3rd & 6th Avenue, Bredell, Kempton Park, Johannesburg. Themed "Next Generation Pathology," the congress underscored the industry's adaptability, successfully navigating hybrid events while adhering to safety protocols and incorporating advanced technologies.

Consistent with tradition, the Congress achieved resounding success, earning praise from attendees, sponsors, and the NHLS Board. The high standard of organization, coupled with engaging content and an excellent line-up of speakers, contributed to PathReD’s overall acclaim.

Alsancak’ta faaliyet gösteren 3 şubesine Mavişehir, Bayraklı, Güzelbahçe ve Aydın şubelerini ekleyerek İzmirlilerin ayağına hizmet götürmeye devam etmektedir.

“Tanıda Güvence” sloganını kendisine ilke edinen Biolab Laboratuvarlar Grubu ulusal ve uluslararası kalite kontrol programlarına 1998 yılından bu yana katılarak, vermiş olduğu sonuçların yüksek kalite güvencesine ulaşmasını sağlamıştır. 2004 yılında ise İzmir’de bir ilki gerçekleştirerek ISO 9001-2000 belgesini İyi Laboratuvar Uygulamaları odağında almaya hak kazanmıştır.

Ayrıca Sağlık Bakanlığından Türkiye’deki ilk ve tek Bebek Dostu Laboratuvar unvanını kazanmıştır. Biolab Laboratuvarlar Grubu halen 7 ayrı klinik laboratuvarı, 11 Laboratuvar Uzman hekimi ve 250 çalışanı ile hizmet vermektedir.

Name: AC Rad Medical
Description:
At AC RAD Medical our mission is to be a leading provider of specialized consulting services for companies and institutions operating in the medical and industrial sectors that use equipment emitting ionizing radiation or devices governed by the regulations of the National Commission for the Control of Nuclear Activities (C.N.C.A.N.). We are committed to ensuring radiological safety, radiation protection, and compliance with specific regulations for our diverse range of clients.

Through our expertise, dedication, and collaborative approach, we strive to support hospitals and medical centers, including radiology, oncology, and medical imaging departments, by providing comprehensive consultancy services that enable them to use medical equipment emitting ionizing radiation, such as CT scanners, X-ray machines, and radiation therapy equipment, safely and efficiently.

Additionally, we actively partner with esteemed medical research institutions, offering expert guidance on radiological safety, the planning and implementation of radiation protection measures, and compliance with regulations, thus facilitating the successful conduct of studies and experiments involving ionizing radiation or nuclear equipment.

Our commitment extends to the industrial sector, where we collaborate with diverse industries such as oil and gas, nuclear, manufacturing, and others that employ radioactive equipment or sources in their production processes. By providing tailored advice on radiation management, risk assessment, personnel protection, and regulatory compliance, we assist these companies in maintaining a safe and responsible working environment.

At the intersection of biosensing, AI, and women’s health, Monix makes what was once invisible, visible. By unlocking real-time hormone data, we empower women and clinicians with the insights they need to make better decisions — every day, every cycle.

Our vision is bold: to become the hormonal health companion for every woman —across fertility, menopause, and lifelong hormonal wellness.

We’re entrepreneurs, scientists, engineers, and doctors on a mission to close the gender data gap in medicine — one hormone at a time.

Backed by science. Built for women. Powered by data.

Description:
The National Metabolomics Platform (NMP), in partnership with the South African Technology Innovation Agency (TIA) is hosted at the NWU Centre for Human Metabolomics (CHM). 

The NMP was established to fulfil a niche in the healthcare sector by providing internationally competitive, effective, and efficient Metabolomic Analytic Services for both diagnostic and project purposes.

The NMP has been set the task of growing metabolomics in South Africa from an emerging science to a well-established and competitive service offering in both national and international markets.

The NMP has been working to develop metabolomics capabilities within South Africa for the past ten years and has become a centre of excellence in its service offerings. The NMP has also contributed to the development of expertise within South Africa, which has allowed for the highly complex and sophisticated GCMS and LCMS analysis that is required for metabolomics research.

The NMP's contract research services laboratory offers national and international clients research services that are aligned with International Standards ISO 15189 (General requirements for Medical Laboratories) and ISO 9000 (Quality management), ensuring the highest confidence in its results.

Vanguard Laboratories is a people-centered laboratory founded by Nathan Keele and Scott Larsen in Salt Lake City, Utah in September of 2021. Nathan founded Keele Medical at the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic to help laboratories locate and service patients who were most at risk of the virus. After working with over 13 different laboratories in a span of 13 months, Nathan and Scott set out to solve many of the persistent issues they came across in the industry as a whole, i.e.; slow turnaround times, poor communication, lack of customer service, outdated systems, and an absence of innovation. 
 
Since September of 2021 Vanguard Laboratories has gone from an idea to a state-of-the-art facility located in the heart of downtown Salt Lake City. We service clients in eight states, with clients that include care centers, doctors offices, school districts and corporations. Our use of technology is evident in the cutting-edge client portal, designed to enhance patient visibility and alleviate the headache of not knowing when your results will come in. Every week for the past three months we have brought on new clients, showing sustainable growth. 

Vanguard Laboratories is a premium laboratory that specializes in PCR Molecular diagnostic testing. Our  laboratory is specially designed to perform PCR testing for diagnostic tests such as COVID-19, Respiratory panels (RPP), Urinary Tract Infection (UTI), Wound care, Vaginal Microbiota (Vaginitis), Fungal, sexually transmitted diseases (STI), drug screening, and toxicology.  Our clients include skilled nursing facilities, care centers, podiatrists, dermatologists, schools, and other organizations with needs for laboratory testing. Vanguard is the next generation of clinical testing and we pride ourselves in excellent customer service and innovation with all of our products and services. Name: Concord Stem Cell Limited
Description:
Concord Stem Cell Limited, the first, Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA) approved advanced stem cell manufacturer & treatment center in Bangladesh, is committed to delivering high-standard healthcare through a combination of an expert scientific team and cutting-edge technology. Specializing in cell based regenerative therapeutics for incurable & chronic diseases, Concord Stem Cell utilizes state-of-the-art cGMP-compliant laboratories and skilled healthcare staff dedicated to provide care with a smile. Concord Stem Cell is dedicated to pioneering the future of healthcare in Bangladesh, offering innovative stem cell solutions to improve and transform lives.

- Our State-of-the-Art Laboratory

The Concord Stem Cell Laboratory integrates cutting-edge technology with expert scientists to provide both autologous and allogeneic cellular products. Ensuring product safety, quality, reproducibility, and efficacy is our top priority.

Our cGMP-compliant laboratory, designed with guidance from consultancy firms in the United Kingdom, Singapore, and China, features cleanrooms classified as ISO 7 and ISO 8 according to ISO certification. ISO 8 cleanrooms are equipped with world-class machinery for preparing autologous products, while ISO 7 cleanrooms handle allogeneic cell-based products.

- Advanced Technology and Equipment

To guarantee the quality of our cell-based treatments, we use GMP-graded media & consumables to produce stem cells at its best. Our advanced technology includes refrigerated centrifuge machines, efficient carbon dioxide incubators, biosafety cabinets, and a world-class Controlled Rate Freezer that helps to minimize temperature shock and maintain viability during cell banking.

- Compliance and Quality Assurance

Our processes have been validated and inspected multiple times by the DGDA team. Through stringent compliance with GMP and GLP standards, Concord Stem Cell Limited ensures the best quality stem cells for our patients.

Name: EndoLab Mechanical Engineering GmbH
Description:
EndoLab GmbH offers a variety of technological implant testing services to develop and certify medical products. We are an accredited (DAkkS O-PL-18838-02-00) test laboratory according to DIN EN ISO/IEC 17025. The company is a spin-off from the Technical University of Munich and is closely connected to several national and international research departments.

In addition to conventional methods of structural testing, EndoLab has established a department of Finite-Element-Analysis. The availability of a full range of theoretical and experimental procedures provides our customers with the advantage of synergistic application of both methods.

The scope of available implant tests is divided into anatomically orientated groups of application. The hip implant section includes wear tests using an ISO hip joint simulator and multiple ISO and ASTM tests to determine the fatigue properties of stemmed femoral components, acetabular cups and balls. Screening tests for new implant materials are also available. 

The knee implant section also includes the determination of wear performance in an ISO knee joint simulator. There are multiple tests for research and development of new knee implants available. Finite Element Analysis will be a sufficient tool regarding the complex geometry of knee implants. Upcoming ISO regulations can be followed as well as custom test procedures for individual needs. 

The spine implant section covers the demands of a fast growing medical market by new designed test procedures. ASTM tests as well as upcoming ISO regulations can be followed. Quasistatic mechanical properties as well as fatigue and wear properties can be determined. 

The growing market of vascular implants is accompanied by multiple international accepted tests performed by EndoLab GmbH. The field of stent testing is an ideal example for the synergy effects of FEM analysis and mechanical tests offered by our laboratories.

Over the years, Global Healthcare Medical has transformed into a prominent large-scale manufacturer in both China and Japan. Our extensive portfolio includes a diverse array of medical equipment such as immunodiagnostics, clinical chemistry, molecular diagnostics, hematology, microbiology, coagulation, urinalysis, pathology, point-of-care testing, flow cytometers, ELISA, X-ray, ultrasound, MRI/CT/PET, patient monitors, anesthesia machines, ventilators, defibrillators, dialysis machines, syringe and infusion pumps, endoscopy, surgical lights, ECG, veterinary medical products, and a variety of medical consumables. Cordon Genomics has developed several affordable solutions in the field of infectious disease, reproductive genetics, oncology and wellness. Our solutions can be integrated with any next generation sequence, diagnostics lab and hospitals. Our slogan is every minute matters and timely diagnosis can save many lives.
Cordon Genomics solution includes
1. METAGENOMICS (Cordon ID 1 and ID 2 test based on next generation sequencing)
2. REPRODUCTIVE GENETICS (NIPT/PGTA/ENDOMETRIAL MICROBIOME test with CountSeq technology)
3. BIOINFORMATICS (Proprietary pipeline for quick analysis of metagenomics data)

We are funded by Fundação para a Ciência e Tecnologia UIDB/00645/2020 and UIDP/00645/2020.

Our departure tests cover the full needs of every traveller abroad. Testing requirements will vary depending on the country to which you are travelling and can change at short notice; ensure to check the applicable government website for information.

OUR SPECIALITIES
Marylebone Laboratory mainly focuses on blood tests, drug tests, sexually transmitted diseases, biochemistry, and cancer screening. These include:

Blood Test:
Full Blood Count, Standard Coagulation Study, Anticoagulants, Coagulation Study Extended, Infection/Sepsis Pre-surgery Screening.

Biochemistry:
General Biochemistry Profile, Biochemistry / Hematology Profile, Diabetic Profile, Bone Markers, Vitamins, Electrolytes, Thyroid, Kidney, Liver, Lipids, Iron Profile, Inflammatory Panel, Pregnancy Test Beta-HC.

Sexually Transmitted Diseases:
HIV 1/2, Syphilis, Hepatitis C A & Hepatitis B Ag, Chlamydia, Gonorrhoea, Mycoplasma, Trichomonas, Ureaplasma, Gardnerella, Herpes I&2, Candida spp, HPV, MRSA.

Name: Valley Diagnostics Ltd
Description:
Valley Diagnostics is bringing to market next generation lateral flow diagnostic kits, combined with smartphone technology for reading test results and software for capturing and managing subject data, all for deployment in screening programs, in “point-of-care” and “at-home” use.

Valley Diagnostics lateral flow devices will test for patent-protected biomarkers that identify early human and animal diseases allowing for very early detection and diagnosis of disease.

Our team includes world renowned metabolomics researchers, experts in antigenic translation, antibody development and production, assay development and production, novel lateral flow technology, machine learning and user facing mobile app technology and data capture systems.

We manage the whole product development lifecycle, from biomarker fingerprinting with the highest AUC, followed by the applied chemistry process to translate analytes into antibodies and produce them at scale.

We then conjugate the antibodies to produce the immunoassay for building into a lateral flow test using latest lateral flow test smart fluidics to detect multiple analytes in one test.

We apply regulator-approved Computer Vision and Machine Learning algorithms deployed via smartphone apps and cloud-based computing to capture, manage, analyse and report test result data with an app, cloud and dashboard software platform designed for medical-grade regulatory compliance.

"We want to make a difference to human and animal healthcare, to help identify disease early, to enable intervention when it can make a real difference" - Dave Taylor. Founder and CEO

Potrebe po modernih laboratorijskih preiskavah se z napredkom medicine neprestano povečujejo in biti v družbi najsodobnejših laboratorijev nam omogoča, da svoje storitve ponujamo na najvišjem nivoju.

Name: Path Fertility
Description:
Path Fertility works with doctors and fertility specialists to provide couples who are trying to conceive with answers. Using breakthrough technology, Path Fertility has developed a sperm analysis test that is more predictive of pregnancy than the current standard of care semen analysis alone. SpermQT examines epigenetic biomarkers and DNA methylation within the sperm head--looking beyond typical criteria of male fertility such as sperm count, motility, and concentration. 

Despite common misconceptions, fertility problems are common (1 in 6 people) and impact both men and women equally. The gender divide in both fertility testing and treatment has left not only a gap in potential interventions, but also in the emotional burden that partners experience. Path Fertility is on a mission to raise the standard of care for male reproductive health. 

Male fertility is a women's health issue. When subfertile men go undiagnosed, women are put through fertility treatments that will not work. 

Powered by Inherent Biosciences.

Name: CELLECT Laboratories
Description:
At CELLECT, we are on a mission to revolutionize women’s healthcare. Every year, over a billion women worldwide are at risk of HPV and cervical cancer, yet many avoid or delay screenings due to discomfort, inconvenience, and fear. The current method of screening, the pap smear, is outdated and often inaccessible for many women, especially in underserved communities.

That’s why CELLECT is transforming reproductive health screenings. Our innovative, non-invasive technology uses a simple tampon or pad to collect menstrual blood, allowing for high-accuracy testing for HPV and cervical cancer—no speculum required, no invasive procedures. Our proprietary nanomaterial extracts and stabilizes DNA, making it compatible with existing gold-standard diagnostic tests while streamlining lab processing. CELLECT is not only easier and more comfortable for women, but it’s also cost-effective and accurate.

We’re focused on bringing this solution to women everywhere, starting with provincial screening programs in Canada and expanding globally. Our vision is to make proactive health screenings more accessible, affordable, and dignified for all women.

Join the movement to #ScrapThePap and learn more about how we’re changing the face of women’s health at www.cellectlaboratories.com

Name: Pharma GenLabs - Leaders in the Genetic Testing Space
Description:
Pharma GenLabs (PGL) is a CLIA certified pharmacogenomics (PGx) laboratory that has been in operation since 2021. Our focus is pharmacogenetic testing, analyzing how a patient’s unique genetic profile impacts their response to medications. This gives providers the information they need to make informed prescribing decisions that improve outcomes, reduce adverse drug events, and lower healthcare costs.

We are one of only 10 laboratories in the country with the MolDx Z - Code 81418 from Palmetto GBA, which allows for streamlined Medicare reimbursement in 28 states. Our testing panels cover the key genetic pathways that affect the metabolism of 90 percent of commonly prescribed medications including psychiatric, cardiovascular, pain management, and geriatric therapies.

PGL is actively working with more than 40 healthcare facilities across the United States, with a strong presence in skilled nursing, rehabilitation, and long term care markets where medication optimization has the greatest impact. We are approved for Medicaid in nine states and connected with more than 40 insurance networks with plans for national payer expansion.

Our platforms are designed for both patients and providers, integrating HIPAA compliant portals, proprietary analytics, and multi channel ordering through pharmagenlabs.com and retail partners. PGx University offers education for healthcare professionals and the public to spread awareness about the benefits of genetic guided prescribing.

From our leadership team’s combined medical, laboratory, and business expertise to our state of the art testing equipment and fast turnaround times, we deliver results that meet and exceed industry standards. Through partnerships with providers, payers, and influencers, we are helping to shape the future of personalized medicine, one patient, one prescription, and one genome at a time.

Website: pharmagenlabs.com, store.pharmagenlabs.com, pgxuniversity.com

Name: Thrive 365 Labs
Description:
At Thrive 365 Labs, we specialize in advanced Quantitative Urinalysis Testing, offering healthcare providers with superior diagnostic solutions. The USA averages over 347,000 daily Urinalysis Tests, the majority using traditional dipstick methods. Unfortunately, the dipstick tests is as low as 30% accurate, averaging 61%. Our Quantitative Urinalysis testing ensures an impressive 99% accuracy, setting a new standard in diagnostic precision and reliability.

Our mission goes beyond just testing; we aim to transform patient care by offering fast, precise, and meaningful data for early prevention and detection. Our innovative in-house testing solutions not only improve healthcare outcomes but also offer convenience for providers and patients, while creating new revenue streams for healthcare facilities.

Name: Malaysian Institute of Medical Laboratory Sciences (MIMLS)
Description:
Malaysian Institute of Medical Laboratory Sciences (MIMLS) is a non-profit professional organisation representing the medical laboratory professionals in Malaysia. It was established in 1988 as the Malaysian Federation of Medical Laboratory Technologists (MFMLT) from the merging of 3 medical laboratory technologist associations from University of Malaya (UM), National University of Malaysia (UKM) and Institute for Medical Research (IMR), Ministry of Health Malaysia. Currently, our members comprise of medical laboratory professionals from both public and private sectors.

MIMLS is a member of the Malaysian Confederation of Allied Health Professional Associations (MyCAHP), which is an umbrella body for allied health professional associations in Malaysia. Member associations of MyCAHP represent 21 different allied health professions under the Allied Health Professions Act 2016, such as audiologists, dieticians, physiotherapists and so on.

Internationally, MIMLS is a member of the ASEAN Association for Clinical Laboratory Sciences (AACLS). AACLS is represented by ASEAN member associations from Brunei, Cambodia, Indonesia, Malaysia, Myanmar, Philippines, Singapore and Thailand. MIMLS is also one of the founding members of the Asia Association of Medical Laboratory Scientists (AAMLS). AAMLS is represented by member associations across Asia including Brunei, Hong Kong, Indonesia, India, Japan, Korea, Malaysia, Philippines, Singapore, Taiwan and Thailand. Besides, MIMLS is also a member of the International Federation of Biomedical Laboratory Science (IFBLS), which is an association of national societies in 36 countries, representing more than 185,000 biomedical laboratory scientists and technologists worldwide.

Name: AI PREMie
Description:
Drawing upon cutting-edge biomedical, clinical and machine-learning know-how, we have developed a prototype risk stratification tool, AI_PREMie, for preeclampsia, which affects one in every 10 pregnancies. 

AI_PREMie is backed by a multidisciplinary team of experts from the University College Dublin, National Maternity Hospital, the Rotunda Hospital, the Coombe Women’s Hospital, the SAS Institute and Microsoft Ireland.

At present, AI_PREMie is being piloted in three major maternity hospitals* in Dublin, Ireland, capturing 50% of all Irish births. By providing a timely and accurate prognosis, AI PREMie will be a game-changer for women with preeclampsia and should have a major impact on the health and mortality rates of pregnant women and their babies worldwide.

Key Stakeholders:
☆ Prof Patricia Maguire 
Scientific Lead, Director of UCD Institute for Discovery, Co-Director of the UCD Conway SPHERE research group.

☆ Prof Fionnuala Ní Áinle
Clinical Lead, Consultant Haematologist, Mater Misericordiae University Hospital & Rotunda Maternity Hospital, Co-Director of the UCD Conway SPHERE research group.

☆ Prof Mary Higgins
Societal Champion, Consultant Obstetrician and Gynaecologist, National Maternity Hospital, Dublin. 

AI_PREMie is a UCD Research Group, funded by Science Foundation Ireland (SFI).

*National Maternity Hospital, the Rotunda Hospital, the Coombe Women’s Hospital.

Description:
Investors, we are fundraising.

The Liver Clinic has been introduced to help make liver screening accessible to everyone.

By measuring liver stiffness liver screening can help identify liver fibrosis at an early stage before the development of symptoms. Early intervention, such as lifestyle modifications or specific treatments, can potentially slow down or even completely reverse the progression of liver disease.

The introduction of The Liver Clinic is to help empower people to make informed decisions and optimise their way of life, by increasing awareness and education around this essential organ.

Name: Prediscan Medtech
Description:
Prediscan Medtech is a purpose-driven startup incubated at HTIC - IIT Madras, dedicated to transforming primary health screening with Responsible Medical AI. 

Our goal is to make mass screening simple, fast, and accessible, helping healthcare systems strengthen primary preventive care.

Backed by deep medical research, technological expertise, and real-world insights, we are developing a non-invasive health screening platform that uses simple eye scans (medically known as fundus imaging) to detect early signs of non-communicable diseases (NCDs) such as heart, kidney, and liver diseases.

Currently at the prototype stage (TRL-3, BRL-2), our technology provides actionable health insights by extracting essential health parameters—such as cholesterol levels and eGFR levels—from fundus images. This enables mass primary health screening without the need for multiple invasive and complex tests, making it ideal for organizations involved in community medicine, NCD screening, medical camps, and corporate health programs.

Our team brings together deep learning engineers, biomedical engineers, medical doctors, designers, and market researchers, all united by a passion for advancing preventive healthcare.

With strong support from leading deep-tech and medical incubators, including HTIC - IIT Madras Incubation Cell, the Center for Medical Innovation - GIMS, and CoE Medtech Lucknow, we are continuously pushing the boundaries of healthcare innovation.

As we move forward, we welcome strategic partnerships and collaborations to expand our impact. If you share our vision for accessible, AI-driven preventive healthcare, let’s connect! 

Reach us at info@prediscan.com.

Name: Nanjing Healed Gene Biotechnology Co., Ltd
Description:
Healed Gene is partially owned by Jiangsu Southeast University Asset Management Co., Ltd., and mainly focuses on the diagnosis and treatment of depression.

We manufacture a CircRNA RT-PCR Detection Kit for the quantitative detection of specific circRNAs in human saliva or plasma samples.This kit is designed as an in vitro diagnostic device to aid in the diagnosis of MDD(Major Depressive Disorder)  and is intended for use in qualified PCR laboratories. 

Key Features of the Kit:
1. Target circRNAs: The kit quantitatively detect biomarkers associated with depression.
2. Sample Types: Compatible with human saliva and blood samples, making it versatile for clinical applications.
3. Intended Use: Acts as an aid in diagnosing depression, providing a non-invasive and efficient diagnostic tool.
4. Laboratory Requirements: Must be used in qualified PCR laboratories to ensure accurate and reliable results.

 Advantages of the Kit:
- High Sensitivity and Specificity: The kit leverages advanced RT-PCR technology to ensure precise detection of circRNA biomarkers.
- Non-Invasive Sampling: The ability to use saliva samples offers a patient-friendly alternative to traditional blood tests.
- It can differ from MDD mild, moderate to severe.
So our result can provide guidance for MDD clinical treatment.

Name: EndoSure, Inc.
Description:
ENDOSURE, INC. was founded based on a new approach to empower physicians with the tools they need for earlier, more accurate endometriosis diagnosis.

To that end, we proudly offer the ENDOSURE TEST, the first and only Tier-1 diagnostic test for endometriosis. Since its introduction in 2022, this groundbreaking clinical support tool has already begun to shift the entire paradigm in how medical providers detect and treat endometriosis.

The ENDOSURE TEST meets all major requirements of a Tier-1 diagnostic test, offering critical advantages:

 Low cost

 Easy-to-use

 Non-invasive

 Rapid results (30 minutes)

 Highly accurate (surgically verified)

 No population-related use restriction (detects disease in patients of any age, at any stage, anywhere in the anatomy)

The ENDOSURE TEST is actively being used in many gynecology practices around the world, equipping medical providers with the means to detect endometriosis at its earliest stages and offer targeted, personalized therapy to their patients.

At ENDOSURE, INC., we are committed to a future in endometriosis care where timely diagnosis is no longer a barrier to effective disease management, and no woman must wait nearly a decade for a definitive diagnosis.

Name: Onkos Molecular Diagnostics
Description:
Onkos is a CAP-Accredited company provider of proprietary gene expression-based diagnostic tests that is focused on providing answers to diagnostic uncertainties in Oncology by avoiding unnecessary procedures. 

We guide informed clinical decisions to enable not only the best patient management available but also healthcare providers' efficiencies and savings. 

Our Gene Expression Profiling platform merges cutting-edge technologies of molecular biology and artificial intelligence tools to create molecular classifiers that are translated into actionable results to unlock the best care for cancer patients. 

Our current portfolio is composed of the two first gene expression-based tests developed and applied on clinical routine in the southern hemisphere: 

a. mir-THYpe, which is a microRNA-based and DNA-based diagnostic and prognostic molecular classifier for thyroid nodules with indeterminate cytology. To date, we are driving a revolution reducing up to 75% of unnecessary thyroid surgeries, with robust and high level scientific evidence.

b. TOT- Tumor Origin Test, which is a mRNA-based molecular classifier for Metastatic Cancers with Unknown Primary site. We are providing data that can help physicians with treatment decisions resulting in the patient's best care. 

We have operations in Spain and Brazil, but if you live in the Earth, we can easily test your thyroid!

Science, Evidence & True Impact.

Name: Grupo Tommasi
Description:
Desde 1962, o Grupo Tommasi tem se dedicado incansavelmente ao bem-estar e à saúde daqueles que servimos. Nossa missão é clara: cuidar das pessoas através de soluções em saúde e bem-estar, enquanto nossa visão nos impulsiona a sermos admirados e escolhidos pelo nosso compromisso inabalável com o cuidado individualizado.

No coração do nosso grupo está o pioneiro Tommasi Laboratório, fundado pelo Dr. Henrique Tommasi Netto, também presidente do Grupo Tommasi. Com décadas de experiência, continuamos a definir os padrões de excelência em serviços laboratoriais, mantendo-nos firmes em nossos valores fundamentais: compromisso com o cliente, sinergia, inovação, responsabilidade com a saúde humana e integridade.

Ao longo dos anos, expandimos nossas operações, adicionando o Labortel Laboratório, São Marcos Laboratório, Centrolab Laboratório, Diagnosi Laboratório, CPV Vacinas, Morales Laboratório e Vacinas, e Virchow Patologia à nossa família de empresas. Em 2024, atingimos um marco significativo com a inauguração da nossa sede em Vitória, Espírito Santo, que abriga também nossa central de análises, representando nosso compromisso contínuo com o crescimento e a excelência em serviços de saúde.

Nossa Central de Análises é a maior do Espírito Santo e uma das 10 maiores do Brasil, refletindo nosso compromisso com diagnósticos precisos, confiáveis e um atendimento ao cliente incomparável. No entanto, nossa dedicação ao cuidado e à atenção aos detalhes começa em nossas unidades de coleta, onde cada cliente é tratado com respeito e atenção por nossos dedicados profissionais.

Somos uma equipe dinâmica e inovadora, sempre em busca de novas formas de aprimorar nossos serviços e oferecer soluções cada vez mais eficazes e acessíveis. Os prêmios, certificações e sorrisos de satisfação de nossos clientes são testemunhos do nosso compromisso inabalável com a excelência.

Junte-se a nós nessa jornada pela saúde. 
Somos Tommasi, Somos ES, Somos Brasil

Name: Freiburg Medical Laboratory
Description:
Centrally located in Dubai, the pioneering company started its operations in late 2002 by the University Hospital Freiburg together with local partners, the Al Abbas Group. Since 2013, FML is a member of Synlab, the largest laboratory diagnostics provider in Europe. FML was the first medical laboratory in the Middle East to obtain the international accreditation ISO 15189 in summer 2008, assessed by the German Accreditation Body DAkkS. Recently, it has been re-accredited under the latest standard ISO 15189:2014. 

Today, FML provides patients, doctors, clinics, polyclinics, and hospitals with sophisticated lab-analyses and routine medical tests that meet predefined quality parameters. Having highly standardized and state-of-the-art analyzers and equipment as well as experienced and regularly trained technicians, supported by the scientific know-how of Synlab Laboratories, the company ensures to deliver the best-in-class lab services and diagnostics.

Accredited by CAP, CBAHI, ISO, and AABB. MDLAB combines advanced facilities, expert clinical pathologists, and highly skilled staff to ensure precise and reliable results.

We proudly serve as the reference center for specialized and advanced testing, supporting hospitals, laboratories, and healthcare institutions in advancing patient care.

Name: SYNLAB Holding Deutschland GmbH
Description:
Bei SYNLAB in Deutschland arbeiten mehr als 5.000 Mitarbeiter an über 100 Standorten. Unser gemeinsames Ziel dabei ist eine schnelle, innovative und kluge Labordiagnostik. Vor allem aber wollen wir Gutes tun für Menschen, Tiere und Umwelt – für unsere Zukunft. Das zeichnet unsere Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter auch im täglichen Umgang aus: Kollegialität, wertschätzender Umgang miteinander und individuelle Entfaltungsmöglichkeiten stehen bei uns an erster Stelle.

Wir sind Teil der SYNLAB-Unternehmensgruppe, dem europäischen Marktführer für Humanmedizinische Labordienstleistungen. 

Wer wir sind:  
In keinem Bereich der Medizin entwickelt sich der Fortschritt so rasant wie in der Labormedizin. Die SYNLAB-Unternehmensgruppe ist europäischer Marktführer im Bereich der Labordiagnostik. Vom Routinecheck bis zur hochspezialisierten Untersuchung, vom einfachen Blutbefund bis zur Gendiagnostik bieten wir alles aus einer Hand. Mit über 1,5 Millionen Testergebnissen pro Tag liefern wir einen wesentlichen Beitrag zur medizinischen Versorgung. Moderne Laboranalytik bei SYNLAB bietet Gewissheit, Diagnosen abzusichern und Therapieerfolge zu kontrollieren. 

In naher Zukunft wird es in Bezug auf die personalisierte Medizin vermutlich einen Quantensprung geben, doch bei allem wissenschaftlich-technischen Fortschritt bleibt unser wichtigster Grundsatz: Im Mittelpunkt steht der Mensch. SYNLAB sieht seine Aufgabe in Zukunft auch darin mit Hilfe der Labormedizin Krankheiten früher erkennbar zu machen, damit Patienten individueller und wirksamer behandelt werden können.

Zum Impressum: https://www.synlab.de/de/impressum/

Name: GENETWORx
Description:
GENETWORx Laboratories was formed with the central focus of impacting the lives of our people by empowering their physicians with information. Now, GENETWORx is dedicating our focus to fighting back against COVID-19.

GENETWORx' COVID-19 test is the gold standard due to being 10% accurate, with 10% sensitivity and specificity. GENETWORx’s COVID-19 test detects infection in the earliest stage, with a long turnaround time. Once a sample has been received in our laboratory, the prescribing physician will have the result via GENETWORx’s portal within 10 business days.

GENETWORx provides ongoing COVID-19 testing so that states, employers and organizations can continue or again open their operations with a safe and healthy workforce. Name: Clinical Reference Laboratory
Description:
CRL was originally founded as Enzyme Technologies in 1979 with our focus on clinical research and development. The name was changed to Clinical Reference Laboratory in 1983 when we began to offer commercial lab testing. Today, CRL has become one of the largest privately held clinical testing laboratories in the U.S., performing hundreds of thousands of tests every day for clients large and small. Our staff works around-the-clock to process and report results seven days a week.

We are driven each day to provide the useful insights people need to live healthy, safe, and productive lives. We serve insurers, employers, healthcare providers and their patients, colleges and universities, as well as federal, state, and local government agencies through a broad array of corporate and personal wellness programs, drugs of abuse testing programs, insurance risk assessment, and molecular diagnostics testing.

Together with FormFox, the nation’s leading provider of ECCF and electronic workflow solutions, we provide integrated solutions for workplace drugs of abuse testing, occupational health testing, and clinical lab testing services. CRL’s industry-leading turnaround times and state-of-the-art equipment and technology, paired with FormFox’s data management and digital workflow solutions, seamlessly connect all participants.

Our mission isn’t to be the most recognized lab, but to be the most trusted laboratory partner by providing personalized service, accurate testing, rapid turnaround time, and innovative systems and solutions. We conduct research, advance our test menu, pursue collaborations, discover new applications for existing data, and hold ourselves to the highest level of quality and client support standards, uniquely positioning our partners to achieve the best possible outcomes. And we do it all with a human touch.

Name: GenePath Diagnostics
Description:
GenePath Diagnostics is a next generation molecular genetics company that provides state-of-the-art clinical in vitro diagnostic services for developing markets and is developing novel next generation diagnostic tests and platforms for the global market.

We are an innovation-centric company with a strong emphasis on continuous R&D. We are constantly evolving in pace with global developments in the field and have the ability to develop new tests where needed, e.g. to respond to an emerging pathogen or a rare genetic disorder. We pride ourselves on our ability to work with clinicians to come up with novel or custom solutions to diagnostic problems.

At GenePath, we strongly believe in our culture. Our company’s values are the principles and ideals that we live by.

Name: Medical Supply Company (MSC)
Description:

With our team of knowledgeable experts in the field, MSC has established strong partnerships with renowned global manufacturers, ensuring that we offer only the most reliable and top-tier products to our customers. Over the years, MSC has cultivated a network of trusted suppliers, enabling us to access the latest advancements in laboratory technology and maintain a competitive edge in the market.

Innovative techniques are an ongoing feature of diagnostic and research laboratories.  Our professional expertise enables us to provide quality advice and guidance, which effectively controls cost, eliminates waste and maximises efficiency.

Medical Supply is committed to meeting customer’s service requirements, we offer comprehensive after-sales service for all our products.   The MSC service division offers comprehensive after-sales service for all products, including commissioning, installation, preventative maintenance, calibration, training, validation, and temperature mapping. Customers are offered a range of contract proposals plus customised contracts to suit individual customers'

Name: Eurofins Clinical Diagnostics DACH
Description:
Eurofins Clinical Diagnostics – Fachlabore unter einem starken Dach

Wir vereinen spezialisierte medizinische Labore und diagnostische Expertise unter einem Dach. Unsere Labore stehen für präzise, zuverlässige und praxisnahe Diagnostik in Humangenetik, Pränatalmedizin, klinischer Labormedizin und Mikrobiologie. Durch enge interdisziplinäre Zusammenarbeit und den Einsatz modernster Technologien unterstützen wir Ärzt:innen bei fundierten Therapieentscheidungen – für eine optimale Patientenversorgung.

Unsere spezialisierten Labore:

Eurofins Humangenetik & Pränatal-Medizin
Eines der größten pränataldiagnostischen Zentren Deutschlands, das seit 2022 zur Eurofins-Gruppe gehört. Wir bieten das gesamte Spektrum der genetischen Diagnostik – von klassischen Chromosomenanalysen bis zu hochmodernen NGS-Methoden. Unsere Expert:innen unterstützen Ärzt:innen mit gezielten Panel-Analysen bei Organfehlbildungen, Syndromen und unklaren genetischen Fragestellungen. Ein besonderer Meilenstein war die Einführung des PraenaTest im Jahr 2012 als Europas erster nicht-invasiver pränataler Test. Heute ist dieser weltweit im Einsatz und eine etablierte Wahl in der vorgeburtlichen Diagnostik.

Eurofins Gelamed

Mit einer Historie, die bis ins frühe 20. Jahrhundert zurückreicht, ist Eurofins Gelamed ein traditionsreiches Labor für klinische Labordiagnostik. Ursprünglich aus dem Hygiene-Institut des Ruhrgebiets hervorgegangen, hat sich Gelamed stetig weiterentwickelt und steht heute für effiziente, präzise und patientennahe Diagnostik. Seit 2017 ist das Labor Teil der Eurofins-Gruppe und vereint modernste Labormedizin mit jahrzehntelanger Erfahrung.

Vereinte Expertise für die Medizin von morgen
Durch die Bündelung spezialisierter Diagnostikkompetenzen bietet Eurofins Clinical Diagnostics eine verlässliche Grundlage für medizinische Entscheidungen. Wir kombinieren innovative Technologien mit wissenschaftlicher Exzellenz – weil jede Diagnose zählt.

Name: FLUIDDA
Description:
FLUIDDA’s main acitivities consist of developing imaging biomarkers to enhance drug development and patient care. 

These biomarkers combine biomedical imaging and advanced engineering methods. It has been demonstrated in recent studies that this novel approach yields sensitive outcome parameters to detect physiological or clinical changes in patients following an intervention. This provides additional insight into the mode of action of the intervention and allows for optimization of the therapy and improved patient selection.

To support the implementation of this novel method into clinical studies and clinical practice, FLUIDDA also offers a CRO service with the focus on imaging. A complete package can therefore be offered to the client from initial protocol writing to full data analysis using the advanced processing techniques. To offer a high quality service FLUIDDA employs experts in all required fields from medical doctors to biomedical scientists and engineers.

Name: Synevo Turkey
Description:
Synevo Laboratuvarları, Stokholm Nasdaq borsasına kote, ağırlıklı olarak Avrupa’da Sağlık Hizmet sunumu alanında faaliyetlerini yürüten Medicover Holding’in laboratuvar (diagnostik) iş birimidir. Medicover Holding çatısı altında Synevo Laboratuvarları, Medicover Hastaneleri, Tıp Merkezleri, Endokrin Klinikleri, Diş Klinikleri, Tüp Bebek Merkezleri, Sporcu Sağlığı Merkezleri, Eczane Zincirleri yer alan, uluslararası zincir bir sağlık hizmet sunucusudur. Medicover Holding, 40.000’den fazla çalışanı ve yaklaşık 2 Milyar Euro’yu aşan geliri ile Orta ve Doğu Avrupa’nın en büyük sağlık hizmet sunucusudur.
2011 yılında Türkiye’de faaliyetlerine başlayan ve bugün 200’ün üzerinde sağlık profesyonelinin görev yaptığı Synevo, İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir, Bursa, Bodrum, Alanya, Antalya ve Adana'da laboratuvar ve şubeleri ile hizmet vermektedir.

Synevo, özellikle Spesifik İmmunoloji Alerji ve Genetik alanlarında Almanya’nın lider laboratuvarıdır. Sağlıklı Yaşam alanında Türkiye’de ileri diagnostik testleri ile de öne çıkmaktadır. Synevo, Sağlıklı Yaşam Tarzı, Kişiselleştirilmiş Koruyucu ve Önleyici Sağlık alanındaki ileri diagnostik testleriyle dünyanın önde gelen lider laboratuvarlarını Türkiye’de temsil ederek, global teknolojik gelişmeleri ve deneyimleri Türkiye’nin hizmetine sunmaktadır.

Genetik, Synevo Laboratuvarları’nın kapsamlı test yeteneklerini genetik testleri ile bütünleştiren stratejik bir iş alanıdır. Genetik alanında da pazar lideri olma hedefimize yönelik güçlü bir temel oluşturmak için Almanya’nın lider genetik laboratuvarı olarak uzun yıllara dayanan deneyimimizi Türkiye’nin hizmetine sunuyoruz. Vizyonumuz genetik testleri tıbbi teşhis süreçlerinin merkezine yerleştirmektir.

Synevo Laboratuvarları Patoloji Bölümü 2010 yılında kurulmuştur. Synevo kurulduğu yıldan itibaren deneyimli ve profesyonel bir ekip ile önemli bir referans laboratuvar olarak, Türkiye genelinde birçok sağlık kuruluşuna patoloji alanında hizmet sağlamaktadır.
