Name: Lablink Medical Laboratory
Description:
Established in 1989, Lablink Medical Laboratory is the largest chain of private hospital laboratories in Malaysia, dedicated to providing top-tier medical laboratory services to our valued patients.

As a subsidiary of KPJ Healthcare Bhd, Lablink Medical Laboratory oversees and operates the laboratories for all 31 KPJ hospitals, MSU Medical Centre and Aurelius Hospital Nilai (AHN).

Lablink Medical Laboratory's reference centre located in Kuala Lumpur, stands out as a beacon of excellence, accredited with the prestigious MS ISO 15189, and the proud holder of Malaysia’s first private laboratory to achieve Bio-Safety Level 3 (BSL3) certification, enabling us to conduct testing for highly infectious diseases, such as Tuberculosis (TB).

Name: Molecular Testing Labs
Description:
Molecular Testing Labs is a mission-driven, innovative health sciences company specializing in precision laboratory diagnostics. Molecular is committed to revolutionizing accessibility to testing via proprietary technology systems, advanced logistics, and cutting-edge research and development.

We are pioneering and innovating distinctive distribution and specimen collection methods that open access to medical testing where geographic, financial, and stigma barriers once created gaps in the healthcare industry.

We provide accessible and innovative laboratory solutions through collaborative partnerships with payors, private healthcare institutions, universities, commercial partners, and public health organizations. 

Molecular Testing Labs is a CLIA-certified and CAP-accredited, state-of-the-art, esoteric and reference laboratory. We specialize in high-complexity, molecular testing with an extensive portfolio of services including infectious disease, toxicology, targeted sequencing, single nucleotide polymorphism (SNP) genotyping, and Next-Generation Sequencing (NGS), and high-resolution immune profiling. Molecular Testing Labs offers a variety of clinical trial services comprising of assay development, trial site training, investigator support, and customized reporting. We apply the maximum level of control to obtain the most consistent and highest quality results.

Molecular Testing Labs is founded on three guiding principles – Compliance, Innovation and Partnership. For more information, please visit our corporate website – www.moleculartestinglabs.com.

Name: Eaglenos Sciences, Inc.
Description:
Eaglenos is a leader in developing portable, precise, and reliable diagnostic devices for both human and veterinary healthcare markets. From kidney health monitoring with our creatinine meter to critical care diagnostics with our blood gas and electrolyte analyzers, we are redefining the future of "point-of-care testing" with innovation and accessibility at our core.

What Sets Us Apart?
Advanced Sensor Technology: Our devices are powered by the latest electrochemical sensor technology, ensuring unparalleled accuracy and reliability.  
Portability and Ease of Use: Designed for efficiency, our products deliver lab-grade precision in any setting—whether it’s a remote clinic, a decentralized healthcare facility, or even a field application.  

Our Key Product Lineup: 
1. Creatinine Meter: Portable and precise, advancing kidney care through early detection and proactive disease management.  
2. Blood Gas Analysis System: Compact yet powerful, providing real-time results across 37 critical parameters for ICUs, emergency rooms, and decentralized care, thanks to our cutting-edge microfluidic electrochemistry technology.  
3. Electrolyte Analysis System: Maintenance-free and hassle-free, measuring five essential electrolytes, including ionized magnesium, with lab-level precision.  
4. Multifunctional Meter: A versatile device that monitors blood glucose, lactate, ketones, uric acid, and total cholesterol, empowering comprehensive health management.
5. Lactate meter: Trusted by athletes and coaches worldwide for optimizing training, recovery, and performance.

At Eaglenos, we strive to make diagnostics accessible, accurate, and actionable, improving lives and healthcare outcomes for patients, clinicians, and animals across the globe. Whether you’re a healthcare professional, distributor, or simply passionate about innovation in diagnostics, we invite you to be part of our mission. Follow us  for the latest updates, success stories, and insights.

Description:
Established in 1989, Lablink Medical Laboratory is the largest chain of private hospital laboratories in Malaysia, dedicated to providing top-tier medical laboratory services to our valued patients.

As a subsidiary of KPJ Healthcare Bhd, Lablink Medical Laboratory oversees and operates the laboratories for all 31 KPJ hospitals, MSU Medical Centre and Aurelius Hospital Nilai (AHN).

Lablink Medical Laboratory's reference centre located in Kuala Lumpur, stands out as a beacon of excellence, accredited with the prestigious MS ISO 15189, and the proud holder of Malaysia’s first private laboratory to achieve Bio-Safety Level 3 (BSL3) certification, enabling us to conduct testing for highly infectious diseases, such as Tuberculosis (TB).

Name: Laboratorios Gasset
Description: En Laboratorios Gasset contamos con los más avanzados recursos tanto técnicos como humanos, mejorando continuamente nuestros medios técnicos para poder ofrecerle siempre una analítica puntera con el abanico de información más amplio posible y la seguridad y tranquilidad de contar con un equipo humano formado por profesionales en continuo desarrollo.

Name: Elephas
Description: Elephas has developed an ex-vivo platform to assess how live patient biopsies respond to immunotherapies. By preserving the native tumor microenvironment from a live core needle biopsy and using a novel method to address tumor heterogeneity, the Elephas Live platform enables a real-time characterization of immune response. To learn more, visit www.elephas.com

Name: Awanui Group
Description:
Awanui is the new name of APHG. Same great people, same great service. Different name. 

Awanui is Aoteaora New Zealand's leading human and veterinary pathology network.

Awanui provides these services through Northland Pathology, Labtests Auckland, Taranaki Pathology Services, Southern Community Laboratories, Wellington SCL, Medlab South & Gribbles Veterinary Pathology. 

With 25 laboratories, 2,100 staff and over 150 collection centres throughout Aotearoa, we interact with over 25,000 people in our communities everyday.

Name: Unilabs Perú
Description:
Unilabs es un proveedor internacional líder de servicios de diagnóstico que ofrece una gama completa de servicios de laboratorio, patología, genética e imágenes a pacientes en cuatro continentes.
Con más de 13.000 personas en 15 países, Unilabs invierte fuertemente en tecnología, equipos y personas (utilizando tecnologías digitales en sus laboratorios e institutos de imágenes de última generación) para mejorar las vidas de cerca de 100 millones de personas cada año.
Unilabs ahora forma parte del holding danés A.P. Moller, fundado y dirigido por la familia Maersk.

Name: Laboratoire National Mohammed VI d’Analyses Médicales
Description:
Le Laboratoire National Mohammed VI d’analyses médicales (LNM6) est le premier d’une nouvelle génération de plateaux techniques fermés, spécialisés et pluridisciplinaires. Basé sur l’expertise nationale et soutenu par la Fondation Mohammed VI des Sciences et de la Santé, il se positionne comme une alternative crédible à la dépendance de l’étranger.
Notre objectif est d’apporter une réponse à la fragmentation de l’offre nationale en Biologie Clinique et de participer à l’effort pour la souveraineté sanitaire nationale, voulue par Sa Majesté le Roi Mohammed VI, que Dieu l’assiste.
Cela se traduit par notre engagement dans le développement constant de notre laboratoire, notamment par l’acquisition à moyen terme de plateformes de dépistage néonatal, de chimie analytique (LC-MS-MS, ICP-MS), de spectroscopie infrarouge à transformée de Fourier (FTIR) et de séquençage à haut débit (NGS).
Le Laboratoire National Mohammed VI d’analyses médicales est également doté d’un centre de Formation continue, et s’implique dans des projets de recherche en collaboration avec l’Université Mohammed VI des Sciences et de la Santé UM6SS, le Centre National Mohammed VI de la Recherche et l’Innovation CM6 et ses partenaires.

Name: CDx Diagnostics
Description:
The mission of CDx Diagnostics is to provide clinicians with easily implemented, cost-effective tools to preempt cancer through enhanced detection of precancerous cellular changes. This is accomplished by a proprietary diagnostic platform that synthesizes computer imaging, artificial intelligence, molecular biology and three-dimensional cytopathology to detect precancerous change earlier and more reliably than prior methods. CDx tests require only a few minutes of practice time, are highly cost-effective, widely reimbursed, and address a recognized critical gap in the current diagnostic standard of care that results in thousands of otherwise unnecessary cancer deaths each year. Routine clinical use of CDx testing has already detected thousands of precancerous cells that would otherwise have been missed in time for effective endoscopic treatment and application of the CDx diagnostic platform to prevent cancers of the bile duct, stomach, and IBD affected colon is currently in progress.

About WATS3D
WATS3D addresses the major inadequacies inherent in current random forceps biopsy testing of the esophagus. In just a few minutes, endoscopists can easily obtain a wide area, full-thickness transepithelial specimen for computer-assisted 3D laboratory analysis prior to diagnosis by any WATS3D certified pathologist. In large multicenter clinical trials, WATS3D has been found to significantly increase the detection rate of both Barrett’s esophagus and esophageal dysplasia. The high sensitivity and inter-observer agreement of WATS3D is due to the larger tissue area sampled, and the proprietary 3-Dimensional computer imaging system that is based on an artificial intelligence algorithm developed as part of the U.S. Strategic Defense Initiative missile defense program. To learn more about WATS3D, visit www.wats3d.com.

Name: Advance Dental Export
Description:
Advance Dental Export is a team of highly skilled and constantly up-to-date technicians with advancements in dental artistry, product materials, and digital dentistry.

Combining the artistry of hand-craftsmanship with the latest in digital design, scanning, milling, and fabrication. 
Our attention to detail comes close to none. We design each case with the individual attention it requires. Every step of the fabrication process follows a strict gold standard from start to finish.
	
We live by our three rules: 
1. To provide consistent aesthetically functional prostheses
2. Exceptional communication
3. Highly competitive prices

Our philosophy of using state-of-the-art equipment, highly skilled technicians, and great customer service has helped our lab become the largest lab in Gujarat & the fastest growing lab in India. 

We take pride in being a quality-driven laboratory that can fulfill all of your dental prosthetic needs.

Name: CryoFuture
Description:
CryoFuture is redefining fertility preservation through a tech-enabled nationwide network for long-term specimen storage and transportation. Acting as an extension of your lab, we partner with fertility clinics to deliver seamless, secure solutions that protect reproductive tissue while reducing operational burden and risk.

Founded by embryologists with over 300 years of combined experience, our team is committed to supporting both clinics and patients. Our comprehensive services include long-term storage, secure transportation, RFID-enabled inventory management, patient billing and consent management, and tailored protection plans—all designed to safeguard specimens while streamlining clinic operations.

CryoFuture’s storage network is built for unmatched resilience and oversight. Each location features a five-point security system, continuous temperature monitoring, and triple-redundant safeguards to protect specimens at every stage. EF-5-rated design ensures readiness for natural disasters, providing clinics and patients with unparalleled peace of mind.

Every transport is managed by medically trained couriers, never outsourced to third-party carriers. Local transports use dedicated CryoFuture vehicles with advanced safety systems, while nationwide shipments travel in validated, pre-charged vapor tanks built for extended travel. Strict chain-of-custody protocols and rigorous pre- and post-transport checks ensure the integrity of every specimen.

Our CryoFuture One platform simplifies onboarding, billing, and consent processes, while providing clinics with real-time inventory oversight. Patients gain transparency through a secure portal with detailed information about their stored specimens.

Trusted by leading fertility networks nationwide, CryoFuture delivers tech-driven solutions that act as a seamless extension of your lab, protecting what matters most: the future of families.

Name: Teleconsult
Description:
Since 2008, Teleconsult has been a prominent player in the European teleradiology market.
We integrate advanced technologies with a strong emphasis on work-life balance for our 250+ radiologists. Our company works with over 70 Swedish hospitals, Danish hospitals, NHS hospitals in the UK, Dutch hospitals, the Dutch National Breast Cancer Screening Programme, international clinical trials and has also been appointed as the UN European teleradiology partner for tuberculosis screening (non-profit). Our offices are located in several countries, including Sweden, Denmark, the UK, Spain, Indonesia, New Zealand and the Netherlands.

Our values revolve around the belief that the highest quality of medicine arises from a harmonious relationship with our doctors and client hospitals, with a focus on the patient. We utilise innovative technologies to promote this harmony.

Name: Centro Médico Sorocaba
Description:
Em 1986, um grupo de médicos idealizou um espaço que reunisse uma clínica de imagens e um laboratório de análises clínicas, fundando assim um Centro de Diagnósticos.

Com mais de 33 anos de experiência, o Centro Médico oferece serviços de medicina diagnóstica humanizada e personalizada, com o mais elevado padrão de qualidade. Por isso, obteve certificação da ONA, reforçando seu comprometimento, qualidade na entrega e respeito ao paciente.

O Centro Médico foi pioneiro nos exames de tomografia computadorizada, ressonância magnética, mamografia digital, ultrassonografia 4D, Raio X Digital e medicina esportiva, reiterando seu compromisso como centro de excelência em diagnósticos e gestão do conhecimento da maneira segura e inovadora.

Pensando na segurança e bem-estar de seus pacientes, conta com uma equipe altamente especializada e a mais alta tecnologia para proporcionar todo o cuidado e eficácia em seus diagnósticos, com laudos e análises mais completos do mercado, o que o torna compatível com os melhores centros do país.

Atualmente, o Centro Médico conta com seis unidades: Unidade Matriz – primeira e tradicional da cidade; Unidade 2 - para exames de ressonância magnética, tomografia computadorizada, medicina nuclear e Instituto da Mulher, espaço exclusivo para atendimento à saúde da mulher; Unidade Empresarial – exclusiva para atendimento a empresas; Unidade Ápice e a Unidade Zona Norte, clínicas inauguradas em 2019.

Sua história não para por aqui, outros projetos estão em andamento para proporcionar mais saúde e qualidade de vida para toda a população.

Name: HVD EGYPT
Description:
HVD was founded in 1994 and began business life working out of Vienna. Before launching the company, we recognized that, within the life science business sector, there was a good number of manufacturing companies looking for a partner to help support their marketing, distribution, and after-sales activities in a number of specialized geographic markets. We bring a global perspective to our business worldwide, covering regions including Central and Southeast Europe, the Middle East, Africa, the Commonwealth of Independent States, the Far East, and Latin America.

At HVD Life Sciences, we strive to empower our customers to accomplish scientific advancements by providing high-quality products and expert support, enabled by strong and lasting partnerships with industry-leading manufacturers. Our relationships are built upon mutual trust and reliability, providing levels of service and after-sales care that are in keeping with our customers’ and partners’ own standards. HVD Life Sciences is not just a reseller. Our relationships with our customers don’t end when we close a sale. At HVD Life Sciences, we all take pride in the expertise we bring to our work. Our customers benefit from local sales and support teams with expert product and application knowledge. We specialize in delivering a streamlined sales process, expert customer support, and top quality service. Our comprehensive support and service program is as important to our business as the products we ship.

Name: Grupo VIVO
Description: Somos una empresa española de salud de diagnóstico integral. A través de la prevención, buscamos el bienestar físico, mental y social de las personas para que la enfermedad no forme parte de nuestras vidas. Ofrecemos servicios innovadores de diagnóstico 360º: ponemos a tu disposición nuestros centros por toda España, más de 10 unidades móviles, pruebas de salud a domicilio, telerradiología especializada y nuestro laboratorio propio de genética y biología molecular para ofrecerte rapidez, conocimiento y autonomía para mejorar tu estado de salud.

Name: Synvia Tox
Description:
A Synvia Tox é o laboratório líder em exames toxicológicos de larga janela de detecção para CNH, CLT e concursos, destacando-se pelo maior parque de espectrometria de massas da América Latina e processamento diário acima de 25.000 amostras.  
 
Com uma equipe de mais de 800 profissionais, incluindo mestres e doutores, garantimos precisão e qualidade em todos os resultados. Temos certificação INMETRO ISO 17.025 e somos credenciados pela SENATRAN (Secretaria Nacional de Trânsito). 
 
Nossa plataforma de gestão de exames toxicológicos para empresas é a mais completa e fácil de usar do mercado. Totalmente alinhada às portarias do Ministério do Trabalho, ela permite o envio automático de informaçõesao eSocial, a randomização de motoristas e a compra de vouchers de exames em todo o país. A facilidade de uso e a possibilidade de integração com sistemas de RH e ERPs asseguram conformidade legal sem complicação nos processos.  
 
Escolher a Synvia Tox é escolher qualidade, segurança e conformidade! 
 
Fale conosco: 
0800 269 1000 

atendimento@synvia.com 

(19) 99489-9294

Name: ARABLAB LIVE
Description:
ARABLAB LIVE 2025 will welcome 12,000+ international visitors and exhibitors to Dubai to explore the future of laboratory technology.

23-25 September 2025
Dubai World Trade Centre

Get involved at www.arablab.com

Name: Genestring Lab
Description:
Centre for Medical Genetics
Upcoming Chain of Diagnostic Centers

Name: AarogyaAI
Description: AarogyaAI harnesses the potential of Intelligent Genomics; AI powered genomics to transform healthcare. Our goal is to empower healthcare professionals and decision-makers with data-driven insights by monitoring the real-time evolution of pathogens. This approach enables precision diagnosis, eliminating the need for empirical prescription of drugs. Our focus is particularly on combating Anti-Microbial Resistance and proactively staying ahead of superbugs.

Name: Sagis Diagnostics
Description: Sagis is at the forefront of diagnostic science, which allows for the delivery of accurate and timely results, backed by unmatched personal service. We are an entirely physician-owned sub specialty diagnostic pathology laboratory located in the heart of Houston, Texas. We develop strong collaborative relationships with each of our referring physicians by offering accurate, prompt, and clear diagnoses in a personal and customized manner. By taking a team-based approach to diagnostics, we ensure that patients are the main focus and are receiving the best medical care possible.

Name: Nostrum AI
Description:
Nostrum is a multinational drug-manufacturing company with the help of artificial intelligence (AI). The company's primary objective is to engineer drugs for a better, faster, and larger benefit. Our drug engineering has a patient-centric approach that eventually cuts the lengthy trial and testing phases by empowering the software techniques of machine learning and artificial intelligence. 

This methodology not only creates momentum in the pharmacy diaspora but also invites an agile and dynamic scientific temper for drug discovery and the health sector.

Name: Concordia Myanmar
Description:
For over 30 years, Concordia International Co., Ltd., established in 1994, has been a trusted partner in healthcare, engineering, and office automation in Myanmar. 
Strategically having the Headquarter in Yangon with 5 branches in Mandalay, Naypyidaw, Taunggyi & Magway, even in challenging times in Myanmar, we stand strong alongside our customers, providing unmatched importation, distribution, technical support, and after-sales service.
On March 30, 2024, we proudly transitioned to a public company, becoming Concordia Public Company Limited, as we prepare for our IPO on the Yangon Stock Exchange. Together with our valued customers, we continue to build on a foundation of innovation, trust, and excellence, ensuring our collective success.

Name: Medisyn
Description:
Medisyn employs around 600 people in Switzerland, who work tirelessly for the benefit our customers and their patients. MEDISYN SA offers general practitioners and specialist doctors, as well as hospital customers a full range of routine and specialist laboratory medicine, including anatomical pathology and human genetics. 

Always close at hand - everywhere in Switzerland
SYNLAB Suisse SA is present at more than 20 locations throughout Switzerland. We are always close to you, when you need us. Personal contact with our customers is a characteristic of SYNLAB. All of us are happy to make a personal commitment to SYNLAB quality with a name and a face - consultants for technical, material and financial questions, laboratory managers for medical questions and analysis interpretations, and laboratory assistants for support with sampling materials or additional analyses.

Serving patients and doctors
Professionals from all medical fields work in SYNLAB laboratories. Complex analyses are performed in regional competence centres by highly qualified specialists. Diagnostic and analytical results are collected in a comprehensive database; scientific summaries and current reports are published and available to physicians. In addition, SYNLAB provides a range of services tailored to the situation in the practice or clinic.

Intelligent, simple and secure data exchange
SYNLAB offers an intelligent, simple and secure solution for the digital exchange of information between partners in the Swiss healthcare sector and the SYNLAB laboratory. The laboratory software is available all day and is updated in real time. It enables fast and secure order entry directly from the software of the doctor's practice or clinic. Validated test results can be retrieved regardless of location, time or device.

Name: Lab Diagnostic Systems
Description: Lab Diagnostic Systems (SMC) Pvt LTD Pakistan : Country's first IVD manufacturer;  focussing to empower local industry to meet local needs with indigenous solutions.

Name: Alatheia
Description:
En Alatheia buscamos mejorar la salud en Chile.
Esto lo logramos mediante la comercialización de soluciones tecnológicas, apoyadas por evidencia científica y médica, enfocadas en optimizar el diagnóstico oportuno y preciso del paciente, contribuyendo en la mejora de los procesos de la salud pública y privada de Chile.

Tenemos un gran compromiso con la salud, haciendo la conexión entre salud y naturaleza.

Vivir en equilibrio con la naturaleza no solo es un acto de responsabilidad con el medio ambiente, sino
también con nuestra salud. La naturaleza tiene un efecto positivo en la vida.
El aire fresco, la vegetación, la luz natural y el contacto con las plantas, está demostrado que tiene
beneficios para el bienestar físico, mental y emocional.

Name: ANTISEL
Description:
ANTISEL was established in 1967 in Thessaloniki, Greece. The original objective was to import and distribute scientific products and technologies in the wider area of Northern Greece. Soon, a greater vision would be realized through the creation of a customer-focused company aiming at the acceleration of scientific evolution in Greece.

ANTISEL, certified with ISO 9001:2015, ISO 13485:2016 and ISO 14001:2015, is the leading distributor of scientific equipment in Southeastern Europe, with a strong team of more than 200 specialists in their field.

Our mission is to serve specialists from several scientific fields with products and solutions for:
• Molecular Diagnostics
• Life Sciences
• Applied Sciences
• Diagnostics
• Analytical Measurements
• Blood Banking
• Laboratory Equipment
• Physiotherapy & Rehabilitation
• Medical Equipment
• Microscopy
• Imaging

Name: pramitalab.id
Description:
Berawal dari sebuah niat yang kuat untuk menghadirkan sebuah layanan Laboratorium Klinik yang lengkap, simpel, cepat dengan mutu hasil yang baik dan harga terjangkau, maka dibukalah Laboratorium Klinik PRAMITA di Surabaya pada bulan Oktober 1987.

Sambutan baik oleh masyarakat Surabaya dan sekitarnya -- khususnya para klinisi -- atas kehadiran Laboratorium Klinik PRAMITA semakin menambah rasa percaya diri dan optimisme para perintis untuk bekerja lebih keras lagi untuk memberikan yang terbaik bagi para pelanggan. Terobosan luar biasa yang dilakukan PRAMITA yang saat itu belum pernah ada adalah layanan non stop mulai pukul 6 pagi hingga pukul 21 malam, layanan rontgen, EKG, kemudian disusul dengan pemeriksaan penunjang lainnya, merupakan wujud nyata komitmen PRAMITA untuk menjadi laboratorium klinik terlengkap .

Berbekal dari pengalaman mendirikan Laboratorium di Surabaya, dikembangkanlah Laboratorium Klinik PRAMITA di berbagai kota besar lainnya seperti Jember, Bandung, Yogyakarta, Cirebon, Jakarta dan Medan, hingga tahun 2006 Laboratorium Klinik PRAMITA telah memiliki 10 Cabang.

Pada kuartal pertama tahun 2007 telah terjadi perubahan sangat mendasar dalam menejemen PT. PRAMITA, yakni perubahan struktur modal, susunan Dewan Komisaris dan Direksi. Atas dasar pertimbangan menejemen, PT. PRAMITA melepas separuh asetnya sehingga pada bulan April 2007 PT. PRAMITA mengelola cabang-cabang yang terletak di berbagai kota besar di Indonesia. Puji Syukur kehadirat Tuhan Yang Maha Esa bahwa perkembangan Laboratorium Klinik PRAMITA sangat pesat sehingga pada tahun 2016 kami telah memiliki 29 cabang yang tersebar di 15 kota diseluruh Indonesia.

Name: Genoa - Laboratório de Medicina Diagnóstica
Description:
Genoa/LPCM

O Laboratório de Patologia Cirúrgica de São Paulo (LPCM), agora conhecido como Genoa/LPCM Medicina Diagnóstica, é um centro de diagnósticos que oferece serviços de análises clínicas e exames especializados. Fundado em 1978, o laboratório tem uma longa história de excelência em patologia cirúrgica e diagnóstica.

História e Parcerias

Inicialmente, o LPCM era albergado dentro do Hospital Sírio Libanês, com o qual manteve um contrato de exclusividade por 35 anos. Essa parceria permitiu que o laboratório desenvolvesse sua expertise e se tornasse referência em sua área de atuação.

Genoa Biotecnologia

Em 2002, um grupo de pesquisadores do LPCM fundou a Genoa Biotecnologia, uma empresa líder em diagnóstico molecular. A Genoa Biotecnologia desenvolve testes para avaliação de risco de doenças, suporte em decisões clínicas e programas terapêuticos personalizados.


Encodexa
A Encodexa é um spin off  da Genoa/LPCM, laboratório originado a partir da fusão da Genoa Biotecnologia SA, empresa de pesquisa em genética molecular desde 2001,  com o Laboratório de Patologia Cirúrgica e Molecular albergado desde 1980 no Hospital Sírio Libanês do qual se desligou em 2013 para possibilitar esta parceria a Genoa/LPCM é reconhecida pela excelência em pesquisa e tecnologia e pelos diversos projetos que desenvolveu, isoladamente ou em parceria com outras instituições tais como a Universidade de Alberta (Canadá), a Universidade Johns Hopkins (EUA) e o Laboratório de Investigação Médica 55 (LIM55) da Faculdade de Medicina da USP, dentre outros.

Corpo Clínico

A equipe do Genoa/LPCM é composta por profissionais experientes e qualificados, que trabalham com dedicação para oferecer o melhor atendimento aos pacientes.

Visite os nossos sites e conheça mais!

Name: Lifera Omics
Description: Lifera Omics delivers cutting-edge genetic and multi-omic testing services to patients, health systems, biopharma companies, and research institutions throughout the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) area.

Name: Ethos Laboratories
Description:
Our purpose is to help more people.

Ethos Laboratories’ commitment to continued innovation is rooted in the company’s passion for cutting-edge laboratory science and a desire to invest in research and development with the goal of helping more people. We specialize in laboratory testing solutions relevant to our partners in pain management, behavioral health, addiction recovery, primary care, and others.

Started in 2010, Ethos is a CAP-accredited, CLIA-certified, high-complexity laboratory that specializes in the highest quality diagnostic testing including clinical toxicology, biomarker testing, and several partner projects for various chronic conditions. Clinical diagnostic testing helps providers screen for, diagnose, and monitor specific medications, conditions, infections, diseases and more. Ethos testing helps providers better assess patient health, allowing caregivers and patients to make informed clinical decisions to deliver more personalized patient care.

Name: Waldner Italy
Description:
With more than 100 years of experience in the industry, Waldner is the ideal partner for setting up workshops of any level and size: 
SIMPLE One-stop shop for: Design, Production, Installation, On-site qualification, After-sales service.
PROFESSIONAL Absolute European leader and second largest manufacturer in the world, 100% German production, All production stages in-house, Direct subsidiaries in the main European countries, In-house laboratory design company (Eretech gmbh) 
FLEXIBLE A product line with endless possibilities for customisation, to guarantee tailor-made solutions to meet every specific need. 
INNOVATIVE Undisputed market pioneers, Waldner was the first company to introduce chemical fume hoods with back-up flow for maximum protection of operator health and energy savings.

Name: Cerba Lancet Africa
Description:
Cerba Lancet Africa is the leading network of clinical pathology and medical diagnosis in Africa, with the ambition to become the leading diagnostic services provider in Africa and world-class standards of pathology services to patients and medical communities across the continent.  

Cerba Lancet Africa is a joint venture created in 2019 with the French group Cerba HealthCare, a leading international player in medical diagnosis, and Lancet Laboratories, the foremost name in clinical pathology in sub-Saharan Africa.


Ensuring they are conveniently located, we operate a network of 170 sites, across Botswana, Gabon, Ghana, Kenya, Mozambique, Nigeria, Rwanda, Swaziland, Tanzania, Uganda, Zambia and Zimbabwe. 

We offer a portfolio of over 4000 pathology testing services ranging from routine screening tests to highly specialised clinical testing for research, screening, industrial, and occupational health, under the direction of more than 20 pathologists. Our pathologists assist doctors in making diagnoses and taking informed decisions. This allows doctors to tailor appropriate treatments about their patients’ health or any medical conditions.

Name: Innoquest Pathology
Description:
In May 2022, Innoquest Pathology (formerly Gribbles Pathology) was officially launched.  We are the only multidisciplinary clinical laboratory in Malaysia to hold both College of American Pathology (CAP) and MS ISO 15189 accreditations. 

Supported by a deep bench of industry expertise and our ground breaking technology, Innoquest is proud to serve clinicians, hospitals, medical centres, and their patients through the deployment of advanced diagnostic testing methods and technology.

Name: Oncolab Diagnostics
Description: Hallo Dubai! Discover cutting-edge healthcare solutions tailored to your unique needs. Trust our expertise for comprehensive diagnostics, advanced therapies, and top-quality medical equipment.

Name: Star Metropolis Clinical Laboratories
Description:
STAR Metropolis Clinical Laboratories is an advanced medical diagnostic laboratory established in UAE since 2006, to cater to whole of MENA Region. SMCL is a part of Arabian Healthcare LLC. SMCL aims at providing most reliable and accurate laboratory services coupled with latest technology and knowledge including logistics management. The objective is always uncompromised quality and value to benefit physician community to assist in their day to day clinical decisions. STAR Metropolis is committed to professionalism, ethics, quality and accuracy. STAR Metropolis after establishing itself in UAE is poised to spread its services and activities to other GCC and rest of the Arabia. Name: QEEGhome
Description:
The vast majority of people suffering from psychiatric disorders, do not have a proper response to medication in the first prescription and this will cause a reduction in the final treatment outcome. We are trying to use objective data provided directly from the brain to predict the exact medication and reduce the probability of failure in the initial prescription.
Personalized and specified medicine in psychiatric disorders such as Adult ADHD, Depression, Dementia, and ADHD is our goal in QEEGhome based on EEG data. It also consists of precise diagnosis. In this way, we are using the most up-to-date methods of signal processing, statistical analysis, and AI methods.
For the first time, we are working on hyperactivity, which is often mixed with disorders such as depression and anxiety, and this makes it difficult to diagnose and differentiate this disease.
Our service consists of QEEG-based reports to help clinicians select better and more appropriate treatments and to help them design better Neurotherapy protocols if they want to use nonmedication methods.

Name: LUMABS BV
Description:
LUMABS BV developed a new, solution-based platform using bioluminescent sensor proteins to detect biomolecules directly in blood plasma. The technology allows for automatic calibration and produces results with crude samples in a matter of minutes. The RAPPID version has been developed to replace multiple workflow, time consuming, waste generation steps in current ELISA methods with a simple one-step mix and measure method to rapidly and with the highest sensitivity of any detection technology, quantify the amount of the antibody/antigen of interest (e.g. drug) in a biological sample, such as blood, starting from a minimally invasive blood amount (1 μL).The test and reader provide a  much higher accuracy as ELISA and eliminates the need for time consuming (washing) steps whilst also offering cost savings.

Using our patented technology, any immunoassay diagnostic manufacturer can reduce in >90% the current carbon footprint of the current ELISA methodologies through a quantifiable reduction in the use (waste) of plastics, (discharged liners of) liquid solutions and laboratory resources energy (no energy-consuming incubations, reduced worflow, reduced equipment usage, etc).

Name: Kypha
Description:
Kypha’s mission is to enable and deliver precise, real-time information from complement, the most inaccessible element of the innate immune system. By doing so we aim to put within reach earlier, more-informed clinical research and therapeutic decisions and better outcomes for every patient with an immune-related condition.

At Kypha, our technology allows us to gain real-time insight into complement proteins – as well as cytokines, chemokines and other biologically labile immune signals. We have developed a point-of-care platform designed for measurement of either single analyte (CompAct) or multiplex (RapiPlex) samples.  By enabling measurement of these samples within minutes, we can assess an individual’s immune status with a far higher degree of accuracy and reproducibility. And because it is embedded into our detection technology, this information can be readily available at the point of care.

By being able to measure specific elements of the complement cascade quickly and reliably, we can open to door to deeper understanding of the role of complement and pave the way for the next generation of therapies.

Name: JaxBio
Description:
At JaxBio, we are revolutionising the way cancer is diagnosed and managed by making cancer detection simpler, quicker, and more precise, and we're doing that through our innovative blood test technology.

Our unique blood test offers advantages over traditional methods and traditional liquid biopsies. Based on its high sensitivity together with low cost and simplicity, we can deliver results faster with improved accuracy. By improving screening and early detection capabilities for cancer, healthcare providers and patients can now make better informed decisions sooner when time is of the essence.

Name: Genessense
Description:
Genessense is powered by MedGenome, born with a vision to provide insight into an individual’s unique genetic makeup and to pave a roadmap for their healthy well-being.

Genessense delivers a full spectrum of predictive health insights that span from genetic risk screening tests to comprehensive genomic wellness packages, providing information about your genetic risk of developing various health conditions.

Genetic risk screening tests by Genessense are based on years of research and validation, curated from exhaustive genomic analysis of population groups and designed by the scientists at MedGenome. The data generated from this research is at the heart of Genessense's offerings.

We utilize the latest Polygenic Risk Score (PRS) based approach, which indicates if the individual is at a high, moderate, or average genetic risk for developing a specific trait or disease.

Our scientists have invested 10,000+ man-hours in research and validation to design and develop the Genessense Genomic Wellness Services.

Pioneering technologies in personal genomics like Next Generation Sequencing (NGS) and microarrays, coupled with bioinformatics data analysis, are employed to decipher and generate your genetic risk status for a particular health condition.

MedGenome is a global leader in genetic testing services, genomics research, and drug discovery solutions. MedGenome has been committed to delivering world-class genomic solutions with greater precision and accuracy to empower every human being for better management of their health since 2013.

MedGenome is working towards democratizing the access to quality and affordable genetic solutions to serve over 4 billion people for their healthcare needs through the power of genetic testing.

Name: LifeArc Centre for Acceleration of Rare Disease Trials
Description:
The LifeArc Centre for Acceleration of Rare Disease Trials is a collaborative initiative aimed at enhancing rare disease research and clinical trials. 

The Centre is part of LifeArc’s Rare Disease Translational Challenge, focusing on accelerating the development of new treatments for rare diseases. The Centre operates as a multi-institutional partnership between Newcastle University, University of Birmingham, and Queen’s University Belfast, working closely with industry, clinicians, and patient groups to improve trial design, recruitment, and delivery.

The Centre is co-ordinated by Prof. David Jones OBE, with each partner institution having a Lead: Prof. Volker Straub [Newcastle University, Profs. Timothy Barrett and Amos Burke [University of Birmingham] and Prof. Amy Jayne McKnight [Queen’s University Belfast].

This initiative aims to accelerate the initiation and delivery of rare disease clinical trials, enhance collaboration across academia, healthcare, and industry, support the development and evaluation of innovative trial designs, and improve patient access to clinical trials.

We are committed to fostering innovation in rare disease research by integrating cutting-edge methodologies, real-world data, and patient-centered approaches. By leveraging expertise across its partner institutions and working closely with regulatory bodies and industry stakeholders, the Centre seeks to streamline trial processes, reduce barriers to participation, and ensure that promising new treatments reach patients faster. Through this collaborative model, we aim to establish a sustainable framework for accelerating rare disease clinical trials in the UK and beyond.

Name: Allergenis
Description:
Our mission at Allergenis is transformative: we aim to revolutionize food allergy diagnosis and management, thereby improving the quality of life for over 200 million individuals worldwide. We have already made significant strides.  

The food allergy epidemic affects 32 million Americans, including one in 13 children, and continues to present potential life-threatening reactions to this entire population.  Sadly, it has generated substantial mental, emotional and financial burdens on individuals, parents and caregivers.

While tolerance levels and subsequent reactions vary among individuals, existing food allergy testing does not identify these ranges.  Current blood-test options in the marketplace produce ambiguous and inaccurate results which lack a full spectrum view of an individual’s allergy.  The most commonly administered blood tests have as high as a 60% false-positive rate, while the gold standard tool, an oral food challenge (OFC) is costly, time-consuming, and frequently anxiety-inducing due to the risk of clinical reaction.

Allergenis is changing the food allergy diagnostic landscape.  Offering patients with more testing options and more clarity on their food allergies.

The first is the Pain Validity Test, which can predict with 95% accuracy who will have abnormalities on the correct medical tests, proving the patient has a validit complaint of pain. The second test is the Pain Diagnostic Test, which give diagnoses with a 96% correction with the diagnoses of the Johns Hopkins Hospital doctors, and recommends the correct medcial tests to use. The thrid test is the Headache Diagnostic Test, which gives diagnoses with a 94% correction with the diagnoses of the Johns Hopkins Hospital doctors. The questionnaires are available at www.PainValidityTest.com, and take only 5 minutes of secretarial time to set up a patient to take the tests. Results are available 3 minutes after completion of the tests.

Name: The Association of Medical Laboratory Immunologists (AMLI)
Description:

The organization consists of clinical scientists, physicians, dentists, veterinarians, medical technologists, and other professionals engaged in all areas of current laboratory testing.

The organization holds an annual meeting at which information on all aspects of laboratory immunology are presented including new test development, technical and quality control aspects of current testing, the impact of regulatory issues, new developments in basic immunology and their impact on the practice of clinical immunology, clinical case studies, poster sessions, and round table discussions with experts in the field. The organization’s mission is to improve the practice of clinical immunology laboratory testing by encouraging education and training of all individuals in the organization, maximizing the quality of test procedures, promoting the exchange of information, supporting clinical research efforts, and improving patient care.

Magic Genomix is a precision oncology deeptech startup leveraging genomic instability biomarkers to persoanlize cancer treatment and de-risk drug development. Our proprietary platform, including tools like Magic X and Magic Tween, transforms complex clinical and multimodal data into clear, actionable insights.

Magic X analyzes tumor biopsy data to stratify chemotherapy response into three clinically actionable categories: predicted responders, non-responders, and patients at risk of therapy-induced harm. Magic X has demonstrated strong predictive power for chemotherapy response in retrospective soft tissue sarcoma data and is now expanding into ovarian, lung, and breast cancers with targeted and immunotherapy combinations.

Name: OptiPath - MVZ für Pathologie eGbR
Description:
Dürfen wir uns vorstellen?
Wir sind ein medizinisches Versorgungszentrum (MVZ) für Pathologie

Als eines der größten Labore für Pathologie führen wir histologische und zytologische Diagnosetätigkeiten aus. Wir untersuchen jährlich eine Vielzahl an unterschiedlichen Gewebeproben aus nahezu allen medizinischen Bereichen. In unserem MVZ für Pathologie OptiPath, OptiCyt  arbeiten 12 Fachärzte und mehr als 100 Mitarbeiter in 6 Abteilungen. 
OptiPath war das erste nach DIN EN ISO 45004 akkreditierte Institut für Pathologie in Deutschland. Mehrfache Re-Akkreditierungen (DIN EN ISO/IEC 17020), durch externe Auditoren in den letzten Jahren, bestätigen unsere Fachkompetenz und garantieren unseren Einsendern, bzw. ihren Patienten eine gesichert hohe Qualität und Zuverlässigkeit der Befunde.

HÄMATOPATHOLOGIE
Die hämatologische Diagnostik ist eine interdisziplinäre Herausforderung. Da die morphologischen Befunde oft nur in Zusammenschau mit den klinischen Daten richtig eingeordnet werden können, haben wir für Sie einen Einsendeschein mit den entsprechenden klinischen Angaben vorbereitet.

IMMUNHISTOLOGIE
Die Immunhistologie und Immunzytochemie sind moderne Verfahren, die in schwierigen Fällen oder zur Bestimmung prognostisch-therapeutischer Informationen zusätzlich zu den konventionellen histologischen und zytologischen Verfahren angewandt werden.

MOLEKULARPATHOLOGIE
Die Molekularpathologie gewinnt zunehmend an Bedeutung für die genaue Charakterisierung von Tumorerkrankungen und ist somit eine Spezialdisziplin der Pathologie. Somit können genetische Veränderungen analysiert werden, um anschließend die individuellen Therapiemöglichkeiten besser bewerten zu können.

ZYTOPATHOLOGIE
Konventionelle gynäkozytologische Untersuchungen und flüssigkeitsbasierte Zytologien werden von unseren IAC bzw. DGZ zertifizierten CTAs gemeinsam mit unseren FIAC bzw. MIAC zertifizierten Ärzten befundet.

Name: Clarity Lab Solutions
Description:
At Clarity, we are not your ordinary PCR laboratory; we are pioneers in redefining patient outcomes through our unique hybrid PCR and traditional culture methodology. Our comprehensive approach, which includes PCR for precise pathogen identification and resistance gene detection, combined with culture for additional growth identification and confirmation of organism viability, sets us apart from traditional testing methods. In addition to organism identification, we also provide the unique advantage of antibiotic sensitivity testing within a pooled environment.  Specimens are processed by mimicking an “in vivo” environment more closely replicating what happens in the body with a polymicrobial infection. Certain pairs of organisms, when present, share nutrients and strength, building antibiotic resistance.  These interactions can change susceptibility patterns and isolation methods do not account for bacterial interaction. At Clarity Lab Solutions, we are committed to delivering unparalleled value and precision in diagnostic testing, empowering healthcare providers to make informed decisions for optimal patient care

Description:
Lipinutragen Srl, born in Bologna in December 2005 as spin-off company of the National Research Council (CNR), is the first company that brings to the market an innovative approach of molecular medicine: cell membrane lipidomics and NUTRILIPIDOMICS, molecular diagnostics to nutraceuticals and nutrition for a personalized approach in health care.

The scientific know-how and ethics distinguish the Company’s activity in the health market. Lipinutragen performs high-quality molecular analysis, as well as training of the persons involved in the health market, providing them with innovative tools for prevention, diagnosis and treatment with highly customized nutritional products.
LIPINUTRAGEN is:
- Functionality and reliability
The analytical protocols applied by Lipinutragen are connected to the CNR research about cell membrane lipidomics, radical stress and trans fatty acid formation, carried out by the co-founders researchers, Dr. Chryssostomos Chatgilialoglu and Dr. Carla Ferreri. The Company R&D&I is based on rigorous scientific basis, knowledge and skills provided by the above internationally renowned scientists
- High technology
The robotic unit, created and owned by Lipinutragen, with an advanced and unique in the world technology, is able to implement the analysis and automatize the cell selection concerning the mature erythrocyte from a small blood sample (500 microliter) and the membrane fatty acid sampling, making repeatable and reliable membrane lipidomic analysis.
- Transparency and quality certified
The Lipidomic Laboratory authorized by the ASL (Health Aut. PG 263274 08/11/2012) at the Research Area of CNR in Bologna;
Scientifically validated analytical protocol;
CE certification of the robotic unit created and owned by Lipinutragen

Name: CellSight Diagnosis
Description:
CellSight Diagnosis is a forward-thinking company founded by a dynamic team, including professionals from the fields 
of dentistry and oncology. The goal is to revolutionize leukemia diagnosis through advanced technology and 
comprehensive medical knowledge. They propose an innovative product that leverages artificial intelligence and image 
processing to enable early, accurate, and rapid diagnosis of acute leukemia. This software platform utilizes deep neural custom models to distinguish immature leukemic blasts from normal cells, facilitating precise diagnosis 
through microscopic image analysis. With a commitment to bridging the diagnostic gap and improving patient outcomes, CellSight Diagnosis is at the forefront of medical innovation, uniting expertise from diverse domains for a common purpose.

Name: Medicover Diagnostics BiH
Description:
Laboratorije Medicover Diagnostics svoje poslovanje u BiH započele su 2022. godine kao dio internacionalnog Medicover sistema. 
Izbor stručnog osoblja, kontinuirano unaprijeđivanje njihovog znanja, primjena najsavrijemenije opreme i novih dostignuća iz oblasti laboratorijske dijagnostike,  koraci su koji nas vode do ostvarenja željenog cilja – postizanje preciznih i pouzdanih laboratorijskih rezultata.

Kvalitet i efikasnost su naši osnovni postulati, oni su osnov našeg poslovanja i čine nas pouzdanim i kompetentnim partnerom zdravstvenim profesionalcima, bolnicama, ordinacijama, osiguravajućim društvima, kompanijama kao i pojedincima.

Medicover Diagnostics posluje kroz lanac od 10 laboratorija, među kojima 6 punktova u Banja Luci sa centralnom laboratorijom u Prijedoru, kao i lokacijama u Laktašima, Prnjavoru, Gradišci i Doboju. 

Integrisani laboratorijski informacioni sistem (LIS) koji upravlja laboratorijskom opremom i kontroliše radne procese, od trenutka uzorkovanja do izdavanja rezultata, primenjuje se u Medicover Diagnostics laboratorijama od osnivanja, što predstavlja jednu od komparativnih prednosti u odnosu na druge zdravstvene ustanove.

Silab je instaliran kao primarni LIS u stotinama laboratorija širom Evrope, jer pored veće brzine omogućava i potpunu automatizaciju laboratorijskih procesa, pri čemu je mogućnost ljudske greške svedena na minimum.

Automatizacija obuhvata sve procese, od prijema do arhiviranja uzoraka, kao i upravljanje dokumentacijom i podacima u bazi podataka. Osim ugradnje novog, najsavrijemenijeg serverskog sistema, obezbeđeno je i njegovo neprekidno napajanje, kao i backup i restauracija baze podataka, sa ciljem da se omogući nesmetano funkcionisanje sistema čak i u vanrednim situacijama.

Name: Reszon Diagnostics International Sdn Bhd
Description:
Established on October 11th, 2010, Reszon Diagnostics International Sdn. Bhd. (Reszon), a member of Hextar Healthcare Berhad develops and manufactures a strong portfolio of innovative in-vitro diagnostics (IVD) rapid tests and enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits for medical professionals, including clinical diagnostic markets worldwide. 

Reszon’s IVD rapid test kits enable medical professionals to diagnose diseases quickly and accurately for the early detection and prevention of diseases. The simple assay procedures plus the portability of its rapid test kits make them ideal for applications in a wide range of settings, including remote areas and countries where sophisticated medical diagnostics are not available. Reszon is actively transforming its manufacturing process to full automation in order to competitively address growing global needs. Reszon is also committed to providing the best affordable diagnostics in the self-testing sector. 

At present, Reszon has 2 manufacturing facilities located in USJ Subang Jaya, Selangor with a current combined production capacity of approximately 96 million units of test kits annually. For more than a decade, we have strengthened our forte to put immunochromatographic assay development and innovation to the commercial market. Driven by the motto of “Reasoning Possibilities in Life”, we retain our passions and commitment to creating more possibilities by improving better health in the human race.

At Reszon, we continue to create solutions for healthcare institutions, laboratories, and medical offices from all around the world. The test results derived from our testing device play an acute role in point-of-care decision-making, influencing the majority of critical healthcare decisions for millions of people worldwide. 

For more information, please visit www.reszonics.com

Description:
Sie suchen einen Entwicklungsdienstleister, einen Berater für Regulatory Affairs oder ein biologisches Testlabor für Ihr neues Medizinprodukt?

Am innovativen Standort im Businesspark Brodswinden, einem Stadtteil von Ansbach, bieten wir als einzigartiger und interdisziplinärer Gesamtdienstleister für die Bereiche Medizinprodukte, Medizintechnik, Laborgeräte und Pharma ein umfassendes Portfolio an. Durch kontinuierliche Innovation hat sich senetics als One-Stop-Shop für die Auftragsentwicklung, Testung, Prüfung und Zulassung von Medizinprodukten etabliert. Alle Aufgabenstellungen der Entwicklung innovativer Geräte, Applikationen und Baugruppen, sowie deren Prototyping und Kleinserienfertigung können umgesetzt werden. Ergänzend beraten wir zu Regulatory Affairs und Zulassung (MDR, FDA), ebenso zur normenkonformen Technischen Dokumentation, der Etablierung von QM-Systemen und der Testung und Prüfung in unseren biologischen und technischen Prüflaboren.

Ob Biokompatibilität von z. B. Kunststoffen, antimikrobielle Wirkung von Oberflächen, Kratz-, Schweiß- und Speichelechtheit von Materialien oder Keimbelastung von Medizinprodukten  – die Test- und Prüflaboratorien von senetics bieten hier ein breites Portfolio. Durch die enge Zusammenarbeit unserer Labore mit unserer Entwicklungsabteilung ist es uns zusätzlich möglich, Ihnen schnelle und einfache Entwicklungsbegleitende Prüfungen, sowie auch spezielle kundenspezifische Testungen anzubieten.

Wir begleiten Sie von der innovativen Idee zum marktreifen Produkt! Das Team von senetics freut sich auf spannende Projekte mit Ihnen!

Weiterhin bieten wir Unterstützung durch die Organisation wichtiger Netzwerke im Bereich der Medizintechnik um eine Unternehmensübergreifende Zusammenarbeit zu fördern. Hierbei möchten wir als Beispiel das Netzwerk für Innovative Zulieferer der Medizintechnik, sowie den Kompetenzatlas-Medizintechnik nennen.

Name: LabExperts sp. z o.o.
Description:
Who are we?

We are a team of experienced analysts, chemists and LC-MS/MS specialists who combine industrial practice, academic experience and a passion for analytical technology development. We have built our competencies at universities, pharmaceutical companies and research and implementation laboratories. As a result, we combine theoretical knowledge with the real needs of modern analytics.

What do we do?

 LC-MS/MS Analytics
We specialize in the development and implementation of quantitative and qualitative analytical methods – both targeted and untargeted – using liquid chromatography coupled to mass spectrometry (LC-MS/MS). Our methods reach laboratories in various sectors: medicine, pharmaceuticals, toxicology, environment, food and more.

 Implementations and trainings

We implement the developed methods at our clients’ sites and train laboratory personnel, tailoring the programs to the needs and proficiency level of the participants. We do not organize training in hotels – we believe that the best training takes place where the equipment stands: in the laboratory. You can visit us in our laboratories or invite us to your place.

 Research and Development (R&D)

We actively participate in R&D and scientific projects. Our experience includes more than 15 completed scientific projects and cooperation with research institutions.

Name: RT MicroDx
Description:
RT MicroDx is reshaping the healthcare landscape by developing accurate, affordable, at-home molecular testing solutions that empower individuals, alleviate financial distress, and contribute to healthier communities worldwide. Our readerless RT LAMP reaction, utilizing saliva samples, empowers individuals and families to take control of their health journey from the comfort of their homes. 
 
Leveraging our scalable testing platform, we are currently developing the first over-the-counter, molecular-based, at-home test for strep, the “RST,” offering a simplistic yet robust and inexpensive testing solution that only requires a saliva sample rather than a painful and invasive throat swab. With accuracy levels reaching 97% specificity and 99% sensitivity, our solutions transcend traditional at-home testing barriers, offering timely and reliable results.

Name: Payvand Clinical, Specialty, Pathology, Medical Genetics and Molecular Laboratory
Description:
Payvand Clinical and Specialty Laboratory was founded in 2004  in Tehran, Iran. Having over 15 years of clinical diagnostic experience, Payvand has provided the best testing service  including routine tests as well as special tests which require more sophisticated protocols and equipment for providing fast and accurate results. 
The quality control process and testing is more frequent than most other laboratories. From 2011 onward, Payvand has been continuously awarded the Quality Certificate from the Health Reference Laboratory of Ministry of Health and Medical Education and also received international quality certificates of ISO9001 , ISO10002, ISO15189.
Payvand Clinical and Specialty Laboratory is expanding its test menu and automation to control costs and maintain superior turnaround time (TAT) for its customers as it carries out over 3000 tests per day on patient specimens from a range of over 700 tests, available. Payvand Clinical and Specialty Laboratory is one of the laboratories in Iran that is recognized as a referral laboratory, in large scale in Tehran and a national diagnostic center by more than 70 laboratories across the country.  
The Laboratory is also a network member of molecular diagnostic centers of IFCC and has a strong reputation in many areas including Molecular diagnostics,Pathology,Genetics,Flow cytometry,FISH,Hematology & Coagulation, Biochemistry,Immunology/Serology,Parasitology and Microbiology.
Payvand Laboratory services include House collection ,online result reporting services as well as having  results available by  post or courier. We offer a broad menu of same-day testing and reporting through dedicated faxes, remote printers and online web results.
Payvand Clinical and Specialty Laboratory looks forward to collaborating with International diagnostic laboratories and companies interested in establishing a network in clinical diagnostic in order to provide best quality services for all domestic and overseas medical centers.

Name: ESP Diagnostics Limited
Description:
Neurodegenerative disorders present a huge societal burden, and one from which few of us remain untouched in some way. Unfortunately, by the time a diagnosis is made, it is often too late and irreversible damage is already done. It is essential that patients get examined as early as possible, and that symptoms get diagnosed accurately. This allows the right patients to receive the right treatments at the right time, to help to slow progression, and mitigate symptoms. 

Pharma and Biotech companies that are developing disease modifying therapies also have a need for biomarkers for neurodegenerative disorders that can help predict disease presence, monitor disease progression and treatment response.
ESP Diagnostics is developing scalable liquid-biopsy tests based upon measurements of specific neurodegenerative disease biomarkers in extracellular vesicles (EVs) extracted from blood, saliva and urine.  The ESP biomarker tests will allow early pre-symptomatic detection of neurological disorders such as Parkinson’s Disease, Dementia with Lewy Bodies, and a differential diagnosis of Alzheimer’s. 
 
We provide assay services to pharma and biotech companies developing disease-modifying therapies (stratification, disease progression, surrogate endpoints, reverse translation, target engagement), and are developing IVD products for patients, clinicians and healthcare providers worldwide.

Name: EQALM
Description:
The European Organisation for External Quality Assurance Providers in Laboratory Medicine (EQALM) is an umbrella organization for European EQA organizers in laboratory medicine. EQALM has as its goals:
a.	To provide a forum for co-operation and exchange of knowledge on quality-related matters especially with regard to external quality assessment/assurance (EQA) programmes in Europe.
b.	To promote the quality of laboratory medicine and the safety of patient care in general and in particular within Europe.
c.	To represent the external quality assessment in Laboratory Medicine providers at European level vis-à-vis political, professional, scientific and other bodies, including patients’ organizations.

EQALM promotes activities that may contribute to the exchange of knowledge on quality-related matters especially with regard to EQA programmes. Examples of activities are:
a.	Organising annual Symposium with scientific and practical themes 
b.	Issuing scientific publications
c.	Developing EQA projects.
d.	Representing Laboratory Medicine EQA activities within other organisations and networks.

EQALM is actively involved in various scientific and educational areas, and have the following Working groups: EQA for Point-of-care Testing (POCT), Central database, survey frequency, haematology, haemostasis, immunohaematology, immunology, infection diagnostics, performance specifications, and virtual microscopy. 
Task and finish groups: the Manufacturing of commutable calibrators and quality control material for standardisation and post-market surveillance of IVD tests (COMET) project, and ISO/IEC 17043 accreditation standard.
Cooperations: EQALM also cooperates with other organisations: ICHCLR, JCTLM, EFLM, IFCC, EA-EUROLAB-EURACHEM.

Through these initiatives, we strive to enhance the accuracy, reliability, and impact of laboratory testing, ultimately contributing to improved patient care.

Name: Laboratório de Imunologia e Biologia Molecular Instituto de Ciências da Saúde - UFBA
Description: Criado em 1982, o Laboratório de Imunologia do Instituto de Ciências da Saúde da UFBA teve os seus primeiros projetos de pesquisa na área da Imunologia Veterinária. Em colaboração com a antiga Empresa de Pesquisa Agropecuária da Bahia - EPABA, hoje Empresa Baiana de Pesquisa Agrícola - EBDA, neste Laboratório testou-se vacinas contra o mal do caroço dos caprinos (Linfadenite Caseosa) e desenvolveu-se testes de imunodiagnóstico e por métodos da Biologia Molecular, para a detecção desta enfermidade. Nele, vem-se também, desde então, estudando aspectos da relação de Corynebacterium pseudotuberculosis, agente etiológico da doença mencionada, com os seus principais hospedeiros. Uma outra importante linha que também vem sendo desenvolvida desde a sua criação, envolve a padronização de ensaios sorológicos para doenças humanas e de animais domésticos. Mais recentemente, o Laboratório de Imunologia ampliou suas linhas de investigação abordando aspectos da regulação neuroimunoendócrina, da imunidade na cavidade oral e do papel de alguns marcadores tumorais. No ensino de graduação, o Laboratório é responsável pelas disciplinas Imunologia I, Imunologia Básica e Fundamentos de Biotecnologia Aplicados à Saúde, oferecidas para alunos da maioria dos cursos da área biomédica. Tem também atuado no ensino de pós-graduação e é um dos principais sustentáculos do Programa de Pós-graduação em Imunologia do Instituto de Ciências da Saúde - PPGIm (Mestrado e Doutorado). Na área da extensão, desde 1992 presta serviço de imunodiagnóstico, realizando anualmente cerca de 300.000 testes, entre ensaios sorológicos, dosagens de hormônios e de marcadores tumorais, bem como imunofenotipagens de hemopatias malignas. O Laboratório de Imunologia conta no seu corpo científico com doutores, mestres, especialistas, graduados, estudantes de pós-graduação e de iniciação científica. Name: UC Davis School of Veterinary Medicine Comparative Pathology Laboratory
Description:
The development of a lab animal diagnostic laboratory at UC Davis began in the late 80's as part of the Animal Resources Service (ARS) under Dale Brooks. Its main objective was to provide health monitoring for rodent research colonies and diagnostic support for all animals used in research at UC Davis. Dave Knudson, then Rick Ermel followed by Stephen Griffey directed these activities.

In 1998, Stephen Griffey proposed to develop the laboratory animal diagnostic program with a specific emphasis on mouse diagnostics and anatomic phenotyping to serve the needs of not only the School of Veterinary Medicine and UC Davis, but also the other UC laboratory animal programs. There were several other programs developed at UC Davis at this time that also supported the development of the CPL. These included the formation of the Center for Comparative Medicine, the Mouse Biology Program (an NIH Mutant Mouse Regional Resource and Knockout Mouse Phenotyping Center), a UC Davis partnership with The Jackson Laboratory, as well as the needs of the other UC lab animal programs. The Comparative Pathology Laboratory was formalized as a self-supporting service unit in the School of Veterinary Medicine in July 2000.

In July 2018, Denise Imai-Leonard became director of CPL. Her new initiatives have included the restructure of residency/fellowship programs, the development and implementation of zebrafish and xenopus health surveillance programs and the expansion of research pathology services. She has strengthened collaborative ties to the California National Primate Research Center and University of Washington and expanded national and international recognition for the lab animal pathology training program through a web-based platform for pathology rounds.

Name: Serbian American Medical and Dental Society
Description:
Serbian American Medical and Dental Society (SAMDS) was formed in Chicago in 1992 by physicians from the former Republic of Yugoslavia, Serbia, a civil war-torn country at the time. The first inaugural conference was held on September 13th 1992. Initially, SAMDS had a vision and focused on a mission to help all civil war victims and refugees from the former country of Yugoslavia.

Throughout the years, SAMDS has expanded its purpose and goals and became involved in different ways, some of which included offering organized free screenings for conditions like diabetes, hypertension, prostate cancer, breast cancer, and mental health (to name a few) to men and women in the Chicago land area. SAMDS has also helped raise money to purchase some of the most basic medical equipment such as EKG machines, stethoscopes, and ultrasound machines, as well as medications for hospitals in Serbia.  The organization continues to be involved and hopes to further invest in helping young medical students with Serbian heritage pursue their education, training and residency in the United States.

As we continue to pursue our purpose of helping human lives, and as a non-for-profit organization, our mission is not possible without membership dues, financial support and donations.


We truly appreciate your consideration of helping our cause.

Sincerely,

Serbian American Medical and Dental Society (SAMDS)

Our focus is to provide healthcare professionals with precise, timely genetic data used to guide best possible treatment plans and enhance patient wellbeing, safety, and satisfaction.

RMDx currently provides pharmacogenetic and infectious disease genetic testing services to physician practices, health systems, corporate wellness programs, and self- insured companies.

Resolve MDx offers healthcare professionals and their patients advanced PCR testing that provides insight into a patient’s genetic makeup that guides critical medication management decisions. Our Pharmacogenomic (PGx) testing provides genetic information that correlates to how a patient metabolizes various medications determining if they are likely to have an adverse effect.  The data gleaned from the test helps healthcare professionals evaluate individual genotypes and develop strategies to:
  • Optimize drug therapies for each patient
  • Minimize the potential for adverse drug effects
  • Reduce drug-drug interactions

https://www.ResolveMDx.com/

Name: Eyemetagenomics
Description:
Eyemetagenomics Ltd has been founded from a group of opthalmologists to understand and develop the largest worldwide database of the eye microbiome through a metagenomic approach.
Several years of medical practice and research of the human eye allowed the development of LUCY, the most advanced solution to integrate microbiome analysis into clinical practice, to help guide therapeutic decisions and provide targeted prevention to patients.
LUCY compares the microbiome and also analyses the different types of microorganisms present in the patient’s eye with hundreds of microbiomes of healthy subjects and pathologies such as glaucoma, dry eye, Steinert syndrome etc.; in this way it is possible to evaluate whether specific bacterial genera are in excess or in defect with respect to the average of the control database, in order to identify and characterize situations of dysbiosis. 
LUCY also represents an incredible new opportunity to compile data for future research in the treatment of eye diseases.

Name: uCAIR
Description:
Join us on the progress towards better medical diagnostics and follow our channel!

uCAIR is a European collaborative research project aiming at providing a super-fast and scalable laser system that will enable rapid penetration of Raman-based diagnostic system into the endoscopy market. It is funded by the European Union under Horizon Europe.

Current in vivo diagnostic imaging techniques are mostly morphological and invasive, as they often require contrast agents to enhance visibility of target pathology. A real-time, non-invasive imaging solution, detecting molecular level disruption of the biological cells’ life cycle, would dramatically change healthcare. uCAIR, unifying 11 partners, will explore a wide-range of novel photonic technologies to enable transfer of Raman imaging into clinical practice. 

Coordinated by the University of Limerick, Ireland, uCAIR brings together partners from seven European countries: Belgium, Czech Republic, France, Germany, Ireland and Turkey. The project will run from June 1st, 2024 until June 30th, 2027 receiving about EUR 5 million funding from the European Union’s Horizon Europe Framework Programme.

This channel is maintained by VDI/VDE-IT on behalf of the uCAIR consortium.

Name: Brainalyze
Description:
Purpose: To revolutionize dementia treatment and care through a low-cost, 5-minute blood test that detects and distinguishes multiple forms of dementia and can do at an early stage
Vision: To pioneer the first global dementia screening program using the Brainalyze blood test
________________________________________
Breakthrough innovation
MX-Raman: Proprietary platform technology that combines optical ‘fingerprinting’ + interpretable AI
•	Multiple lasers excite Raman scattering to create an optically-generated biochemical ‘fingerprint’ 
•	AI uses optical fingerprint data for classification and prediction analysis
•	Only platform capable of broad-spectrum dementia detection and differentiation
•	5-minute test | Costs <10% of current tests | Portable & scalable
________________________________________
USP
•	Beyond biomarkers: Competing blood tests (e.g. pTau217) detect only Alzheimer’s. MX-Raman detects and differentiates all major dementias
•	Simple single-step test: No reagents, antibodies, dyes required nor complex infrastructure, sophisticated equipment. Does not involve multiple steps unlike current tests.
•	Speed, cost and size: 100x faster and <10% of the costs of existing tests (imaging or biomarker based), <1m2 footprint
•	Versatile use cases: Early screening, patient triage, differential diagnosis, treatment monitoring, clinical trial stratification and companion diagnosis
________________________________________
IP & Defensibility
•	Patent pending in UK, EU, US (WO2023105219A1) covering method, device and use cases
•	Proprietary data moat, AI analysis models, know-how and trade-secrets
•	Technology developed through 12 years of academic research
________________________________________
Progress to Date
•	Funding: $1.8M translational research funding already available
•	Clinical feasibility and traction: >400 patient samples tested, published 93%+ diagnostic accuracy, >1200 patient samples further secured
•	Device: Prototype and AI analysis models developed

Name: CardioGenomicsAntwerp
Description:
Our Cardiogenomics and Functional Genomics Research Group at the University of Antwerp and Antwerp University Hospital investigates the genetic basis of inherited cardiovascular and connective tissue disorders. We integrate clinical expertise with advanced -omics technologies in zebrafish, mouse, and human cell models to uncover and target the molecular mechanisms behind these conditions. Our focus is on two main disease groups: 
(1) Inherited aortic disorders, including Marfan, Loeys-Dietz, Meester-Loeys, vascular Ehlers-Danlos syndromes, bicuspid aortic valve aortopathy, and familial thoracic aortic aneurysm/dissection.
(2) Inherited cardiac arrhythmias, such as Brugada syndrome, Long QT syndrome, and arrhythmogenic ventricular cardiomyopathy.

Onze onderzoeksgroep Cardiogenomics en Functionele Genomics aan de Universiteit Antwerpen en het UZA bestudeert de genetische basis van erfelijke hart- en bindweefselziekten. We combineren klinische expertise met geavanceerde -omics technologieën in zebravis-, muis- en humane celmodellen om de onderliggende moleculaire mechanismen te begrijpen en gericht te behandelen. We richten ons op twee hoofdgroepen:
(1) Erfelijke aorta-aandoeningen, waaronder het Marfan-, Loeys-Dietz-, Meester-Loeys- en vasculair Ehlers-Danlos-syndroom, bicuspide aortaklep-aortopathie en familiair thoracaal aneurysma/dissectie.
(2) Erfelijke hartritmestoornissen zoals het Brugada-, Long QT-syndroom en aritmogene ventriculaire cardiomyopathie.

Disease Testing
• Immune assessment, evaluating the activity and effector function of T cells in health and infection
• Immune dysregulation, quantifying if the immune response is appropriate for the infection
• Stress and viral reactivation, uncovering drivers of fatigue or brain fog
• Detecting if the pathogenic virus or bacterium is still present in the body
• Inflammation-related challenges affecting mental well-being, identifying imbalances in neurotransmitters and stress hormones
• Viral testing, providing insights into the cycle of latency and lytic viral infections such as Epstein-Barr (EBV), Cytomegalovirus (CMV), Varicella Zoster Virus (VZV), and other herpes viruses and continuous T cell stimulation through viral SARS-CoV2 reservoirs
• Tick-borne infections, providing T cells testing as a tool to follow through the disease course of multiple tickborne illnesses
Providers use the actionable data to tailor treatment plans for conditions like Lyme, chronic fatigue, or neuroinflammation.
Our commitment to reliability ensures results you can trust. Overnight shipping preserves specimen quality, and our fast turnaround, within seven business days, delivers timely answers.
Visit our website or contact us at info@i-labs.us

Name: LymeLab Pharma
Description:
We provide services in fields of chemistry, biotechnology and pharmacy. We offer qualitative and quantitative analyses on request. 

Our significant advantages are our competent and experienced team of specialists along with innovative laboratory equipment. Our facility Is well-equipped for metabolic and proteomic research.

We are a Good Laboratory Practice (GLP) system certified unit.

We conduct scientific research in areas of food chemistry, toxicology, pharmacology, pharmacognosy and neurobiology. 

We specialize in separation techniques coupled with various detectors, particularly mass spectrometry. 
The main analytical techniques implemented at LymeLab Pharma include:
•	Liquid chromatography coupled with triple quadrupole mass spectrometry (LC-MS/MS)
•	Liquid chromatography coupled with an ion trap and time-of-flight analyzer (LC-IT-TOF)
•	Gas chromatography coupled with triple quadrupole mass spectrometry (GC-MS/MS)
•	Gas chromatography with a flame ionization detector combined with a headspace sampler (HS-GC-FID)
•	Matrix-assisted laser desorption/ionization time-of-flight mass spectrometry (MALDI-TOF/TOF)
•	Inductively coupled plasma mass spectrometry (ICP-MS)

We conduct validation and determination of pesticide residues in vegetables, fruits and honey. We also specialize in analysing industrial hemp, non-industrial hemp and hemp resin for cannabinoid content, including delta-9-tetrahydrocannabinol. Additionally, we detect residues of polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons (PAHs), aflatoxins, heavy metals, volatile organic compounds, polyphenols, and terpenes.

We have developed a method of synthesis of high-purity psilocybin and its derivatives. which are currently under numerous research on its psychoactive and therapeutic effect.
