Name: SQK | Reliable Quantum-AI Medical Imaging
Description:
SQK builds quantum–AI hybrid software for medical image reconstruction and enhancement across imaging modalities. We deliver higher diagnostic image quality—reducing noise and artifacts, improving contrast and edge fidelity, and recovering clinically meaningful detail—while preserving quantitative reliability (repeatability, bias control, and cross-site harmonization) so measurements remain trustworthy for clinical care and multi-center research.

Our pipeline combines state-of-the-art AI reconstruction with physics-aware modeling to enforce consistency with acquisition and scanner characteristics. A quantum-assisted refinement layer targets hard-to-model residuals (e.g., fine texture and structured noise) and complements classical optimization and deep learning. Designed for deployment, SQK integrates with scalable HPC infrastructure and standard clinical formats/workflows, enabling validation, monitoring, and consistent performance across sites and hardware.

QMEDIC is designed to improve image quality—reducing noise and artifacts, restoring clinically meaningful detail—while preserving quantitative reliability (repeatability and cross-site harmonization). This helps ensure imaging results remain trustworthy for routine clinical use and consistent for multi-center research and biomarker-driven studies.

Our approach combines state-of-the-art AI reconstruction with physics-aware modeling and a quantum-assisted refinement layer, supported by scalable HPC infrastructure. SQK collaborates with clinical and research partners to validate performance in real workflows and accelerate translation into production deployments.

Focus areas

Medical image reconstruction & enhancement (multi-modality)

Quantitative reliability: repeatability, harmonization, and biomarker readiness

Quantum–AI hybrid pipeline + scalable HPC integration

HQ: Seattle, WA (with cross-border presence in North America and Korea)

Our services include:

Cancer genomics & pharmacogenomics: Testing for common cancers and inherited genetic variants to guide personalized treatment plans and drug response.

Pathogen detection: RT-PCR-based diagnostics for infectious diseases, including emerging pathogens and antimicrobial resistance profiling.

Genomic solutions: Whole genome and exome sequencing, bioinformatics analyses, and tailored reporting for clinical and research applications.

Why NextGen:
Our multidisciplinary team of molecular biologists, bioinformaticians, and data scientists ensures every test is accurate, reproducible, and relevant to real-world clinical and research needs.

We focus on delivering reliable genomic testing and research support, helping healthcare providers, researchers, and institutions make informed decisions based on robust molecular data.

Name: TETmedical, Inc.
Description: TETmedical, Inc. (Tethered Enzyme Technologies) is a clinical stage platform nanomedicine company focused on in vitro diagnostics that enable insights for high-consequence disease decision making. TET emerged out of groundbreaking innovations originating at Cornell University. Our device measures less than a hundredth the width of a human hair. It is a miniature, functioning, highly stable molecular machine, capable of performing chemical operations with high sensitivity, stability, and speed (thousands of times faster than antibody assays): a patented “TET nanobot”, consisting of thousands of enzymes tethered to a silica nanoparticle. TETmedical’s first product is the NSE-FAST (Neuron Specific Enolase Functional Activity Stroke Test), the first in-vitro diagnostic for brain injury from stroke.

Name: UNSW Mending Broken Hearts
Description:
Mending Broken Hearts (MBH) is a student-led engineering initiative developing a Total Artificial Heart (TAH) to compete in the Heart Hackathon, the world’s first TAH design challenge.

Established in 2022, MBH is a team of 40 students across Mechanical, Electrical, Software, and Systems sub-teams. Our mission is to advance artificial heart technology while inspiring the next generation of biomedical engineers.

Since its inception, MBH has gained international recognition. In 2023, we attended the Heart Hackathon Finals in Dallas, Texas, proudly representing UNSW on the global stage. In 2024, we competed in Utsunomiya, Japan, securing 3rd place among top university teams worldwide. These achievements highlight our team's rapid progress in artificial heart design and innovation.

As part of the UNSW VIP Program, MBH engages in initiatives like Sci-Fest, Education Festival, and VIP Breakfast. Our award-winning VIP video placed 1st in the International VIP Consortium, surpassing 50 institutions from 14 countries and gaining global recognition. We have also achieved 1st place at the UNSW Education Festival VIP Pitch Competition two years in a row (2023, 2024).

As a UNSW Arc Club, MBH also participates in events like O-Week, Launch Week, and Clubs Takeover.

In December 2025, MBH will compete in the Heart Hackathon Finals in Vienna, Austria, aiming to push the boundaries of artificial heart technology. We invite industry partners to support us in achieving this goal and revolutionizing life-saving healthcare.

Name: Human Cortex Lab
Description:
Who we are
Our aim is to bridge fundamental neuroscience with clinical applications to catalyze groundbreaking contributions to human health. 

As a cutting-edge neuroscience lab, we are committed to pioneering new therapies and diagnostic techniques for a range of neurological diseases. We specialize in the use of state-of-the-art neuroscience methodologies, setting us apart as a leading research biobank in Denmark and around the world.

Our biobank serves as an indispensable resource, procuring, preserving, and supplying high-quality, living and preserved human brain samples. By making these samples readily accessible to leading neuroscience and oncology labs, we aim to accelerate the pace of key scientific discoveries and facilitate the shift from animal models to human-based research.

Embedded in the rich neuroscience ecosystem of Aarhus University, we play a crucial role in elevating the neuroscience landscape both locally and internationally. Through focused studies on the living human cortex, we aspire to advance therapeutic interventions for a wide range of neurological and psychiatric disorders, including epilepsy, stroke, Parkinson's disease, and brain cancer. In doing so, we stand to make a lasting impact on millions of lives worldwide.

As a central key facility within the Danish Neuroscience Center at Aarhus University Hospital, we are steadfast in our commitment to open science, active collaboration, and resource-sharing, thereby enhancing the collective pursuit of knowledge and solutions in neuroscience.

Funding
Lundbeckfonden, Danish Cancer Society, Aarhus Universitets Forskningsfond

Name: WagenLab
Description:
A WagenLab é um laboratório especializado em análises cromatográficas de alta precisão, equipado com tecnologias de última geração como GC-MS/MS e LC-MS/MS. Nosso compromisso é oferecer resultados confiáveis e dentro dos mais elevados padrões técnicos, atendendo às demandas de diferentes setores com rigor científico e agilidade.

Atuamos em diversas áreas, com destaque para:

- Saúde: Avaliação de residual de óxido de etileno (ETO) em processos de esterilização em materiais e implantes mamários, garantindo segurança para pacientes e conformidade com normas regulatórias.

- Meio Ambiente: Monitoramento de águas (subterrânea, superficial, efluentes e água potável), contribuindo para a preservação ambiental e atendimento às legislações vigentes.

- Toxicologia para detecção de Drogas de Abuso: Ensaios laboratoriais de alta sensibilidade que auxiliam em processos de investigação, compliance e saúde pública.

Nosso diferencial está na união entre tecnologia de ponta, equipe técnica altamente qualificada e compromisso com a excelência científica. Cada análise é conduzida com precisão e rastreabilidade, assegurando resultados que fortalecem a tomada de decisão de nossos clientes, sejam eles da área da saúde, indústria, órgãos reguladores ou instituições de pesquisa.

Na WagenLab, acreditamos que a ciência aplicada com responsabilidade é uma ferramenta essencial para promover segurança, inovação e sustentabilidade.

La nostra principale attività è quella di fornire ai professionisti sanitari degli strumenti volti a trovare delle soluzioni personalizzate sul singolo paziente attraverso la medicina di precisione.

Tramite i nostri test e servizi abbiamo creato una mappa della medicina di precisione capace di valutare lo stato di salute della persona. 

La medicina di precisione ci permette di poter porre a servizio del professionista test e servizi che lo aiutino nel cercare il giusto trattamento volto a migliorare lo stato di salute del singolo individuo. Test e servizi da noi proposti permettono non solo di indagare le migliori strategie in ottica di prevenzione, ma anche valutare e monitorare i trattamenti e le strategie in atto.

Affianchiamo i nostri partner nell’individuare eventuali miglioramenti dello stile di vita dei propri pazienti in un’ottica sia di risoluzione di sintomi manifestati sia di prevenzione. 

I test che effettuiamo per i nostri partner si suddividono in tre macro aree: 
Symbyo - il tuo microbiota
Genehome - il tuo patrimonio genetico
Epigene - la tua epigenetica

Oggi puoi avere a disposizione i risultati dei nostri test con una reportistica chiara, dettagliata e graficamente intuitiva in modo da fornire un supporto visivo concreto ed esaustivo. 

Perché lavorare con noi? 
● Siamo prima di tutto ricercatori e abbiamo l’obiettivo di offrire costantemente servizi e soluzioni innovative.
● Per avere soluzioni strategiche personalizzate per il benessere e la salute dei tuoi pazienti 
● Per aumentare il tuo know how e condividere il metodo di lavoro che abbiamo consolidato negli anni 
● Per poterti dedicare esclusivamente al tuo lavoro e alla relazione con le persone mentre noi ti aiutiamo ad avere sempre soluzioni professionali all’avanguardia.

Description:
Dr. Bakshi's advance diagnostics offers IgG Delayed Food Allergy/Food intolerance test from Germany ImuPro                                                                                          
A  Blood tests measure's the presence of IgG antibodies in the blood that are associated with specific food intolerances. IgG food intolerance testing is becoming very important to find the foods which might be causing chronic inflammation.  It measures the levels of immunoglobulin G antibodies in response to specific foods . IgG food intolerance testing is that certain food may trigger an immune response leading to the production of IgG antibodies. The test is marketed as a way to identify which foods an individual may be intolerant to & should avoid in their diet.
Elimination diets involve eliminating specific foods or groups of foods from an individual's diet and then reintroducing them one at a time to see if any adverse reactions occur. It shows improvement to a very large extent.

Description:
The SatioPatch Platform decentralizes care by Transforming Workflow for diagnostics, drug delivery and biometrics integration. 

Lab quality at home consumer-based diagnosis is enabled through a convenient and simple to use patch utilizing a wide variety of technologies to address an increasing demand for rapid, point of care diagnosis.  

This adhesive patch platform is being developed for drug and vaccine delivery with a reusable applicator and low-cost disposable with pressure sensors.  The platform is designed to provide stable (through adhesive patch) and controlled (through motors) delivery to match the needs of a wide range of drugs and to improve the experience for chronic disease patients with recurring injections.  Radical innovations in work flow include a remote tele-injection capability (video, biometrics, remote control, go/no-go sensors, EHR transmission) and a fully automated delivery through the intradermal or subcutaneous route of administration at Therapeutic Dose levels.
Products not yet approved in US or other territories.

Name: PAEQ-Hemostasia
Description:
O Programa de Avaliação Externa de Qualidade em Hemostasia (PAEQ-Hemostasia) desenvolvido pelo Hemocentro de Campinas da Unicamp, está em conformidade com a norma ISO/IEC 17043:2023 para programas de ensaio de proficiência, e visa contribuir para a melhoria da qualidade dos testes laboratoriais relacionados à assistência de pacientes com doenças hemorrágicas hereditárias e em situações clínicas da trombose. A finalidade de um programa desta natureza é atender as exigências
previstas na regulamentação técnica RDC 786/2023 da legislação brasileira. A RDC 786/2023 que regulamenta o funcionamento dos laboratórios clínicos no país, orienta que todo serviço que realiza testes clínicos laboratoriais deve participar regularmente de testes de proficiência. O objetivo em participar neste tipo de programa é assegurar a exatidão e a confiabilidade dos resultados obtidos pelo laboratório, e identificar se o mesmo apresenta a capacidade de realizar um diagnóstico assertivo. O programa possibilita o reconhecimento de possíveis melhorias técnicas e auxilia na direção da capacitação dos laboratórios e profissionais participantes.

Name: The HrC Test
Description:
What is HrC Genomics?

HrC Genomics involves processing an individual’s blood sample using Next Generation Sequencing (NGS) technology.

NGS is a technology for determining the sequence of RNA and/or DNA to study genetic variation associated with diseases. In this instance the disease is cancer.

For HrC Genomics, blood samples are processed using two processes i) Whole Exome Sequencing & ii) Whole Transcriptome Sequencing.

Whole Exome Sequencing

In this process, protein making genes in the genome are targeted for DNA sequencing. This allows us to detect whether there are any gene mutations in the DNA that are associated with certain types of diseases. Mutations can cause faulty proteins and disrupt normal body processes.

Whole Transcriptome Sequencing

The same coding regions are targeted as above but use RNA as an input. The main difference here is that the RNA reflects the gene expression of the genome, rather than the sequence of DNA itself. So a difference in RNA expression in certain genes (either up or down regulated) can be associated with certain diseases.

When using the two approaches together, we can detect whether there are any mutations from the DNA, and also whether some mutations might be linked with the changes in respective gene expression. Both are used for biomarker detection but give different outputs.

HrC Technology

The data generated from processing the blood samples using NGS technology now  need to be analysed and interpreted using HrC technology.

HrC is a technology developed by a team of scientists at Epigeneres Biotech in Mumbai. Their technology is based upon the hypothesis that very small embryonic-like stem cells (VSELs), residing in multiple tissues, undergo epigenetic changes and get transformed into Cancer Stem Cells.

When this occurs, Cancer Stem Cells from impacted organs in the body get mobilised into circulation in peripheral blood, in increasing numbers.

1. Early Alzheimer’s Risk Detection Kit using a simple blood test. We have discovered a novel mechanism of Alzheimer’s Disease (AD) development in patients and further to it we have developed a novel antibody (patent application (PCT) under review) and a kit to detect this biomarker in blood samples (the first of its kind) very easily using the most commonly used detection method (ELISA) in clinics around the world. This data is recently published in the most cited peer reviewed journal in this field ‘Alzheimer’s & Dementia’. This detection kit is also very important to detect the quality of donors’ blood sample before transfusion to the recipient to mitigate the risk of developing AD to the recipient. We have performed some clinical studies in Amsterdam and in Shanghai. The results are highly promising. Our diagnostic kit outperformed conventional blood biomarkers Aß40, Aß42, NfL, GFAP and pTau18, reaching an accuracy of 92% in detecting mild cognitive impairment (MCI) ahead of dementia diagnosis as observed on small cohort in our new clinical study. 

2. Food Supplement: After over a decade of research and discovering the novel mechanism of AD development, we have also developed a highly potent formulation of Food Supplement using a special combination of various amino acids (patent application submitted). This food supplement is highly potent to convert BAD IsoAsp to GOOD Asp!

Name: Smartlab Consulting
Description:
Le Constat L'Accréditation n'est pas une question de géographie, c'est une question de méthodologie. Pourtant, un fossé existe souvent entre les exigences des normes internationales (ISO) et la réalité opérationnelle des laboratoires dans les pays à ressources limitées.

Les consultants venus d'environnements hyper-standardisés échouent souvent à comprendre nos contraintes locales (logistique, énergie, culture du changement). Résultat : des procédures écrites mais jamais appliquées.

 Qui sommes-nous  Smart Lab Consulting est né pour combler ce vide. Nous sommes une firme panafricaine d'expertise en Biologie Médicale et Métrologie. Notre philosophie est simple : L'excellence par le terrain, pour le terrain.

Nous ne nous contentons pas d'expliquer la norme. Nous la traduisons en processus opérationnels, adaptés à votre contexte, sans jamais sacrifier la rigueur scientifique. Nous transformons des laboratoires qui fonctionnent "à l'expérience" en structures qui fonctionnent "au système".

Notre mission Combler le Gap Accompagner les structures de santé (Publiques & Privées) de l'Afrique Centrale et de l'Ouest vers la reconnaissance internationale, en construisant des Systèmes de Management de la Qualité (SMQ) robustes et durables.

Nos Domaines d'Expertise: Nous intervenons sur l'écosystème global du laboratoire :

 Accréditation & Normes : Mise en œuvre complète des normes ISO 15189 (Biologie Médicale) et ISO 17025 (Étalonnage & Essais). 
 Biologie Délocalisée (POCT) : Supervision et connectivité des équipements au point de service (ISO 22870). 
 Gestion des Équipements & Métrologie : Maintenance, étalonnage et cycle de vie du parc instrumental. 
 Biosécurité & Bio-sûreté : Gestion des risques biologiques et protection du personnel. 
 Contrôle Qualité : Mise en place et gestion des programmes de CQI et EEQ (Évaluation Externe de la Qualité).

Notre Promesse: Des solutions pragmatiques. Une conformité réelle. Une expertise

E foi assim, investindo em equipamentos com tecnologia de última geração, compondo sua equipe com profissionais de alto nível técnico e, principalmente, tratando seus clientes, médicos e colaboradores com o máximo respeito e cuidado, que o Dra. Tânia Medicina Diagnóstica se tornou referência em diagnósticos, saúde, qualidade e confiança.

Essa história não acaba aqui. O Dra. Tânia Medicina Diagnóstica vai continuar com a ideia fixa de se superar a cada dia, trazendo serviços inovadores e levando os melhores diagnósticos e soluçōes de saúde até você, a qualquer hora, em qualquer lugar. Pode contar.

Our name – derived from “ethics” – reflects an unwavering commitment to regulatory compliance and integrity in every project.

- Oncology & Hereditary Disease: Molecular assays like BCR-ABL1 real-time PCR for leukemia monitoring and BRCA1/2 gene analysis by NGS for cancer risk.
- Immunogenetics & Transplant: High-resolution HLA typing and related compatibility testing.
- Genomic Medicine: Cutting-edge microarray analysis and whole-exome sequencing (ORION) for comprehensive genetic insights.

Commitment to Quality, Compliance, and Innovation:

Rethix partners with healthcare providers, research institutions, and investors to bring precision, innovation, and accessibility to healthcare. Our laboratory is COFEPRIS-certified in Mexico and adheres to the highest international quality standards, instilling confidence in every result. We have built a world-class facility that sets new benchmarks in compliance, validation, and operational excellence – delivering accurate, actionable results with turnaround times that empower timely decision-making.

Future-focused and trustworthy, Rethix remains dedicated to advancing medical knowledge and patient care. By uniting rigorous ethical standards with cutting-edge technology, we are shaping the future of diagnostics and clinical research – making high-quality, personalized medicine more precise and accessible for all.

Name: Exactics
Description:
Exactics is a UChicago/Tulane undergrad-founded startup committed to developing rapid, reliable, and cost-effective diagnostic technologies for infectious diseases. Our flagship product, QuickLyme, is a lab-free rapid test that detects Lyme disease in ticks, delivering results in just 15 minutes—enabling swift, informed treatment decisions for anyone who’s been bitten, whether it’s you or your pet. 

In addition to QuickLyme, Exactics holds multiple patents for our novel diagnostic platform, Proteus+, which can be adapted to rapid tests for over 200 arthropod-borne diseases. Through joint research initiatives with institutions in Illinois and Nigeria, we’re actively expanding this technology for application in neglected tropical diseases. 

Our founding team consists of five undergraduates—four from the University of Chicago and one from Tulane University—with academic expertise in biology, chemistry, computer science, and economics. Our board of advisors includes four tenured professors from the University of Ibadan, Lagos State University, Harvard Medical School, and the University of Cambridge. 

We have participated in the NSF i-Corps program, the Polsky BUILD Accelerator at UChicago, and the P33 Chicago Speed Round. Additionally, we have secured funding through pitch competitions such as DePaul University Pitch Madness, Tulane Pitch Friday hosted by the Lepage Center for Entrepreneurship, and Open MIC Night hosted by Tulane Medical School and the Tulane Innovation Institute. 

With the adaptability of our Proteus+ platform, we aim to introduce affordable, efficient, and accessible diagnostics for a range of diseases, including malaria, dengue fever, Lassa fever, West Nile virus, and more to fight infectious diseases worldwide.

For inquiries or to learn more, please reach out to our team at contact@exacticsbiotech.com. We look forward to connecting!

Within CMG, our oncogenetics and hearing loss research group is dedicated to unravelling the genetic and epigenetic mechanisms underlying cancer and hereditary hearing loss. Our group brings together expertise in fundamental, translational and clinical research. 
In the field of oncology, we focus on the development of innovative strategies for cancer detection, by leveraging (epi)genetic biomarkers both in tissue and liquid biopsies. Our hearing loss team aims to better characterize the genetic drivers and molecular mechanisms of the disease.
Collectively, we employ a range of molecular and computational techniques to uncover biological insights and drive translational applications in precision medicine. Our research strives to bridge the gap between the lab and the clinic, with the ultimate goal of improving patient outcomes through earlier diagnosis, personalized care, and better understanding of disease genetics.

Exsera offers over three dozen validated tests for autoimmune and complement-related conditions, including rheumatoid arthritis, systemic connective tissue diseases, antiphospholipid syndrome, vasculitis, autoimmune hepatitis, and diseases of complement deficiencies and dysregulation. We continuously refine our tests to meet the evolving needs of clinicians, particularly those working with emerging biomarkers and complement therapeutics.
As a recognized leader in autoimmune and complement testing, Exsera is committed to delivering high-quality, timely results. Description:
Minish Technology strives to realize the goal of lifelong use of natural teeth through its innovative tooth restoration solution, Minish, not only in South Korea but for people worldwide. Minish Technology provides cutting-edge dental restoration solutions that restore the function of natural teeth. Our core technology, the Minish Solution, utilizes biomimetic ceramic materials that closely resemble the properties of natural teeth, enabling restorative treatments that are both functional and aesthetically pleasing. This allows patients to maintain the health of their natural teeth for a longer period while restoring both their original functionality and appearance.

Minish Technology goes beyond offering dental treatments; we aim to provide comprehensive oral health care. Our leading brand, Dr. Minish, delivers better oral care solutions to consumers through its range of oral hygiene products. In addition, we operate the Minish Academy to educate and train dentists globally, enabling them to offer higher levels of dental care using Minish's innovative technology.

With our differentiated technology, Minish became the first in South Korea to develop a dental-exclusive 3D scanner and CAD/CAM technology, setting new standards in digital dentistry. Unlike traditional dental treatments, the Minish Solution uses materials that are 99% similar to natural teeth, providing superior restoration and long-lasting results.

Minish Technology pursues sustainable management, adhering to ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) principles. As a member of the UN Global Compact, we take responsibility for contributing positively to society. Furthermore, with a network of more than 20 Minish clinics in South Korea and internationally, we are establishing ourselves as a global leader in oral health management.

We are looking for colleagues to join us on this exciting journey of innovation and challenge at Minish Technology.

Name: MVZ Laaff GmbH - Prof. Dr. Helmut Laaff
Description:
Das MVZ Laaff mit seinen Standorten in Freiburg, Heilbronn und Ulm bietet ein umfassendes Untersuchungsangebot im Bereich der Dermatopathologie/-pathologie, allgemeinen Pathologie, Immunhistologie und Molekularpathologie. Dieses Leistungsspektrum wird durch ein umfangreiches Serviceangebot erweitert, welches selbstverständlich individuell an die Einsender:innen angepasst wird.

Ziel unserer Arbeit seit Gründung der Laboreinheit im Jahre 1992 ist es, eine zeitnahe, moderne und verständliche Histologie zu bieten. Die Befunde werden aktuell klassifiziert und bieten eine möglichst spezifische Diagnose im Kontext mit der Klinik. Dafür arbeiten wir täglich rund 12 Stunden von Gewebeeingang bis zum Befundversand. Regulär findet dieser Vorgang am selben Tag statt. 
In einem Vierteljahrhundert haben wir Arbeitsabläufe optimiert, um Ihnen in kurzer Zeit einen adäquaten Befund zu übermitteln.

Seit Juli 2004 arbeitet unser Labor in Freiburg ununterbrochen nach DIN EN ISO 9001, ist zertifiziert und hält nach erfolgreichen Audits auch den neuesten Anforderungen der DIN EN ISO 9001:2015 stand.

Am Hauptsitz im Südwesten der schönen Stadt Freiburg im Breisgau beziehen wir ausschließlich Ökostrom. Alle Geräte unterliegen einer ständigen Wartung und werden auf neustem Stand gehalten.

Name: BTS Biologie Médicale - Lycée Jean Monnet de Franconville
Description:
Le BTS Biologie Médicale (BioMed) du lycée Jean Monnet est une formation professionnalisante en 2 ans, dédiée à la préparation des futurs techniciens supérieurs de laboratoire en biologie médicale. 
Ce cursus ouvre les portes à de nombreuses opportunités professionnelles dans les laboratoires de biologie médicale, qu'ils soient hospitaliers ou privés, en Anatomie et Cytologie Pathologiques (ACP), aux Établissements Français du Sang (EFS), ainsi que dans divers laboratoires d'analyses spécialisées.

Situé au cœur d'un environnement verdoyant à Franconville (95, Val d'Oise), le lycée Jean Monnet propose un cadre propice à l'apprentissage. L'équipe pédagogique, composée d'enseignants spécialisés en biologie médicale, mobilise son expertise pour offrir une formation de qualité, en adéquation avec les exigences du secteur professionnel.

Chaque année, une trentaine d'étudiants obtiennent leur diplôme grâce à un partenariat étroit entre l'équipe pédagogique et les laboratoires de la région. Ce réseau assure une formation concrète, complète et directement applicable dans le milieu professionnel, garantissant ainsi une insertion réussie dans le domaine des analyses de biologie médicale.

Name: LEO Healthcare Advanced Diagnostics Laboratory
Description:
Welcome to LEO Healthcare, a leading diagnostics laboratory specializing in histopathology, molecular diagnostics, and digital pathology. Our cutting-edge facility combines advanced technology and expert professionals to provide accurate, reliable, and patient-centric diagnostic solutions. With a focus on innovation and excellence, we aim to make a significant impact on accurate diagnoses, personalized treatment approaches, and improved patient outcomes.
At LEO Healthcare, our histopathology services form the foundation of our diagnostic expertise. Our experienced pathologists utilize state-of-the-art techniques and equipment to analyze tissue samples, providing precise and detailed diagnoses. We offer a comprehensive range of histopathology evaluations, including routine tissue analysis, tumor grading, staging, and disease progression assessment. Employing advanced techniques such as immunohistochemistry and special staining, we enhance the accuracy and specificity of our evaluations.
In the realm of molecular diagnostics, LEO Healthcare remains at the forefront of innovation. Our molecular diagnostic services focus on the genetic and molecular characteristics of diseases. Leveraging cutting-edge technologies like PCR, FISH, and NGS, we detect genetic mutations, gene expressions, and chromosomal abnormalities. These valuable insights enable accurate diagnoses, prognoses, and personalized treatment approaches. 
Digital pathology is a core component of our diagnostic capabilities. By digitizing pathology slides and employing whole-slide imaging (WSI) technology, we offer remote access, collaboration, and analysis of pathology slides. Our digital pathology platform facilitates remote case review, image sharing for consultations, and interdisciplinary collaboration among healthcare professionals. Our aim is to improve patient outcomes, enhance the overall healthcare experience, and foster trust and confidence.

Name: Ospri BioPath
Description:
Empowering Precision. Elevating Outcomes.

At OSPRI, we believe that molecular testing should empower healthcare—not complicate it. Born from a deep commitment to scientific excellence, operational innovation, and clinical relevance, OSPRI designs smarter, faster, and more sustainable infectious disease solutions for modern healthcare systems.

We don't just build assays—we engineer opportunity. By integrating the theory and power of microbiology, and next-generation sequencing into a single streamlined PCR platform, OSPRI delivers testing solutions that are:

· Faster: Extraction-free, direct-to-amplification workflows that cut testing time by up to 70%.

· Smarter: Quad-plex assay designs increase throughput, reduce waste, and lower costs.

· Clinically Relevant: Customizable panels that align with provider needs and reduce claim denials.

· Scalable: Fewer instruments, fewer steps, more throughput—with operational models that grow without expanding staff or CAPEX.

Healthcare deserves solutions that aren't just accurate—but actionable, adaptable, and ahead of the curve. That's the OSPRI difference: Precision perfected. Performance unmatched.

Name: Laboratoire Biopharmed Diagnostic
Description:
BIOPHARMED DIAGNOSTIC est un laboratoire d’analyses biomédicales qui se veut une référence du genre. A cet effet, nous nous spécialisons dans tous les secteurs de la biologie médicale à savoir : l’hématologie, la biochimie, l’immuno-hormonologie, la microbiologie (incluant la parasitologie – mycologie et la bactériologie – virologie).

Nous constituons une équipe de professionnels jeunes et dynamiques (pharmaciens et médecins biologistes cliniciens, ingénieurs biotechnologistes) qui nous engageons à fournir à notre patientèle un service de qualité à des coûts conceptionnalisés afin d’optimiser la prise en charge rapide et efficiente de nos patients.

L’analyse biomédicale, étape importante et décisive du circuit du patient, nécessite une franche collaboration entre tous les acteurs à savoir nous biologistes cliniciens et les praticiens cliniciens ou hospitaliers. Nous mettons l’accent sur cette relation avec les différents praticiens traitant de la place.

Ce dialogue continu avec tous les acteurs de production de la santé nous permet d’offrir un panel d’analyses sans cesse réadapté au diagnostic rapide et efficient des différentes pathologies rencontrées dans la zone.

A l’heure actuelle, nous rendons disponibles pour nos populations la quintessence des analyses réalisées dans la pratique médicale. Par exemple, nous apportons à la population de Calavi et environ, des analyses en bactériologie qui jusqu’alors n’étaient pas disponibles…

Enfin, nous travaillons dans un cadre garantissant le confort de notre patientèle, la confidentialité de leurs données médicales ainsi que le respect de l’environnement. Nous n’hésitons pas à proposer  des prélèvements à domicile pour la commodité des patients alitées ou à mobilité réduite d’une part et pour ceux désirant une discrétion particulière d’autre part.

Klinikai vadovauja dermatovenerologijos gydytoja Prof. dr. Matilda Bylaitė-Bučinskienė, į savo komandą subūrusi bene stipriausius specialistus Lietuvoje, turinčius patirtį gydant ne tik dažnas odos ligas, bet ir retus odos susirgimus. Klinikoje taikoma moderniausia odos ligų diagnostika ir ekspertiškai gydomi ne tik suaugusieji, bet ir vaikai. Kiekvienam pacientui skiriamas išskirtinis dėmesys – sudaroma individualiai pritaikyta gydymo programa, apimanti vietinį ir sisteminį gydymą bei išsamias odos priežiūros rekomendacijas. 

Klinika išsiskiria ir estetinės dermatologijos paslaugomis – naudojant inovatyvią ir pasaulyje pripažintą įrangą atliekamas plaukų šalinimas, veido kontūravimas ir stangrinimas bei grožio injekcijos, o procedūras atlieka patyrę, medicininį išsilavinimą turintys specialistai, nuolat tobulinantys žinias tarptautiniuose mokymuose.

Norintiems suderinti profesionalią odos priežiūrą su poilsiu, kviečiame apsilankyti Holistic Skin & Wellness SPA centre Birštone – vietoje, kur odos gydymas ir estetinės dermatologijos procedūros harmoningai dera su atsipalaidavimu jaukioje aplinkoje. SPA centre kuriamos individualios odos sveikatos, jos grožio ir psichologinės gerovės puoselėjimo programos, leidžiančios susigrąžinti vidinę pusiausvyrą ir patirti giluminį atsipalaidavimą gamtos apsuptyje esančiuose apartamentuose.

Name: Gruppo Centro Servizi Medici
Description:
Il Gruppo Centro Servizi Medici (CSM) è stato costituito nel 2002, fra i primi Laboratori Centralizzati in Italia. L’aggregazione delle esperienze e delle competenze di specialisti che da decenni operano nel campo della medicina di laboratorio ha consentito di sviluppare un sistema fondato sulle eccellenze. Gli elevati standard dei metodi diagnostici in uso garantiscono la qualità clinica dei risultati analitici, a vantaggio e beneficio dei pazienti, per i quali collaboriamo anche con i più grandi centri diagnostici italiani ed europei.
Tutti i processi operativi sono finalizzati al miglioramento continuo della qualità nel rispetto delle norme ISO e OHSAS. Il Gruppo CSM è dotato di complessi sistemi informatici per la tutela e il rispetto della Privacy. Il Gruppo CSM, su base volontaria, ha redatto e adottato un proprio Codice Etico nel quale sono esplicitati i valori professionali, morali, etici e sociali sui quali fonda il proprio operare. Con i propri Punti di Accesso e con l’utilizzo di strumenti diagnostici e informatici sempre all’avanguardia, è vicino a tutte le esigenze di salute dei pazienti. Grazie alla visione futuristica del Gruppo, che ha saputo cogliere i molteplici vantaggi dell’aggregazione, CSM è oggi una struttura di medicina di laboratorio aggregata di 3° livello costituita da un Laboratorio Centralizzato e da Settori Specializzati di Microbiologia, Ematologia, Biologia Molecolare e Genetica, Citoistopatologia, Chimica clinica e Tossicologia. Opera con un team di professionisti qualificati e costantemente aggiornati. Il laboratorio Centralizzato si sviluppa su una superfice di oltre 800 mq.Il Gruppo Centro Servizi Medici (CSM) è fra i più grandi laboratori centralizzati in Italia operante nel campo della medicina di laboratorio. L’aggregazione delle esperienze e delle competenze di tanti specialisti ha consentito di sviluppare un sistema fondato sulle eccellenze, introducendo un approccio integrato fra innovazione, prevenzione e cura della salute.

Name: Synevo Hrvatska - poliklinika
Description:
Synevo Croatia is part of Medicover a leading international healthcare and diagnostic services provider headquartered in Sweden and listed on Nasdaq Stockholm. Established in 1995 in response to the growing demand for high-quality healthcare services in Poland, Medicover subsequently expanded to other countries, fulfilling similar needs. 

Medicover’s largest operations are in Poland, Germany, Romania and India. 
Medicover provides a broad spectrum of healthcare services via an extensive network of ambulatory clinics, hospitals, specialty-care facilities, laboratories and blood-drawing points through two divisions – Healthcare Services and Diagnostic Services.

Healthcare Services – offers high-quality care based on preventive and outpatient care services, specialist healthcare, fertility treatment, state-of-the-art dental services and optician services as well as wellbeing solutions – including sports packages and diets. Care is offered in 9 countries via 184 medical centres, 42 pharmacies, 42 hospitals, 115 dental centres, 38 optical showrooms, 13 mental health centres, 18 fertility clinics and 144 fitness clubs and gyms. The major markets are Poland, India and Romania.

Diagnostic Services – provides comprehensive clinical laboratory services across all major areas of clinical pathology, from routine screenings to advanced testing, supporting everything from disease prevention to treatment monitoring. The division delivers top-tier diagnostic solutions, ensuring accurate, timely, and reliable data that drive medical decisions and enhance patient outcomes. Operations are carried out through a network of 117 laboratories, 915 blood-drawing points, and 32 clinics across 13 countries, with key markets in Germany, Romania, Poland, and Ukraine.

For more information, visit www.medicover.com

Name: Société Marocaine de Chimie Clinique
Description:
La Société Marocaine de Chimie Clinique et Biologie Médicale (SMCCBM) est une Société savante qui a été crée en 1983 avec comme objectifs de promouvoir la Biologie Clinique (Biologie Médicale ou aussi Médecine de Laboratoire) sur les plans national et international. Les membres adhérents sont des Biologistes médicaux des secteurs publique et privé autorisés à exercer la Biologie Médicale en tant que Directeur de laboratoire, Directeur-Adjoint ou Biologiste des hôpitaux exerçant dans chacune des spécialités (Biochimie, Hématologie, Immunologie, Microbiologie, et Parasitologie). Les spécialistes en Anatomopathologie et en Génétique médicale peuvent également être membres titulaires.

Dans le cadre de sa participation à la formation médicale continue, la SMCC organise annuellement des Journées Nationales de Biologie Clinique ainsi que des Séminaires et Ateliers thématiques.

Pour promouvoir la Biologie Clinique Marocaine et dans le cadre de ses relations nationales (AMBM, Conseil des Pharmaciens Biologistes, Chambre Syndicale des Biologistes) et francophone (Syndicat Des Biologistes Français), la SMCC a participé au grand évènement de mise du Maroc à l’honneur pendant les JIB 2009.

Name: Laboratory of Genetics and Personalized Medicine, Zan Mitrev Clinic
Description:
Pioneering the future of healthcare by delivering personalized medicine through genetics and molecular diagnostics – we tailor prevention, diagnosis, and treatment to our patients' specific needs.

We offer a comprehensive range of molecular diagnostic services and personalized genetic solutions. Providing our patients with accurate and reliable diagnostic results is of the utmost importance to us, which is why we strive to deliver the highest standard of care and the most advanced diagnostic services in the industry. We're committed to improving patient outcomes through personalized medicine and innovative molecular and genetic solutions, and we guide and support healthcare providers every step of the way.

Our services can be categorized into several main categories:

1. Human Genetics and Diagnostics 
• Rare (monogenic) diseases diagnostics with NGS
• Kinship analysis
• Pharmacogenetics and drug-response
• Comprehensive microarray genotyping for the assessment of carrier status of rare diseases, risk of common diseases with PRS analysis, pharmacogenetics, ancestry, and wellness and traits
• Nutrigenetics and food intolerance

2. Oncogenetics and Cancer Therapy 
• Oncogenetics and hereditary cancer testing
• Targeted therapy for cancer

3. Genetics and Reproduction 
• Non-Invasive Prenatal Diagnostics (NIPT)
• Preimplantation Genetic Screening (PGS) of in-vitro fertilized embryos

4. Molecular Diagnostics of Infectious Diseases 
• Diagnosis of respiratory pathogenic viruses and bacteria
• Diagnosis of gastrointestinal viruses and bacteria
• Diagnosis of sexually transmitted diseases (STDs)
• Diagnosis of bacteria, fungi, and antibiotic resistance in sepsis
• Diagnosis of HCV/HBV/HIV 
• Pathogen detection in various biological samples (metagenomics)

Feel free to reach us!

+389 70 285 751

Name: SYNLAB Hrvatska - poliklinika
Description:
Synevo Hrvatska je dio Medicover grupacije, vodećeg međunarodnog pružatelja zdravstvenih i dijagnostičkih usluga sa sjedištem u Švedskoj i uvrštenog na Nasdaq Stockholm burzu. Medicover je osnovan 1995. godine kao odgovor na rastuću potražnju za visokokvalitetnim zdravstvenim uslugama u Poljskoj, a potom se proširio i na druge zemlje, ispunjavajući slične potrebe.

Najveće operacije Medicover grupe nalaze se u Poljskoj, Njemačkoj, Rumunjskoj i Indiji.

Medicover pruža širok spektar zdravstvenih usluga putem opsežne mreže polikliničkih centara, bolnica, specijalističkih ustanova, laboratorija i punktova za vađenje krvi, kroz dvije glavne divizije – Zdravstvene usluge i Dijagnostičke usluge.

Zdravstvene usluge – obuhvaćaju visokokvalitetnu skrb temeljenu na preventivnim i ambulantnim uslugama, specijalističkoj zdravstvenoj zaštiti, liječenju neplodnosti, suvremenim stomatološkim i optičkim uslugama, kao i rješenjima za očuvanje zdravlja – uključujući sportske pakete i prehrambene programe. Skrb se pruža u 9 zemalja putem 184 medicinska centra, 42 ljekarne, 42 bolnice, 115 dentalnih centara, 38 optičkih centara, 13 centara za mentalno zdravlje, 18 klinika za plodnost i 144 fitness kluba i teretane. Glavna tržišta su Poljska, Indija i Rumunjska.

Dijagnostičke usluge – pružaju sveobuhvatne kliničko-laboratorijske usluge u svim glavnim područjima kliničke patologije, od rutinskih pregleda do naprednih testiranja, podržavajući sve faze – od prevencije bolesti do praćenja liječenja. Ova divizija pruža vrhunska dijagnostička rješenja, osiguravajući točne, pravovremene i pouzdane podatke koji podupiru medicinske odluke i poboljšavaju ishode liječenja pacijenata. Usluge se provode putem mreže od 117 laboratorija, 915 punktova za vađenje krvi i 32 klinike u 13 zemalja, s ključnim tržištima u Njemačkoj, Rumunjskoj, Poljskoj i Ukrajini.

Za više informacija posjetite: www.medicover.com

Name: Grupo CETAM
Tech2Heal
Description:
NPA countries are facing work absenteeism and early retirement due to poor physical and mental health. 

Healthcare services that can help employees recover and get back to to work, such as occupational therapy/counselling, are currently under strain, difficult to access, expensive and underfunded. Tech2Heal aims to attain an enhanced comprehension of the reasons behind both absenteeism and early retirement due to poor wellbeing . 

A combination of qualitative/quantitative methods, and ubiquitous technology to monitor work-life will be used. Pilots will be implemented to validate solutions. 

Tech2Heal ultimate goals are to help employees/self-employees to gain awareness to live healthier for longer; and propose suitable changes to work/health policies. Its multidisciplinary team of technicians/clinicians provides diverse range of expertise to explore these challenges. Our regions common problems will facilitate a shared development and implementation of solutions across the partner countries.

Name: CrioBrasil
Description:
A CrioBrasil é um serviço que zela pelo acolhimento e cuidado com seus pacientes. 
Fundada em 2012, estabeleceu relacionamento com especialistas e clínicas de reprodução humana, sendo referência em confiança e transparência na importação de sêmen e óvulos para o Brasil, seguindo exigências dos órgãos reguladores da área.
Representantes exclusivos do Fairfax Cryobank, um dos maiores bancos de sêmen do mundo, buscamos soluções para atender as exigências de nossos parceiros prestando serviços com foco no paciente.
Nos consolidamos no cuidado, qualidade e segurança de importação de amostras de sêmen e óvulos e expandimos para o mercado de exames. Tudo isso com o apoio e parceira de clínicas e especialistas de todo Brasil. 
Somos pioneiros no Brasil na personalização do atendimento e acolhimento masculino e idealizamos um Concierge Masculino, com espaço discreto e acolhedor.
O Concierge Masculino é a continuidade da jornada do paciente de um serviço ou clínica, com cuidado, esmero e unicidade. 
Trabalhamos em parceria com serviços em todos os estados do Brasil, sendo parte da jornada do paciente e fazemos isso com atendimento de excelência e comprometimento.
Nossa credibilidade é de valor inestimável e, por isso, oferecemos um atendimento personalizado para parceiros, ginecologistas, urologistas, oncologistas, especialistas em reprodução humana e equipe multidisciplinar que suporta cada paciente.


CrioBrasil em serviços:
+ Exames masculinos
+Importação de gametas (sêmen e óvulos)
+Criopreservação de sêmen
+ Armazenamento de material biológico
+ Transporte de material biológico

Name: European Academy of Otology and Neurotology (EAONO) 2024
Description:
Dear colleagues,

After the well-organized virtual EAONO meeting in London in 2021, we like to welcome you to the 2024 face-to-face EAONO workshop which will be organized in the oldest city of the Netherlands; Nijmegen. The beautiful and historically rich city of Nijmegen is located in the east of the Netherlands near the German border. A large percentage of the inhabitants of the city are in their 20’s due to the number of schools and universities located there. The conference venue will be Concertgebouw de Vereeniging, a concert hall officially opened in 1915 and built in a mixture of Art Nouveau and Art Deco styles.

We are looking forward to a scientific program with state-of-the-art lectures, scientific presentations and discussions. Moreover, there will be ample opportunity to submit and present original papers.

Looking forward to welcoming you!
On behalf of the organizing committee
Jef Mulder and Myrthe Hol

Name: Navo Health
Description:
At Navo Health, we make fetal monitoring intelligible.

Our platform ingests cardiotocography (CTG) waveforms and delivers not just a classification and risk score, but a clear, clinician-friendly explanation that maps model outputs to obstetric signals — variability, accelerations, decelerations and other physiologic features. By design, our AI is interpretable: clinicians see the why behind each flag, so they can act with confidence.

Built for real-world care, our system integrates into antenatal and intrapartum workflows, supports clinician review, and links decisions to evidence — leveraging published literature and explainability methods to surface the most relevant studies and clinical rationale. We focus on safety, transparency and partnership with clinical teams, not replacing judgment.

Why it matters: clearer signals mean faster escalation when risk is real, and fewer false alarms when it isn't — improving care efficiency, clinician confidence, and patient experience. We collaborate with hospitals, researchers and regulatory experts to validate performance and align with clinical workflows.

Interested in a demo, clinical partnership or pilot? Follow us for research updates and reach out to book a conversation.

Name: Rapidx Bio
Description:
Problem


1.4+ billion people are diagnosed with infectious diseases every year. 

8 days is the average delay for a person to go from the first symptom to treatment leading to severe disease, causing 15 million+ avoidable deaths every year.

We have developed an infectious disease detection technology that can reduce this symptom-to-treatment cycle from the 8 day average to under 30 minutes.

How Our Technology Works And Its USP

Our prototype uses fingernail sized lasers and gold nanorods to amplify pathogen DNA to provide unprocessed sample-to-result time of <5 minutes. Crucially, the plasmonic PCR process integrates/removes the need for crucial steps (such as cell lysis, extraction and purification) to detect pathogens from entirely unprocessed samples, enabling it to be used without the need for a healthcare professional or a technician. Using our fast, single-step, portable and high accuracy PCR, first in point-of-care settings and subsequently in point-of-need or patient-facing settings, we can help diagnose and treat patients 200x faster (from 8 days to a few mins) to prevent severe disease.

Name: Tvaster Genkalp
Description:
Tvaster Genkalp is a Molecular Diagnostics company, established in May 2021, specialising in Liquid Biopsy, offering blood based cancer diagnostic solutions.  With innovative approach and commitment to quality, Tvaster has developed a groundbreaking screening test for Hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) called Episcreen  Liver.  
Episcreen Liver represents a major leap forward in the early detection of liver cancer (HCC). Rigorously validated through a study involving over 750 patients, this technology has demonstrated exceptional accuracy, far surpassing the current standard blood-based biomarker, AFP. The recent clinical study revealed that Episcreen Liver achieved an impressive sensitivity of 90%, in stark contrast to AFP’s 50%. Moreover, Episcreen Liver identified 92% of HCC cases missed by AFP, offering a potentially life-saving solution for countless individuals. 
Tvaster is dedicated to enhancing early cancer detection and improving patient outcomes through its state-of-the-art diagnostic solutions.

The laboratory integrates state-of-the-art technologies, such as Next Generation Sequencing (NGS), and collaborates with globally recognized biotechnology and bioinformatics partners to deliver personalized genetic insights for improved diagnosis, prognosis, and patient care.

Genotypos Science Labs stands out for its dedication to scientific excellence, ethical conduct, and direct collaboration with physicians, ensuring that every test result supports effective preventive and therapeutic decisions. The laboratory’s team of highly qualified scientists is committed to upholding the highest standards, as evidenced by compliance with international quality certifications (ISO 9001 and ISO 15189).

With a vision to shape the future of personalized medicine, Genotypos Science Labs continues to lead the way in genetic diagnostics, research, and innovation-empowering healthcare professionals and patients alike to make informed decisions for optimal well-being.

Name: MultivisionDx
Description:
MultivisionDx builds AI-powered decision-support tools for personalized diagnosis and treatment selection for solid cancer. Our computer vision technology integrates unique biological and spatial features of the tumor and its microenvironment, generating patient-specific tumor profiles for each patient. This approach allows clinicians to assess tumor aggressiveness and tailor the most effective treatment strategies for individual patients.

Built on years of multidisciplinary research at the University of Helsinki and demonstrated in a 650-patient proof-of-concept study published in Cell, the technology now carries pending patents for both its biomarker-discovery platform and a first-in-class composite biomarker for head-and-neck cancer, establishing a new standard in tumor profiling.

Name: Rotterdam Kidney Lab
Description:
Our research focuses on fluid and electrolyte handling by the kidney and its implications for common conditions such as hypertension and chronic kidney disease (CKD). To do so, we apply a translational approach that combines experimental work with clinical and epidemiological studies. 

In the lab we focus on epithelial transport proteins, especially the sodium-chloride cotransporter (NCC). We use complementary techniques including cell and animal models, organoids, and ex vivo approaches (isolated perfused kidney, urinary extracellular vesicles). Recent contributions include the characterization of NCC regulation by potassium, angiotensin II, WNK-SPAK kinases, and calcineurin inhibitors. 

In clinical studies we address the impact of the renal tubular mechanisms identified in the lab. Examples include the thiazide sensitivity of calcineurin inhibitor-induced hypertension, the renal tubular basis for salt-sensitivity in CKD, and the role of potassium in CKD (ongoing national trial with potassium supplementation). To analyze renal tubular transport non-invasively, we have developed novel methods to isolate, quantify, and characterize urinary extracellular vesicles. 

Through our tertiary referral center we also focus on inherited kidney disease including polycystic kidney disease and tubulopathies with discovery of novel mutations in SCCN1A and KCNJ16. 

Finally, we collaborate with the population-based Rotterdam Study in which serum and urinary electrolyte data are coupled to a range of phenotypic and genotypic data and outcomes.

Name: BioMEMS Diagnostics
Description: BioMEMS Diagnostics is developing an ultrahigh performance Point of Care and at-home diagnostics platform featuring a simple, single-use test cartridge, handheld analyzer and smart device app to deliver results for complex tests previously available only in hospital or central lab settings. Up to ten different tests can be integrated into a single cartridge with results in less than 5 minutes.  Test panels currently in development include respiratory infections, systemic inflammation, healthy aging, drug-resistant UTI, tropical diseases, recurrent myocardial infarction and concussion, many of which use a saliva or urine sample instead of a blood draw -- vastly increasing access to high-need, high-complexity testing at home or at Point of Care. The BioMEMS technology features a hybrid biosensor array that can be configured to accept a broad range of antibodies, aptamers, nucleic probes and other affinity agents, able to detect most any biomarker, ranging from a single pathogen to a single protein in most any biofluid. This is disruptive technology that also crushes the cost of manufacturing chip-based diagnostics by producing "blank" cartridges in the millions, and then adding the chemistry for specific diagnostics targets in a secondary operation, exponentially lowering costs. In so doing, BioMEMS vastly increases access to high-performance, high-complexity testing, offering an accurate, affordable testing platform with the potential to displace the current paradigm of collecting samples, transporting to a remote lab, and waiting for results when sophisticated tests are needed. No skill, no lab required. This proprietary, patent-pending, digital testing platform is equally effective in a doctors' office as it is in an ambulance, a combat zone or a tent hospital in South Sudan. A disruptive technology capable of transforming point-of-care. point-of-need and at home diagnostics.

Name: The Dutch Society of Human Genetics
Description:
The Dutch Society for Human Genetics (NVHG) is the scientific association for everyone in the Netherlands who is active in the field of human genetics.

Our Mission
It is the NVHG’s mission to support the development of the knowledge of Human Genetics in the Netherlands and to help to inform the public, patients, and stakeholder groups about the progress and issues surrounding this.

We define “Human Genetics” as the study of the human genome and mitochondrial DNA sequence, and its modifications and variations, both in patients, healthy persons and populations. and the inheritance of such information in related human beings. 

NVHG is aiming to accomplish this mission by being the national meeting platform for researchers, physicians and other professionals in human genetics, and by providing insights in the landscape of human genetics in The Netherlands, by bringing together various stakeholders, e.g. hospitals, research institutes, ministries, insurance companies and technology developers. 

Our Vision
We subscribe to the vision of the Council of Europe, that “the development of genetics in healthcare has a major impact on the organization of health care, leading to shifting from curative to preventive services, from in-patient to out-patient treatment, from specialized genetic services to genetics as an integral part of general health services.” 

Sister Associations
The NVHG partners with three professional associations:

VKGN
The Dutch Society for Clinical Geneticists which unites medical specialists in clinical genetics.

VKGL
The Dutch Society for Laboratory Specialists Clinical Genetics 

NACGG
The Dutch Association for Community Genetics and Public Health Genomics

Name: AMMAGENOMICS Biotechnology Research and Diagnostics
Description:
Accurate Molecular Mutation Analytical Genomics (AMMAGENOMICS) (Former AMMAGEN) founded in 2020 with the mission of reporting accurate results in all fields of diagnostics, food testing services in a quick turnaround time. 

The strength of the company is the strong scientific background to develop novel technology for Biotechnology applications. In very short time, the company has developed patented DNA and RNA extraction kits, both giving purified Nucleic acids or direct PCR extraction free kits. Extraction free kits help to overcome sample-bias in avoiding preferential binding of nucleic acids to spin columns or magnetic silica beads. 

The kits give high quality with yield with fungal and bacterial samples, where gram positive cell wall is difficult to lyse. These kits  are lytic enzymes free kits and give correct phyla percentages in stool, soil, saliva and other microbiome studies. The plant extraction kits give pure DNA and RA free from polyphenols and other PCR-inhibitors.  

High quality Mastermix both for qPCR and RTPCR and for gene expression and SNP analysis are also developed for high quality testing. 

AMMAGENOMICS has expertise in DNA and RNA sequencing with giving high quality data both Sanger and Metagenomics platforms.  All type of research challenges are undertaken and offered as contract research services or Proof of Concept Study services. Expertise are in primer designing for oncology markers with single base pair change of for polymorphism/ SNP analysis etc. 

In diagnostic part, AMMAGENOMICS has developed new diagnostic tests like Total Polyphenols, Antioxidants and Malondialdehyde in all biological samples. These tests are not an alternative to existing diagnostic tests but add as supplementary test to improve diagnostic efficiency for all diseases. These are good for diabetes, cancer, cardiovascular diseases, dental, infertility especially for improving high success rate in IVF/IUD etc. 

In Food Testing  new tests to detect adulteration,

Акредитација: СИНЛАБ е акредитирана од ИАРМ (Институт за акредитација на Р. Македонија) согласно МКС ИСО 15189:2013 под реден број МЛ-001.

СИНЛАБ е сертифицирана преку надворешна контрола на квалитет од INSTAND e.V., Германија и BIO-RAD, САД.

Структура на клиенти: физички лица, лекарски ординации, поликлиники, болници, медицински и истражувачки лаборатории, работни организации.

Name: Nuubo US
Description:
Nuubo is the only non-adhesive, wearable ECG monitor, tailored for patient comfort and ease of use. It's an ideal solution for a wide range of patients, particularly beneficial for those with sensitive skin or various chronic conditions. Nuubo's innovative design significantly reduces skin irritation, streamlining the monitoring process for everyone.

Nuubo embodies a patient-centric approach to continuous cardiac monitoring. It plays a pivotal role in the early detection of potential cardiac issues, enabling prompt adjustments in treatment plans and fostering a proactive stance in cardiac healthcare. This comfortable, non-intrusive device has proven to achieve high patient compliance rates, an essential factor in effective care management across various healthcare settings.
Nuubo's skin-friendly cardiac monitoring solution caters to a broad patient demographic, offering a gentler, adhesive-free alternative without compromising the quality of cardiac insights. Equipped with a 2-lead ECG and four integrated sensors, Nuubo delivers precise, comprehensive data, making it ideal for monitoring sporadic cardiac symptoms, arrhythmias, and AFIB, as well as assessing the effectiveness of treatments for abnormal heart rhythms. 

Nuubo's innovative non-adhesive design ensures safe and effective cardiac monitoring for all patient groups, including those who are sensitive to traditional adhesive-based systems. This inclusivity allows a wider range of patients to benefit from advanced cardiac monitoring, thereby elevating the standard of care they receive.  Nuubo is redefining cardiac health monitoring with a focus on accessibility, comfort, and comprehensive care.

Description:
Gutfeeling Labs is a pioneering Swedish healthtech company specializing in gut microbiome & gut integrity analysis with personalized interventions. Founded by twin brothers Dr. Hans Fischer (Immunology) and Dr. Walter Fischer (Neuroscience) from Lund University in 2017, the company is headquartered at Medicon Village in Lund, Sweden.

Gut issues often go undiagnosed or misdiagnosed. The company's mission is to democratize access to advanced gut health insights through affordable, science-backed tools. Our flagship offerings include:

SIBO and Leaky Gut Testing: Offering the world's first dual urine test to detect Small Intestinal Bacterial Overgrowth (SIBO) and increased intestinal permeability, conditions linked to various health issues. The patent-pending test is based on home sampling and mass spectrometric analysis of urine.

GutClear Supplement: A patented, plant-based supplement designed to address SIBO and support gut health without disrupting beneficial colon bacteria.

Gutfeeling Labs has analyzed over 18,000 gut microbiome samples, providing personalized dietary recommendations to promote gut balance and overall well-being.

Committed to innovation, Gutfeeling Labs also participates in environmental initiatives, such as developing feed additives to reduce methane emissions from livestock, contributing to global sustainability efforts.

By combining cutting-edge research with accessible health solutions, Gutfeeling Labs empowers individuals to take control of their gut health, fostering a broader understanding of the microbiome's role in human health because when the gut is off, everything else follows.

http://www.gutfeelinglabs.com

Name: Genetix
Description:
Welcome to our genetics testing company, where we offer cutting-edge pharmacogenomics testing to help you make more informed decisions about your health and wellbeing.

Our pharmacogenomics testing is designed to analyze your DNA and provide insights into how your body may respond to certain medications. By understanding your genetic makeup, we can help you and your healthcare provider make more informed decisions about which medications to take, which to avoid, and which may require dosage adjustments based on your unique genetic profile.

Our team of expert geneticists and scientists use state-of-the-art technology to analyze your DNA and provide you with accurate and reliable results. We work closely with healthcare providers to ensure that our tests are tailored to meet the specific needs of each individual patient.

Our pharmacogenomics testing can help you:

* Determine which medications may be most effective for you based on your genetic profile
* Identify medications that may have adverse reactions or cause side effects based on your genetic profile
* Optimize dosages of medications based on your genetic profile
* Avoid unnecessary trial-and-error in finding the right medication or dosage

We understand that each person's genetic makeup is unique, which is why we offer personalized testing options that are tailored to meet your specific needs. Our tests are designed to provide you with the most accurate and reliable information possible, so you can make informed decisions about your health and wellbeing.

At our genetics testing company, we are committed to helping you live your healthiest life possible. Whether you're looking to optimize your medication regimen or simply want to gain a better understanding of your genetic makeup, we're here to help. Contact us today to learn more about our pharmacogenomics testing and how we can help you achieve your health and wellness goals.

Acerca de Wondfo:

Fundada en 1992 y cotizada en 2015, Wondfo es una empresa de biotecnología de rápido crecimiento en China. La compañía se especializa principalmente en diagnósticos rápidos en el país, pero busca expandirse a otras áreas de la industria de la salud.

Tras años de esfuerzo en la entrega de productos y servicios de alta calidad, Wondfo ha ganado una sólida reputación en todo el mundo. En su proceso de producción, la empresa cumple estrictamente con las regulaciones y estándares nacionales e internacionales. Ha obtenido certificaciones CE, FDA, FSC, así como las certificaciones de sistema de calidad ISO 9001:2008 e ISO 13485:2012.

Wondfo otorga gran importancia a la investigación y el desarrollo, considerando la innovación como el núcleo del crecimiento empresarial. Actualmente, contamos con más de 530 investigadores altamente cualificados, y más del 30% de nuestro personal posee títulos de maestría y doctorado de universidades prestigiosas a nivel global. Además, hemos establecido laboratorios de I+D en Guangzhou y San Diego.

Con nuestras avanzadas líneas de producción y un personal altamente experimentado, nuestra capacidad diaria de producción de kits de prueba alcanza los 1.5 millones. Wondfo también ofrece una variedad de servicios personalizados para distribuidores profesionales y afiliados asociados.

Proporcionamos productos de alta calidad a precios muy competitivos, junto con un apoyo técnico profesional y servicios de asesoría. Actualmente, Wondfo tiene clientes en más de 120 países y regiones.

Nuestro compromiso es proteger la salud y mejorar la calidad de vida con mejores productos, servicios y soluciones. Con más de 3,000 empleados dedicados, continuaremos innovando y moldeando el futuro de las pruebas diagnósticas y la atención médica.

Name: Bio Care Medical Centers
Description:
Το πρώτο διαγνωστικό κέντρο BIOCARE, ιδρύθηκε το 1990 και καθιερώθηκε ως ένα από τα πρωτοπόρα στον Ελληνικό χώρο, καθώς η επένδυση σε ανθρώπινο δυναμικό, σύγχρονο εξοπλισμό  και υλικοτεχνική υποδομή, υπήρξαν πρωταρχικοί στόχοι της εταιρίας. 

Η διασφάλιση ποιότητας, η πιστότητα των αποτελεσμάτων, η εμπιστοσύνη του ιατρικού κόσμου αλλά και των εξεταζομένων, καθώς και η συνεχής  προσπάθεια βελτίωσης και εκσυγχρονισμού των υπηρεσιών της, συνέβαλαν σημαντικά στην αναγνωρισιμότητα των κέντρων.  Με την συμβολή  του έμπειρου επιστημονικού προσωπικού και της προηγμένης τεχνολογίας, διενεργείται ευρύτατο φάσμα εξετάσεων με γνώμονα πάντα τον σεβασμό  προς τον άνθρωπο και την υγεία του.

Επιπλέον, λειτουργώντας με τα πρότυπα των σύγχρονων Ιατρικών Κέντρων της Ευρώπης και της Αμερικής, τα διαγνωστικά κέντρα  BIOCARE διαθέτουν εξελιγμένο σύστημα μηχανοργάνωσης και ηλεκτρονικής αρχειοθέτησης, έτσι ώστε να  διατηρείται επ' αόριστον ιστορικό εξετάσεων και να είναι διαθέσιμο  οποτεδήποτε αυτό ζητηθεί.

Tα διαγνωστικά κέντρα  BIOCARE στεγάζονται σε  σύγχρονους, ιδιόκτητους, λειτουργικούς, κατάλληλα διαμορφωμένους και εξοπλισμένους χώρους με τα πλέον σύγχρονα ιατρικά μηχανήματα.

Partolab also uses FDA approved and validated tests and assays for cancer diagnostic and prognostic, pharmacogenetic, pathogen detection and identification.

Partolab has adopted Swedish workflow for laboratory routines and the personnel are well-trained from international universities:
      - Institute of cancer research (King’s college, UK)
     - Karolinska university /Hospital (Stockholm, Sweden)

The results of the tests in Partolab are validated by international institutes and partolab has received validation certificates from renowned centers in England, Germany and Sweden.

Name: AirSeal CardioVascular
Description:
AirSeal CardioVascular is a Washington University School of Medicine spinout developing PADGuard, the first blood-based diagnostic purpose-built for Peripheral Arterial Disease (PAD) using our patented biomarker, cFAS. PAD affects over 200 million people globally, including 12 million in the United States, and contributes to approximately 150,000 limb amputations each year in the U.S.

PADGuard is our lead product, with cFAS serving as the foundation of a broader Dx + Tx platform. While AirSeal’s focus is diagnostics, independent academic research has also identified cFAS as a promising therapeutic target in PAD and atherosclerosis—further validating the biomarker’s translational and clinical significance.

Built on strong intellectual property, multiple peer-reviewed publications, and extensive KOL, market, and biopharma validation, PADGuard offers a simple, accurate, and scalable approach to PAD detection. AirSeal is positioned to drive meaningful clinical impact and enable long-term expansion across cardiometabolic diseases.

Name: RADIS Lab
Description:
The RADIS Lab (Robotics, Artificial Intelligence, Dynamic Flow, Advanced Imaging, and Simulation) at St. Michael's Hospital in Toronto is a pioneering research facility dedicated to advancing neurovascular disease diagnosis and treatment. Established under the leadership of Dr. Vitor Mendes Pereira, globally recognized neurosurgeon and the director of Endovascular Research and Innovation, and co-led by Nicole Cancelliere, renowned radiographer and Neurovascular Research Program Manager, the lab integrates cutting-edge technologies to develop novel therapeutic strategies. 

The team has achieved several groundbreaking milestones:

World’s First Robotic-Assisted Neurovascular Intervention: In 2019, the lab performed the first robotic-assisted brain aneurysm repair globally, marking a significant advancement in neurovascular surgery. 

Pioneering Novel Imaging Techniques: The lab has been instrumental in demonstrating the safety and value of optical coherence tomography (OCT) technology for neurovascular applications, enhancing the precision of intracranial procedures. The team performed the world’s first series of endoluminal brain imaging using nOCT which was published on the cover of Science Translational Medicine in May of 2024. They have also worked with industry partners to develop brain imaging protocols for stroke assessment. 

International Training Programs: The lab has established training programs for endovascular surgeons worldwide, disseminating advanced techniques and improving global neurovascular care standards.

The RADIS Lab at St. Michael's Hospital offers a comprehensive and technologically advanced environment for research training in neurovascular diseases. Its integration of clinical excellence, innovative research, and multidisciplinary collaboration positions it as a leading center for developing future leaders in neurovascular care.

Name: Headache Sciences Inc.
Description:
We are a clinical artificial intelligence company that will facilitate the diagnosis and monitoring of headache disorders. We were founded in 2017, in which we have relentlessly searched for an EEG biomarker to diagnose migraine.

Doctors and scientists have been searching for an EEG test for 85 years. We have achieved, what we consider to be a major breakthrough, 93% accuracy in diagnosing migraine with aura. We are working with great urgency to try to convert this to a commercial machine learning test. The potential market is vast
because there are over one billion people in the world with migraines. With timely support, we could be a significant Canadian first.

We will be offering a diagnostic and monitoring service. It is called
the Machine Learning Test for Migraine or “MLTM”. Monitoring refers to repeat testing, which is expected to become a big part of the business, just as it is for ECG testing for the heart. We will start with migraine and then proceed to other headache disorders. The Company plans to offer various types of tests, each having its own specific set of values to stakeholders. These
include, but not limited to, non-emergency diagnosis on non-pain days, diagnosing a headache in-progress, monitoring for improvement or deterioration, disability assessment and severity assessment.

Except for the placement of electrodes by a qualified EEG technician, eventually the test, including the report generation to referring doctors, will be automated.

Name: Corcillum Pty Ltd
Description:
Corcillum (cor-SEE-lum) means heart (as the seat of intelligence); the brain.

We are building a next generation digital coronary twin to meet our mission of preventing 100,000 myocardial infarctions by 2035 and one million by the middle of the century.

Digital twins are virtual models of coronary arteries incorporating clinical, imaging, genetic, molecular, social, environmental, and physics factors. These models enable dynamic simulation, intervention assessment, and outcome monitoring but have not reached clinical maturity.

Corcillum is leveraging our patented artificial intelligence, coronary physics simulations, and our high-performance cloud computing platform, called corSuite, to build a next generation digital twin suited for clinical integration.

CorSuite, the new home of coronary analytics, integrates all coronary imaging pathways in one place: intravascular, invasive angiography and non-invasive computed tomography imaging, to generate high-resolution anatomical models suitable for personalised assessments. These anatomical models then ‘plug in’ diverse sources of data to give new insights into coronary disease.

No more tedious, time-consuming analyses; no more expensive capital costs. CorSuite helps you see what your imaging can’t see and lets you ask questions that previously you would have never dreamed to ask.

corSuite is currently for research use only and is not cleared for clinical or diagnostic use.

iTOOTH is an early stage Medtech Start-up based in Zurich, Switzerland. Spun-off in 2022 from a leading international MedTech company iTOOTH is keen to leverage saliva to disrupt traditional diagnostics.

The iTOOTH solution is a breakthrough innovation shaping the new field of continuous in-mouth diagnostics. iTOOTH is an in-mouth health tracker to gain personalized insights and improve your healthy lifestyle.

Saliva serves - similar to blood - as a «mirror of the body» reflecting the physiological and pathological state of the body. But - as opposed to blood - can be collected non-invasively and continuously, which unlocks new potential in health prevention and treatment.

The iTOOTH solution is a cutting-edge technology platform consisting of a wearable and software platform.

Name: Center for Klinisk Genetik og Genomisk Diagnostik, Region Sjælland
Description: Centeret er tovholder for at introducere kliniske afdelinger til anvendelse af helgenomsekventeringer som en del af den kliniske udredning indenfor de sygdomsområder, der er besluttet af Det Nationale Genom Center. I tæt samarbejde med Klinisk Genetik præsenteres de elementer af samtaler, der er særligt vigtige at mestre i forbindelse med anvendelse af brede genetiske undersøgelser. Og der instrueres i arbejdsdelingen mellem kliniske afdelinger og klinisk genetik i forholdt til initiel udredning og familieudredning og rådgivning ved arvelige sygdomme. Centeret organiserer og varetager også tolkningen af sekvenserne via et samarbejde med de rekvirerende afdelinger og ved sparring med faglige miljøer i ind- og udland. Centeret organiserer at sekvenserne kan anvendes dynamisk således at ny viden kommer patienterne til gode og at der ikke laves unødige nye analyser. Centeret tager et tværfagligt perspektiv i forhold til hvilke redskaber der kan anvendes i alle diagnostiske specialer, der arbejder med molekylærbiologiske analyser, for at lette arbejdsgange og for at sikre at patientens svar let kan tilgås af de behandlende klinikere uanset hvor patienten behandles.

Name: The Wilson Centre for Blood Cancer Genomics
Description:

Our mission is to ensure every patient with blood cancer receives an accurate diagnosis, and their physicians get the genomic data they need to make optimal treatment decisions.

Details on our NGS panels and single variant assays are available here: https://www.petermac.org/health-professionals/services-for-health-professionals/pathology-health-professionals/molecular-pathology/molecular-haematology

As a proud member of the Collaborative Centre for Blood Cancer Genomics, the Wilson Centre leads a dynamic research program focused on targeted treatment resistance, personalised medicine, bone marrow failure syndromes, and residual disease. For updates on our research program please visit us here: https://genomic-cancer-medicine.unimelb.edu.au/research/wilson-centre-for-blood-cancer-genomics-piers-blombery
