Name: Dx365
Description:
DX 365 is an all-in-one lateral flow diagnostic system with NFT data sharing for test manufacturers. It boosts sales through the Dx365 reader and marketplace, serving diagnostic businesses, point-of-care facilities, pharmacies, fitness/wellness centers, elder homes, and veterinary clinics. Dx365 offers quick, accurate diagnostics with an intuitive app-based interface.

Key components:

Dx365 Marketplace: A business solution for diagnostic enterprises.
Dx365 Reader: A portable electronic IVD device for professional and home use, supporting a variety of lateral flow tests.
Dx365 Studio: A desktop application for LFA manufacturers and developers to adapt tests to the Dx365 system.
Dx365 Care: A cross-platform app for end-users including medical professionals and non-professionals.
Dx365 Cloud: A platform for test metadata distribution, data storage, and exchanging LFA calibration data, ensuring constant test support.
Potential biomarkers include hormones, cardiac markers, wellness/health, urine analysis, tumor markers, infections/viruses, allergy assays, and drugs of abuse.

Name: Dr. Gehlken Rohstoffanalytik GmbH
Description:
Die Dr. Gehlken Rohstoffanalytik GmbH hat sich auf die mineralogische und geochemische Untersuchung von mineralischen Rohstoffen, keramischen Produkten und anorganischen Baumaterialien spezialisiert. Die Expertise erstreckt sich auch auf die Analyse von Prozessrückständen aus verschiedenen Branchen. Das Besondere an Arbeit besteht darin, dass nicht nur die chemische Zusammensetzung oder physikalische Parameter bestimmt wird, sondern auch die real existierende mineralogische Zusammensetzung. Dadurch wird eine Korrelation zwischen diesen Parametern ermöglicht.

Dieses Ziel wird durch eine einzigartige Methodenkombination aus Röntgendiffraktometrie und Infrarotspektroskopie erreicht. Diese Kombination ermöglicht die quantitative Bestimmung des modalen Mineralbestands, was durch herkömmliche Röntgenverfahren in den meisten Fällen nicht möglich ist. Andere Labore verwenden oft nur die Röntgenfraktometrie und Röntgenfluoreszenzanalytik, um den normativen Mineralbestand zu ermitteln, was weniger präzise Ergebnisse liefert.

Die Kunden stammen aus verschiedenen Branchen, dazu gehören u.a. die Natursteinindustrie, die keramische Industrie, der Straßenbau und der Deponiebau.

Namhafte Unternehmen wie Bilfinger + Berger Bauaktiengesellschaft, Gebr. Stolz GmbH & Co. KG, Berlinwasser Services GmbH, Geologisches Landesamt Mecklenburg-Vorpommern und viele weitere vertrauen auf uns.

Sie alle verlassen sich auf die Expertise von Herrn Dr. Gehlken, um die Qualität ihrer Rohstoffe und Produkte sicherzustellen.

Die Dr. Gehlken Rohstoffanalytik GmbH bietet u.a. folgende Dienstleistungen an:
- Analyse der Zusammensetzung von mineralischen Rohstoffen für die Bauindustrie (Zement, Beton, Keramik), Straßenbau, Bahn- u. Gleisbau, um sicherzustellen, dass sie alle Qualitätsanforderungen erfüllen.
- Beratung von Unternehmen bei der Entwicklung neuartiger Verfahren, die zum maximalen Nutzen von mineralischen Rohstoffen dienen

Mehr erfahren Sie unter: https://gehlken.de

Name: Portable X ray On Demand, LLC
Description:
PXOD was founded in 2023 with a mission to revolutionize medical imaging by bringing it directly to healthcare providers and patients, especially in the wake of the challenges presented by the Covid-19 pandemic. During the pandemic, hospitals, clinics, and healthcare workers faced immense pressure, with overloaded systems, limited resources, and the urgent need for innovative solutions to ensure patient care continued seamlessly. Medical imaging, a critical component of diagnosing and monitoring patients, became a significant challenge due to limited access and high demand.

Recognizing this gap, PXOD was created to bridge the divide, providing cutting-edge, portable medical imaging technology that can be easily deployed wherever it’s needed most. By offering real-time imaging capabilities, PXOD ensures that healthcare professionals have immediate access to crucial diagnostic tools, even in remote or under-resourced settings. This innovation aims to streamline healthcare delivery, reduce wait times, and improve patient outcomes.

PXOD’s approach emphasizes convenience, reliability, and accessibility, bringing high-quality imaging directly to the point of care. Whether it’s in hospitals, clinics, or even remote field locations, PXOD is committed to improving the healthcare experience for both providers and patients, empowering medical teams to make faster, more accurate decisions during critical moments.

Name: The Sunrise International & Co
Description:
We are [The Sunrise International & Co ], a leading distributor of laboratory chemicals, molecular diagnostics (including PCR kits), ELISA kits, and laboratory equipment dedicated to supporting scientific research, clinical diagnostics, industrial laboratories, and educational institutions. Our mission is to enable progress in life sciences, medicine, public health, and quality control by delivering reliable, high‑quality products, exceptional technical support, and responsive logistics.

We believe science advances when researchers and practitioners have access to accurate tools, reagents, and instruments — and our goal is to be that trusted supply partner. Whether for infectious disease testing, biomarker discovery, environmental monitoring, or industrial process control, we aim to make each customer’s operations smoother, safer, faster, and more reproducible.
Market Need & Industry Context

In today’s world:

Molecular diagnostics has gained enormous importance (e.g. PCR, RT‑PCR, qPCR) in detecting pathogens (viruses, bacteria), monitoring outbreaks, and supporting public health. Reliable kits and reagents are essential.

Immunoassays, particularly ELISA (Enzyme‑Linked Immunosorbent Assay), remain fundamental in quantifying biomarkers (proteins, antibodies) in diagnostics, research, food safety, and environmental applications.

Lab chemicals (both organic and inorganic reagents, buffers, standards, etc.) are fundamental building blocks for all biomedical, environmental, industrial, and academic research and QC/QA processes.

High‑quality laboratory equipment and instrumentation (thermocyclers, spectrophotometers, centrifuges, etc.) enable accurate experimentation, diagnosis, production, and testing.

In many regions, however, there are gaps: delays in supply, lack of technical guidance, concerns about reagent/instrument quality, insufficient support or calibration, etc. That is where a distributor with strong sourcing, quality assurance, and local service becomes

Warum das MVZ Institut für Mikroökologie Ihr Spezialist für Mikrobiota, Schleimhaut und Allergien ist:

 Forschung & Innovation – Durch die enge Zusammenarbeit mit Universitäten und die kontinuierliche Integration aktueller Studien bieten wir Diagnostik auf höchstem Niveau.
 Individuelle Therapieempfehlungen – Unsere Analyseergebnisse unterstützen personalisierte Behandlungsansätze für eine ganzheitliche Patientenversorgung.
 Nachhaltige Gesundheit – Ein gesunder Darm ist die Basis für Wohlbefinden und ein starkes Immunsystem – wir liefern die wissenschaftlichen Grundlagen dafür.

Als Pioniere in der mikroökologischen Diagnostik tragen wir dazu bei, die Medizin von morgen zu gestalten. Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam neue Wege für eine gesunde Zukunft gehen!

Name: Society of Medical Laboratory Technology of South Africa (SMLTSA)
Description:
The Society of Medical Laboratory Technology of South Africa (SMLTSA) is dedicated to promoting the profession of medical laboratory technology within the country. Serving as the official voice for medical laboratory professionals, SMLTSA ensures that their perspectives are represented in policy discussions affecting pathology testing in Southern Africa.

Scientific Endeavors
SMLTSA emphasizes the importance of scientific advancement by publishing the Journal of Medical Laboratory Science & Technology of South Africa biannually. This peer-reviewed journal provides a platform for professionals to share research findings and stay abreast of developments in laboratory medicine.

Professional Support
Acting as an advisory and consultative body, SMLTSA plays a pivotal role in education, training, and employment within the medical laboratory sector. The society offers guidance to educational institutions, certification bodies, and employers, ensuring that the profession maintains high standards and adapts to evolving healthcare needs. 

Membership and Representation
Members of SMLTSA actively participate in meetings with educational, certifying, registering, and employing authorities. Through this involvement, they advocate for the interests of medical laboratory professionals, ensuring their voices are heard in key decision-making processes.

Educational Initiatives
Understanding the critical role of education, SMLTSA is committed to the development and continuous professional growth of medical laboratory personnel. The society offers resources and opportunities for ongoing learning, ensuring that practitioners remain competent and informed about the latest advancements in the field.

Technological Advancement
SMLTSA endorses the adoption of new technologies and provides a platform for professionals to learn about and integrate these innovations into their practices.

Diagnóstico Molecular:
En el área de diagnóstico molecular, utilizamos las últimas tecnologías y métodos para analizar el material genético de nuestros pacientes. Desde pruebas de detección temprana de enfermedades hereditarias hasta la identificación de mutaciones genéticas específicas, nuestro laboratorio cuenta con equipos de última generación que nos permiten realizar análisis precisos y de alta sensibilidad.

Patología Molecular:
La patología molecular es esencial para entender la base molecular de enfermedades y trastornos. Nuestro laboratorio ofrece una amplia gama de análisis que incluye la evaluación de biomarcadores, expresión génica y análisis de mutaciones somáticas. Estos análisis nos ayudan a proporcionar información valiosa sobre el pronóstico y la selección de terapias específicas para nuestros pacientes.

Citogenética:
En el campo de la citogenética, nos enfocamos en el estudio de los cromosomas y su estructura. Realizamos análisis cromosómicos para detectar anomalías, como aberraciones numéricas y estructurales. Masthead is a manufacturer and marketer of medical products and apparel designed to enhance patient comfort, recovery and dignity. The company’s first product was the Breast Bag, a care bag containing recovery supplies, comfort items and hygiene products in a reusable designer duffel bag that could be sent to a woman facing breast cancer (mastectomy) surgery by a caring friend. Soon hospitals began to take notice, and now give bags to their patients. The surgical and recovery bra line, has proven to have an innovative and revolutionary recovery bra: the Elizabeth Pink Surgical Bra.  The division of ChabnerXRT will soon launch it's first FDA 510k cleared, patented Radiation Treatment Bra for support both in the supine and prone positions for treatment of breast cancer.

Name: Uvigga Diagnostics
Description:
Combating Antibiotic Resistance with Innovation

Antibiotic resistance is a global health threat, according to the World Health Organization. Our project focuses on optimizing the acute diagnosis and medication of urinary tract infections (UTIs). Today, treating UTIs accounts for 15% of the world's antibiotic consumption.

The current urine dipstick test used for early detection of UTIs suffers from low precision, leading to unnecessary antibiotic treatments. We are working on a solution based on state-of-the-art research and lateral-flow assay technology.

Our goal is to enhance the acute diagnosis of UTIs and reduce unnecessary antibiotic prescriptions. Our interdisciplinary team, with strong partners from DTU, OUH, and SDU, is working tirelessly to make a difference in the fight against antibiotic resistance.

Name: Fisioradi Medical Center
Description:
Fisioradi Medical Center nasce a Pesaro nel 2001 grazie all’intuizione di Maurizio Radi (fisioterapista, osteopata, chiropratico, chinesiologo) con l’ambizioso obiettivo di strutturare il centro in maniera completa al fine di poter liberare dal dolore chiunque si affidi alle sue mani, garantendo alle persone di ritornare nel più breve tempo possibile alla propria vita.

Maurizio ha iniziato la sua attività in un piccolo studio, ben presto frequentato da campioni del basket e del ciclismo e professionisti del calcio, del volley e del rugby. Spinto dalla volontà di creare qualcosa di importante, ha pensato di creare un centro molto innovativo per l’epoca, che in questi 20 anni ha subito una costante crescita e varie ristrutturazioni per mantenersi sempre un passo avanti fino ad inaugurare a settembre 2021 il nuovissimo Fisioradi Medical Center, una struttura di oltre mille metri quadrati con servizi di fisioterapia, riabilitazione, diagnostica, poliambulatorio e chirurgia ambulatoriale. 

La grande visione di unire tutto all’interno della stessa struttura diventa finalmente realtà.

Il centro dispone di tutti i più moderni elettromedicali, una grande palestra e una piscina riabilitativa con acqua calda a 33° e ben 5 differenti altezze per poter lavorare al meglio su ogni singola problematica.

Il Poliambulatorio vanta ben oltre 40 medici specialistici per poterti dare la migliore risposta per ogni tua necessità.
E’ un Poliambulatorio che coinvolge alcuni tra i migliori medici e consulenti del centro Italia.

Fisioradi Medical Center è un Centro Diagnostico in cui poter trovare macchinari di ultima generazione e uno staff di Medici e Tecnici Radiologi di alto livello. E' possibile effettuare accertamenti quali:

Name: Zoma Fungal Diagnostics Ltd
Description:
Underpinned by two decades of expert knowledge and clinical diagnostic experience, we can provide specialist education and training in medical mycology. Uniquely targeting laboratory scientists and practising clinical staff, our courses offer practical tuition in all aspects of fungal identification and its application to medical mycology. 

With nearly 20 years experience of working in clinical diagnostic mycology, the time is right for us to start to share our knowledge and skills with others so that the next generation of clinical microbiologists can be confident in the identification and interpretation of fungal organisms isolated in the clinical diagnostic laboratory.

We are providing practical training courses in the identification of fungi to laboratory technicians, biomedical scientists, and clinical scientists. Through lectures, tutorials and practical sessions we aim to inspire confidence and improve knowledge for anyone who may have the need to identify fungi with the potential to cause disease.

We offer training in our purpose built onsite laboratory, or we can send our skilled experts to you for bespoke 121 or dedicated team training at your own facility. Please don't hesitate to contact us and discuss your needs and we wil try our best to accomodate your requirements.

Name: PrognostX Health
Description:
PrognostX Health is a company dedicated to the discovery and clinical optimization of novel diagnostic tests.

Our mission and primary focus is to improve patient-centered outcomes through early identification and management of Chronic Kidney Disease (CKD). ConfirmCKD is a new diagnostic test that is highly accurate for CKD on single test assessment. Early CKD diagnosis allows for early intervention and prevention of late-stage progression. In combination with recent discoveries of new medications that treat the condition, ConfirmCKD can help save millions of individuals from end-stage renal disease and early death, as well as save healthcare spending and Medicare costs by billions of dollars every year.

We are in the business of putting dialysis out of business.

For those interested in clinical research involving the underlying mechanism of kidney disease progression, please visit the website below for more information.

https://scitube.io/prognostx-health-a-new-test-to-identify-chronic-kidney-disease-a-costly-and-silent-killer/

Name: Laboratório Pasteur Paranaguá
Description:
O Laboratório Pasteur é uma instituição de saúde com uma trajetória de 56 anos dedicados ao cuidado dos pacientes e à promoção da saúde. Fundada com a visão de oferecer serviços de excelência, a empresa tem como foco central o paciente, proporcionando um atendimento personalizado e humanizado que reflete seu compromisso em tratar cada indivíduo de maneira única.

Desde sua fundação, o Laboratório Pasteur assumiu a missão de zelar pela saúde de seus pacientes. A prevenção de doenças é um dos pilares fundamentais de sua abordagem, visando identificar riscos à saúde e oferecer um estilo de vida saudável. Além disso, a instituição desempenha um papel crucial ao auxiliar os médicos na definição das condutas clínicas, fornecendo resultados de exames confiáveis que contribuem para um diagnóstico essencial e um tratamento eficaz.

A infraestrutura do Laboratório Pasteur é projetada para proporcionar um ambiente aconchegante e acolhedor aos pacientes. O conforto e o bem-estar dos pacientes são prioridades, permitindo que eles enfrentem seus cuidados de saúde com uma sensação de tranquilidade. A modernização é evidente na presença de equipamentos de última geração, que não apenas garantem resultados precisos, mas também demonstram o compromisso contínuo da instituição com a vanguarda da tecnologia médica.

A busca incessante pelo aprimoramento e a qualidade dos serviços prestados são valores centrais do Laboratório Pasteur.

Name: The Lab
Description:
PZU Poliklinika The Lab je privatna zdravstvena ustanova specijalizovana isključivo za laboratorijsku dijagnostiku. Naša misija je pružiti brzu, preciznu i pouzdanu dijagnostičku uslugu svim korisnicima, oslanjajući se na stručnost tima i savremenu tehnologiju. Vjerujemo da kvalitetna laboratorijska analiza predstavlja prvi i ključni korak ka očuvanju i unapređenju zdravlja.

S ciljem da laboratorijske usluge učinimo dostupnijima, prisutni smo na više lokacija: Sarajevo, Široki Brijeg, Mostar i Tromeđa. Naš tim čine licencirani stručnjaci sa dugogodišnjim iskustvom u oblastima biohemije, hematologije, mikrobiologije, imunologije i genetike. Kroz stalna ulaganja u edukaciju i tehnologiju, osiguravamo uslugu koja je u skladu s najvišim profesionalnim i etičkim standardima.

Naš fokus je na tačnosti, brzini i individualnom pristupu svakom pacijentu. U ponudi imamo širok spektar laboratorijskih testova:
• Osnovne i specijalističke biohemijske analize
• Hormonske pretrage
• Mikrobiološki brisevi i PCR testovi
• Testovi za sportiste i preventivne panele
• Genetska testiranja i analize intolerancije

Vizija PZU The Lab je postati lider u oblasti laboratorijske dijagnostike u regiji, prepoznat po stručnosti, inovacijama i kvalitetu usluge. Težimo gradnji povjerenja – s pacijentima, zdravstvenim ustanovama i stručnjacima – kroz transparentnu komunikaciju, partnerstvo i kontinuirano unapređenje standarda.

U svijetu u kojem vrijeme i zdravlje nemaju cijenu, naš zadatak je da laboratorijsku uslugu učinimo dostupnom, efikasnom i – prije svega – tačnom. Kontinuirano radimo na unapređenju korisničkog iskustva, jer smatramo da savremena dijagnostika mora biti jednako pristupačna koliko i stručna.

Name: Pracownia Onkogenetyki Dziecięcej
Description:
Pracownia Onkogenetyki Dziecięcej IPCZD specjalizuje się w nowoczesnej diagnostyce molekularnej dziecięcych nowotworów litych, szczególnie guzów ośrodkowego układu nerwowego (OUN). Wykorzystuje zaawansowane technologie, takie jak sekwencjonowanie nowej generacji (NGS), profilowanie metylacji DNA oraz narzędzia sztucznej inteligencji, w tym uczenie maszynowe. Opracowane rozwiązania są innowacyjne i porównywalne z metodami stosowanymi w czołowych europejskich ośrodkach onkologii dziecięcej.

Pracownia realizuje kompleksową ocenę markerów molekularnych: diagnostycznych, prognostycznych, predykcyjnych oraz kwalifikujących do terapii celowanej. Badania obejmują także analizę zmian germinalnych, co umożliwia identyfikację rodzin z podwyższonym ryzykiem zachorowania i wdrożenie odpowiedniego poradnictwa genetycznego oraz działań profilaktycznych.

Jednostka współpracuje z kluczowymi ośrodkami klinicznymi IPCZD – Kliniką Onkologii, Kliniką Neurochirurgii oraz konsultantem krajowym w dziedzinie neuropatologii – co zapewnia centralizację danych biologicznych, molekularnych i klinicznych pacjentów onkologicznych z całej Polski.

Dzięki wsparciu projektów finansowanych przez NCN, ABM, MEiN i MZ, Pracownia realizuje badania naukowe, których wyniki znajdują odzwierciedlenie w publikacjach naukowych i krajowych standardach diagnostyki molekularnej w onkologii dziecięcej.

Name: Limbach Nord GmbH
Description:
Seit mehr als 55 Jahren sind wir in und um Hannover bekannt für ein breit gefächertes Spektrum an Laboranalysen von höchster Qualität. Zusätzlich bieten wir den behandelnden Ärzten eine persönliche Beratung zur bestmöglichen Diagnostik und Therapie an.

Wir setzen bei unseren Analysegeräten ausschließlich auf namhafte Hersteller und arbeiten mit der jeweils neuesten Gerätegeneration. Durch interne und externe Qualitätskontrollen garantieren wir ein gleichbleibend hohes Niveau der Analysenergebnisse.

In der Analytik bieten wir Ihnen ein breites Leistungsspektrum in den Bereichen Laboratoriumsmedizin, Mikrobiologie, Virologie und Infektionsepidemiologie. Alle gängigen Analysen führen wir vor Ort durch – wir verfügen über eine komplette in-house-Analytik. Häufig benötigte Analysen führen wir täglich durch, speziellere Verfahren mehrmals wöchentlich. Sehr seltene Spezialanalysen übergeben wir unseren Partner-Laboren der Limbach-Gruppe, die diese zeitnah für Sie bearbeiten.

Bei Routineuntersuchungen (Hämatologie, Klinische Chemie, Gerinnung) erhalten Sie Analyse und Befund am Tag der Einsendung. Notfälle und eilige Aufträge bearbeiten wir schnellstmöglich. Die Ergebnisse stellen wir Ihnen auf Wunsch per Fax, DFÜ oder LaborApp zu. Auffällige und medizinisch besonders wichtige Befunde teilen wir Ihnen als behandelndem Arzt jederzeit direkt mit.

Sämtliche Proben bewahren wir sieben Tage lang für Sie auf. So können Sie Nachforderungen unter präanalytischen Maßgaben stellen, ohne dass Sie den Patienten erneut einbestellen müssen.

Name: Laboratorio Químico Clínico
Description:
Con más de 30 años de experiencia, el Laboratorio Químico Clínico (LQC) ha sido un referente en Barranquilla y más allá, desde su fundación en 1981 por la Dra. Sonia Ayubi de Fernández. Nuestra trayectoria comenzó en la carrera 53 # 64-28 y se ha expandido con el tiempo, manteniendo un compromiso inquebrantable con la excelencia en servicios de salud.

Fuimos pioneros en Barranquilla al introducir la realización de PCR para HIV en 2001, gracias a nuestra aprobación de Roche USA, demostrando nuestro compromiso con la innovación y la vanguardia tecnológica. Con el apoyo de proveedores comprometidos, hemos crecido constantemente, extendiendo nuestra presencia a Santa Marta, Cartagena y Valledupar, llevando servicios de primer nivel a empresas y particulares.

Nuestra misión es clara: ser una institución que ofrece servicios de salud de la más alta calidad en laboratorio clínico y salud ocupacional. Contamos con un equipo humano altamente calificado, respaldado por tecnología de punta y prácticas que garantizan calidad y confiabilidad en cada resultado.

Valoramos profundamente a nuestros pacientes y clientes, brindándoles atención personalizada, calidez humana y un compromiso constante con su bienestar. Además, tenemos un propósito institucional de contribuir a la formación de nuevos profesionales en el campo de la salud, ofreciendo oportunidades de crecimiento respaldadas por nuestro talento humano y tecnología.

Mirando hacia el futuro, nuestra visión es convertirnos en una organización líder en la prestación de servicios de laboratorio y seguridad y salud en el trabajo. Buscamos proporcionar resultados altamente confiables y oportunos, crear ambientes seguros y contar con un talento humano altamente competente.

En LQC, estamos comprometidos con el crecimiento continuo como familia y con seguir sirviendo a nuestros clientes con la calidad y el compromiso que nos caracterizan. Juntos, construimos un futuro más saludable y prometedor para todos.

Name: Eswatini Medical Laboratory Association
Description:
The Eswatini Medical Laboratory Association (EMLA) is the national professional body representing all cadres within the medical laboratory field, including laboratory scientists, technologists, technicians, students, educators, and regulators across both public and private sectors. Our mission is to uphold and advance the standards of medical laboratory science by fostering professional development, advocating for recognition, and ensuring quality diagnostics that drive better healthcare outcomes.

At EMLA, we believe that laboratory professionals are the backbone of disease diagnosis, surveillance, and research. We work collaboratively with healthcare institutions, government bodies, and international partners to enhance laboratory medicine through education, training, and policy development. Our initiatives focus on continuous learning, accreditation, mentorship, and innovation to strengthen laboratory systems and public health responses in Eswatini.

Through strategic engagement and advocacy, we ensure that laboratory professionals are equipped with the knowledge, skills, and opportunities needed to excel in their careers. Whether you're a seasoned expert, an emerging scientist, or a regulatory stakeholder, EMLA is committed to supporting your growth and amplifying the role of medical laboratory science in shaping a healthier nation.

Join us in driving excellence, innovation, and impact in laboratory medicine.

#MedicalLaboratoryScience #HealthcareInnovation #ProfessionalExcellence #LaboratoryMedicine #PublicHealth #Eswatini #EMLA #Diagnostics #MedicalScience #CapacityBuilding #ClinicalLaboratory #LabProfessionals #StudentScientists #HealthcareLeadership

Name: Molecular Virology Laboratory, University of Nigeria Teaching Hospital Enugu
Description:
We are a diverse and collaborative team of scientists ranging from early-career researchers to seasoned public health professionals united by a shared passion for strengthening virological surveillance and combating infectious diseases.
Our collective expertise spans virology, molecular diagnostics, epidemiology, genomics, field surveillance, and health systems research. We bring together the energy of youth, the wisdom of experience, and a mutual commitment to impactful science that protects communities and informs health policy.
 What We Do:
•	Monitor and analyze viral disease patterns through robust surveillance systems
•	Conduct field investigations and outbreak response in real time
•	Leverage lab technologies (PCR, ELISA, sequencing) and bioinformatics tools for virus detection
•	Evaluate vaccine effectiveness and support immunization strategies
•	Bridge research and policy through publications, training, and health advocacy
 Why We’re Unique:
Our team thrives at the intersection of innovation and institutional memory. The mentorship and experience of senior scientists complement the tech-savvy and forward-thinking approaches of younger members—fostering a rich environment of learning, adaptation, and leadership development.
 Our Vision:
To build resilient health systems through data-driven virology, inclusive surveillance, and collaborative public health action—locally and globally.
 Open to partnerships in:
Virological Surveillance | Infectious Disease Control | Molecular Diagnostics | Genomics | Vaccine Impact | Public Health Research | Outbreak Response

Name: EURL-PH-ERZV
Description:
EU Reference Laboratory for Emerging, Rodent-borne and Zoonotic Viruses (EURL-PH-ERZV)

The EURL-PH-ERZV strengthens Europes preparedness and response to serious viral threats. Designated by the European Commission, its main objective is to support ECDC and national reference laboratories in laboratory capacity, surveillance, outbreak response, harmonisation of methods, and the exchange of expertise and materials across Europe.

Led by the Public Health Agency of Sweden and in partnership with Institut Pasteur (France), INMI Lazzaro Spallanzani (Italy), and the National Center for Public Health and Pharmacy (Hungary), the consortium brings together extensive laboratory experience and expertise in arenaviruses, filoviruses, hantaviruses, henipaviruses, lyssaviruses, poxviruses, and viral “Disease X” scenarios. By sharing reference materials, protocols, quality assessments, and training opportunities, the EURL helps laboratories across Europe stay prepared and respond effectively to both known and novel pathogens.

This may result in death due to the inability of physicians to diagnose an illness effectively.

Our business idea is a comprehensive Medical Technology software stack that will integrate the real-time, automated quality inspection of Chest X-rays proposed in our research project with the features present in a traditional Radiology Information System (RIS), i.e. ordering examinations, scheduling appointments, assignment of cases based on staff resources etc.

Name: EPSRC Center for Future PCI Planning
Description:
Percutaneous Coronary Intervention (PCI) is a procedure to treat obstructive coronary artery disease. The majority of patients receive drug-eluting stent devices that act as a supporting scaffold and deliver drugs to counteract renarrowing. Hundreds of thousands of patients annually require an invasive repeat procedure, a huge economic burden and pressure on healthcare. It is currently not feasible to quantitatively predict the immediate effect of an intervention and if/when a patient will suffer from renarrowing. Tools that enable optimisation of the procedure on a patient-specific basis are urgently needed to improve outcomes and alleviate the healthcare burden.

Critical to the procedure is assessing individual patient's level of disease. Medical imaging allows to visualise the degree of obstruction and the composition of the plaque, informing clinicians to plan PCI. Decisions are presently left to operator experience and there are no guidelines for how to optimise PCI for a given patient.

Computational models of PCI have potential to inform PCI strategy. However, they suffer from limitations related to increasing realism and accuracy of the models, improving robustness, predictive power and computation speed. Critically, run times of current models hamper timely decision support and genuine in-clinic impact.

The centre addresses challenges by developing a decision support tool to assist clinicians with PCI planning. Mathematical modelling of fluid-structure interaction, lesion preparation, drug delivery and growth & remodelling, allied to statistical inference, emulation, uncertainty quantification and optimisation enables computational tools to answer clinical questions.

Working with world-leading International Centres, imaging and medical device companies, the centre will develop novel mathematical and statistical methodologies, supported by clinical datasets, to create fast and accurate tools for integrating computation into PCI planning within the clinic.

Description:
CTL was established in 2005 to provide accredited calibration services for laboratory dispensing equipment, starting initially with auto-pipettes. We received INAB (Irish National Accreditation Board) accreditation for calibration laboratories to ISO 17025:2005, Reg No. 186C in October 2007.

One year later in October 2008, Eppendorf UK Ltd appointed us an authorized service centre for warranty repairs and calibration services on all Eppendorf dispensing equipment in Ireland and additionally IQ/OQ on new equipment if required. Consequently, our Calibration Scientists have completed the formal Eppendorf liquid handling course at Eppendorf AG, Hamburg, Germany covering Manual and Electronic pipettes, Dispensers, Burettes and pipette controllers

On 1st November 2016, Eppendorf AG acquired CTL which will continue to be managed as  wholly owned subsidiary of Eppendorf AG by its current Managing Director, Brian Kelly. This acquisition not only means we can further strengthen our existing quality reputation in the market place, but through our combined synergies, also enables Eppendorf to expand its service presence in Ireland, especially for customers in regulated areas.

Name: Kalb Analytik GmbH
Description:
1994 gründeten Dr. Edwin Kalb und Horst Böhler das Unternehmen Böhler Analytik als Erweiterung des Portfolios von Böhler+Sohn. Das Prüflabor entwickelte sich sehr schnell, 1997 konnte das 300 m2 große Labor mit vier Mitarbeitern bezogen werden. Schon zwei Jahre später erhielt Böhler Analytik die Erstakkreditierung zum Prüflabor im Bereich Abwasser und Abfälle. In den darauffolgenden Jahren folgten die Erweiterungen der Akkreditierung zur Prüfstelle in den Bereichen Mikrobiologie von Trink- und Brauchwasser und Lebensmittel und für Abluftmessungen sowie die Akkreditierung zur Inspektionsstelle für Trinkwasser und Bäder, zur ÖNORM-Registrierung von Reinigern gemäß ÖNORM B 5104-5106 und für Abfalluntersuchungen gemäß Deponieverordnung. Dadurch wurde der Leistungsumfang des Unternehmens, neben der Analyse von Proben im Labor um die Möglichkeit erweitert, die Erfüllung von gesetzlichen Anforderungen von Betrieben, im Konkreten deren Produkte und/oder Anlagen, zu bewerten.

Bereits 2009 wurde die Fläche des international tätigen Unternehmens auf 900 m2 verdreifacht und damit zusätzliche Arbeitsplätze geschaffen. Im Jahr 2015 wurde ein automatisches Hochregallager für Rückstellproben mit 2000 Palettenplätzen in Betrieb genommen und die Laborfläche auf 1200 m2 erweitert. Ende 2016 wurden 30 Mitarbeiter beschäftigt.

Um die Unabhängigkeit und Unparteilichkeit des Unternehmens in einem stark regulierten sensiblen Bereich auch nach außen unzweifelhaft darzustellen, wurden die Besitzverhältnisse Ende 2016 neu geregelt. Seit 31. März 2017 firmiert die Prüf- und Inspektionsstelle als Kalb Analytik AG.

Name: Monarch Informatics
Description:
Monarch Informatics is a startup dedicated to helping hospital laboratories better utilize their data. Our product, LOLA, eliminates the need for lab technicians to manually analyze data for reporting and decision-making. LOLA presents lab test KPIs like Turnaround Time, Contamination Rate and Positivity Rate in real-time, giving lab managers the necessary visibility to improve their lab’s operations. LOLA was developed in 2021 and is used daily at Kingston General Hospital to eliminate 60+ overtime hours every month. It also helps Lab Directors identify and plan for infectious disease outbreaks, keeping our community safe.

Monarch is currently developing LOLA v2, which will have more advanced capabilities like predictive analytics, automated alerting for problematic metrics, and solution recommendations.

Monarch Informatics is informed by its co-founder, Dr. Prameet Sheth, Director of Microbiology at KGH, as well as numerous other hospital lab workers, ensuring that LOLA meets the needs of laboratories across the continent. We are committed to improving the lives of all, from the patient awaiting their test results to the lab director handling influenza outbreaks, Monarch is here for you.

Com um compromisso inabalável com a qualidade e precisão, a Clínica Sodic é reconhecida como uma parceira confiável por profissionais de odontologia em todo o país.

Nossa clínica é especializada em fornecer uma ampla gama de serviços de diagnóstico por imagem, dedicados exclusivamente à saúde bucal e craniofacial. 

No centro de nossa missão está o suporte incomparável ao diagnóstico odontológico. Nossos radiologistas e especialistas altamente qualificados oferecem interpretações profissionais e análises detalhadas, capacitando os dentistas a tomarem decisões informadas e a desenvolverem planos de tratamento eficazes para seus pacientes.

Na Clínica Sodic, a qualidade é uma prioridade em cada etapa do processo. Desde o momento em que nossos pacientes entram em nossas instalações modernas e acolhedoras até o momento em que recebem seus resultados, eles são tratados com cuidado, respeito e profissionalismo.

Junte-se à comunidade de profissionais de odontologia que confiam na Clínica Sodic para fornecer o mais alto padrão em diagnóstico por imagem. Descubra como nossa experiência de mais de duas décadas e nosso compromisso com a excelência podem elevar a qualidade do atendimento odontológico que você oferece aos seus pacientes.

• Physical and performance characteristics according to
DIN EN ISO 8637-1 (sieving coefficient, clearance, ultrafiltration rate, pressure drop, integrity tests, endotoxin transfer)

Name: DENTEO CAD CAM
Description:
DENTEO CAD CAM es un laboratorio dental especializado en el diseño, fabricación y venta de piezas protésicas dentales compatibles con los principales sistemas de implantes disponibles en el mercado. Damos servicio a clínicas y a laboratorios, desde la preparación del caso hasta la producción.
El laboratorio cuenta con un equipo joven, pero con amplia experiencia en su campo, orientados al servicio y la excelencia, que combinan sus conocimientos técnicos con la mejor tecnología del Software Nemotec, para el diagnóstico y la planificación digital y los mejores software del mercado en el campo del diseño y la fabricación. 
Este saber hacer humano se complementa con maquinaria de última generación y los materiales de la mejor calidad del mercado; todo esto sumado a unos procesos de planificación, diseño y fabricación controlados, nos permiten entregar rehabilitaciones personalizadas que tienen en cuenta los aspectos tanto estéticos como funcionales de los pacientes. 

Gracias a nuestra larga trayectoria, los productos que desarrollamos, fabricamos y distribuimos, se adaptan a las exigencias de los pacientes y a la expectativa de odontólogos y cirujanos, en términos de diseño, calidad y precio.

Nuestra visión:
En DENTEO CAD CAM, nos aseguramos de buscar continuamente los medios humanos y técnicos que nos permitan proporcionar las soluciones más inteligentes y sencillas.
Estamos convencidos de que es posible ofrecer productos a menor coste, sin que ello afecte a su calidad. Creamos soluciones para aumentar la satisfacción de profesionales y pacientes, a la vez que reducimos los costes gracias a la aplicación de las nuevas tecnologías.

Nuestra misión y compromiso:
Nuestra misión consiste en crear y mejorar la calidad de nuestros productos y las condiciones que favorezcan las sinergias de forma permanente.
Nuestros resultados son fruto de un trabajo en equipo con nuestros clientes y proveedores.

Name: California Association of Toxicologists - CAT
Description:
The California Association of Toxicologists, founded in 1967, is a professional and educational association of forensic and clinical toxicologists throughout North America and the world. Its objectives, as set forth in the By-Laws, are:

To promote the mutual exchange of information within the field of toxicology and the discussion of professional problems of common interest.
To improve the practice, elevate the standards, and advance the cause of toxicology.

The Philippine Medical Tests System (PMTS) was established in 1981 and is one of the pioneer clinics in the Philippines to conduct medical examinations of Overseas Filipino Workers (OFW’S) bound to almost all countries in the world.

Name: Ripoll y DePrado
Description:
Ripoll y De Prado Medical Group, an entity specialized in traumatology and orthopedic surgery, is an international leader in sports medicine. It is made up of six medical companies that stand out for integrating the most advanced technology without leaving aside the classic concepts that have survived the passage of time in orthopedic surgery and traumatology and that constitute the main foundation of the medical criteria.

Name: Lab de Sonrisas
Description:
Lab de Sonrisas es una empresa fundada en 2021, especializada en el diseño y fabricación de alineadores invisibles, comprometida con transformar sonrisas de manera efectiva y estética. Nuestra misión es ofrecer soluciones innovadoras y personalizadas para mejorar la salud oral  y la apariencia de nuestros pacientes. Lab de Sonrisas se distingue por su enfoque en la calidad, precisión y comodidad de sus productos, utilizando tecnología de vanguardia para crear alineadores que se adapten perfectamente a las necesidades individuales de cada paciente.
Desde nuestros inicios, hemos crecido y evolucionado, siempre manteniendo nuestro compromiso con la excelencia y la satisfacción del cliente. Además de los alineadores invisibles, ofrecemos una gama de servicios complementarios al rededor de la odontología digital:
Lab Aligners: Nuestro servicio principal de alineadores invisibles, diseñados para tratar una amplia gama de maloclusiones con precisión y comodidad.
Lab Scan: Escaneos dentales a domicilio o en nuestra sede para mayor comodidad y precisión.
Lab Kids: Tratamientos de alineadores especializados para niños, adaptados a sus necesidades específicas.
Lab Connect: Plataforma para una comunicación eficiente y directa entre los ortodoncistas y el laboratorio, facilitando el seguimiento y ajuste de los tratamientos.
Lab Learning: Programas educativos virtuales destinados a capacitar a profesionales en el uso de alineadores invisibles y las últimas técnicas en ortodoncia.
Lab I+D: Investigación y desarrollo continuo para mejorar nuestros productos y técnicas, asegurando que estamos a la vanguardia de la innovación en ortodoncia.
Contamos con un equipo de expertos dedicados y un enfoque centrado en el cliente, esforzándonos por brindar resultados excepcionales y una experiencia de tratamiento superior. 

En Lab de Sonrisas, creamos sinergia entre la clínica y la ingeniería para construir el futuro de la odontología.

Name: Mikroskopia UP Poznań

Dysponujemy mikroskopami najwyższej klasy, które zapewniają dokładne i rzetelne wyniki badań.
 
# Mikroskop elektronowy skaningowy (SEM) Zeiss Evo 10 z możliwością obrazowania preparatów na siatkach (STEM) oraz analizą pierwiastkową (EDX)

# Mikroskop konfokalny Zeiss LSM 880 z Airyscan

Analizy / badania wykonuje specjalista z prawie 20 letnim doświadczeniem w mikroskopii. Wszelkie informacje oraz konsultacje z zakresu przygotowania próbek, sposobu obserwacji, dostępnych terminów analiz oraz cennika można uzyskać pod numerem 513 704 861 lub adresem email: marcin.kujawa@up.poznan.pl

Szczegółowa specyfikacja:

Skaningowy mikroskop elektronowy (SEM) Zeiss EVO 10.

- obrazowanie powierzchni preparatu w wysokiej próżni (HV) z wykorzystaniem detektora SE oraz BSE (obrazowanie różnic w składzie pierwiastkowym powierzchni) z rozdzielczością do 3 nm*
- obrazowanie powierzchni preparatu w zmiennej próżni (VP) z wykorzystaniem detektora VPSE z rozdzielczością do 20 nm*. Tryb pracy przeznaczony dla miękkich i delikatnych preparatów, które nie mogą być poddane standardowej procedurze przygotowania oraz obserwacji w warunkach wysokiej próżni
- obrazowanie cienkich, półcienkich i ultracienkich skrawków oraz sypkich preparatów zdyspergowanych na siatce do mikroskopii transmisyjnej z wykorzystaniem detektora elektronów przechodzących w trybie STEM z rozdzielczością do 3 nm*
- analiza składu pierwiastkowego (EDX), analiza liniowa, mapowanie
- przygotowanie próbek - suszenie w punkcie krytycznym (CPD), nałożenie na stoliki SEM, dyspersja na siatce TEM, napylanie złotem.

* wartość zależna od warunków pracy mikroskopu oraz rodzaju preparatu

Mikroskop konfokalny Zeiss LSM 880 z Airyscan

- powiększenie od 50x do 630x plus zoom cyfrowy
- rozdzielczość do 200 nm w osi X, do 500 nm w osi Z; 
- rozdzielczość Airyscan 140 nm w osi X, 400 nm w osi Z

At BioLAB, we go beyond the traditional lab experience by offering:

24/7 customer support

Home sample collection via our mobile app

Customized test panels for healthcare professionals

Our mission is to empower physicians, clinics, and patients with the tools and insights needed to make informed healthcare decisions. Whether supporting fertility specialists, dermatologists, fitness centers, or oncologists, BioLAB is the trusted partner in delivering next-generation diagnostics.

We are proud to support the region’s growing focus on medical tourism, positioning Bahrain as a destination for advanced, reliable, and patient-centered laboratory services.

Name: OnDemand Mobile Lab
Description:

Name: JST 3D
Description:
JST 3D S.r.l. è una startup innovativa italiana con sede a Varese, attiva nel campo della tecnologia medica avanzata. Sviluppiamo soluzioni basate su intelligenza artificiale e digital twin per ottimizzare l’analisi delle immagini TC e migliorare l’efficienza nei processi diagnostici e chirurgici.

 La nostra missione è duplice:

 Supportare il chirurgo nella pianificazione preoperatoria tramite modelli 3D interattivi;

 Affiancare il radiologo con strumenti di refertazione automatica, capaci di riconoscere strutture e patologie con grande precisione.

 Il nostro prodotto principale è BrugOne AI, una piattaforma che trasforma automaticamente le immagini TC in modelli 3D dettagliati in meno di due minuti, superando i limiti dei software tradizionali grazie a reti neurali convoluzionali che analizzano ogni voxel.

 Nel 2025 abbiamo lanciato PonD3, la nostra spin-off operativa: un servizio “lite” basato su BrugOne, che consente a clinici, università e centri di simulazione di ottenere modelli 3D anatomici da TC in sole 48 ore. PonD3 è già disponibile online ed è pensato per la formazione medica, la simulazione chirurgica e la pianificazione preoperatoria di base.

 Con JST e PonD3, vogliamo rendere l’anatomia digitale e l’intelligenza artificiale accessibili, rapide e affidabili per ogni medico, ospedale e centro di ricerca.

 Scopri di più:
www.jstmedics.com
www.ponde.in

Name: BioTouch Cardio
Description:
BioTouch Cardio is proud to offer the Multifunction Cardiogram.

The Multifunction Cardiogram device (MCG) is a 510k-cleared, 10-min resting test; supporting more accurate detection of Ischemia in the Microvasculature…by analyzing the entire Myocardium as a system.

The results from the MCG device are as accurate as Coronary Angiography; and can be reasonably said to provide more complete and accurate diagnostic information than its more conventional counterparts such as: the conventional EKG, nuclear, echo, and pharmacological stress tests.

The MCG device is also sensitive to heart disease from to Type-2 Diabetes.

The MCG system can potentially offer a medical practice new testing capacity and offerings.

The MCG device has received:
	The American Heart Association Innovation Challenge Award (2017). 
	Featured status by the American College of Emergency Physicians (ACEP) Research Forum in the Annals of Emergency Medicine clinical study, (2020).
	Chapter discussion in “Integrative Cardiovascular Medicine,” a medical school textbook by Dr. Mark Houston, published by Wolters Kluwer.

DEVICE DETAILS: 
The MCG device compares and determines a patient’s trace results using patented A.I. algorithms against an empirically derived clinical database of 200,000 clinical double-blind validation trials. 

The A.I. is based on La Grange-Eüler algorithms and Fast-Fourier-Transformation. 

Reports include QRS complex with embedded data with 166 Indices. 

It’s manufactured on a Panasonic Toughbook, with a proprietary operating system, specialized chassis, and operates on both Wi-Fi and Ethernet. 

The MCG trace data is HIPAA-compliant. 

All MCG technology is offered by Emergency MCG USA.

BioTouch Cardio is a MyHeart Field Test Organization.

Name: OncoFirm Diagnostics
Description:
At OncoFirm Diagnostics, It’s Personal.

Cancer isn’t just a medical challenge, it’s deeply personal. Every member of our team has been touched by it: a parent, a sibling, a best friend, a child. We’ve sat in waiting rooms, felt the heartbreak of uncertainty, and held on to hope for more time.

That shared experience unites us and fuels our purpose. We are not only scientists, engineers, and professionals, we are daughters, sons, friends, and survivors. Having stood on both sides of a diagnosis, we made a promise: to create solutions that truly matter.

Our mission is simple yet profound: to empower healthcare professionals, patients, and pet owners with the ability to detect cancer early enough to fight back. Early detection isn’t just science, it’s hope, it’s time, it’s a second chance.
At OncoFirm, our diagnosis are more than tests. They are lifelines. Built with empathy and precision, they carry the weight of what’s at stake: graduation, an anniversary, another tomorrow.

We are accelerating the fight against cancer in two critical arenas:

Human Healthcare: Delivering fast, accurate, and accessible rapid diagnostics that bring lab-grade results to the point of care, reducing delays and improving survival outcomes.

Companion Animal Care: Pioneering a new standard in veterinary medicine with affordable, point-of-care cancer screening—empowering veterinarians and protecting the pets that families cherish.

This is not just our work, it is our stand, our promise, our movement. By transforming pain into purpose and science into solutions, we are building a world where early detection is the rule, not the exception.

OncoFirm Diagnostics exists to save lives—human and animal—by making early cancer detection fast, accessible, and universal.

Fachwissen, eigenes Labor und schnelle Veterinärdiagnostik

INVAC identifiziert relevante Erreger aus Proben erkrankter Tiere durch spezielle Anzucht- und Anreicherungsverfahren sowie MALDI-TOF, Serologie und molekularbiologische Methoden. Mit einem wissenschaftlich ausgebildeten Team und strengen Qualitätsstandards nach GMP-Richtlinien arbeitet INVAC verantwortungsvoll und präzise.

Bestandsspezifische Impfstoffe für optimale Tiergesundheit

INVAC produziert bestandsspezifische Impfstoffe, die exakt auf die Bedürfnisse Ihres Tierbestands zugeschnitten sind. INVAC identifiziert relevante Erreger, um maßgeschneiderte Impfstoffe zu entwickeln. Mit innovativen Herstellungsverfahren und speziellen Adjuvantien gewährleistet INVAC maximale Wirksamkeit und Sicherheit.

Beratung und Monitoring - Prophylaxe bleibt das Ziel

INVAC bietet umfassende Beratung und Monitoring-Services an, um eine nachhaltige Prophylaxestrategie zu entwickeln. INVAC unterstützt bei weiterführender Diagnostik, Hygienemonitoring und Futtermittelanalysen. INVAC hilft dabei, Erreger zielgerichtet zu bekämpfen und bietet regelmäßige Screenings für Nutztiere an.

Name: GraBis Inc. (formerly KingoBio)
Description:
GraBis는 자성을 띤 나노소재를 기반으로 생명과학 및 진단 분야에 특화된 고성능 마그네틱 비드를 개발하는 바이오 스타트업입니다.

우리는 “작은 입자가 만드는 큰 변화”를 모토로, DNA 정제, NGS 샘플 전처리, 액체생검 기반 바이오마커 분리 등 다양한 응용 분야에서 높은 효율과 정밀도를 갖춘 시약 솔루션을 제공합니다.

GraBis의 핵심 기술은 단핵(single-core) 구조의 자성 나노입자입니다. 일반적인 다핵(Multi-core) 비드보다 훨씬 더 높은 자성 회수력과 균일한 입자 분포 특성을 지니고 있어, 세척 시간이 짧고 오염 가능성이 낮으며, 결과 재현성을 크게 향상시킵니다.

현재 출시된 첫 번째 제품 GraBeads-NCB는 NGS 클린업(정제) 용도로 사용되며, 국내외 전체 분석 기업 및 병원 연구소에서의 초기 테스트에서 상용 제품 대비 20~30% 향상된 효율을 보였습니다.
우리는 이 기술을 기반으로 항체 고정화, 세포 분리, 바이러스 검출 등 고부가가치 진단 영역까지 기술을 확장해 나가고 있으며, 향후 조기 암 진단과 감염병 모니터링을 위한 맞춤형 플랫폼 구축을 목표로 하고 있습니다.

GraBis는 실험실의 작은 고민에서부터 글로벌 헬스케어의 큰 문제 해결까지, 연구자와 환자 모두를 위한 기술을 만들어 나가고자 합니다.
당사의 혁신적인 자성입자 기술은 생명과학 연구의 효율을 높이는 동시에, 미래 진단 시장의 패러다임을 바꿀 준비가 되어 있습니다.
------
GraBis is a biotechnology startup specializing in advanced magnetic nanoparticles for life sciences and molecular diagnostics.
Guided by the belief that “small particles can spark big breakthroughs,” we develop high-performance magnetic bead solutions for DNA purification, NGS sample preparation, and biomarker separation in liquid biopsy applications.

Our core technology is based on proprietary single-core magnetic nanobeads. Compared to conventional multi-core beads, our particles offer significantly stronger magnetism, superior dispersion, and faster wash kinetics resulting in cleaner results, shorter protocols, and improved reproducibility.

Our first product, GraBeads-NCB, is designed for NGS cleanup workflows. In early benchmarking studies with genome sequencing companies and hospital labs, GraBeads-NCB demonstrated 20–30% higher performance compared to leading commercial products.
Building on this foundation, we are expanding into antibody immobilization, cell separation, and pathogen detection ultimately aiming to deliver next-generation platforms for early cancer diagnosis and infectious disease monitoring.

Name: cranium - Privatinstitut für Diagnostik GbR
Description:
Seit über 20 Jahren bieten wir als praxisunabhängiges Privatinstitut cranium dreidimensionale Kiefer- und Schädelaufnahmen auf detailgenauer und überlagerungsfreier Röntgenbasis für die Zahnmedizin und HNO-Heilkunde an. Diese Aufnahmen, auch DVT (digitale Volumentomographie) genannt, helfen dem überweisenden Zahnarzt/Arzt und natürlich auch dem Patienten die höchste Sicherheit in der Befundung und Therapie von Erkrankungen im Kiefer- und Kopfbereich zu erlangen.

Mit unserer Erfahrung und Kompetenz erhalten Sie durch speziell ausgebildete Zahnärzte und einen HNO-Arzt eine professionelle Auswertung und Befundung der Aufnahmen.

Darüber hinaus bieten wir Ihnen in regelmäßigen Abständen Strahlenschutzkurse zur Erlangung der Fachkunde an, welche die fachliche sowie rechtliche Grundlage zur Arbeit mit 3D-Röntgenbildern und zum Betrieb eines eigenen digitalen Volumentomographen darstellt. 
Die DVT Kurse sind von der Zahnärztkammer Nordrhein zugelassen und behinhalten auch die Aktualisierung der Fachkunde im Strahlenschutz gemäß §18a Abs. 2 RöV!

Für weitere Details informieren Sie sich bitte auf unserer Internetseite.

Name: NanoPin Technologies, Inc.
Description:
Our mission is to advance infectious disease diagnosis and improve patient care using novel diagnostic platforms that produces rapid and accurate results from patient samples. Our versatile platforms address critical needs for current infectious disease epidemics such as tuberculosis, HIV, and non-tuberculosis mycobacteria (NTM). 

NanoPin is currently offering diagnostic services for active Tuberculosis in our CLIA facility.  Our NanoDetect-TB assay is direct-in-blood and enables early and accurate detection of active TB in any body - infant, young children, or adult, previously BCG vaccinated, and HIV co-infected.  The assay is uniquely capable in extrapulmonary TB.

We provide digital solutions for diagnosis, prognosis, and treatment of brain disorders.

Our first target is to conquer Alzheimer's disease. The disease is a neurological disease that affects tens of millions of people around the world, and it is a very painful disease not only for the patient but also for the patient's family. As we become an aging society, the number of dementia patients and management costs are increasing significantly, and the dementia treatment market is expected to grow rapidly.

Bredis Healthcare provides a variety of solutions for early diagnosis and prognosis monitoring of dementia based on ultra-sensitive detection of biomarkers in bodily fluid. We also offer various digital solutions for personalized cognitive training to prevent and treat the disease.

Name: Medical Genetics Laboratory of Dr. Zeinali
Description:
Medical Genetics Laboratory of Dr. Zeinali, established in 2000 by Professor Sirous Zeinali, was founded with the mission of enhancing family health in Iran and promoting the culture of genetic disease prevention.
With over two decades of proven expertise, our laboratory is recognized as one of the largest and most advanced centers for medical genetics diagnostics in the country.
Backed by a highly skilled team of more than 50 specialists, we offer a comprehensive range of genetic testing services, including Next-Generation Sequencing (NGS), MLPA, QF-PCR, STR and fragment analysis, real-time PCR, and karyotyping. Our core areas of focus include prenatal (PND) and preimplantation (PGD) genetic diagnosis, carrier detection, molecular oncology, and forensic DNA identification.
Accredited by GEDNAP (Germany) for forensic genetics and having successfully analyzed over 65,000 genetic cases, we are committed to delivering results with precision, speed, and reliability — empowering physicians, supporting families, and contributing to national healthcare with trusted genetic insights.

Name: LabWorks Diagnostics
Description:
LabWorks Diagnostics began with a simple but persistent observation—both as a clinician and as a family member of patients: diagnostic labs often fall short. Reports are delayed or unreliable, communication is unclear, and in many places, quality takes a backseat to volume.

As a doctor trained at AIIMS New Delhi and an MBA from IIM Bangalore, I’ve worked across hospital systems, taught medicine, and seen first-hand how a single lab report—when accurate, timely, and clinically sound—can change the course of treatment.

LabWorks is my commitment to bringing that level of rigour, ethics, and clinical thinking into diagnostics—especially where it’s most needed.

We’re starting focused, with clinical chemistry and hematology, and building deliberately—with:
 Thoughtful use of technology
 Strong internal quality controls
 And a no-compromise attitude on clinical standards

We don’t upsell unnecessary panels.
We don’t cut corners.
We simply do the basics—right, every single time.

If you’re a clinician who needs reports you can rely on, or a patient who wants clarity without confusion—LabWorks is built for you.

 Based in Jaipur, Rajasthan | Scaling responsibly, with purpose

Name: American Integrative Meds
Description:
Our Mission
Through evidence-based and patient-centric care we instill hope that long-term recovery is possible. Our purpose and passion is to empower the individual, his/her family, and the community to find new, safe and effective treatment options utilizing adult stem cell therapy. Our goal is to one day find a cure to diseases such as Multiple Sclerosis, Parkinson’s, Rheumatoid Arthritis, Alzheimer’s, Osteoarthritis, Ulcerative colitis, Diabetes, COPD and more. We pride ourselves on providing truth to patients inquiring about receiving adult stem cell therapy through us — a therapy that may help completely change their lives today.

We Are Evidence-Based
Board Certified Surgeons employ the most recent research and advanced surgical tools to harvest the highest number of stem cells using minimally invasive techniques. Certified laboratory technicians apply the latest promising research for processing and activating each patient’s stem cells, while also minimizing cell death to enhance treatment effectiveness. Our PhD Neuroscientist designs each laboratory protocol to boost efficacy and ensure safety. Board Certified Physicians then administer the stem cells, guided by the latest studies that demonstrate increased efficacy by targeting specific areas of need in the body. We continually update our protocols by consulting a broad spectrum of clinical experts, ensuring our methods remain cutting-edge and current.

Over the years Noble has also successfully diversified into the field of laboratory medicine by adopting latest techniques, inducting highly skilled professionals and introducing latest state of the art analysers from USA, Germany, Sweden, France and Japan.

We strive to continuously upgrade our knowledge and technology keeping the pace with latest developments in the field of medical science.

We have been awarded prestigious NABL Accreditation, the highest level of accreditation for clinical laboratories in India, for compliance to ISO 15189:2012 by National Accreditation Board for Testing and Calibration laboratories.

Dr. Renuka Wadhwa is accredited by The Fetal Medicine Foundation for Nuchal Translucency and Nasal Bone Scans (less than 50 in India)

Noble Diagnostic Centre is also the only NABL accredited independent lab in Delhi providing 24 hours sample collection along with night reporting of urgent tests.

Cégünk laborinformatikai rendszerekkel, azok menedzselésével és teljes körű illesztésével foglalkozik. Kiemelt szerepet játszik cégünk profiljában a belga Clinisys cég Glims komplex laborinformatikai rendszer, mellyel kapcsolatosan kollégáink évtizedes tapasztalattal rendelkeznek.

English:
Our company deals with laboratory IT systems, their management and full integration. The Glims complex laboratory informatics system, from the Belgian company Clinisys, plays a prominent role in our company's profile, and our colleagues have decades of experience with this system.

Our partners are located all over Europe and we have working relationships in Hungary, Slovakia, Finland and Belgium. 
Our references include the management, extension, development and support of a national laboratory network for Synlab Hungary and the implementation and full integration of the Glims system for several laboratories.

We offer new hope to those suffering from incontinence.

Incontinence isn't talked about, and some people never even consult their doctor. Yet the burden is huge - it is thought to affect around 16% of the population. Symptoms can be debilitating, the condition carries significant stigma and it causes a whole raft of physical and mental health problems.

Finding the root causes can be difficult. We are innovating with new biomarkers to aid in diagnosis, and are building tools to educate and help manage the condition. Name: Laboratório Patologistas Reunidos
Description:
O Laboratório Patologistas Reunidos iniciou suas atividades em outubro de 1969, tendo como sócios fundadores, o Dr. Luiz Alberto Fagundes e o Dr. Dejalma Corrêa Johann. Sempre teve como objetivo, além de oferecer um serviço qualificado, inovar. Por isso, foi o pioneiro na implantação da área de imuno-histoquímica (1987), exame fundamental no diagnóstico de tumores indiferenciados e na avaliação prognóstica de algumas neoplasias, principalmente o câncer de mama.

Hoje este setor, conta com um volume significativo de exames imuno-histoquímicos e com acervo de anticorpos, necessário para montar os paineis diagnósticos e de pesquisa. Mantemos avaliação constante de novos produtos através de revisão da literatura de forma a termos sempre anticorpos novos aprovados em artigos científicos de ponta.

O laboratório também participa de protocolos internacionais na utilização de marcadores para uso terapia alvo e avaliação posterior dos resultados terapêutico.

Também damos suporte técnico para trabalhos científicos e teses de mestrado doutorado que necessitam painel imuno-histoquímicos.

Continuamos trabalhando sempre no sentido de manter o alto nível dos nossos serviços, e a agilidade na liberação de resultados.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande Do Sul

Name: ICSH · INTERNATIONAL COUNCIL for STANDARDIZATION in HAEMATOLOGY
Description:
ICSH - The International Council for Standardization in Haematology was initiated as a standardization committee by the European Society of Haematology (ESH) in 1963 and officially constituted by the International Society of Hematology (ISH) and the ESH in Stockholm in 1964.

The ICSH is a not-for-profit organisation Non-Governmental Organisation that aims to achieve reliable and reproducible results in laboratory analysis in the field of diagnostic haematology. UK Registered Company Number: 10940331. UK Registered Charity Number: 1178359. Registered address: 2-4 Packhorse Road, Gerrards Cross, Buckinghamshire, United Kingdom  SL9 7QE

The ICSH coordinates Working Groups of experts to examine laboratory methods and instruments for haematological analyses, to deliberate on issues of standardization and to stimulate and coordinate scientific work as necessary towards the development of international standardization materials and guidelines.

Name: SQK | Quantum-enhanced computing for next-generation medical imaging and diagnostics.
Description:
At SQK Inc., we are pioneering the convergence of quantum computing, photonics, and AI to address one of healthcare’s most urgent challenges: achieving real-time, high-resolution medical imaging for early disease detection and precision-guided treatment.

Our flagship platform, QMEDIC (Quantum-enhanced Medical Imaging & Diagnostics Computing), is designed to overcome the computational bottlenecks that limit today’s imaging systems. Conventional ultrasound and photoacoustic imaging face tradeoffs between speed, resolution, and scalability. QMEDIC introduces a quantum-hybrid reconstruction engine powered by:

  - Quantum Acceleration: Leveraging hybrid quantum-classical algorithms for image reconstruction and signal optimization.

  - Photonics Integration: Harnessing ultrafast photonic pre-processing and noise-resilient signal normalization.

  - AI-Driven Reconstruction: Applying advanced machine learning models for artifact reduction, super-resolution, and real-time analytics.

  - Zero I/O Memory Pooling: CXL-based in-memory computing for latency-aware, high-throughput processing pipelines.

With this architecture, QMEDIC enables non-invasive, radiation-free imaging modalities like photoacoustic and ultrasound to achieve diagnostic clarity previously only possible with CT or MRI, but with greater safety, lower cost, and real-time operation.

Our initial focus is on oncology and pediatric applications, where safe and accurate imaging is critical for early detection and treatment guidance. Beyond healthcare, QMEDIC’s scalable architecture extends to defense, life sciences, and industrial sensing, where ultrafast hybrid computing is essential.

SQK is headquartered in North America with global R&D collaborations across USA, Canada, Korea, and Europe. We are engaging with hospitals, OEMs, and research institutions to validate QMEDIC in clinical and preclinical environments.

Name: Taumedis
Description:
Founded officially in 2023 by a dedicated group of Canadian scientists and engineers with a profound passion for medical imaging, τauMEDIS derives its name from "tau Medical Imaging Solutions," where the Greek letter tau (τ) holds significance in both magnetic resonance imaging and various neurodegenerative diseases. Boasting over a century of collective experience in the medical imaging domain, the τauMEDIS team is committed to delivering top-tier medical imaging solutions to healthcare institutions and research centers worldwide.

Winnipeg, the capital city of Manitoba in Canada, is strategically located approximately one hour north of the Canada/U.S.A. border and serves as the geographical center of North America. Winnipeg has a rich heritage in medical imaging research and development, dating back to the establishment of the National Research Council Institute for Biodiagnostics (NRC-IBD) in 1992. The NRC-IBD's primary mission was to explore and advance non-invasive medical diagnostic technology, aiming to enhance disease prevention, early detection, and treatment outcomes. Its key areas of focus included magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), magnetic resonance spectroscopy (MRS), and infrared spectroscopy (IRS), leading to numerous pioneering technological breakthroughs in their respective fields.

Name: Theío Vitality
Description:
THE ULTIMATE HAIRCARE SOLUTION

Using only a single strand of hair, Theío Vitality’s innovative method of hair mineral analysis creates a blueprint of the human body’s elemental composition, unveiling any anomalies and excesses that may be negatively impacting hair health. 

Moreover, it quantifies hair quality and its potential to be improved. The results give individuals the control to make informed choices about their follicular health and to measure and evaluate any changes over time.
Experts in cutting-edge laser technology, the Theío Vitality team operates the only laboratory in the world that is able to analyse hair BELOW the scalp where it is not impacted by environmental contaminants. 

Theío Vitality's service is two-fold. First, it will address concerns regarding elemental balance and a potential need to change diet, certain lifestyle choices and/or nutritional supplement regimes that may be impacting the hair quality, such as zinc and selenium. Second, it will focus specifically on the hair itself by providing physiological information about the hair and quantifying its potential to be improved. 

Theío Vitality, the HAIR SCIENCE Division of TrichAnalytics Laboratory, was founded by Dr. Jennie Christensen in 2016 and is located in Victoria, British Columbia, Canada. Jennie has been a toxicologist, researcher, and consultant in the environmental services sector for over 20 years. Her laboratory utilizes a specially designed laser ablation inductively coupled plasma mass spectrometer (LA-ICP-MS), positioning her and her team as the leading experts in analysing hair chemistry and identifying elemental concentrations in the body that may influence hair health.

At Theío Vitality, we are committed to the highest quality laboratory analysis and bespoke client service. Our Quality Management System (QMS) follows international standards and is accredited with ISO/IEC 17025 through the Canadian Association for Laboratory Accreditation (CALA) for Scope of Testing.

Name: Asia Pathogenomics (APG)
Description:
Asia Pathogenomics (APG) is a Taiwanese-based company that provides metagenomic sequencing diagnostic services for infectious pathogens. We are one of the pioneers in precision medicine, utilizing metagenomic next-generation sequencing techniques and bioinformatic analysis to assist clinicians in detecting pathogens in infected patients. APG actively cooperates with several medical centers, hospitals, and universities to build a Taiwanese localized pathogen database and continues putting effort into bioinformatic analysis research and development. We are providing top-grade quality clinical sequencing services for infectious diseases.
APGseq, our sequencing service is designed to provide clinicians with efficient testing services so that patients with acute disease progression, severe life-threatening conditions, and difficult-to-diagnose patients will not miss the golden treatment time and get the most precise diagnosis and treatment as soon as possible.
APGseq can sequence various types of specimens, ranging from plasma, and bronchoalveolar lavage fluid to tissue of infectious patients. Analyzing more than 27,000 pathogens (including bacteria, fungi, viruses, and parasites) under one test, and the test report will be provided within 24~48 hours. APGseq delivers a comprehensive, precise, and fast diagnosis for clinicians. Aim to improve the quality of medical care for infected patients in Asia.
In addition, We are the only Element Biosciences agent in Taiwan!

Name: AIOLsci
Description:
AIOLsci, founded by Prof. Damien Gatinel and Dr. Benjamin Stern, is transforming cataract surgery decision-making by equipping surgeons with the most advanced tools for intraocular lens (IOL) selection. Our web-based platform provides high-resolution data across a wide range of IOLs, giving surgeons precise and accessible insights to tailor lens choices for every unique eye.

What truly sets AIOLsci apart is its breakthrough use of wavefront measurements, analyzing nearly 10 million data points per IOL to capture every design nuance with unmatched accuracy. As the first worldwide platform to deliver this level of detail to surgeons, AIOLsci establishes a new global gold standard for surgical planning.

By reducing risk, lowering uncertainty, and improving predictability, AIOLsci enables surgeons to achieve more consistent outcomes and greater confidence in their choices. Every successful postoperative result begins with a high-quality retinal image, which not only drives visual performance but also facilitates smoother neuro-adaptation. By ensuring the optical match between the cornea and the lens, AIOLsci provides the strongest possible foundation for long-term patient satisfaction.

With its unique combination of precision, depth of insight, and ease of use, AIOLsci empowers surgeons to deliver the best possible outcomes for their patients.

Name: Gravidas Diagnostics, Inc.
Description:
Gravidas is developing a rapid PoC test to identify pregnant women at risk of developing severe or life-threatening preeclampsia.  

Founded and managed by practicing clinical and scientific leaders in assay  development and pregnancy and preeclampsia, Gravidas is at an advanced stage of product development.

There is a significant unmet medical for a simple test for determining who is at risk for developing severe preeclampsia due to the current low-confidence diagnosis of pregnant women presenting with preeclamptic symptoms.  Without such a test, there may be mistimed or unnecessary medical intervention, leading to rapid progression to severe disease and pregnancy/delivery complications.

Preeclampsia is the leading cause of maternal and fetal mortality and morbidity worldwide, resulting in a large addressable market in the U.S. and around the world for such a test.

Name: DatChem Pty Ltd
Description:
DatChem has been established to commercialize DatChem-Breast and DatChem-Neuro.  DatChem is the first technology to apply advanced data analytic techniques to patented applications of magnetic resonance spectroscopy. Importantly DatChem data is obtained on an installed MR scanner base  and the data evaluated in the DatChem cloud. 
The first product to market is DatChem-Breast, which can quantify the risk of a woman developing breast cancer by applying its unique intelligence to predictive chemical signatures. It is integrated with the routine breast MRI. A twelve year blinded clinic trial of over 400 women has shown the technology correctly predicted 32 out of 32 women who would develop a breast cancer two to six years ahead of current methods. The clinic trial documentation was submitted to the United States Food and Drug Administration in April 2025 and is pending approval. If approved, this technology will allow women to make informed decisions as to their treatment.
The  next product to market will be DatChem-ADHD, which can provide the treating specialist with an objective diagnosis, identification of neurochemical pathways affected, and if and how the patient responds to therapy. A DatChem-ADHD test is provided at the same time as an MRI and will result in a neurochemical profile for each person. That profile will be compared to a clinical database of healthy brains and those with ADHD. The technology can be used to monitor response or lack thereof to therapy.
Pain, post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD), and blast exposure each have a unique neurochemical profile and can be objectively diagnosed. Again, response or lack of response to therapy can be monitored. For front line defenders, the technology can be applied to monitor resilience during training and in action. 
The technology for each of these applications has a granted patent or a PCT application pending. DatChem-Neuro is the only objective test available to date for each of these conditions.

Name: Unique Biosciences
Description:
Oral pathogens are widely recognized not only for their role in periodontal disease, gingivitis, and peri-implant complications but also for their links to systemic disease like Alzheimer’s disease, inflammatory bowel disease, cardiovascular disease, diabetes, respiratory infections, and oral cancer. This connection underscores the critical role of oral health in overall systemic well-being.

Unique Biosciences is an emerging start-up led by a passionate, dedicated team committed to tackling key challenges in the field of oral diagnostics. We specialize in research and development, delivering cutting-edge solutions such as ready-to-use qPCR master mixes for accurate oral pathogen detection and their quantification in saliva related to various diseases, along with innovative preservative solutions for biological sample storage. Our goal is to support research universities and clinical labs by offering ready-to-use multiplex master mixes targeting several key dental pathogens, helping them reduce funding requirements for developing new, high-complexity testing products. Additionally, we are also a high-complexity CLIA-certified laboratory specialized in saliva-based clinical sample testing. Looking forward, we also plan to develop dental prebiotics and probiotics as part of our long-term vision.

Le laboratoire consacre ses activités de biologie clinique pour les patients de la Clinique Saint-Jean et du centre Magnolia. 
CEBIODI effectue également les analyses médicales pour d’autres prescripteurs en accueillant les patients ambulatoires dans les centres prélèvement des cliniques ou dans des polycliniques extra-muros ou des cabinets de consultation privés.

CEBIODI est un laboratoire agréé par l’INAMI qui fonctionne 7 jours/7 et 24 heures/24 sur les deux sites hospitaliers l’un à Saint-Jean Botanique et l’autre à Saint-Jean Méridien. 

CEBIODI emploie actuellement 7 médecins biologistes et environ 65 employés dont 40 technologues de laboratoire. 
CEBIODI réalise annuellement plus de 3.300.000 analyses de biologie clinique humaine allant des tests de routine jusqu'aux tests spécialisés dans les domaines tels que la chimie, l'hormonologie, la toxicologie, le monitoring thérapeutique, la microbiologie, la sérologie infectieuse, l'hématologie, l'hémostase-coagulation, l'immuno-hématologie, sérologie non infectieuse et la spermiologie. 
CEBIODI est aussi reconnu comme structure intermédiaire pour la capacitation des gamètes mâles

CEBIODI est équipé d’automates et de moyens techniques lui permettant de réaliser en interne plus de 98% des analyses prescrites. Les analyses sous-traitées sont envoyées dans des laboratoires universitaires. L’ensemble du processus opérationnel est informatisé à l’aide d'un logiciel spécialisé de gestion de laboratoires (LIS). Les résultats des analyses sont adressés électroniquement ou sur support papier aux prescripteurs.

As more and more people outside the traditional clinical setting started to order lab tests, we knew there had to be a better way.

A CAP-accredited leader in molecular diagnostics, STONE was built from the ground up to meet your changing needs — whether you’re inside or outside the traditional clinical setting — with the latest technology, personalized service and in-network rates.

It’s our goal to create equitable access that connects information to everyone who needs it; from the provider to the patient to the pharmacy- transforming people’s ability to make informed decisions about a patient’s health. 

We are the go-to laboratory for comprehensive testing, offering everything from clinical bloodwork to pharmacogenomics (PGx) testing to infectious disease testing, toxicology, and advanced screenings. Whether it’s diagnostics, research endeavors, or patient care, our unwavering commitment to excellence remains steadfast. gnosis /no-sis/ n. from the Greek gnōsis meaning “knowledge,” “known,” or “to know.” Knowledge experienced.

NatMEG houses a state-of-the-art 306-channel MEG system with integrated 128-channel EEG.
