Name: TGV-Dx
Description:
TGV-Dx is developing and commercializing a new generation antimicrobial susceptibility test (AST), AtbFinder - a breakthrough diagnostic platform technology enabling physicians to select the most effective antibiotic regimens (even for hard-to-treat, recurrent infections) with unprecedented speed and accuracy, helping save lives and significantly lowering healthcare costs.

The AtbFinder is based on a proprietary methodology, and is a breakthrough since it is phenotypic (not genetic) but is culture-independent, delivering results from “raw” clinical samples just in 4 hours.
AtbFinder enables the selection of the most efficacious antibiotic therapy for drug-resistant bacterial infections with unprecedented speed and accuracy: (i) results in 4 hours, (ii) each sample is screened through the largest antibiotic menu of 188 drugs. 
 Unlike any competing AST, AtbFinder works with polymicrobial infections. It is an all-in-one prefabricated kit that does not need any special equipment and does not require a pathogen ID.
 AtbFinder is a platform technology  used for: 
 
•	Urinary Tract infections 
•	Reparatory tract infections 
•	Skin and soft tissue infections

O Aliança Diagnósticos é referência em qualidade, possuindo uma vasta gama de convênios credenciados, e oferece mais de 2 mil tipos de exames, desde os exames mais simples (de baixa complexidade) até os exames da mais alta complexidade como testes de DNA, genética e toxicologia, biópsias, dentre outros. Buscamos sempre um atendimento humanizado e receptivo para os clientes, aliado à constante sintonia com os dados clínicos para se obter um resultado confiável e a satisfação dos pacientes e médicos.

A Aliança Diagnósticos busca garantir a satisfação de nossos clientes, oferecendo um serviço de qualidade. Manter as atividades de parceria com empresas fornecedoras em prol de crescimento conjunto. Oferecer aos seus empregados, oportunidades de desenvolvimento profisisonal e finalmente comprometendo-se sempre e continuamente com a melhoria dos serviços prestados, para fazer desta empresa sinônimo de confiança e qualidade.

Sano Technologies is reshaping body composition assessment and disease diagnostics through our disruptive technology capable of revealing localised composition imbalances and patterns in a four-dimensional and highly visual way.

Name: ТОО «INVIVO» (Инвиво)
Description:
Лаборатория «INVIVO» была создана в 2007 году как высокотехнологичная лаборатория, применяющая инновационные методы не только в процессе выполнения анализа, но и на протяжении всего сервисного цикла. На сегодняшний день лаборатория проводит более 800 видов медицинских лабораторных исследований.

Миссией лаборатории является предоставление качественных лабораторных услуг по доступной цене, в тех местах, где раньше получить многие виды качественных лабораторных исследований было затруднительно.

Лаборатория «INVIVO» - первая в центральноазиатском регионе лаборатория, имеющая сетевую региональную структуру. На данный момент на территории Казахстана успешно функционируют более 400 приемных пунктов, более 600 квалифицированных специалистов.

Согласно государственным лицензиям, ТОО «INVIVO» (ИНВИВО) осуществляет два основных вида деятельности:

1. Диагностика: Лабораторная диагностика: бактериологические исследования, иммунологические исследования, общеклинические исследования, биохимические исследования, серологические исследования (ЛАБОРАТОРИЯ).

2. Первичная медико-санитарная помощь: доврачебная (ПРИЕМНЫЕ ПУНКТЫ). Производит забор биоматериалов.

Система менеджмента качества ТОО «ИНВИВО» соответствует требованиям нормативных документов ИСО 15189:2007 «Медицинские лаборатории. Особые требования к качеству и компетентности». Кроме того, система менеджмента качества применительно к услугам медицинской (клинико-диагностической) лаборатории соответствует требованиям  ИСО 9001-2015 (ИСО 9001:2015).

На сегодняшний день в Казахстане успешно функционируют более 400 приемных пунктов, 2 лаборатории (Астана и Алматы)  и 11 сателлитных лабораторий (Актобе, Кызылорда, Шымкент, Тараз, Атырау, Уральск, Семей, Талдыкорган, Актау, Павлодар). С 2013 года открыты  УЗИ кабинеты по всем регионам.

What We Do
Diagnostics:

Research Kits:
Developing and manufacturing affordable, high-quality research-use-only (RUO) kits for academic and research institutions.

Contract Research Organization (CRO):

• A 97% accurate AI diagnostic platform, trained on 36,000+ patients, live in clinics now
• A novel nanoparticle-based immune cloaking therapy (in development)

iFertility empowers clinics and doctors with data-driven tools to diagnose immune causes of pregnancy failure — and helps patients avoid unnecessary IVF and medications.

We’re backed by science, driven by compassion, and focused on solving one of the most urgent challenges in global health: the birth rate crisis.

Name: SentryDx
Description:
NexGen accurately detects cancer DNA from a simple blood draw (liquid biopsy). Cancer DNA is rare, but NexGen's technology makes detection easy. NexGen takes a blood sample and replicates the DNA, like PCR, but adds a blocker to prevent normal DNA from replicating. This allows for the enrichment and easy detection of cancer DNA.
Liquid biopsies can detect cancer up to 16 months before the current standard, which is radiological imaging. Early detection will lead to better treatment and saves millions of lives.
NexGen's goal is to receive FDA approval for diagnosing cancer from a blood draw and is uniquely positions, compared to many competitors, to meet the FDA's guidance on in vitro diagnostic regulation.

Name: Kohane Laboratory for Biomaterials and Drug Delivery
Description:
Our lab has three main broad areas of research: drug delivery, biomaterials, and nanomedicine, with considerable overlap between these. Some of our projects are driven by developing new technologies, others by trying to find cures for specific diseases. 
Some of the medical conditions that have received the most attention in our group are:

1. Pain. We have been developing agents for prolonged duration local anesthesia since 1996. We have developed drug delivery systems that provide days to weeks of local anesthesia, potentially obviating the requirement for opioids. We have also developed injectable systems that can provide triggerable on-demand local anesthesia, i.e., where the timing, intensity, and duration of local anesthesia could all be determined by the patient.

2. Ophthalmology.  In collaboration with the Ciolino lab at Mass Eye and Ear, we have developed a drug eluting contact lens platform, and demonstrated efficacy in anterior and posterior portions of the eye. We have developed nanoparticles that can be targeted to the posterior segment of the eye by photo-triggered targeting. We have studied numerous formulations for local anesthesia of the cornea. 

3. Middle ear infections. We have developed eardrops that would deliver an entire course of antibiotics for middle ear infections (otitis media). We have used the same system to provide otic analgesia.

4. Vascular malformations. We have developed nanoparticulate system to treat vascular malformations.

Other diseases we have developed treatments for include sepsis, peritoneal adhesions, and cancer are among the medical conditions that receive the most attention in our group.

Name: Subatomic Eye
Description:
1 in 10 patients—780 million people worldwide—face diagnostic errors due to outdated imaging tools (WHO, 2016). At Subatomic Eye, we solve this with quantum-powered imaging that detects diseases at the atomic level, offering 10,000x higher resolution than MRI or CT scans.  

Our Solution
Our Quantum Powered platform integrates atomic, molecular, cellular, and organ-level data to uncover hidden anomalies like misfolded proteins or mitochondrial failure. This enables earlier detection of cancers, Alzheimer’s, and drug-resistant TB, reducing diagnostic errors by 50% (simulation data).  

Global Mission
We make precision imaging portable and affordable, bridging healthcare gaps worldwide. From South Africa to global communities, we empower clinicians to "See Beyond Limits" and transform healthcare from reactive to preventive outcomes.

Name: Soluzione Salute
Description:
Il poliambulatorio Soluzione Salute di Cortemaggiore nasce nel mese di marzo dell’anno 2016 dall’idea di un gruppo imprenditoriale emiliano-veneto. Dal 2020 la Società Soluzione Salute è compartecipata al 50% dal gruppo TECO di Fiorenzuola d'Arda.
Nel mese di aprile 2017 comincia l’esperienza operativa del poliambulatorio. L’anno 2017 è stato il periodo di avviamento, nell’anno 2018 sono stati circa 2.000 i pazienti che hanno affidato la propria salute alle nostre cure. Soluzione Salute vuole essere una boutique della salute, un luogo dove il paziente può trovare una veloce e competente risposta alle proprie necessità.
Nel mese di dicembre 2020 viene inaugurato il nuovo centro radiologico in collaborazione con il Centro Radiologico Explora di Reggio Emilia. 220 metri quadrati ospitanti :
• RX tradizionale attrezzato con Flat Pannel
• TAC dedicata al massiccio facciale – tecnologia CONE BEAM. 
• RX panoramica dentale.
Nel periodo legato alla pandemia Covid-19 il poliambulatorio ha saputo offrire, fra i primi in Emilia-Romagna, il servizio di detectazione del virus, divenendo punto di riferimento per la provincia di Piacenza.
Nel mese di marzo 2021 si avvia una nuova e qualificante collaborazione con il gruppo Fisioterapia FermiLosi. 
Nel mese di luglio 2022 Soluzione Salute inaugura il punto prelievi in Fiorenzuola d’Arda, via f.lli Magni n°2 presso TECO Dal 4 luglio 2022 in tutti i punti Soluzione Salute si applica il prezzo esami del sangue dettato dal nomenclatore pubblico AUSL, offrendo la sanità privata allo stesso prezzo della sanità pubblica.
Oggi operano presso il poliambulatorio 26 medici specialisti, selezionati seguendo una regola fondamentale: ricercare quelle doti umane e professionali capaci di convincere noi stessi ad affidare loro la nostra salute. Nel 2022 oltre 5.000 ci hanno affidato la loro salute.

Name: Noval Diagnostic
Description:
Noval diagnostic është një laborator mjekësor që ofron një shërbim laboratorik diagnostik të plotë dhe me një cilësi shumë të lartë në përputhje të plotë me normat dhë praktikat më të mira europiane. Ne ofrojmë një gamë të gjërë analizash biokimike klinike të cilat ju sigurojnë mjekëve dhe pacientëve të tyre te dhëna të sakta dhe të sigurta për diagnostikimin dhe vlerësimin e gjëndjes shëndetësore të tyre.
Noval diagnostic ofron gjithashtu edhe gamën më të plotë në vend, të analizave mikrobiologjike.  Ekspertiza e avancuar në interpretimin e të dhënave ju sigurojnë mjekëve dhe pacientëve të tyre, të dhëna shumë të sakta dhe të besueshmë, për diagnozën e infeksioneve të shkaktuara nga bakteret, viruset, mykrat dhe parazitet e ndryshëm.
Izolimi dhe identifikimi i më shumë se 100 baktereve me rëndësi klinike nga kampionet e ndryshëm klinikë si dhe testet e tyre të ndjeshmërisë bëhen me teknologjinë më të avancuar aktuale. Diagnoza e sëmundjeve virale si një nga diagnozat më të vështira dhe më të kërkuara, realizohet me dy mënyra: duke zbuluar gjurmët që lëne ato në organizëm pra duke matur titrin e antitrupave specifike ndaj virusit, si dhe duke përdorur teknologjinë bashkohore të zbulimit dhe amplifikimit te acideve nukleike ARN apo ADN c’ka mundëson dhe matjen e ngarkesës virale për një sërë virusesh.
Aplikimi i teknologjive të reja bashkëkohore si rt-PCR e kanë përmirësuar ndjeshëm diagnozën e sëmundjeve infektive. Përmiresimi konsiston në realizimin e analizave që zbulojnë dhe identifikojnë njëkohësisht patogjenë të shumtë të cilët lidhen me sindromat klinike si: infeksione të sistemit nervor qëndror, infeksionet e sistemit respirator,  infeksionet gastrointestinale si dhe infeksione të sistemit urogenital.
Këto teste multiplekse apo sindromike shkurtojne kohën e diagnozës laboratorike, ulin koston e përshpejtojnë vendim-marrjen klinike.
Noval diagnostic marrjen falas të kampioneve biologjike edhe në vendin e punës apo të banimit të mjekëve dhe pacientëve të tyre.

Name: Üç Gen Tıp Laboratuvarı
Description:
Tıbbi tahlil laboratuvarımız İzmir'de biyokimyasal tetkikler, meslek hastalıkları ve doku tiplendirme testlerini gerçekleştirmek üzere 3 donanımlı birimden oluşmuştur.

Doku Tiplendirme Laboratuvarında organ nakli gereken hastalara ve vericilerine (kemik iliği ve böbrek nakli) ait testler yapılmaktadır.

Tıbbi tahlil laboratuvarımız doku tiplendirmede Ege Bölgesi ve İzmir'in ruhsatlı tek özel laboratuvarıdır.

HLA Class I ve Class II antijenleri DNA bazlı PCR tekniği ile gerçekleştirilmektedir. Crossmatch, Panel Reaktif Antikorlar ve Flow Sitometrik ölçümler de yine bu bölümde yapılmaktadır.

Behçet Hastalığı, Ankilozan Spondilit, Romatoid Artirit, Çölyak, tip 1 Diabetes Mellitus için de ilgili HLA antijenleri saptanabilmektedir.

Biyokimyasal tetkikleri bölümünde: rutin biyokimya, endokrin, hematoloji, ilaç düzeyleri, tümor belirleyiciler, seroloji, immunoloji, idrar ve vücut sıvıları analizleri yer almaktadır.

Meslek Hastalıkları Laboratuvarında:

İşçi sağlığı ve güvenliği çerçevesinde yapılması gerekli olan ve endüstri çalışanlarına yönelik spesifik testler gerçekleştirilmektedir. Bu bölümde Atomik Absorbsiyon Spektrofotometresi ile Kurşun ; Bakır Alüninyum gibi izelementlerin yanı sıra Türkiye' de sayılı Laboratuvarda çalışılan Kadmiyum, Krom, Nikel, Cıva, Selenyum gibi ağır metaller de ölçülebilmektedir.

Ayrıca gaz kromatografisi ile kanda benzen, toluen, xylene, n-hegzan gibi uçucuların yanı sıra aldehid, keton, glikol gibi toksik maddeler ölçülebilmektedir.

Bunların dışında; İşyerinde yoğun olarak kullanılan farklı kimyasal etkenlere göre yapılması gereken ilgili testlerde tarafımızdan yapılabilmektedir.

Name: GeneCheck
Description:
GeneCheck removes the ‘trial and error’ approach to prescriptions, saving you time and money, and avoiding potential side effects.

Using an internationally-validated PCR test system, on a single saliva sample, we’ll analyse a specific small set of genes that are known to interact with commonly prescribed drugs. The results will deliver clear insights for you and your doctor.

This will help you to tailor what medications are prescribed to you, and at what dosage, based on your unique genetic makeup.

As a result, you’ll see fewer side effects and lower risk of adverse reactions to your medications. This is the future of healthcare.

Name: SinuesLab
Description:
Did you know that every time you exhale you are releasing thousands of molecules into the ambient air? Breath is a diagnostically underexploited body fluid, which contains valuable bio-chemical information about health status. 

However, nowadays very few diagnostic tests rely on exhaled air. Our mission is to reverse this situation by uncapping the potential that breath analysis holds as a non-invasive method to assist in clinical decision making. To do this, we use modern analytical platforms combined with sophisticated computational tools. In particular, we use modified mass spectrometers, which have been designed to sense exhaled molecules at minute concentrations. Since the analysis requires no sample-preparation or manipulation, the diagnostic result can be obtained nearly in real-time. This technology is especially well suited for children due to its non-invasive nature.

Name: MLUA Oranienburg e. V.
Description:
Die Milchwirtschaftliche Lehr- und Untersuchungsanstalt Oranienburg e. V. (MLUA) hat die Aufgabe, die in der Milchwirtschaft erreichten Leistungsstandards durch Lehre, Untersuchung, Beratung und Forschung zu erhalten und zu verbessern. Aus der Verflechtung dieser Tätigkeitsfelder ergeben sich hohe Synergieeffekte, die die MLUA zu einer kompetenten Kontaktstelle für alle am Verkehr mit Milch und Milcherzeugnissen beteiligten Kreise machen.

Seit Gründung im Jahr 1992 arbeiten wir in der industriellen und öffentlichen Auftragsforschung und -untersuchung. Unser akkreditiertes Dienstleistungslabor bietet ein breites Spektrum standardisierter chemisch-physikalischer, mikrobiologischer und sensorischer Analysen an. Zudem führt die MLUA Qualitätsprüfungen nach bundes- und landesrechtlichen Bestimmungen durch und berät die zuständigen Stellen in fachlichen Fragen. Für Betriebe, auch und insbesondere der handwerklichen Milchverarbeitung, besteht die Möglichkeit der ständigen Beratung im Rahmen der monatlichen Güteprüfung.

Die MLUA ist für das Einzugsgebiet der neuen Bundesländer und Berlin die zentrale überbetriebliche Ausbildungsstätte für die staatlich anerkannten Ausbildungsberufe Milchtechnologe/-in und Milchwirtschaftliche/r Laborant/in. Zudem werden Vorbereitungslehrgänge zum Milchwirtschaftliche/n Labormeister/in und Molkereimeister/in, externe Qualifizierung nach § 45 (2) BBiG sowie verschiedene Fortbildungsveranstaltungen angeboten.

Weiterhin werden mit dem Ziel der Optimierung der Produktqualität und der Verbesserung der analytischen Qualitätssicherung an der MLUA anwendungsbezogene Forschungsarbeiten durchgeführt. Diese orientieren sich an den Erfordernissen des Marktes, des Lebensmittelrechts und der Gesundheitsfürsorge für den Verbraucher.

Besuchen Sie uns auf unserer Website: https://www.mlua.de/

Name: Opus Genomics
Description:
At Opus Genomics, we are dedicated to advancing the understanding and treatment of autism and neurodevelopmental disorders. Our mission is driven by a deep commitment to making a positive impact on the lives of individuals and families affected by these conditions.

What sets us apart:
- Expertise: Our team of scientists, geneticists, and researchers specializes in the genomics of neurodevelopmental disorders, bringing a wealth of knowledge and experience to our work.
- Innovation: We are at the forefront of genomic research, employing the latest technologies and methodologies to explore the genetic underpinnings of autism and related conditions.
- Empathy: We understand the unique challenges faced by individuals with autism and their families, and our research is driven by a desire to improve their quality of life.
- Collaboration: We actively partner with clinicians, advocacy groups, and the broader scientific community to enhance our collective understanding and find solutions that matter.

Through cutting-edge genomics testing and research, we aim to uncover the genetic factors contributing to autism and related neurodevelopmental disorders, leading to more accurate diagnostics and targeted therapies. 

Connect with us to explore collaborative opportunities, stay informed about our latest discoveries, and be part of a community dedicated to autism and neurodevelopmental research and support.

Name: Midwest Veterans' Biomedical Research Foundation
Description:
Midwest Veterans' Biomedical Research Foundation, (MVBRF) is a non-profit corporation associated with the Kansas City VA Healthcare System, Wichita VA Healthcare System, and VA Eastern Kansas Health Care System. In 1988 Congress authorized the department of Veterans Affairs medical centers to establish nonprofit foundations. The purpose of these foundations is to facilitate the receipt and administration of private sector funds for the support of VA research and education. 

Since November 1988, our purpose has been to facilitate research and educational programming by connecting governmental entities, industry, and foundations to the VA medical centers in Kansas City, Leavenworth, Topeka and Wichita connections support basic, clinical and outcomes research that directly benefits Veterans clay and in the future.

Our research is conducted through grants issued by the National Institutes of Health (NIH), the Department of Defense (DoD), National Cancer Institute (NCI), Foundational Partners like the Alzheimer's Association and the Patient Centered Outcomes Research Institute (PCORI), and through pharmaceutical industry studies and philanthropic.

MVBRF serves the needs of our participants, researchers, and the medical community at large. We provide an array of services including grant and business management, human resources and clinical research support. Our employees provide the needed expertise for basic and patient centered research. They are the research technologists, scientists, nurses and clinical study coordinators supporting the VA doctors and other staff in their search for innovative diagnostic and therapeutic cures for many diseases and illness - especially those that affect our Veterans.

Name: Institute of Applied Health Sciences (IAHS)-Medical College
Description:
Institute of Applied Health Sciences (IAHS) was founded in 13 May 1989 with 42 students by prominent National Professor Dr. Nurul Islam, an iconic figure in the field of Medical Education in Bangladesh, South Asia and the world. The institution has accorded recognition by Bangladesh Medical and Dental Council on 12 July 1990 and Chittagong University allowed the students to be enrolled and appear in the first professional examination in 1991.It continued to function as an institute under University of Chittagong till early 1992. University of Science and Technology Chittagong (USTC) was established as a Private University soon after Private University Act 1992 came into force when IAHS became its constituent body under Faculty of Medicine. Institute of Applied Health Sciences (IAHS) got affiliated with Chittagong Medical University in 2017.
The academic plan of MBBS program at IAHS is based on Bangladesh Medical and Dental Council (BM&DC) approved course and curriculum in which lectures are supplemented by tutorials, demonstrations and practical laboratory assignments. As per the BM&DC requirements and guidelines, IAHS strictly maintains the teacher Students ratio. Renowned and experienced faculty members are involved in the teaching, learning and assessment process. According to the National Quality Assurance Scheme, all academic activities and developments are ongoing in this institution under the regulation of the Government of People’s Republic of Bangladesh. Yearly training on- Methodology of teaching, Student’s performance Assessment, Methodology of Research is being provided to improve and enhance the professionalism of all teachers. In their own journals, IAHS faculty members could publish their research articles. As well as there are weekly seminars, monthly integrated teaching program of each phase for the continuous betterment of the academic performance of the students and teachers.

Description:
BI CAP s.r.l.s. offre soluzioni avanzate per la tracciabilità sicura e autonoma di campioni biologici, farmaceutici e materiali sensibili, basate sulla tecnologia di identificazione a radiofrequenza (RFID).

La nostra gamma di prodotti RFID SMART consente la tracciabilità e la gestione ad alta precisione di un'ampia varietà di campioni biologici, sia all'interno di strutture quali laboratori, biobanche e ospedali, sia durante il trasporto, garantendo prestazioni ottimali fino a temperature di -192°C.

Grazie alle nostre soluzioni hardware e software brevettate, forniamo un accesso immediato e completo alla cronologia di ogni singolo campione, ottimizzando la gestione e la sicurezza dei dati.

-

BI CAP s.r.l. provides sophisticated solutions for the secure and autonomous tracking of biological samples, pharmaceuticals, and sensitive materials, leveraging radio frequency identification (RFID) technology.

Our RFID SMART product portfolio facilitates high-precision tracking and management of a diverse range of biological samples, both within controlled environments such as laboratories, biobanks, and hospitals, and during transit, ensuring consistent performance at temperatures as low as -192°C.

Through our proprietary hardware and software applications, we offer immediate and comprehensive access to the historical record of each individual sample, thereby optimizing data management and security protocols.

En nuestro laboratorio de biología molecular, nuestra principal misión es llevar a cabo investigaciones de vanguardia y proporcionar servicios de diagnóstico de alta calidad en áreas específicas de la biología molecular. Nos enorgullece ofrecer un conjunto especializado de servicios que se centran en la secuenciación genética, el diagnóstico de la influenza aviar y la detección de fitopatógenos virales.
 
Secuenciación Genética: Utilizamos tecnología de secuenciación Oxford Nanopore Technologies, secuenciación de última generación que permite analizar secuencias genéticas con un alto nivel de precisión y rapidez. Esto es esencial para una amplia gama de aplicaciones, desde la identificación de mutaciones genéticas hasta la caracterización de genomas completos.
 
Diagnóstico de Influenza Aviar: Como parte de nuestro compromiso con la salud pública y la sanidad animal, ofrecemos servicios de diagnóstico de influenza aviar. Nuestro laboratorio está autorizado por el Servicio Agrícola y Ganandero y cuanto con un equipo de científicos altamente capacitados para detectar y caracterizar los virus de la influenza aviar,  fundamental para el control y la prevención de brotes en aves de corral y la salud de la población.
 
Detección de Fitopatógenos Virales: En el ámbito de la agricultura y la fitopatología, comprendemos la importancia de mantener las plantas sanas y proteger los cultivos. Nuestro laboratorio está especializado en la detección de fitopatógenos virales que pueden afectar negativamente  los cultivos de vides. Utilizamos técnicas moleculares aprobadas por el SAG, con tiempos de respuesta excepcionales.

Name: SeqDiagnostics
Description:
SeqDiagnostics is transforming respiratory infectious disease diagnosis through innovative genomic solutions. We are dedicated to providing clinicians with the rapid, comprehensive, and actionable insights needed to improve patient outcomes and advance precision medicine.

Our Mission is to revolutionize respiratory infectious disease diagnosis by providing clinicians with rapid, comprehensive, and actionable genomic insights that improve patient outcomes and advance precision medicine.

We are developing a proprietary next-generation sequencing (NGS) platform designed to revolutionize how clinicians diagnose respiratory infections. Our technology leverages cutting-edge genomics and bioinformatics to analyze genetic material directly from a respiratory sample. This allows for the comprehensive detection of bacteria, viruses, fungi, and atypical pathogens in a single test.

Respiratory infectious diseases represent a significant global healthcare burden. Traditional diagnostic methods often fail to identify the causative pathogen in 40-60% of cases, leading to delayed or incorrect treatment, increased healthcare costs, and poor patient outcomes. SeqDiagnostics was founded to close this diagnostic gap.

Our platform provides a single-assay solution with broad pathogen coverage, superior sensitivity, and a rapid turnaround time, enabling faster, more accurate treatment decisions when time matters most. We are committed to developing tools that seamlessly integrate into clinical workflows, empowering clinicians to make critical decisions with confidence.

We envision a world where every patient with a respiratory infection receives the most accurate diagnosis possible, enabling optimal treatment decisions and better health outcomes.

Name: PreDx, Inc
Description:
PreDx has created a groundbreaking class of bioresponsive contrast agents (BCAs), revolutionizing the gene therapy industry by offering real-time, non-invasive monitoring of gene expression in living organisms. Our proprietary MR probes can detect repaired or inserted gene expression products and produce measurable changes in contrast, thereby providing invaluable insights into biodistribution and activity levels of your gene therapies. Importantly, our technology negates the need for sacrificing animals to gauge treatment distribution, a breakthrough with ethical and longitudinal advantages.

Even as the gene therapy market grows, challenges persist, particularly in efficacy evaluation and safety monitoring, areas where PreDx's technology can offer unparalleled advantages:

Risk Mitigation: Early-stage confirmation of gene expression, its efficiency, and spatial distribution could significantly reduce the uncertainties involved in gene therapy development.

Cost-Effectiveness: By enabling real-time imaging and 3D mapping of transgene expression, PreDx's BCAs can considerably cut both time and costs, especially in high-value primate studies where you can reduce the number of animals needed.

Enhanced R&D Capabilities: Our BCAs can easily adapt to monitor multiple enzymes or other targets, offering a versatile tool that can accelerate Caribou BioSciences’ already robust research initiatives.

Data Integrity: Our technology allows for longitudinal studies on the same animal, ensuring data consistency and reducing variables that might skew your results.

At Biogenesis Healthcare, we are a fast-growing organization driven by a team of experienced professionals in the in-vitro diagnostics industry. Our expertise spans sales, marketing, applications, and service support, delivering innovative and reliable diagnostic solutions to labs and hospitals across India.

We specialize in a wide range of high-quality reagents and niche testing parameters — including unique biochemistry special tests like ADA, ACE, G6PDH, Ferritin, Ceruloplasmin, IgE, and sTfR — along with advanced protein diagnostics such as Free Light Chains, Beta-2 Microglobulin, C1q Complement, C1 Esterase Inhibitor, and many more from our European partners.

Through strategic alliances with globally recognized manufacturers like Medicon Hellas (Greece) and Trimero Diagnostics (Spain), we bring cutting-edge technology and proven performance to Indian laboratories. Our goal is to make specialized testing accessible and affordable, even in smaller towns, thereby supporting early diagnosis and better patient outcomes.

Our nationwide presence includes a strong distributor network and a dedicated team of sales, service, and product support personnel, ensuring fast turnaround and expert assistance at every step.

We are committed to shaping the future of diagnostics by combining scientific knowledge with automation know-how — delivering solutions that improve lab efficiency, accuracy, and impact on human health.

Name: KingoBio Inc.
Description:
정확한 진단은 치료와 예방의 핵심입니다.
언제 어디서든 정확한 진단이 가능한 솔루션을 제공함으로써
우리의 가족을 지키는 글로벌 생명공학 기업으로 도약하고자 하는 주식회사 킹고바이오입니다.

저희 회사 구성은 20~30대로만 구성되어 있는 젊은 벤처기업입니다.

저희의 업무수행 원칙은 아래와 같습니다.
1. 실행은 수직적! 문화는 수평적
2. 잡담을 많이 나누는 것이 경쟁력이다.
3. 휴가나 퇴근시 눈치주는 농담을 하지 않는다.
4. 보고는 팩트에 기반한다.
5. 일의 목적/기간/결과/공자를 고민하며 일한다.
6. 책임은 실행한 사람이 아닌 결정한 사람이 진다.
7. 가족에게 부끄러운 일은 하지 않는다.
8. 모든 일의 궁극적인 목적은 '고객만족'과 '이윤창출'


[Our product 1. GraBeads]
GraBeads is core product which can enrich the bacterial pathogens in blood without blood culture, so there are two advantages compared to competitors as follows: 
>	First, the yield of obtained nucleic acid can be increased up to 100 times. 
>	Second, the purity of obtained nucleic acid also can be increased owing to the removal of diagnostic inhibitors in blood.

[Our product 2. K-SL DNA extraction kit]
The K-SL DNA extraction kit is a composition of reagents that are used to extract DNA from bacteria that are bound to GraBeads. These reagents can be used alone without GraBeads. When used with GraBeads, the performance of extraction increases more than 10 times. It is registered as a first-grade medical device with the MFDS and is also available as a Research use only (RUO) product. The kit configuration is as follows:
	Lysis buffer
	Binding buffer
	Magnetic silica beads
	Washing buffer I
	Washing buffer II
	Elution buffer

[Our product 3. GraBon system]
The GraBon system is an automated system that uses GraBeads and the K-SL DNA extraction kit to extract bacteria DNA from blood. Currently, it can process up to 4 samples simultaneously, and the whole process is possible within 50 minutes. The GraBon system has a Multi-well kit with 9 different wells, and the GraBeads and K-SL DNA extraction kit reagents have been injected inside each well. This Multi-well kit is disposable and enables the opportunity for ongoing revenue generation.

Description:
SpiraCheck is a start-up focussed on developing a multi-cancer early detection breath test for improved cancer survival.  Through identification of volatile organic compounds (VOCs) it is intended that the SpiraCheck algorithm will be able to rule-out gastrointestinal and other cancers through one test.  

SpiraCheck is a spin-out from Imperial College, London and the work of Professor George Hanna and his team.  The SpiraCheck test is being developed to improve the five-year relative survival for gastro-intestinal cancers by increasing the rate of early detection.  At the same time, the test should decrease the number of invasive diagnostic tests through better prioritisation, thereby reducing the financial burden of healthcare systems.

Name: Rapid Biosensor Systems Ltd
Description:
Development of disposable, low cost and accurate rapid tests for infectious diseases.  Our TB Breathalyser is a proven disposable diagnostic device for screening of active infectious Tuberculosis (TB) in rural settings where resources are minimal.  Over 50% of people tested for TB cannot easily produce sputum samples, the RBS TB Breathalyser is used to collect a cough sample and so it does not require a sputum sample.

The TB Breathalyser has been successfully tested in field trials in India and Ethiopia, with sensitivity and specificity results >95%.  The TB Breathalyser containing a patient's cough sample is inserted into the RBS portable, battery-operated optical reader to reach a result in 2 minutes.  The reader uses standard optical componentry from a well-established supply chain to enable high volume manufacturing of this low cost TB diagnostic.

The TB Breathalyser antigen test hardware and TB assay system are protected by patents which have been granted in many countries.

The RBS bio-optical platform can be adapted for developing other rapid diagnostic tests including bovine TB testing on Farm.

Infectología Molecular: Identificamos y caracterizamos patógenos a nivel molecular, permitiendo un diagnóstico temprano y eficaz de enfermedades infecciosas.

Marcadores Celulares: Analizamos características celulares específicas, facilitando la detección y monitoreo de enfermedades hematológicas y neoplásicas.

Nuestro compromiso con la calidad, la ética y la innovación nos impulsa a seguir avanzando en la investigación y aplicación de las mejores técnicas, trabajando en estrecha colaboración con médicos, investigadores y especialistas para mejorar continuamente nuestros servicios  y contribuir al avance de la ciencia.

Description:
Tech Doctor transforms daily data obtained from wearable devices into insights and realizes data medicine. Using data, we aim to provide appropriate medical care tailored to each individual, support those involved, and create a world where people can care for each other.

SelfBase - A platform that quickly visualizes and analyzes continuous, long-term data from multiple wearable devices and medical equipment without hassle. It is also possible to analyze data in conjunction with questionnaires, etc.

We develop digital biomarkers and realize remote support of medical care using data.

What is a digital biomarker?

A biomarker is an item or substance in the body that indicates the presence or absence of a disease, changes in the condition, or the effectiveness of treatment. Until now, these biomarker data were “point data” that were measured only when people visited a medical institution, and the presence or absence of a disease and its progress could only be determined at that time.

However, advances in digital technology have made it possible to obtain continuous, long-term "line data" daily without any stress using smartphones or wearable devices. Digital biomarkers are indicators that visualize changes in diseases and treatments based on this digital information.

Suppose data such as exercise, sleep, and heart rate can be obtained outside medical institutions. In that case, it will be possible to understand changes in condition in more detail and provide optimal care (personalized medicine) tailored to each individual.

Name: Paradigm Labs LLC
Description:
We know what's a stake when you drug test a patient.

Paradigm an independent, CLIA-accredited clinical laboratory, accredited by the College of American Pathologists (CAP),  specializing in high complexity clinical toxicology testing. Paradigm is nationally certified Women’s Business Enterprise through the Greater Women’s Business Council (GWBC), a regional certifying partner of the Women’s Business Enterprise National Council (WBENC). 

Our expert team of laboratory professionals utilizes state-of-the-art LC/MS/MS instrumentation to provide reliable, precise toxicology results that healthcare providers can trust. While we offer traditional LC/MS/MS “confirmation” testing following provider-facilitated or performed immunoassay “screening,” most of our clients use one of our Benchmark testing platforms: Benchmark OFT (oral fluid) and Benchmark UDT (urine). Benchmark tests are cost-effective and meet payor medical necessity guidelines for coverage and reimbursement of drugs of abuse testing. Our Benchmark tests return the power of solid clinical decision making to you – the healthcare provider. There are no guessing games or reporting delays typically associated with a traditional immunoassay to LC/MS/MS testing platform.

Visit our website for more information!

O objetivo do IF Lab é capacitar você, e os profissionais de saúde que o orientam, a tomar decisões baseadas em evidências, ajudando a promover uma vida mais equilibrada com foco na medicina integrativa, funcional e preventiva.

No IF Lab, a ciência encontra a inovação para entregar resultados que fazem a diferença. Nosso laboratório oferece uma gama abrangente de exames que permitem que você aborde medidas preventivas ou de tratamento de forma personalizada.

Entre em uma era de saúde sem precedentes com o IF Lab. Mergulhe na medicina de precisão onde você é o foco.

Com nossos testes genéticos e moleculares avançados, relatórios detalhados e a praticidade de fazer seus exames por meio de uma simples autocoleta em casa, personalizamos sua jornada para uma vida mais saudável.

 Não é apenas sobre genética, ciência e tecnologia… é sobre entender a si mesmo, cuidar do futuro da sua família e adaptar soluções para seu estilo de vida único.

Viva a excelência em saúde com o IF Lab!

Con el constante avance de la Biología molecular, nuestro Departamento de genética ha desarrollado un amplio espectro de servicios entre los que se destacan los analisis de filiacion para determinar los vinculos de paternidad, maternidad, hermandad completa e incompleta, tío sobrino, abuelo-nieto.  Además de los análisis de filiación, nuestro Departamento de Genetica, realiza analisis genomicos, como es el Test de ADN prenatal no Invasivo, para detectar anomalías cromosómicas a partir de la semana 10 de embarazo como tambien analisis de la predisposición genetica de cancer hereditario. Además de lo anterior hemos desarrollado distintos perfiles para identificar intolerancias alimentarias, por medio de la predisposición genetica, asi como tambien el analisis nutrigenetico, que nos permite entender cómo funciona tu metabolismo, cómo reacciona tu organismo a los diferentes macro y micro nutrientes, cómo estimular tus diferentes capacidades físicas para mejorar tu rendimiento y cuáles son tus mejores recursos para perder peso
Nuestro departamento Industrial realiza el análisis de agua, tanto fisicoquímico como bacteriológico. Ha incorporado tambien el perfil cromatográfico del aceite de cannabis, que permite evaluar el contenido de cada uno de los cannabinoides con utilidad farmacológica.

Name: WISH | Women Intimate Shelter - Unipd
Description:
Il progetto WISH (Women Intimate Shelter) è un gruppo di ricerca multidisciplinare del Dipartimento di Scienze Biomediche (DSB) dell'Università degli Studi di Padova che si dedica allo studio degli effetti della violenza da partner intimo (IPV) sulla salute delle donne.

La nostra missione è andare oltre i segni visibili, svelando i meccanismi fisiologici e molecolari con cui il trauma si traduce in un danno biologico, in particolare a livello cerebrale e cardiaco.

Il progetto si propone di:

 Sviluppare e perfezionare un modello sperimentale per studiare gli effetti sistemici dell'IPV.
 Mappare i meccanismi molecolari che collegano l'esperienza traumatica al danno d'organo, con un focus su cervello e cuore.
 Identificare e testare strategie terapeutiche innovative, sia farmacologiche che comportamentali, per prevenire o mitigare il danno.
 Validare le scoperte ottenute nel modello animale attraverso studi su donne vittime di IPV, per garantire che i risultati siano trasferibili e rilevanti.
 Diffondere attivamente le conoscenze generate per formare professionisti, sensibilizzare la comunità e potenziare le strategie di prevenzione.

Name: LICOS Scientific GmbH
Description:
Ein Tag im Labor kann manchmal ziemlich hektisch und fordernd sein.

Habe ich alle meine Proben und Reagenzien vorbereitet?
Sind meine Tubes und Platten alle da?
Habe ich alle meine Geräte für meinen Versuch da und Betriebsbereit?

Wer wünscht sich da nicht einen kompetenten Partner, welcher sich um die Beschaffung der entsprechenden Verbrauchsmaterialien kümmert, die entsprechenden Geräte beschafft oder bei der Umsetzung neuer Projekte unterstützt.
Sei es nun beim nächsten händischen Versuch oder dem nächsten Automatisierungsprojekt.

Hier unterstützen wir Sie mit unserer Erfahrung, Tatkraft und unserem großen Netzwerk.

Sie möchten ihre Verbrauchsmaterialien unkompliziert und ohne der Sorge eines Lieferengpasses, aber Trotzdem zu einem fairen Peis - Das übernehmen wir für Sie.

Sie sind auf der Suche nach einem neuen Laborgerät und benötigen Hilfe bei der Auswahl und den Verhandlungen mit dem Hersteller - Das übernehmen wir für Sie.

Sie planen einen Ablauf zu Automatisieren oder eine neue Automationsanlage im Labor zu implementieren, Möchten sich aber auf einen unabhängigen Partner und dessen Expertise in der Laborautomatisierung verlassen - Das übernehmen wir für Sie.

Sie wünschen sich einen persönlichen Kontakt und kein Anonymes Anfrageformular.
Dann Sind Sie bei uns richtig!
Unsere Telefonnummer ist kein Geheimnis. Denn oft ist in einem kurzen Telefonat ein Anliegen schnell geklärt.

Name: Project BIOCAN
Description:
"Examining the diagnostic potential of multimodal biomarkers for the detection of colorectal cancer"

The main goal of our study is to identify new, reliable biomarkers for the early detection of colorectal cancer, in order to improve the prognosis and treatment outcome of these patients.

This project was approved for financing by the Ministry of Education, Science and Innovation within the Competition for co-financing of national scientific research projects, and was fully financed by the Ministry.




"Ispitivanje dijagnostičkog potencijala multimodalnih biomarkera za detekciju kolorektalnog karcinoma"

Glavni cilj našeg ispitivanja je identifikacija novih, pouzdanih biomarkera za rano otkrivanje kolorektalnog karcinoma, kako bi se poboljšala prognoza i ishod liječenja ovih pacijenata.

Ovaj projekat odobren je za finansiranje od strane Ministarstva prosvjete, nauke i inovacija u okviru Konkursa za sufinansiranje nacionalnih naučnoistraživačkih projekata, i u cjelosti je finansiran od strane Ministarstva.

Name: Histo Color Excelência em Histologia
Description:
A Histo Color está no mercado não para competir, mas para elevar o padrão existente, focando sempre na melhoria contínua das práticas laboratoriais. Nossa missão é fornecer soluções que aprimorem a qualidade das colorações histológicas, e estamos sempre abertos a esclarecer dúvidas de técnicos, analistas e médicos sobre falhas e procedimentos de aprimoramento. Acreditamos que a qualidade é o principal diferencial que podemos oferecer, e estamos comprometidos em ajudar nossos clientes a alcançar os melhores resultados possíveis

Oferecemos kits personalizados de alta qualidade, treinamentos especializados e compartilhamos dicas valiosas diretamente em nosso perfil no LinkedIn. Entre nossas principais colorações, destacam-se:

- **Tricrômico de Masson:** Diferenciação de tecidos conjuntivos, colágeno e fibras musculares.
- **Perl’s Prussian Blue:** Identificação de depósitos de ferro.
- **Reticulina:** Demonstração de fibras reticulares.
- **Grocott:** Detecção de fungos, como Pneumocystis jirovecii.
- **Ziehl-Neelsen Tradicional:** Visualização de bacilos ácido-resistentes com fundo azul.
- **Ziehl Modificado com Fundo Amarelo:** Adaptação inovadora da Histo Color, que oferece melhor contraste para a detecção de pequenas quantidades de bactérias.
- **Fit Faraco Tradicional:** Método eficiente para coloração de microrganismos, com fundo azul.
- **Fit Faraco com Fundo Amarelo:** Outra inovação da Histo Color, esta adaptação proporciona uma visualização aprimorada em amostras críticas.
- **Coloração de Gram:** Diferenciação entre bactérias Gram-positivas e Gram-negativas.
- **Alcian Blue:** Demonstração de mucossubstâncias ácidas.
- **P.A.S. com e sem Diastase:** Detecção de glicogênio e outras substâncias.
- **Alcian Blue com P.A.S.:** Combinação para a diferenciação de mucossubstâncias ácidas e neutras.
- **Verhoeff:** Coloração de fibras elásticas.
- **Vermelho Congo:** Identificação de amiloide.

Name: Radiant Dx
Description:
Few realize that the abundance of information (genomic sequence, expression profiles, epigenetics, and functional assays) suffers from data entropy with no direct relationship between measures.  

This confusion of causal relationships significantly hinders progress in oncology, immunology, developmental/systems biology, and beyond.

Our advanced multi-scale platforms at Radiant Dx, powered by Claritas technology, bridge this gap with exceptional cellular resolution. This platform enables researchers to map dynamic tissue level interactions, reveal whether mutations drive disease or shape responses, and accelerate breakthroughs. 

We are committed to transforming biology through structured multi-omics data (DNA, mRNA, protein, epigenetics, and function) for AI-driven predictions, pioneering organoid innovations for precision cancer diagnostics, drug discovery, and biological insights.

Name: CAPRIN1 Foundation
Description:
Welcome to Our Caprin1 Page!

Caprin1 is a crucial yet often overlooked protein that plays a significant role in cellular function and neurological health. Our mission is to raise awareness, share research, and build a supportive community for those affected by Caprin1-related conditions.

What is Caprin1? Caprin1 (Cell Cycle-Associated Protein 1) is an essential protein involved in RNA regulation, cell growth, and brain function. Recent studies suggest its importance in neurodevelopmental disorders and neurodegenerative diseases.

Our Goals:

•	Spread Awareness: Educate the public about the role of Caprin1 in health and disease.
•	Support Research: Share the latest scientific findings and advancements.
•	Build Community: Connect individuals, families, and researchers who are affected or interested in Caprin1-related conditions.

How You Can Help:

•	Follow & Share: Help us reach more people by spreading the word.
•	Engage & Discuss: Participate in discussions and share your experiences.
•	Stay Informed: Keep up with the latest research and developments.

Together, we can make a difference by increasing understanding and support for those impacted by Caprin1-related conditions. 

Thank you for joining our cause!

Description:

If so, I invite you to experience relief and assistance with our extremely reliable solutions! 

WHY SHOULD YOU CONSIDER EASY WAY DELIVERY SERVICES, LLC?

1. Physical limitations: maybe collecting samples for testing and administering can be challenging for residents with limited mobility or who are bedridden.
2. Staffing Shortages: Limited nursing staff may struggle to dedicate sufficient time for thorough wound assessments and comprehensive care plans. 
3. Complex Wound Etiologies: Besides pressure ulcers, common in nursing homes, wounds can arise from various causes, each requiring specific treatment plans.
4. Outbreak Management: Respiratory illnesses, UTIs, and COVID-19 can spread quickly in congregate settings like nursing homes. This can make it difficult to contain outbreaks.

REASONS TO CHOOSE EASY WAY DELIVERY SERVICES, LLC TO SUPPORT YOUR NURSING HOME
1. Easy Way Delivery Services, LLC has partnered with MB Medical Labs to provide doctors, nurse practitioners, and technicians to administer test and treat patients on-site at your facility.
2. Easy Way Delivery Services, has years of medical courier experience. You can be confident that your patient's samples and specimens will be delivered promptly and in excellent condition and you will have results in 24 to 48 hours. All results will be assessable through an MB Medical provide portal. 
3. Our onsite wound testing and wound care will free up your current nursing staff to focus on other patients. This will eliminate the need and reduce the costs of transporting patients to and from a hospital.

Name: Syncromed Diagnósticos
Description:
Fundada em 2013, pelas Biomédicas Leila Delgatto e Queila Freitas Vieira, a Syncromed nasceu para preencher uma importante lacuna no mercado diagnóstico, vislumbrada pelos mais de 30 anos de experiência de uma de suas sócias em laboratório de análises clínicas.
Ser um laboratório especialista em saúde ocupacional, promovendo um atendimento rápido e com logística diferenciada na entrega de resultados para clientes como empresas e medicinas ocupacionais, foi inicialmente o foco da Syncromed Diagnósticos.

Ao longo do tempo nos transformamos, sempre em busca de nossa melhor versão e com o objetivo de servir com excelência e crescer cada vez mais, ampliamos nossa visão de atendimento e hoje a Syncromed é um centro de diagnósticos que presta serviços nas áreas de análises clínicas, toxicológicas, exames complementares, testes genéticos e vacinas. 

É nesse espirito de inovação constante que a Syncromed busca se destacar como Centro Diagnóstico na cidade de Guarulhos.

Hoje, nossa estrutura é capaz de proporcionar atendimento personalizado as necessidades de nossos clientes, tanto para empresas de pequeno e grande porte que necessitam de agilidade no cumprimento de seus programas de saúde ocupacional quanto para os clientes que buscam um atendimento diferenciado no cuidado de saúde individual.

Nossa missão é agregar valor individual ou coletivo na saúde da comunidade a nossa volta, sendo a qualidade técnica e o prazo de entrega reduzido de resultados é prioridade!

Name: MyHealthUmbrella
Description:
MyHealthUmbrella puts all your health information safely in one place...your smartphone. Using new AI technology, it can diagnose ailments and diseases earlier than ever before.  Early diagnosis of disease is the key to a healthy long life.  We mix your health history, your health device data, your genetics and your current symptoms to project the most likely reason for a health problem. Your complete health picture is under one Umbrella.When you do go to the doctor, you are more fully informed and can help them do their job better.  MyHealthUmbrella also recommends doctors in your area that specialize in the specific issues you may be having.  A healthy body and peace of mind makes life happier....and better. 
Take charge of your life and health.
Get the the right doctor for your unique issue.
Early diagnosis is the key to curing most diseases, especially cancers and infections.MyHealthUmbrella was created in a public/private partnership with a Silicon Valley University.  Top researchers in Medicine, AI, Mathematics, Computer Science and Data Science have participated.MyHealthUmbrella utilizes the full power of your smart phone and high speed wireless technologies.  Put peace of mind in your pocket with MyHealthUmbrella.

Name: Ultrasound Consultants International LLC
Description: Ultrasound Consultants International's mission is to decrease the incidences of maternal mortality and preventable deaths in the emerging world. Medical afflictions such as DVTs, Cirrhosis, Kidney disease, poor circulation and strokes all lead to high rates of pre-mature death in developing countries.  We aim to use portable diagnostic ultrasound examinations to detect and report on these disorders.  Ultrasound Consultants International focuses on training local country residents on the art of diagnostic ultrasonography.  Once trained, we equip the new trainees with the ultrasound machines and supplies needed to provide quality service.  This allows for the aiding of marginalized, disadvantaged and rural communities.  Training locals promotes country ownership and civic pride, which increases sustainability and drives economic growth.  And the skills learned from our training are teachable and transferrable, which makes it scalable and maintainable.  We train, equip and expand, then leave the local residents to chart their own course with locally-driven solutions.

At Trace Scientific, customer satisfaction is at the heart of everything we do. Our team of knowledgeable experts is committed to delivering personalized support and technical expertise, helping you select the best solutions for your specific needs. Whether you're seeking guidance on product selection or technical advice, we’re here to assist every step of the way.

Trace Scientific is your dedicated partner in scientific advancement, combining quality, reliability, and exceptional service to empower your research and innovation.

Name: BioDrop Solutions
Description:
BioDrop Solutions is pioneering non-invasive neurological diagnostics through advanced tear-based microRNA profiling. Our innovative hydrogel contact lens technology captures and preserves tear fluid biomarkers, enabling early detection of gliomas and other neurodegenerative diseases with a simple, comfortable collection process.

Headquartered in Riga, Latvia, we combine cutting-edge biomaterial engineering with AI-powered analytics to deliver high-sensitivity, sample-to-answer diagnostic solutions. By integrating next-generation molecular analysis with patient-friendly sampling, BioDrop empowers clinicians to diagnose life-threatening conditions earlier, improving treatment outcomes and survival rates.

Our team comprises neuroscientists, biotech executives, and medical device innovators dedicated to transforming neurological diagnostics. We are currently advancing through clinical validation, scaling manufacturing partnerships, and preparing for regulatory approvals to bring this technology to market globally.

Mission: To revolutionize neurological diagnostics through non-invasive, accessible, and accurate biomarker detection.

 Contact: contact@biodropsolutions.com

Name: Redwood Bio
Description: Redwood Bio is pioneering an Alzheimer's test that can detect the disease in its early stages using a simple blood sample.  Redwood’s paradigm-shifting technology is capable of detecting Alzheimer's up to 15 years before symptoms appear, with a sensitivity that is 100-fold higher than the most advanced diagnostic instruments currently available. Redwood's Alzheimer's test has the potential to become the standard of care due to its ease of use, cost effectiveness, and ability to significantly improve patient outcomes. Beyond Alzheimer's disease testing, Redwood's technology could revolutionize the medical diagnostics industry by replacing the gold standard ELISA tests with its 100,000-fold higher sensitivity, faster assay times, and lower cost.  Redwood Bio is based in California and is headed by scientists and engineers with decades of experience in research and development from MIT and UC Santa Cruz.

Name: Praxisnetz Humangenetik Deutschland
Description:

Zum Praxisnetz gehören aktuell vier humangenetische Einrichtungen. Diese erbringen eigenständig und eigenverantwortlich medizinische Leistungen in Form von genetischen Sprechstunden sowie genetischer Labordiagnostik und sind über ganz Deutschland verteilt.

Jede teilnehmende Praxis des Praxisnetzes steht Ihnen somit sowohl lokal als auch bundesweit als Partner in der humangenetischen Versorgung Ihrer Patienten zur Verfügung.

Ziel des Praxisnetzes Humangenetik Deutschland ist es, den Stellenwert der klinisch orientierten Humangenetik in der medizinischen Versorgung sowohl für andere Fachgruppen als auch gegenüber Patienten darzustellen und zu vertreten. Dabei kommen im Sinne eines Querschnittsfaches humangenetische Fragestellungen in jedem medizinischen Fach vor und gewinnen immer mehr an Bedeutung. Die Diagnostik an der individuellen Fragestellung des Patienten und seiner Familie auszurichten sowie die interdisziplinäre Patientenbetreuung sind zwei unserer wesentlichen Ansätze.

Name: Onset DNA
Description:
Onset DNA is a tech-enabled, mobile-first DNA collection and testing services company supporting legal, clinical, and institutional workflows with speed, accuracy, and regulatory integrity.

Headquartered in Houston and expanding nationwide, we partner with law firms, healthcare providers, government agencies, and community organizations that require reliable, court-ready, and medically sound DNA testing, without the operational burden of traditional lab-based models.

Our services include legal relationship testing (paternity, kinship, probate, CPS matters), non-invasive prenatal DNA testing, immigration DNA testing, and select genetic screening services. All legal testing is processed through DNA Diagnostic Center (DDC), an AABB-accredited laboratory, ensuring strict chain-of-custody standards and admissible documentation.

Onset DNA operates at the intersection of Healthcare Services, Health IT, and Legal Infrastructure. Our mobile-first delivery model, HIPAA-aligned digital intake and documentation, and trained collector network allow us to support both individual cases and higher-volume DNA testing needs, without compromising compliance, turnaround time, or client experience.

Od roku 1993 poskytujeme špičkové služby klinickým pracovištím i farmaceutickým firmám, a to nejen v České republice, ale i mezinárodně.
Naše laboratoř kombinuje tradiční patologickou odbornost s nejnovějšími technologiemi, včetně sekvenace nové generace (NGS), metylace genomu a algoritmů umělé inteligence pro vyhodnocování vzorků. Ročně zpracováváme stovky tisíc vzorků a podílíme se na vývoji nových diagnostických metod i léčiv. Spolupracujeme i s předními světovými institucemi (např. Mayo Clinic, Memorial Sloan Kettering) a naši odborníci spoluvytvářejí klasifikace WHO pro různé typy nádorů.

Founded in 1993, Bioptic Laboratory has grown into one of the largest and most advanced pathology laboratories in Europe. With a team of over 300 professionals, it provides comprehensive cytological, histological, and molecular genetic diagnostics for hospitals, private practices, and pharmaceutical companies.
The laboratory combines expert human analysis with cutting-edge technologies, including next-generation sequencing and artificial intelligence, to deliver precise and personalized diagnostic solutions. Its research activities contribute to global medical advancements, including the development of targeted cancer therapies.
Biopticka Laborator is a trusted partner in clinical diagnostics and applied research, offering high-tech infrastructure, subspecialized expertise, and a commitment to innovation.

Name: AnaclinGene
Description:
A AnaclinGene é um laboratório de genética que se destaca pela excelência técnica, inovação e compromisso com a saúde de precisão. Nossa trajetória é marcada pelo pioneirismo no setor genético brasileiro, sempre buscando oferecer serviços de alta qualidade e parcerias estratégicas com os maiores centros de pesquisa e desenvolvimento do mundo.

Em 2020, a AnaclinGene atingiu um novo patamar ao consolidar uma parceria exclusiva com um dos mais avançados laboratórios israelenses. Essa colaboração nos permitiu incorporar tecnologia de ponta na análise genética, elevando o nível dos exames oferecidos no Brasil, Portugal e Estados Unidos. A tecnologia desenvolvida em Israel proporciona uma taxa de precisão superior a 98,5%, garantindo diagnósticos confiáveis e de alto impacto clínico.

Nossa infraestrutura combina o mapeamento genético da plataforma Illumina GSA (Infinium Global Screening Array) e a análise da base de dados WGS (Whole Genome Sequencing), possibilitando a leitura precisa de mais de 99% dos SNPs mapeados. Além disso, a AnaclinGene se diferencia por oferecer um sistema exclusivo de Inteligência Artificial (IA), que aprimora a interpretação dos exames, incluindo leitura em sentido positivo e negativo—uma inovação única no mercado global.

Com um modelo de distribuição exclusivo no Brasil, estamos redefinindo os padrões da genética aplicada à saúde, oferecendo testes preditivos, de auxílio diagnósticos precisos e soluções personalizadas para pacientes e profissionais da área médica. Nosso compromisso é transformar a medicina de precisão em uma realidade acessível, promovendo saúde, longevidade e qualidade de vida.

Xuunu is also working on a biosensory skin patch that continuously captures internal bio-signals to deliver real-time, proactive health intelligence and personalized early warnings. We are building seamless integrations with smart medication bottles and messaging platforms.

Detection of deviations from established Biosignature, caused due to physiological and psychological events will lead to insights and recommendations to the users. This way we can transforms unstructured actions into actionable data, that can help in medication adherence, ascertaining its continued efficacy, and synchronizing with EHRs and care teams in real time.

Xuunu is laying the foundation for a future where technology doesn’t just respond to illness — it helps prevent it. 

We are leading AI diagnostics with creating unique biosignature.

Description:

Ein umfassendes Portfolio an allgemeinem Laborbedarf komplettiert unser Angebot. Durch unsere langjährige Erfahrung am Markt wissen wir, mit welcher Ausstattung sich Ihre spezifischen Aufgaben bestmöglich realisieren lassen.

Im Life Science-Bereich geht es um Genauigkeit, Sorgfalt, Sicherheit und Verlässlichkeit. Aber es geht auch um Schnelligkeit und Ergebnisfokussierung. Ganz gleich, ob in Forschung, beim Qualitätsmanagement oder in der Produktion. Damit im Labor mehr möglich wird, liefern wir die richtige Technologie und Verbrauchsmaterialien.

Auch im Service begleiten wir Sie – solange Sie es wünschen

Wir verstehen unsere Arbeit als Begleitprozess, bei dem wir jedes Detail Ihrer Anforderungen bedenken. Das beginnt bei der Auswahl der Produkte und Materialien über die Unterstützung bei der Nutzung bis hin zur Wartung von Laborgeräten. Begleitung meint, dass wir als Ansprechpartner mit Ihnen auf Augenhöhe sprechen, von Spezialist zu Spezialist, dabei immer erreichbar sind und mit einer Lösung im Gepäck schnell vor Ort. So können wir gemeinsam mit Ihnen auch maßgeschneiderte Sonderanfertigungen entwickeln. Wir wollen auch im Service mehr möglich machen. So bedeutet Begleitung für uns auch, dass wir defekte Laborgeräte instand setzen, wenn sie von einem anderen Anbieter erworben sind.

Für spezifische oder weiterführende Fragen können Sie uns gerne direkt kontaktieren.

Name: Fertility Phoenix
Description:
Fertility Phoenix offers access to testing for HHV-6A, a DNA virus causing an infection in the uterus of almost half of women with unexplained infertility, compared to 0% of fertile women.

We provide this access with Covee, an at-home menstrual fluid collection kit, and the only non-invasive way of testing.

With HHV-6A infections of the uterus, there may be no noticeable symptoms other than infertility.

Why hasn’t anyone heard of it? Testing wasn’t easily accessible, it is highly specialized and required a uterine biopsy before the developement of Covee. Uterine HHV-6A infections are NOT detected in blood or saliva. 

Consequently, this is the most overlooked virus in infertility, preventing an estimated 1.25 million births in the U.S. annually. Our goal is to raise awareness about HHV-6A and empower couples to take control of their fertility journey.

Name: Biomed Training
Description:
Who are we?
Biomed Training was developed by Biomedical scientists who knew the challenges of graduates without any knowledge of practical laboratory work. We wished to do something for enthusiastic future scientists who can progress into their chosen field with the skills we provide them through our course. Our team consists of Biomedical Scientists with over 10 years combined experience within the NHS and also the private sector.

What we do?
We have been training in Histology for 2 years and we are now introducing a Blood sciences . This includes learning the core skills required for technicians to work/locum at a band 3 or 4 level within the NHS. The band 4 roles are also known as Associate Practitioner roles within the private sector.

Why are we training?
Our staff has worked in numerous laboratories and noticed a common weakness. Laboratories are understaffed and overworked to focus on training their staff members and so progression is very slow and can take up to 2-3 years in some case. Our trainers are very enthusiastic about teaching and loves to spread his knowledge.

What can I do with my qualification?
Once you complete the course you will receive a certificate from Biomedtraining which verifies your training. You could then begin applying for band 3 or 4 roles. We also have dedicated recruitment agents scouring roles for our students with competitive rates of pay.

Aim: 
Our long-term goals are to ensure our students can advance their careers and go onto earn more through higher paying roles. Biomedtraining is passionate about advancing their students careers and endeavor to assist them even after the training.

Objective: 
To deliver outstanding training to students and assist laboratories who are understaffed.

Name: ExOcular Dx, Inc.
Description:
About Us
ExOcular is revolutionizing the management of severe eye diseases. We're developing a portfolio of blood-based multiplex tests built on exosome-based, disease-specific biomarkers. These tests provide early, and actionable insights, paving the way for personalized and transformative patient care. We empower physicians with unparalleled insights to deliver earlier, more effective treatments. 

The Impact of Severe Eye Disease
The incidence and prevalence of severe eye diseases increase as people age. Our initial focus is on patients with early- to intermediate-stage age-related macular degeneration (AMD) and diabetic retinopathy (DR)— the leading causes of blindness. 

Age-Related Macular Degeneration (AMD)
The macula is crucial for central vision. AMD is a progressive retinal disease and a leading cause of irreversible blindness in people over 60. About 20M Americans have been diagnosed with AMD, 3x the number of patients with Alzheimer’s. Worldwide, 300M cases are projected by 2040. 

Diabetic Retinopathy (DR)
BR is the most common complication of diabetes and the leading cause of blindness for Americans aged 25-74. About 9.6 million Americans, or 26% of patients with diabetes, are affected by DR.

Our Solution
Early Diagnosis
Diagnostic testing is especially important for people over 50 and diabetics who are at higher risk for developing eye diseases. ExOcular results can help optimize referrals to ophthalmologists and drive intervention earlier.

Progression Prognosis
A test to risk-stratify patients could guide early intervention.

Treatment Monitoring
Serial testing can optimize dosing schedules and indicate if medications need to change. This strategy personalizes treatment, enhances health outcomes, and saves costs on ineffective specialty drugs.

Name: Test4 Cancer
Description:
Introducing Test4 Cancer, offering Genetic Screening tests for Prostate Cancer directly to your home. 

Our Genetic Screening test identifies men at high risk of developing prostate cancer, this is identified by detection of fault genes which are known to increase risk. Our test is a simple saliva test that can be carried out in the comfort of your own home or at one of our clinics. 

Prostate cancer is often left undetected due to having no signs and symptoms in the early stages. This means the disease can grow and progress to a stage where curative treatment is not possible. Approximately 10-15% of men with prostate cancer develop life threatening, aggressive tumors that sadly can spread to an incurable stage. 

Detecting the gene within your body early can prevent and reduce the disease severity and extend life prospects.

A high proportion of males in the high-risk category carry faulty inherited repair genes and survival amongst this group is approximately only 50% of that of men with no genetic mutations. The presence of these faulty genes allows us to identify the risk of developing prostate cancer. Patients who are at risk of developing prostate cancer can benefit from increased surveillance and preventative steps to better manage the disease. 

The optional Clinical Pathway at Test4 can, not only provide information based on early detection through the test4 Genetic Screening Test , but also provide clinical support and options for further tests and referrals as needed. This support is provided by independent, qualified Consultant Urologists.

Paramedical Courses are specialized healthcare programs that train individuals to work in various allied health professions. These courses focus on providing support to medical professionals and assisting in patient care. Paramedical professionals play a crucial role in the healthcare industry and work closely with doctors, nurses, and other healthcare practitioners.
Radiology technician courses are educational programs that train individuals to operate medical imaging equipment and perform diagnostic imaging procedures. These programs typically range from one to four years in duration. They cover topics such as anatomy, radiographic techniques, patient care, and radiation safety. Students gain hands-on experience through clinical rotations in healthcare settings. After completing the program, graduates may need to obtain Licenced or Council Registration to practice as radiologic technologists. Specializations in areas like CT, MRI, and mammography may be available.
It's important to note that the details of radiology technician courses can vary depending on the educational institution and the country in which the program is offered. If you're interested in pursuing a radiology technician program, it's recommended to research and contact specific institutions to obtain the most accurate and up-to-date information about their courses.

Name: IMPLANTATPATHOLOGIE
Description:
Leistungsspektrum
1. Produktentwicklung:
Beratung und Begleitung bei der Entwicklung neuer Implantate oder Modifikationen in Hinblick auf die zu erwartenden Interaktionen zwischen Implantat und Zielgewebe. Beratung bei der Studienplanung und entsprechenden Antragsverfahren. Unterstützung bei der Anfertigung produktbezogener wissenschaftlicher Publikationen. 
2. Produktoptimierung:
Beratung zur Produktoptimierung unter pathologischen und biologischen Aspekten der Biokompatibilität. Es werden modernste morphologische
Untersuchungsverfahren zur Beurteilung von Materialeigenschaften und Körperreaktionen angeboten. Neben konventionell histologischen und
immunhistochemischen Untersuchungsverfahren, bestehen Möglichkeiten
zur Hartgewebsuntersuchung, stehen 2D- und 3D-Digitalmikroskopie sowie
Elektronenmikroskopie mit Elementanalyse (EDX-Analyse) zur Verfügung.
3. Schadensanalyse:
Untersuchungen von Verlustimplantaten mittels Digitalmikroskopie und Rasterelektronenmikroskopie mit Elementanalyse (EDX-Analyse). Ferner
Untersuchungen vom Interfacebereich sowie histologische und immunhistochemische Untersuchungen des periimplantatischen Gewebes. 
4. Serienkonstanz-Untersuchungen:
Untersuchungen von Implantaten und Biomaterialien vor Implantation auf
Konstanz im Produktionsprozess. Diese Untersuchungen dienen der Qualitätskontrolle des Fertigungsprozesses mit makropathologischer Begutachtung der Implantateigenschaften und Oberflächenstruktur mittels Digitalmikroskopie und Elektronenmikroskopie.

Name: Rete Diagnostica Italiana per le Piastrinopatie congenite
Description: Le Piastrinopatie Congenite comprendono un numeroso ed eterogeneo gruppo di alterazioni congenite della funzione delle piastrine, caratterizzate da manifestazioni emorragiche prevalentemente ma non esclusivamente muco-cutanee. La gravità delle manifestazioni emorragiche è variabile: in alcuni casi esse possono essere controllate facilmente, in altri casi richiedono l’intervento medico, l’ospedalizzazione e la trasfusione di concentrati di piastrine e globuli rossi. Sebbene le singole entità nosologiche siano rare, le Piastrinopatie Congenite nella loro globalità rappresentano molto probabilmente le più frequenti alterazioni congenite dell’emostasi, come è stato dimostrato da alcuni studi eseguiti in diverse parti del Mondo. Ciò nonostante, i registri ufficiali riportano una frequenza spesso inferiore a quella di altri difetti congeniti dell’emostasi, quali le sindromi emofiliche e la malattia di von Willebrand. Questa discrepanza è dovuta principalmente alla complessità dell’iter diagnostico delle patologie piastriniche. In Italia sono pochi i centri specializzati nell’esecuzione delle numerose e delicate indagini diagnostiche specifiche. Spesso i pazienti vengono indagati presso centri non specializzati che non possono approfondire le indagini e non sanno a chi riferire i pazienti per il completamento dell’iter diagnostico. Anche i centri più specializzati molto raramente possono dotarsi di tutte le potenziali indagini di laboratorio necessarie. La Rete Diagnostica Italiana per la Piastrinopatie Congenite sorge con lo scopo di censire i centri italiani dedicati alla diagnosi delle Piastrinopatie Congenite e di favorirne l’interazione e la collaborazione. Il buon funzionamento della Rete Diagnostica non solamente permetterà l’identificazione di un maggior numero di pazienti e, conseguentemente, una loro migliore gestione clinica, ma farà anche da catalizzatore della crescita culturale dei centri partecipanti, uniformandone l’attività allo stato dell’arte.

Name: Frigg medica
Description: Frigg medica selur og framkvæmir skimanir og rannsóknir á vímuefnum í líkamsvessum, þ.e. þvagi, munnvatni og blóði. Auk þess er í boði sérfræðiráðgjöf í vali og úrlestri/túlkun rannsókna. Annars vegar er um að ræða skyndipróf sem hægt er að framkvæma og lesa úr á staðnum, hins vegar nánari rannsóknir á rannsóknarstofu. Hægt er að taka sýnin sjálf(ur) eða láta okkur gera það. Hjá okkur starfa geðlæknar og hjúkrunarfræðingar með mikla reynslu af greiningu og meðferð fíknisjúkdóma, en auk þess höfum við stuðning lyfjafræðinga og sérfræðilækna í vímuefnarannsóknum. Rannsóknir okkar hafa allar nauðsynlegar vottanir til þess að halda fyrir dómi og hafa ítrekað gert það í Evrópu og á norðurlöndunum. Við bjóðum þessa þjónustu á mun betra verði en hingað til hefur tíðkast hér á landi.

Name: Laboratorio Lespi
Description:
Fundado en 1997, Laboratorio Lespi es un centro de estudios anatomopatológicos dedicado a contribuir al bienestar de nuestros pacientes mediante el diagnóstico de última generación en patología y biología molecular.

En Laboratorio Lespi, reconocemos la importancia de obtener resultados rápidos y confiables. Trabajamos en estrecha colaboración con los equipos médicos, asegurando informes detallados y precisos en el menor tiempo posible.

Ofrecemos una amplia gama de técnicas diagnósticas, incluyendo biopsias, citologías, inmunohistoquímica, PCR. Con estas herramientas, obtenemos información detallada y precisa sobre el perfil genético y molecular de los tumores, lo que nos permite personalizar los tratamientos y ofrecer opciones terapéuticas más efectivas.

Entre nuestros servicios ofrecemos:
- Estudios de biopsias
- Citologías: estudio de PAP y detección de HPV por PCR para diagnóstico de infecciones.
- Inmunocitoquímica mediante el equipo automatizado BenchMark GX Ventana de Roche. Estudiamos distintos paneles oncológicos y ofrecemos resultados de calidad en escaso tiempo.
- Estudios intraquirúrgicos y congelaciones
- PAAF: orientación en la toma de muestra y estudio de punciones aspirativas con aguja fina.

Laboratorio Lespi cuenta con la última incorporación: el equipo BenchMark GX Ventana de Roche. Este equipo de alta tecnología nos permite ofrecer resultados confiables, reproducibles y de altísima calidad, orientando a los oncólogos al tratamiento adecuado para cada paciente. Ofrecemos análisis de paneles para cáncer de mama, colon, pulmón, melanoma, tiroides, SNC y enfermedades hereditarias.

Con más de 30 años de experiencia en el mercado, en Laboratorio Lespi seguimos trabajando con un criterio innovador y dedicado a la salud, liderando la identificación temprana de patologías para el bienestar de las personas.

Name: HEALTHFAME DIAGNOSTISCH SERVICES PVT LTD
Description:
HealthFame is a pioneering initiative that aims to bridge the healthcare gap between urban and rural areas in India. Our mission is to provide high-quality diagnostic services to the underserved population residing in Tier-2, Tier-3 cities, and rural areas. We believe that everyone, regardless of their geographical location, should have access to reliable and affordable healthcare services.
One of the primary reasons for the disparity in diagnostics between different regions in India is the lack of resources, including well-equipped laboratories and qualified medical personnel. This shortage often compels individuals from rural areas to travel long distances to avail themselves of even basic diagnostic tests. This not only incurs additional expenses but also causes inconvenience and delays in obtaining crucial healthcare information.
HealthFame addresses these challenges by establishing a robust and efficient ecosystem of accessible diagnostic services. We bring advanced laboratory facilities closer to the people, eliminating the need for unnecessary travel. Our network of diagnostic centers in Tier-2, Tier-3 cities, and rural areas ensures that individuals can conveniently access a wide range of tests without compromising on accuracy or timeliness.
At HealthFame, we prioritize accuracy and integrity in every step of the diagnostic process. We employ qualified and experienced technicians to perform the tests and maintain strict timelines to deliver reliable results. Our commitment to quality ensures that patients receive accurate diagnoses, enabling them to make informed decisions about their health.
Moreover, HealthFame strives to make diagnostic services affordable for all. We understand that cost can be a significant barrier to accessing healthcare, especially for economically disadvantaged individuals. Through strategic partnerships and optimized operational efficiency, we aim to provide cost-effective testing solutions without compromising on quality.
